title: ALL HAIL THE POWER OF JESUS' NAME
details:
. (S.S. 203, 3RD TUNE) EDWARD
PERRONET.1726-1792 REV. 19:16. J. ELLOR.1819-1899
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesu Ahzhei tammatoide, Rakot meina rata (2 times) Pumpiigo tam matoisana, Ratade,
rata rata, Ratade Pumpii sagong go.

2. Sazyi poumei jaangpii teipyi, Pumpii go ratade. (2 times) N'go lungsyisa keikapyi, Ratalo,
rata rata, Ratalo Pumpii Ahgotei.

3. Sazyi pouryi meihang teina, Matalo Pumpii go. (2 times) Nyi meihang kok kumwosana,
Ratade, rata rata, Ratalo Pumpii Ahgotei.

4. Sating gam pichii ngoutangle, Nyihang mah Sagong go, (2 times) Meihangpii tam
matoitude, Ratade, rata rata, Ratalo Pumpii Ahgotei

title: ALL HAILTHE POWER OF JESUS!
details:
(C.W. 252) CORONATION EDWARD PERRONET, REV.
19:16. OLLIVER HOLDEN,
KEY G. With dignity, in moderate time.

title: ALL PEOPLE THAT ON EARTH
details:
. (SS.9) THOMAS KEN,1637-1711 From the GENEVAN
PSALTER. Arr. by LOUIS BROUGEOIS.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouto lung kaleihang, N'tah rangaa tei kasuisa, Pumpii doi gong kalu tchiilo,
Pumpii Jesugo ratade.

2. Pumpii Jesu Ahbai teipii, Nyi meihang go chyitat pyile, Ahna kasui pyisa leile, Chiitak
pyisa makot pyile.

3. Tammatoisa Ahda liitlo, Ahna kamui latpyi tangle Rok sagoisa tammatoilo, Taksupiina
tammatoilo.

4. Satoi kapyi Pumpii gotei, Sakou chyi kangeilui hangna, Tam matoide Pumpii gotei Pfiinaa
Rangii matei zheito.

title: ABIDE WITH ME
details:
. (S.S.297) LUKE 24:29. H.F. LYTE, 1793-1847 W.H.MONK.1823-1889
KEY E FLAT. In moderate time.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii Jesu n'goh kasuipyilo. Tinghum kamyiki n'goh toisulo, Meikakina n'goh toi eikido!

Pumpiina toisupii kasui pyilo.

2. Mik hiit hangki to n'goh jupyilo, Kahem teina n'goh ngamwo tangle; Kaset kalak n'tah
rangaa kito, Pumpii nangroile nyigo keikabui.

3. N'goh kasuisa leihum dwipokna, Jukarou meigo Ina ngambuile, Katei goteido Ina
hingmakle; Sating gamto kadoutang Pumpiigo!

4. Ina jyimaang katuki karyidwi; Gohdato bamsana koipyi tangle, Kavai kahum teito
gongkiisana, Taido ringdo Pumpiina keipyitang.

title: ALL TO JESUS I SURRENDER
details:
. (A.H. 50) MK. 10: 28. REBECCA S. POLLARD. D. B.
TOWNER,1850-1919
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Jesuda I pyi eitakle gohmah kalei matumpii, Ahgo lungsyile, malumsa Ina ringkalei taatei,
I Pyi eitakle… I pyi eitakle… Gohmah kaleihang Pumpii daka pyi eitakle.

2. Jesuda I pyi eitakle kok kumsa rataleile, Goma peebang gongliit sa gohbam n'tak
doumatulo.

3. Jesuda I pyi eitakle poisa gomah tchiipyilo, Rangii mateina dengpyilo, Nangna gohda
bampyisa.

4. Jesuda I pyi eitakle gohpum matum pyi eitak Lungkasyi teigoh maangpyisa gosatoi
doumatulo.

title: AWAKENING CHORUS
details:
. (C.S.S.283) PS. 97:1. CHARLOTTE G.HOMIER, 1856-1932 CHAS
H.GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Tuhlo, tuhlo, n'tah mahlii tei tchiilo, Tuhlo, tuhlo, sazyipou bam hangki shiimatulo, Tuhlo
kamyi tinglang tahng takle, Kavai tei godato ngou matulo.

(Male voice) : Azang kabi ningkam kabi, Bamlyi kiteito ka n'tah mah. Liitei tchii n'joilo. Full
Harmony : Pumpii Sagongna kem hangtei gahpyi takle. Unision : Ntah ntah sana saalo lii
tchii humlo.

Full Harmony : Ahtei mahum tei hango matilo, Ahmah meitei doikashyi doulakle, Pumpii
Sagong ntah ntah Pumpii Sagong tangle.

2. Laklo laklo, ka ntah pungtei laklo, Saalo saalo, kabi samtei hanggo shiimatulo, Sazyi
pouryi meimah ngamgotei, Kalui kagaa poitoi kasuta tei.

title: ALLTHE WAY TO CALVARY
details:
. (S. S. 82) LK. 23 : 33 W. G. MOYER. I. H. MEREDITH.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Gohrangii kamyi sumto kalei kaktei! Pumpiina gahpyile kem hangtei, Ahlung kasyi kavai
gohlung liitpyisa, Kamyi tchii magahsa lukeipyi.

Calvary zang gamto Pumpii teipyile, Gohkem jaangpii gokem jaangpii, Calvary zang gamto
Pumpii teipyile, Gohkem jaangpii teipyi.

2. Kem kapung Ina Pumpii peebang teito, Kem gahpyilosa mata leile, Lat manoisa kalattei
Ina shiile, Gohkem hangtei gaapyi tanglesa.

3. Pumpiina nyigo lungkasyi madatle, Zang kajyi Ahbam tei toi eisa, Nyikem jaangpii calvary
to teipyile, Kalui tchiisupii Pumpii toide.

title: A SHELTER IN THE TIME OF STORM !
details:
(S. S . 539) PS. 94 : 22. VERNON J. CHARLESWORTH.
IN "Song service",1838-? IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Nyi Bangpii koitu kadile, Nyina gongbam ntaknile Nyidoi kashyi kadoukido Nyina
gongbam ntaknile.

Oh! Jesu nyimah koitu kaditeile. Ntak bamle, ntak bamle. Oh! Jesu nyimah koitu kaditeile.

Nyina gongbam ntaknile.

2. Kavai kadi kamyi kito, Nyina gongbam ntaknile, Ngou karoumei gohing lakle Nyina
gongbam ntaknile

3. Tingkei tingrot gongtu kido Nyina gongbam ntaknile, Taksupii Jesuda leitang Nyina
gongbam ntaknile.

4. Oh! lungkasyi koitu kadi, Nyina gongbam ntaknile Koipyilo gonaa mei nyigo, Nyina
gongbam ntakn

title: ALL HAIL, IMMANUEL !
details:
(A.H. 217) REV. 5 : 12. D. R. V. SICKLE. CHAS. H. GABRIEL. 1856-
1932
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tammatoi tang Immanuel, ring kakii Pumpii gotei, Meihangna tammatoi sana gozhei
mata tangle, Keikapyi Pumpii Sagong zhei kito meihang lii tchii njoide, Sazyii pouryii kalei
hangna ntah rangaasa tammatoi, Immanuel.

 Oh; Immanuel, Immanuel
(Oh, lungkasyii Sagong gotei, oh Immanuel)
He Immanuel, Immanuel
(Nle lungkasyi Sagongle, oh Immanuel)
Lung kamajungdo teimahumdo,
(Majung tei mahumdo)
Gohmah tangle matum hangteido, matum hangteido,
Oh, Immanuel, Immanuel,
(Oh lungkasyi Sagong gotei, oh Immanuel)
He Immanuel, Immanuel,
(Nle lungkasyi Sagongle, oh Immanuel)
Sagong paryito Sagong Pumpii Immanuel.

2. Nyi toitude Immanuel, keikapyi Pumpii gotei, Sazyi pouryi kati kangou hangna n'go toile,
Keipyi kabui liitei tchiisana kalui tchiisupii ratatang, Keikapyi liitei meihangna tchiisana
tammatoi tude, Immanuel.

3. Tammatoilo Immanuel Sagongmah Sagong gotei, Ngoukarou go kunam takle satando tei
gahle’ Kakui kamaa kashyi kemhangtei kadiiki rattoi eitakle, Ahzheikito meihangna
kangamtei saade tammatoide, Immanuel.

title: ABUNDANTLY ABLE TO SAVE
lyrics:
1. Cross paryito teikapyipii Pumpiigo, Ahnaa sapii mpougo kamalum mei, Hakalaang tei
kagah tchiimatu lakle, Sadoi bikaki tei kisa leiloitang.

He kangsanaa mei Pumpiina latsa lei, Aha kalaang tei meikagaa tchiimakle, Ahmah
zaiteipii kemhang tchiimagaa pyi, Aha kalaang tei gaa kalei tchiimakle.

2. Kareiki teito Pumpii sagong mahsam, Tamkabam sam kamalum meigo teina, Kalui kagah
rangii teina kasuitang, Karing doutangle Ahmah zheiki teito.

3. Kemlung teito lungranu loiwosana, Lung kamatei kamalum meihang gotei, Pumpii
Jesuna tinglang kaleita tei, Keipyi tanglesa kada tchiisa leile.

title: AMAZING GRACE
details:
. (C.S.S. 77) JOHN NEWTON,1725-1807 E. O. EXCELL.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Kamadatle! Lungkasyi ei, I kakumgo keipyi; I gahtusa, Ahna fiiwo; Mik kachet ngoutakle.

2. Lungkasyi tei douwosana, Kahing tei gahtakle; Ina malum kalu tinglang, Tam kaluni
gahle.

3. Kaset kalak bamki teito, Ina pakpat takle! Lungkasyi piina pangpyisa, Keelam pang gong
pyitang.

4. Pumpiina tampyi eitakle, Ahsam tei kalimak; Eitoi Ina Ahgo razang, Goh chiilung
matumpii.

5. Goh mah chyingei lui eisana, Chiilung keitu piinei, Ka ntah kamajung teipii, Chiilung tei
doutangle.

title: ANYWHERE, MY SAVIOUR
details:
. (S.S. 596) JN. 10 : 3. E. C. ELLSWORTH. J. H. TENNEY.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina bam hangkitei pangtat pyile, Gobai teipiina jumsa ntah matulo, Mphepii
baangwosa tuhuisa leikido, Nangna pang katat bam hangki suitangle.

 Keikapyi abam hangki tei, I gotei suitang n'go suihum tang, Pumpii nangna pangtat dichii,
Gotei sui tangle.

2. N'goh ntah matule bam hangkito, Teimahum pyisa kemtei tchiimatu makle, Gohmah
puidi tat shyisa myisa leikido, Pumpiina pangtat pyichii I hingmakle.

3. Kei kapyipii go I na rata leile, Kasang puidiki chyitat dichii moulakle, Kemteina hemsa
leikido tchiihaa pyilo, Pumpii nangna bamhangki kasui pyilo.

title: BREAK THOU THE BREAD OF LIFE
details:
. ((C.W. 461) PS. 119: 195. MARY A LATHBURY, 1841-
1913. WILLAIM F. SHERWIN, 1826-1888.
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Karing mah chiirok tei nyigo pyilo, Nyi rangii kachii kashakdo pyilo! Pumpii gotei nyina
fiihsa leile, Gohmah rangiina ringkabui samtei!

2. Goma rangii kamatei maang pyisa, Gohmikki liitsa vaipyi matulo! Teikumpiina Ido mikrak
wosa, Tamdek kaleihang Ina ngoubuile!

3. Nang karing mah rangii kachii kashak, Kamatei samtamsa, mateipyilo! N'goh karing mah
chiitaktei pyilo, Nangna lungsyi goma tei tchiipyilo!

title: “BY GRACE ARE YE SAVED”
details:
((S.S. 18) EPH. 2: 8. D. W. WHITTLE, 1840-1901 J.
MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Kamatei Pumpii ma keikapyi ma ngamtei, Kem kapung meigotei lungsyi pyisa Ahna
gongpyi.

Kamalum jaang teipiina, n'go keipyi,
Lungsyi sana keipyi takle,
Goma ngamteipii tchiiwolak,
Gohmah ngam Gohmah ngam
(Gohmah ngam gohmah ngam bikaki jaangpii mak) (2 times)
Gohmah ngam bikaki jaangpiimak,
Pumpiina kapyile Gohmah ngam bikaki jaangpiimak,
Pumpiina kapyile Pumpiina kapyile,
Pumpiina kapyile,
Pumpiina kapyile,
Kei kapyi tei.

2. Aha kalaang sam ei Jesuna tampyile, Crosski poimakii girang takle Bangpii naa gotei.

3. Ahgo Kamalum mei karing douleng tangle, Nyimei hang gotei Ahmah naamei tchiipyi
humtangle.

title: BLESSED REDEEMER
details:
(AACH. 27) JOHN 19:17,18. A. B. CHRISTIANSEN,1895-1985 H. D.
LOES,1892-1965
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Kamyi tinghum oh kavai tingchoi Zanggam tei pangpi, Calvaryki Kamaa tchiikasu Jesu
Ahgo Gohjaang piina cross gamto gile
N'goh keikapyi kalei kapyipii
Cross paryi teito mage Jesuna
Rajam pungleido zaipatsa leido
Keikapyi samtei tamsa teipyi.

2. Bangpii Ahnyigo kalei pyilo Titang sumakpiina katchiile Taituhna katang rata pyile Ahlung
kasyi tei kamadatle

3. Keikapyi piigo I lungsyile, Tammatoi kabuitei Ahsekle Sating gam katang magasupii
Gohmui piina tammatoi tangle

title: BEYOND THE SWELLING FLOOD
details:
. (S.S. 915) REV. 21 : 4. A. E. CHILDS. J. H. TENNEY
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Dwijei kadi ei majuchii, Nyikou meihang kadou tangle, Kalak kaniih mangei eisa,
Kahingtei kadouloi lakle, Dwi kadi majuchii.

Dwi kadi majuchii,
(3 times) Nyi n'nouloi lakle,
Nyihang na kadoutang ( 3 times)
Dwi kadi majuchii.

2. Doi kashyi kadoutu chiido, Malumsa sating gam kiihne; Sating rakotna katam shii,
Bangpiina mikdwi piitpyitang; Sating gam pisekchii.

3. Kanghe meigo kadou tangle, Katai meihang ringkiisana Teipiinei leimik teipiina, Nyihang
ntah njoitangle. Sating gam sazyito.

4. He n'goh koikapyi Pumpii, Bamhang kito kasuipyilo Kalui kagah tchii kasuni, Goh mikdwi
kahumtei gahtang Satinggam pisekchii.

title: “CASTINGALLYOUR CARE UPON HIM”
details:
(S. S. 878) I PET. 5: 7. C. MALAN.1787-1864 J.
MCGRANAHAN.1940-1907
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. N'go hemkatu kiteido, Koikapyi Pumpiina, Kateih Kamahum piiteina, N'go koipyi tangle.

Ahda goma matum pyilo,
 Ahda goma matum pyilo,
Pumpii lungkasyi teipiina
Pumpiina n'go koipyi tangle

2. Pumpii dateito nang kaanglo, Lung liitsa kaangdichii, Nangna kakaang matum madum,
Lungsyisa pyitangle.

3. Pumpii Jesu Khrista dato, Ratasa kaang dichii, Kalak kaniih kalei hangtei, Tchii magahpyi
buile.

4. Gongtang karam kalak jaangpii, Dachiisa lunglak tang, Pumpiina jupyi laklesa, Dapei rali
pyipo?

title: COME GREAT DELIVERED COME
details:
. (SS.462) Ps.4:17. F.J.Crosby. W.H.Doane.
Doh is G.
lyrics:
1. He keikapyi Pumpii lungsyi pyilo, Nang hum majipyilo, Pumpii n'go ratasa koileile, Nang
hummaji pyilo.

I kadhii puidiki tuthang takle,
Gokito dhiisa tutakle,
He keikapyi Pumpii goh toisulo,
Nang hummaji pyilo.

2. Kamyi puidiki gohbam gahtakle, Nang hummaji pyilo, Karing bam kavaiki panggong pyilo,
Nang hummaji pyilo. 3. Pumpii nangna n'goh mangei sulo, Nang hummaji pyilo, Kasoih
gonaa mei hangna kaang leile, Nang hummaji pyilo.

title: CROWN HIM KING
details:
. (S.S. 94)
REV. 19 : 16.
IDA A. HUSHOWER. KEY G .
R. C. WARD.
lyrics:
1. Nyihang mah Khristago ratalo!

Chiilungta Pumpiigo toihumde!

Pumpii zheito pumtei kavaitei,
Kalui gahsa toilo.

Pumpii gotei toilo toilo!

Sating gamto, Pumpiigo toitang,
Ratalo! Ratalo!

Pumpiigo toihumde.

2. Paryilam rakot toimatulo,
Pumpii mah ka ntah bamkito,
Meilui matumpii gonghum sana,
Pumpiigo ratade.

3. Pumpiina kemgotei ngamtakle,
Pumpii rangiitei liitbam dichii,
Nyihang nado teigo ngambuile,
Pumpiigo ratade.

title: COUNT YOUR BLESSINGS
details:
. (S.S. 745) EPH. 1: 3. REV. J. OATMAN JR.,1856-1922 E. O.
EXCELL.1851-1921
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Goh chiilungki doi kashyi kadou kido, Datchii tangposa nangna kamaning tei, Pumpiina
satoi kapyi maning gonglo. Pumpii lungkasyi hangkapii madatle.

 Pumpii satoi nang maning gonglo.

 Pumpii lungkasyi tei maninglo,
Kisa kisa nang maning loilo,
Pumpii lungkasyi hangkapii madatle.

2. Datchiisa nang kamasui potpung leipo? Kamage switei nang maningsa leipo? Pumpiina
satoi kapyi maning gonglo; Golung swikak swiryi katu gahtangle.

3. Kahing katchiih kalak matum madamtei, Nang maningsa teilam nleituh sulo, Pumpiina
matum madamtei tileile, Sating gam rangii mateina koipyitang.

title: CHILDREN OFTHE LIGHT
details:
. (S. S. 1117) E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 JNO. R. SWENEY,1837-
1899
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Nyihangna kavaimah naa kumpii roitatsana leipo? Myibung bung kalei tinghum lam
taatei toiham eisana, Paryilam sating gammah kito mmaang kapyi kavai, Pumpii ma
lungkasyi swikapyi kavaitei doutakpo?

 Kavai ki tatsa leipo?

Pumpii ma kavai kitei,
Jesumah zaipii mateipyisa satoi piina nyigo,
Sating gammah ahnaamei kumpii kavai tatleipo?

2. Sating gammah ahnaa meimah lung kamanoi kumsupii, Sazyi poumah kamage kalak
kemgo kasui leipo? Kamyisum lungki teito kalei rangiihang latwosa, Kalui tchiikasu kavai
sating gam pangmaang wobuipo?

3. Kavaimah ahnaamei hang! Nyihang ntahsa lii tchiide, Keikapyi paiki teito nyihang rangii
vaimatude, Teijaangpii kem kapungmei hangna pao ei shiiwosana, Sagongmah namdi kitei
Jesugo kasui liitwolo

title: COME, THOU ALMIGHTY KING !
details:
(C.W. 122) DAN 7:22 ANON.C. 1757 FELICE DE
GIARDINI,1716-1796
KEY G. Joyously, with dignity
lyrics:
1. Gonglo Pumpii Sagong, Gozheigo ratatang, Tchiiha pyilo sagoi kaki Pumpii! Katai mahum
Pumpii, Kalui gahsa nangna gong bampyilo.

2. Gong pyilo he Pumpii! Kateih mahum piina, Karatatei poisa lukei pyilo, Gosamtei gong
pyilo, Nyigo rali pyilo Rangii matei,

3. Gong pyilo He Pumpii! Gomah kamatei tei, Rashii tchiitang, nang dikaki piile, Rangiiki
liitpyisa, N'goh toipyi sulo, Rangii matei!

4. Sagoi kaki Pumpii! Kalui gahsa n'go, Tammatoi tang, go sating sazyitei, Nyihang pihsa
ngoutang, Kalui tchiisupiina, ratahum tang

title: CONSTANTLY ABIDING
details:
. (T.H. 42) ANNE. A. MURPHY., ?-1942 MRS. W. L. MURPHY
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi meina tchiipei wokalak ngam,
Kamajung tei gohlungki lei,
Kamyi sum lungteito baangneisa leikido,
Gohlung kito hingsang hinglakle.

S.P: Kasuisa bampyile, gohmah Jesu,
Kasuisa bampyile, magah supii,
Latkalei tei shiilosa lungsyisa tamlei,
Ina n'go mangei lakle mangei sang mangei lak.

Part: Kasuisa bampyile. (2 times)
Jesu gohmah, gohmah Jesule,
Kasuisa bampyile (2 times)
Magah supii magah supiina,
Kalattei shiisa mangei sang mangei mak,
Lungsyisa tamlei n'go
Ina n'go mangei lakle go mangei lakle.

2. Pumpiima lungkasyi gohlungto jutuki,
Sazyi pouryi lii katchii kum,
Kaset kalak kahing kamyiki kasuipyi,
Gahsupii kasuipyi oh Jesu.

3. Eiziika ka ntah kabitei tisupii,
Kaki ngam roina tchiisana,
Jesugo Jusana chiilung kamyi kitei,
Muipiinado tampei wolakle.

title: CHRIST AROSE!
lyrics:
1. Roukika goitakle
Keikapyi Jesu
Rou kangto bampyile
Leimik hangtum.

Roukito ringkiih takle,
Zaipatsa ngou karougo ngamle,
Ringtakle kamyikito ringkiih takle
Kalui kagah sating gamto lungtutak
Ringtakle, ringtakle
Halleluyah ringtakle.

2. Matahpii koileile,
Pumpii Jesugo;
Roukitei gahtakle;
Pumpii Jesu.

3. Kataina ngam makle,
Pumpii Jesugo;
Routei tchii rum takle
Jesu Ahna.

title: CALVARY!
details:
(S.S.116) LK. 23:33. W. M. K. DARWOOD. JNO. R. SWENEY1837-1899
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Calvary zang… gamto katai,
Jesu sekle… crossto katai
Cross paryito… kahum zaipii,
Gohkem gahpyi… zaitei piina.

Calvary zang paryi teito,
Kem jaangpii Jesu teipyile,
Calvary zang kamyi zangto,
Koikapyi Pumpii taitakle.

2. Pumpii teina… katai kaktei,
Sazyi nleih… sating myile.

Kalaam peitei… hetriit teiki.

Sating gam kamui… latpyi tak.

3. Pumpii Jesu… kada kumpii,
Nyikem jaangpii… na taipyipo?

Kalak kaniih… matum madum,
Calvary gam… to gahpyile.

title: CALLING THE PRODIGAL
details:
. (R. S. 125) LK. 15. C. H. G. CHAS. H. GABRIEL, 1856-1932
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Katam suikasu meigo Pumpiina latleile,
Risupii gonglosa Ahna latleile.

Tingnei nang Pumpiidato diisa leitutakle,
Shiipyilo lungsyisa latlei.

N'go latsa lei, Katam, suikasu meigo,
N'go latsa lei, Kalangsana gongliitlo.

title: HAVE THINE OWN WAY
details:
. (C.W. 324) Is. 2: 3. JER. 18:3,4. MISSA. A. POLLARD,1862-1934
GEO. C. STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY E FLAT. In moderate time, and like a prayer
lyrics:
1. Gomaning tchiilo Pumpii Sagong,
Iniih rangrhiile, nangna pumle
Nangna kamaning tei tchii pyilo,
Gonaa mei Nyina koisa leile.

2. Gomaning tchiilo Pumpii sagong.

Poipyilo Pumpii n'goh tingnei;
Sabwi songdo haabi matulo,
Pumpii godato I kaang leile.

3. Gomaning tchiilo Pumpii Sagong,
Rangii laksa kalei jupyilo;
Teimahum matumpii gomale,
Oh, Pumpii nangna tchiihaa pyilo.

4. Gomaning tchiilo Pumpii sagong.

Gohlung kito Khristago maning;
Meihangna ngouwo kasutatei,
Rangii mateipii kasui pyilo.

title: FALL INTO LINE
details:
. (S. S. 705) I TIM. 6: 12. WM. H. GARDNER. 1770-1853 CHAS. K.
LANGLEY.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Zangmajusa sagoi zangto,
Kabisam koitei shiile;
Gojaangpii tamkalei samtei,
Tchiigatpiina shiipyilo.

Behlo saryi tchiitang karam
Behlo saryi tchiitang karam
Latkalei bwika koitei shiilo behlo,
Christian saryimei hangtei.

2. Saryinat kasangsa leilo,
Bwika sagoisa konglo;
Kasang ngam tchiikalei meigo,
Sating gammeina julei.

3. Sana bwikatei kong loilo,
Saryilat teihsa saalo;
Jesu jaangpii, Jesu jaangpii,
Tei eikido ngam tangle.

title: BE NOT DISMAYED
details:
. (C. S. S. 262) I PET. 5: 7. MRS.CIVILLA D. MARTIN, 1869-1948 W. S.
MARTIN, 1862-1935
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Kata katalam gongkido,
Golung manou sulo,
Pumpiina gokasui pyitang.

Taksupii kasuitang.

Golung manousulo,
Nangna tatkalei hangkitei;
N'go kasui pyitang,
Pumpiina kasuitang.

2. Nangna kamarei hangteido,
Pumpiina kasuitang;
Nangna kakaang matum madum,
Pumpiina keh pyitang.

3. Kalak kaniih kadoukido,
Pumpiina tileile,
Pumpii gotei nang toisulo,
Satoitei pyitangle.

4. Kalak kaniih kadoukido,
Golung nleisulo,
Nangna maningtei pyitangle,
Swikak swiryisulo.

title: KAMATEI LII
lyrics:
2.Apwi apfiina lungsyisa latsa leitakle,
Shiipyilo n'go eitoi latsa leile
Gorangii magesa leidichii gongliit pyilo
Shiipyilo lungsyisa latlei.

3.Gonglo gopfiikito kachii kashak tchii dabam,
Kachii kashak mah hangngiki gongliitlo
Gopfii kiteito kadaa tchii bamsa koileile,
Shiipyilo lungsyisa latlei.

title: ANCHORED AT LAST
details:
. (R. S. 864) MRS. C. H. M.1862-1929 MRS. C. H. MORRIS.
KEY E FLAT. Duet-saprono &tenor:
lyrics:
1. Tinglang katahngka gorangii myi eitakle
Sazyipou kalak kaniih pungsa
Jesuda gongliitlo ntak matutangle
Kamong kakto tuiparong vaipyi

Koipyi, jupyi gohmah kalak kaniih
Matumpii gahpyile
Ahna gohmah cross masuitei poitoi pyile
Jesutei gohmah ntak bamle

2. Gahkalak tudi kangteito ntaktangle
Eitoisek Jesu douwodichii
Tingkei tingrot kateih dwijeido gonglakle
Eitoina Jesu gohmah takle.

3. Kamajung karyi lougamto ntaktangle
Teibamto Jesuna kasuitang
Lungkasyi satoi poisa teito lungtangle
Eitoina Jesu gohmah takle.

title: AND CAN IT BE THAT I SHOULD GAIN ?
details:
(H.W.C. 203) CHARLES WESLEY,1707-1788
THOMAS CAMPBELL
KEY A
lyrics:
1. Sazyi poumei chiilung humtei.

Kem sazyito nlum leile,
Khristana lungkasyi kito,
Ah! Zai teipii keipyi takle,
Teijaangpii lung ranuloide,
Lung kasyi akang sanamei,
Tingnei leimik eitoiseka,
Pumpiida tei tatliit wode.

2. Khrista nyijaangpii teipyile,
Teijaangpii pfiina lungsyile,
Ngou karoumei saryi gotei,
Pumpiina nyigo tchii hatang,
Tusatlo nyi Christian meihang,
Pumpii mah saryimei hangtei,
Tusat giimlo tusat giimlo,
Pumpii saryi meina ngamtang.

3. Pumpii gohmah I Ahmale,
Pumpii saryi meihang teina,
Teih nleisulo saryi mei,
Khristana nyidoi sattangle,
Ahpaito nyi karing meihang,
Khrista zheito nyina ngamtang,
Khrista jaangpii tusat giimlo
Keikapyi Pumpii zheikito.

4. Ahgong koiloi matulakle,
Jesu ei gohmah tangtakle,
Kasang kamajyi teipiina,
I Ahdato ringsa leile,
Khrista Gohmah Ina ngamtang,
Sagong pyihung nyi douleng tang,
Khrista dato eitoi Ina,
Sagong pyihung douleng tangle.

title: GATHER THEM IN !
details:
(S.S. 779) LUKE 14:23 F.J. VAN ALSTYNE. GEO. C. STEBBINS.
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Bammarong leile panggong keilo,
Nyi Sagongmah takbei kitei,
Pang gongsa keilo tokryi matulo,
Majyi meigo chiimatulo.

Puidi kadikito tatsa kalei,
Kem tchiisa kalei meigo;
Lungsyisa jumage pyisana,
Gahkaleigo pang gonglo.

2. Bammarong leile panggong keilo,
Katam suikasu mei jaangpii,
Maningsa nyihang lunglaksa leile.

Ahgo latloi keilak takle.

3. Bammarong leile panggong keilo,
Pumpii Ahma samtei sekle,
Lungkasyi namki tei panggong keilo,
Lungkasyi Jesu baikito.

title: ALLTHE WAY MY SAVIOUR
details:
. (S. S. 522) DUET. 8: 2. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 R.
LOWRY, 1826-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina goh pangtat pyilo, I na dapei tchii tangpo?

N'goh satoi doumatulo, Swikak swiryi matusu,
Ntah kitei liitmatulo, Malumsa Ahda liitlo
Ahda kagong meihang gotei
Pumpiina lukei pyile. (2times)

2. Pumpiina goh pangtat pyilo, I na dapei kaang tangpo?

Lungkasyi satoitei pyilo, Karing chiitak tei pyilo
Teitchii dichii majyi lakle, Kasaryido bitangle
Gohdah karing dwipok pyilo
Malumsa ntahtangle. (2times)

3. Pumpiina goh pangtat pyilo, Ina dapei kaang tangpo?

Lung kasyipii tokryi pyilo, Pumpii mah akeeteito
Gong nduikatu tinglangki, Nyina tammatoi tangle
Sating rakotgo kasuisa
Tammatoi lii tchiitangle. (2times)

title: A HOME ON HIGH
details:
. (S. S. 957) JN. 14: 3. L. W. MANSFIELD. GEO. C. STEBBINS,1846-
1945
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Leimik kaliit bamsong diisa,
Kamong songdo diisa;
Sageiti bam songdo diisa,
Sagoigam gohkee lei.

2. Kalak kaniih maju eichii,
Gohatei lui eichii,
Tingkum tinglang luikalu tei,
Keetei I gong tangle.

3. Kamage marii tinglangtei,
Ina maju eichii,
Gohrangii tei ntahtangle,
Sagah bamki gongchii.

Keekadilei meibai chemmak,
Gojaangpii tchii dabam
Bangpii ma vaikaki bamtei,
Gojaangpii tchiida bam.

4. Kaset kalak mage marii,
Matum tei toi eisa,
Satinggam kasagaa bamto,
Bangpii kasui lungtang.

title: ALTOGETHER LOVELY !
details:
(S.S. 93) G.F.R. SONG OF SOL. 5:16. G.F. ROOT,1820-1895
KEY B FLAT. Moderato
lyrics:
1. Mvii lamtei ngou kasagah namto!

Lungkasyi mei tangtang nduileile.

Teiki hakalaang lungkasyi paito,
Keikapyigo kada tamtangpo!

Oh, Ahtei tang tangdoi Sagong teile!

Teiki pungbaang Ahgo tammatoi!

Ahma “ngoukabi matum madum tei”
Kalui gaasa nyihang lii tchiitang le.

2. Lungkasyi leihum tang goh Pumpii tei!

Lungsetpii Ahna n'go latleile.

Datchiisa matapii pyi kalei tei,
Poirou humle, he gohmah rangii!

3. Pumpiina lungkasyi tokryi pyile!

Shiipyilo Ahna lungsyi latleile.

“Gonglo pot masui pungsa mage mei,
Gonglo gohdah gong ntakwolo”.

title: ENDEAVOURERS` MARCHING SONG
details:
. (S. S. 1100) EX. 14: 15. MISS FANNY J.
CROSBY,1820-1915 IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Christian saryimei kalattei shiilo,
Tanii sagong tei suitat tangpo?

Meihangna tchiigatpii Ahtei suichii,
Saryitei nyina ngamwo buile.

Tatlo saryimei Bangpiina latlei!

Doilam liitlo kaang kokryi pungsa!

Peirah tei kajatlei kavai kito,
Nyihang saryi bamki maangtude.

2. Teito saryimei bwika kongtude,
Bangpii zheito saryitei ngamde;
Pyitanglesa tamkabam sazyitei,
Tanii nyigo ngamkabui leipo?

3. Teihlo saryimei teimahum keilo,
Tinglang kaleikak teihsa toide,
 Buika kongleile teihsana saalo,
Saryi nyina ngam kabui jaangpii.

4. Saryi ngamwosa kagong piineitei,
Sating gamto Jesu kadoutang;
Daziika ntah tang Ahju ngouchii,
Kalui kagaa lungkasyi doutang.

title: CHRIST THE LORD IS RISEN TODAY
details:
. (C.W. 239) I. COR. 15:20. CHARLES WESLEY, 1707-
1788 FROM LYRA DAVIDICA, 1708
KEY C. Joyously.
lyrics:
1. Tingnei Khrista ringtakle, Halleluyah.

Sating gammei ntahle, Halleluyah.

Meinaado ntah leile, Halleluyah.

Sating sazyi hang toide, Halleluyah.

2. Lungkasyi ngam tchiitakle, Halleluyah.

Saryi tchiisa ngamtakle, Halleluyah.

Kem gaakapyi jaangpiina, Halleluyah.

Azai patloilak takle, Halleluyah.

3. Kataigo ngam wosana, Halleluyah.

Eitoina hinglak takle, Halleluyah.

Pumpii teina ringloisa, Halleluyah.

Sating gam pituhtakle, Halleluyah.

4. Sagongtei ring loitakle, Halleluyah.

Kataina ngam sutakle, Halleluyah.

Rangii jaangpii taipyile, Halleluyah.

Rou teina ngamsutakle, Halleluyah

title: GIVE ME THY HEART
details:
. (H. P. 62) E. E. HEWITT, 1851-1920 WM. J. KIRKPATRIK1838-1921
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Kasang puidigo toi eisa
Kempuidi tatsa kaleimei
Gopfiina lungsyisa latlei
Nang golung tei pyilo
Gohda (gohda pyilo)
Pyilo (go lung matum)
Golung (gohda pyilo)
Pyilo (go lung matum)
Gopfiina katamtei shiilo
Golung matum pyilo.

2. N'go kataangka toi eisa
Daziika lungkasyi latkaang
N'go eitoi latsa leile
Golung matum pyilo

3. Bikaki pfii Bangpii teina
N'go daziika lungsyipo
Gohdah golungtei pyilosa
Kamanoipii latlei.

4. He gohmah pfii Bangpii sagong
Godah I tingnei gongleile
Gohmahlunghang goda pyilei
Godah pyi eitakle.

title: DWELLING IN LOVE
details:
. (S. S. 869) 1 JOHAN. 4:16 D.W. WHITTLE GEO C. STEBBINS
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Maikating sating gamswi, Sazyi pouryi maangpyi, Pumpiina lungkasyi ei, Daziika
madatpo?

Malum... wolo
Ntah… doutang.

 Ka… daziika madatsam
Lung… kasyibam
Pumpiida lei,
Zai… pii kemtei gaapyi takle.

2. Nyigo tamrali pyilei,
 Bangpii samtei suilo;
Ryikabam samna tamle
Bangpii naa zheikito.

3. Nyina malum jaangpiina,
Ahlung kasyi doule,
Ahna calvary zangto,
Nyikem gaap

title: HIS WAY WITH THEE
details:
.(R.S.574) C. S. N. CYRUS S.NUSBAUM,1861-1937
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Jesu jaangpiina kabi ngam nang tchiihum tangpo?

Ahma kasang puidiki tat hum leipo?

Goma kamasui pottei, Ahda pyikei eisa,
Ahna pangtat matulo.

Nangna tchiitang karam ngam luisana, Longhum tangle Ahzai kamateipii, Alungkasyi teipii
n'go pangtat Ahna pangsa katattei bikile.

2. N'go keipyinesa kalattei nang shiileipo? Ahda kagong mei hang teina titangle. Pumpiigo
nangna lungsyisa lukeiwo dichii, Ahgo pangtat matulo.

3. Sagong sazyi kitei ntah kalui tchiimakle, Ahma kasangtei nangna tiwotakpo? Goma rangii
keikabui tei nang marei dichii, Ahgo pangtat matulo.

title: CHRIST THE FOUNTAIN
details:
. (S. S. 572) I JOHN 1:7. NEWMAN HALL. C.C. CASE. 1843-1918
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kem syitoi tangkaram karing dwipok, Kem hangtei zaipii syimatei pyitang Kamage meigo
Jesuna keipyi Gokem syitoipyi sabwikum haatang.

Sabwi songdo haabisana, Syitoi pyilo N'goh sabwi songdo haasana.

2. Ina ngamtei tchiisa tchiiloi kido Ina katchiitei mahkado makle Lung kamage meigo Ahna
koipyi Kemtei gahpyisa sabwi kumtakle.

3. Gohlung switei matei pyilo Pumpii! Sating kataa goma kavai teipii Tchiihaa pyilo, teito
vaipyi humlo Kemtei matei sabwisong haakitang.

title: HIM THAT COME UNTO ME
details:
. (R.S. 227) E. E. H JN. 6: 37. EWITT.1851-1920 WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kasui kapyi Ahlattei shiiwolo; Rangii matei liisong bikisa Sating gammah pungkoigo
kasuisa Kamajung piina latlei.

Gohdah kagong meigotei, Gohdah kagong meigotei, Gohdah kagong meigotei, Ina toisang
toilakle.

2. Kamasui pot kapung mei matumpii, Keikapyi tei nangna ngoutangle, Gohdah teito Ahna
satsa leile, Pumpiina poima
3.Gohdah gongliit kanyii meihang teina, Mik kachet, peetui katchiih kaniih; Kemlungto
nlumsa kalei meihang Meisatei tchiihum tangle

4. Rangii lamto saryisa kaleimei, Majyimei Ahda gongliit humlo, Ka ntah sating gam sazyi
kito, Pumpiina koisa leitang

title: HAVE YOU BEEN TO JESUS?
details:
(S.S. 379) E.A.H. PS. 51:7. E.A. HOFFMAN,1839-1929
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Kem gahnyisa nang Jesu malum takpo? Jao zaitei piina syi eitakpo? Pumpiigo nang
tchiigatpii malum takpo? Jao zaitei piina syi eitakpo?

Syitakpo….. zaiteipii? Rangiitei jao zaipii syitakpo? Kem peimani matei takpo sabwikum Jao
zaitei piina syi eitakpo?

2. Nang taksupii Jesudato tatleipo? Jao zaitei piina syi eitakpo? Crossto katai Ahdato
ntakleipo? Jao zaitei piina syi eitakpo?

3. Namwo kalak Ahna kagong tinglangki, Jao zaiteipii syimatei takpo? Goh rangiigo tei
tchiimatei eitakpo? Jao zaitei piina syi eitakpo?

4. Kem peimani matum piina toi eisa, Jao naamah zaipiina syi eilo, Mateikasu rangii
jaangpii dwipok lei, Jao zaitei piina syitoi eilo.

title: ROLLING ON THE WHEELS OF TIME
details:
.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Tinglang paryito tatleile, Tuhtakle neika neika, Sazyi paryi ngam toi eisa, Satinggam
gohkee tutang.

Tinglang paryito nyi tatsa leile, Tinglang paryito nyi tatsa leile, Nleitang nleitang gohkee
lampaang, Tinglang paryito nyi tatsa leile.

2. Neika neika mah nganiide, Kasang puidi tatkalu, Puidi tikasu meihang tei Kempuidi ki
tutangle.

3. Tingkum paryito katat ei, Katong katuk hangka lei, Swiki kalak rangaa humtei, Kanui
kahat hangka lei.

4. Puidi tang tang tei tatsana, Gohkeelam pitutangle; Puidi kashyi tatmajusa Rangii kilam
tutangle.

title: NEVER ALONE
details:
. (R. S. 325) MATT. 28 : 20b. E.E. HEWITT,1851-1920 J. C. H. & V. A.
WHITE.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Nang hingsang hingsulo, kavai pyitangle, Sageiti kumpii puidi vaipyi tangle, Kamyi
tinghum teido vaipyi eitakle, N'go roina toilak Ina kasui pyitangle.

Kasuitat humtang, Kasuitat humtang, Ahna samret pyibam takle, Toisang toipyi laklesa.

2. Hiipaa hangteido laamsa hui eitakle, Sazyi pouryi leimik liitmaji kido, Jesu gomah hiipaa
huisang huilakle, Sating gammah kavai Ahna kasuitat humtang.

3. Ngoukasu doikashyi kalei hangteido, Ahna kasui pyichii hingkatu gahle, Pumpii lattei
shiiki gohlung ntahle, Lungkasyi lii tchiisa Ahgo kasui tattangle.

title: HAVE YOU ANY ROOM FOR JESUS ?
details:
((G.B.216) LUKE 19:5 D.W.WHITTLE,1840-1901 C.
C. WILLIAMS.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Goma kem poimatou kapyi Jesu bamkabui leipo? Pumpii Ahgo golungki tei Liit bammatu
nyimakpo?

Jesu liitkabui bam seilo Koikinglo Pumpii samtei Goma lung kamui latpyilo Pumpii liitbam
matulo.

2. Pumpou ntah kabui bamle Cross gamto taikapyipii Pumpii liit bamkabui bamtei Golungki
tei leitakpo

3. Jesuna latkagong kitei Goma tinglangtei leipo? Ahma tinglangtei eitoile Supaunei
tinglang gahle

4. Jesugo liitbam matulo Tinglang tei gahnitakle Kalangsa gongliit sudichii Keikapyi tei
doulakle.

title: RING OUT THE BELLS
details:
. (H. V. 107)
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi meihang karingtei doulo, Ahma kalungki kagong meihang, Tampei wokalak
teikumpii, Lung ntahtang tingchoi kumpii.

Ka ntahmah pung, Tammatoi mah lii, Lungkasyi mah sam, Ka ntahmah pungkoi tei shiilo
mei kaleihangna, Ka ntahmah pungkoi gotei shiilo meihang teina, Ka ntahmah pung koitei
shiilo sazyipou hangna, Jesu gong pyitakle, Ka ntahmah sam shiimatulo.
2.Hiipaa hangna ngoubisa mpai kumpii, Tingkeinii guikatu bam hangki, Keiram kabitei
punggong pyi, Ruina hang ka ntah lii tchii.
3.Ka ntahmah pung kalak koishii wosa, Karing rangii ahnyina doutang, Teito tchiikapyipii
gotei, Tikei wochii ahnyi ringtang.

title: ROCK OFAGES
details:
. (C.S.S. 130) Is. 26: 4. A. M. TOPLADY,1740-1778 DR. THOMAS.
HASTINGS,1784-1872.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kalui kagaa tukadi, Kabei pyilo godaka, Gopum kito kapat zai, Longkalei dwitei piina,
Gohkem tchii magah pyilo, Syi mateisa poipyilo.

2. Ngamtei tchiisa leikido, Mikdwi patsa leikido, Ahsam sui kasukito, Ngamtei tchiisa
leikido, Pumpii Jesu roinale, Gohkem gahpyi kabuitei.

3. Pumpiida liittang karam, Samaakado poimakle, Tikasu sating gaamto, Sam tchiitang
karam kitei, Pumpiina lungsyi suchiih, Kemkito Itai tangle.

4. Taitang karam maningsa Samakado poisupii, Pumpii crossgo maningsa, Keipyitang
karam jaangpii, Kalui kagah tukadi, Kabei pyilo godaka.

title: PRAISE YE THE LORD!
details:
(S. S. 215) PS. 150: 2. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 H. R.
PALMER,1834-1907
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii zheigo tammatoide, Hossana!, Ntahsa saasa toide, Nyimah lungswi ntahsa Ahgo
toide, Kasatei zheigo toide, Ahna katat hangki suisa tatde, Ahmah lungkasyi tei malumsa,
Ahmah kavaitei nyidaka vaipyisa, Magah supii Ahbai piina pangtat pyitangle.

Tchiigat piina tatsa, Nyimah peirahtei kajatsa, Tchiigatpii tat sana, Ka ntah liitei tchiisana,
manyih gahsa tatsa, Kamong kakto pangpat pyitangle; Ngou kasagah satinggam pihkasuta.

2. Pumpii zheigo toihumlo gah supiina; Kazang zyitei Ahda lei, Ahlung kasyitei tamsa
tammatoide; Ka ntahmah lii tchiisa, Majung teipiina lii tchiisa tatde, Jesu kumpiina nyido
tatde, Satoi kapyi bamki ntahsa tude, Keikapyi paikito gahsupiina lungtangle.

title: I AM COMMING TO THE CROSS
details:
. (S.S. 477) W JN. 6 : 37. . MCDONALD. W. G.
FISCHER,1835-1912
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Mik kachet kasoih Ile, Ngoutang wolaksa kalei, I crosski tei gongleile, Eitoi keikapyi
doutak.

I Pumpii go malumle Calvary mah jaonaago, Sazyi nriitpii rata Pumpii n'goh keipyilo

2. Kashyi kahong moijusa, Tinglang katahngka takle, Pumpiina n'goh tamle, Ina pot matou
pyitang.

3. Sazyi pouryi ngam matum, Pumpou rangii matumpii, Ahdah pyitoi eisana, Kalui kagah
gomale.

title: OUR CHRISTIAN BAND
details:
. (S. S. 1108) L. G. CUYLER. PS. 34: 3. IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Lungkamajung….. lii tei tchiisa….. Nyihangmah lung….. kamajungpii….. Tokryisanii…..

Pumpii zheigo….. Ntahsana….. tammatoide…..

Tchiigatpiina satde, lungswi ninasana, Gahkalei meihango tingnei fiikei wode, Nyina
latkalei zhei, peipou haa katangpii, Jesu katu zheigotei anyida tam mangoude

2. Bam eikito….. nyi matumpii….. Nduisana….. Pumpii mahzhei….. Tei latsana….. nyihang
lungswi….. Tchiimateisa….. satoi doude…..

3. Christian gohkang….. sanah meihang… Nyihang peekaang…. Tat njoide….. Goma
teima….. humtei piina….. Christian meihang….. go keipyilo….

title: TRUSTING JESUS
details:
. (SS.836) E.PACE. JOHN 18:15 IRA.D.SANKEY.
DOH IS AB
lyrics:
1. Jesugo malumkito, Kalak kaniih douleido, Katei katchiih doukido, Jesu roina malumne
Sating kataa ratalo, Nangkatai maning gatlo, Katalyi tchiileikido, Jesu roina malumne

2. Ahrangii kavai teina, Gohlungki liitbam pyilo; Ahnii kasuichii tailak, Jesu roina malumne.

3. Lii tchiitang ntah dichii, Ratatang kahing douchii; Doi kashyi kadoukido, Jesu roina
malumne.

4. Sazyipou gahkasuta, Pumpiigo malum tangle; Ina ringkalei taatei, Jesu roina malumne.

title: MY JESUS, I LOVE THEE
details:
. (S.S. 659) I PET. 1: 8. W. R. FEATHERSTON,1846-1873 REV. A. J.
GORDON,1836-1895
KEY F FLAT
lyrics:
1. Jesutei gohmahle katu Ititak, Kemmah ngamtei Ina tchiiloi keilakle, Nang gohmah
keikapyi koikapyi piile, Ina eitoi titak eitoi tiwotak.

2. Nangna reipii lungsyi I n'go lungsyi, Calvary cross paryito n'goh lutak, Nangna
gohjaangpii tupyihung tei keile, Ina eitoi titak eitoi tiwotak.

3. Taido ringdo Ina n'go lungsyitang, Ringkalei taa n'go tammatoi tangle, Katai katangpiina
lungsyihum tangle, Ina titak kasangpii Ina titak.

4. Ngou kasagah bamkitei pihtangkaram, Kavai sating gamto gotammatoi tang, Ina pyihung
tei keisa Ina saatang, Ina eitoi sahngsa tikeiwo takle.

title: MOSES VIEWED THE LAND
details:
. (A. S. 13) DEUT. 32:52 T. M. THOMAS MORELEY.1845-1891
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Israel naamei….. Rabuizyi Tingkum rekdei tatle, Bangpiina Moses baiki, Kamadat taa
tchiipyi.

 Canaan maning gongsa, Puidi katat timakle, Teitchii kido kem lungteito Kataimei moitakle,
Mosesdo maning gong makle; Canaan razang gongsana.

2. Kamagedo magele, Ntahdo ntahle, Canaan nam puidi katat, Bangpii swi nleilak.

3. Israel tangtang kamaning, Gongtang keiwo makle, Meiki kangto lungsana, Taanaa meina
liitle.

title: JESUS IS ALLTHE WORLD TO ME
details:
. (A.H. 98) JOHN 15:13 W. L. T. WILL L.
THOMPSON,1847-1909
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Jesu teina gohmah sazyi Ka ntah kara-ngaa Ahma swirek goh teimahum Ah kasuna tei
gaa Kamage tinglangki Ahna N'goh ntakdou matule. Kamageki ntah matu Kanghele.

2. Jesutei gohmah sazyile Kakihgo fiiloilak, Ahdah liitchii satoi pyitang Satoi taksupii pyi.

Tingkaang tingrot teido pyile Ina lutaa kei kabam tei Rati hangka matimatu Goh kangle.

3. Jesutei gohmah sazyile Ina matei humtang Eikakum kanghe meigotei, Dakumpii
toitangpo? Ahteih kasuitei kasangle Ahma cross Ina juhum tang Teihsui humtang sating
kataa Kanghego.

4. Jesutei gohmah sazyile Bikaki meido gaa, Ahgo malum malum humtang Katai katang
piina, Hangkasa bikaki kangle Chiilungki kara-ngaa doule Ka ntah tei kalui tchiimak Goh
kangle.

title: HE LIVES ON HIGH
details:
. (M.H. 420) B.B. MCKINNEY.1886-1952 Arr. by B.B. MCK.1886-1956
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ka ntah sating gam toi eisana, Sazyi pouryi Jesuna humpyi, Apyiki tupyihung tei keisana,
Kem kapungmei jaangpiina teipyile.

Sating gamlei sating gamlei; Kataigo ngamwosa ringkii takle, Sating gamlei sating gamlei,
Neika n'goh pang tangle.

2. Roubam ki teito gongkii wosana, Jesu sating gam nleitu tak, Tingneika sazyi pouryi
nleihum Ahgo malum meigo pangwo tangle.

3. Lung kamage mei Jesudah gonglo, Ntak katu teimahum pyitang, Kalak kaniih pungsa
kalei meihang, Ngou kasagaa pyihung keipyi tangle

title: NOTHING BUT THE BLOOD OF JESUS?
details:
(Alex.171) HEB. 9:22. R.L REV. R.LOWRY,1826-
1899
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Gohkem dapii syitoitang? Kakih gah Jesu zairoile! N'go tchii m'bi kabui, Kaki gah Jesu
zairoile.

Oh, maikating Ahzai, Sabwikum tchiimahaa! Dwipok kaki gahle, Kaki gah Jesu zairoile!

2. N'go tchiimatei kabui, Kaki gah Jesu zairoile! Ina tchiipai wolakle, Kaki gah Jesu zairoile!

3. Kemgo tchiimagah kabui, Kaki gah Jesu zairoile! I bikabui teimahum, Kaki gah Jesu
zairoile.

title: NEAR THE CROSS
details:
. ((GGSH. 63) COL. 1: 20, EPH. 2: 13. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-
1915 W. H. DOANE,1832-1915
KEY F
lyrics:
1. Jesuma cross peebangtei, Karingmah dwipok lei, Matapiih kapyi dwipok, Calvary gamto
pat.

Cross kitei, cross kitei, Kalui kagaa tchiimak, Sating gam pihkasu ki, Cross gotei
maningtang.

2. Cross datei liitwo dichii, Rangii kasoih hangdo, Sagei tingtang pwikumpii, N'goh vaipyi
tangle.

3. Pumpii ma jaonah kumpii, N'goh mangou pyilo, Koipyilo sating kataa, Ina ntak doune.

title: NO, NOT ONE
details:
. (S.S. 904) EPH. 5 : 2. REV.JOHNSON OATMAN. 1856-1922 GEO.C.HUGG
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Jesu kumpii kang kakitei gahle, Meikado gahsang gah! Meikado rangii kabi pyiwolak, Ah
kumpii gahsang gah!

 Jesuna nyi kalaktei tile, Ahna kalui katang reipyi, Jesu kakum kang kakitei gahle, Meikado!

Gahsang gah!

2. Jesu kumpii mateihkaki kang gah, Meikado gahsang gah! Jesu kumpii lungmanoi kabi
gah, Meikado! Gahsang gah!

3. Jesu kumpii kasui katu gahle, Meikado! Gahsang gah! Kamyi sumto Ahnii chyitat pyile,
Ah kumpii! Gahsang gah!

4. Pumpiina nyigo toikatu gahle, Gahsang gah! Gahsang gah! Kemtei tchiisa leido Ahna
toimak, Ah kumpii! Gahsang gah!

title: O HAPPY DAY !
details:
(S.S. 866) PROV. 16 : 20. PHILIP DODDRIDGE,1702-1751 EDWARD F.
RIMBAULT,1816-1876.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Kem katchiipii n'goh eido, Doibisanii jupyi takle; Jupyi kati Jesu roile, Teipii Jesu
tammatoile.

Ntahle….. ntahle, Goh kemtei Jesuna gahpyi, Pumpii gotei mata dichii, Pumpii teina rali
pyile, Ntahle….. ntahle. Gohmah kemtei gahpyi takle

2. I Pumpii lungkasyi dousa Taa kahungtei tchiilui takle; Jesuna goh kalatkito, Ina ntahsa
malumle.

3. Kareikina goh rangii ei, Kahem baikito leidile; Eitoi Ina malum sana, Gohdato Jesutei
leile.

title: WHOSOEVER CALLETH
details:
. (SS.419) JULIA STERLING. ROM.10:13 IRA D. SANKEY.
DOH IS F
lyrics:
1. Oh ntah sampaotei bamlyito saa gongleile, Ahna teikapyi kabi sampaotei pung gonglei.

Pumpiima kabi samtei meihangda tampyilo, Lukei kalumei hanggo Jesuna latleile.

Mei katana Jesugo latsa leidichii, Mei katanado latdichii keipyi tangle. (2 Times)

2. Ahzaitei rangii keikapyi jaangpii humpyile, Juhmage kapyi Pumpii mah jaonah
meihangtei, Shiiwosa golung kito Ahgo lukeiwolo, Meikado gahlakle Ahgo lukei kalumei.

3. Mage mariipot pungkalei meigo keipyitang. Ahna n'go latlei gopot pungha tanglesa, Mei
katihng chiilung kabitei Ahna pyitangle, Malumgatsa Ahgo lukei kalumei hanggo.

title: ONWARD, EVER ONWARD
details:
. (R.S. 905) MARIAN WENDELL HUBBARD. CHAS. H.
GABRIEL.
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Christian saryi meihang tude saryini, Saryinat keisa kaang kokryitei poisa, Doilam tatlo
kangam peirah kajatsa, Pumpii zheikito saryitei ngamtangle.

Tattulo, Khristana nyigo latleile, Saryi jaangpii, Christian saryi tchiitude Doilam tatlo saryi
bamki Hosanna saatude.

 2. Ngoukarou kahemtei mananglei takle, Rangii kokryi tei kaang, ngii poimakiihlo, Meihang
saryinat keisa tatpattulo, Teihlam nleisulo nyina ngamtangle.

3. Teihlam nleisupii saryitei tchiilo, Tchii kadaalo pumpiina katam suisa, Saryitei lui eisa
saryi ngamwosa, Pumpii dato nyi meihang satoi doutang.

title: REVIVE THY WORK, O LORD!
details:
(S.S.309) HAB.3:2. ALBERT MIDLANE. W. H. DOANE,1831-
1915 arr.by MISS FANNY J.CROSBY,1820-1915
KEY G. Spirited
lyrics:
1. Ngam tchiimakiih pyilo, Gonaa mei mataa lei Meihang goteido tampyilo, Nyigo matipyilo.

Ngam tchiimakiih pyilo, Kalangsa humpyilo Gonaamei kokkumsa rata He Pumpii koipyilo.

2. He tchiikapyi Pumpii, Gozhei dimatulo! Rangiigo lungkasyi samtei, Meekum song
matulo.

3. Goma ngam katchiiki, Pumpii pangtat pyilo, Kamalum tei nleisupii, Pumpii gohjaang
piile.

4. Gonaa mei nyihang go, Rangiitei maang pyilo, Tamtang karam kaki gahle Koikapyi
nangroile.

title: THE DAY STAR HATH RISEN
details:
.(SS.110) F.J. CROSBY. II PETER 1:19 GEO. C STEBBINS.
DOH IS E.
lyrics:
1. Tinghum lampaang sageiti vai pyitakle; Ina kamyi kito tatloi keilakle, Ahma kavai teipii
puidi vaipyisa, Oh tinghum sageiti n'goh vaipyilo.

N'goh vaipyilo, vaipyi loilo, Tinghum lampaang sagei n'goh vaipyilo.

2. Tinghum lampaang sagei, ngoukabi teipii, Kisa vaipyilo goma kavai teipii, Sazyipou meina
kamyitei ngousana, Tinghum lampaang sagei, patkalei ngoutang.

3. Tinghum lampaang sagei, kisa vaitakle, Vai wokalak gahle kamyibam hangki, Tinghum
lampaang sagei, Goma kavaile, N'goh vaikapyi goma kavai teile.

title: ONE IS OUR MASTER
details:
. (S. S. 500) MATT. 23: 8. E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920
WM.J.KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Keikapyi Pumpiitei hangnina roile Lungkasyi rengteipii peinei pyile Oh Ahma lungkasyi
rangiigo vaipyi Miitsupiina meetei vaipyi leile
Jesuzhei kito nyihang malumde Tinglang kalei taa Ahna kasuipyi Rahet bisa lungkasyi tei
leidichii Pumpii zheikito Hosanna saatang.

2. Ntah rangaasa Pumpii ngamtei tchiilo Swi teimahum tei Pumpiigo pyilo Kasoih kasetgo
Pumpiina tchiihale Mage meigo satoitei pyileile.

3. Kaki kisang Pumpiitei Ahroinale Gahkalak satoi Ahbaiki leile Ahteih kasui meihang
doikabi doutang Taksupii Ahzhei tam matoitude.

title: HIGHER GROUND
details:
. (A.H.165) PS. 31:3, PHI. 3:14. REV.J.OATMAN,1856-1922
CHAS.H.GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kasagoi zang Ina tatlei, Neika neika doi ntoisa, Ratasa Ina tat leile, Sagoi bamki pangkiih
pyilo.

Pumpii n'goh satmatulo, Sagoi kaki bamni teika, Kavai lungkasyi bam nitei, Sagoi bamki
pangkiih pyilo.

2. Kahing katciih sazyi pouryi, Bamnitei I bamnyi makle, Kangka kemki tobam tuchii, Ina
karata poipyilo.

3. Sagoi bamki I bam nyile, Ntah rangaa liitei tchiisa, Kamatei mah lii kabi tei, Ina sagoi
gamto tchiine.

title: CHRIST RECEIVETH SINFUL MEN
details:
. (S. S. 390) MATT. 9: 12. ERDMANN
NEUMEISTER.1671-1756 J. MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907 TRANS. BY MRS. EMMA F. BEVAN
1827-1909
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Kem kapung meihang gotei, Jesuna lukei pyitang Saakalei samkabi tei, Meihanggo tam
mangoulo.

Kisa kisa lii tchiilo, Kemmeigo lukei pyitang Tchiigatpii tam mangoulo, Kamaatei gahpyi
tangle.

2. Ahdato gong ntaklo, Ahsamtei nang malumlo, Jesuna kemtei gahpyi Kem kapungmei
jaangpiina.

3. Nyikem tei gahpyi sana N'goh tchiimatei pyilo, Kamaa matum gahpyisa Kalui katang
koipyitang.

4. Khristana lukei pyilo Ina kem punglei kido, Kemtei tchiimagah pyisa, Sating gamto I
lungtang.

title: REMEMBER ME
details:
(S.S. 630) JER. 15 : 15. ISAAC WAATS,1674-1748 ASA HULL.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Jesu Ahna zai patkapyi, Kadapii pourui tang? Cross paryito teikapyi tei Gohjaang
gojaangpiile.

Lungset kati Pumpii dato! I lung kali tangle; Nang nlei kagong tinglangki N'goh maning seilo,

2. Kem katchiipii gojaang piina, Kaset kalak lehpyi! Nangna lungset katikumpii, Sazyi pouryi
gahle.

3. Sating sazyi pouryi matum, Tchiikapyi Bangpiile Teitchiikido Ahnaa gotei, Gohjaangpii
maang pyile.

4. Khrista katei tinglang kitei, Satingdo myitakle, Kamadat sati ngouwosa Hangna tam
matoile.

title: AS A VOLUNTEER
details:
. (M. H. 228) W.S. BROWN. CHAS. H. GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Sagong jaangpii saryi ta tana tchiileipo? Meihang go latleile, gong heipyi humlo, Kalangsa
keipyilo, lungkasyi piina, Nang Pumpii ma saryimei tchiinyi makpo?

Pumpii ma saryi meitei, kasang roina, Kakihmei latlei nang datchiisa? Jesuna koipyisa
hingtang karam gaa, Nang Pumpii ma saryimei tchiinyi makpo?

2. Pumpiina n'go latlei lungkasyi piina, Lungkasyi ma Pumpii, goh jaangpii teipyi, Pumpiina
latsa lei, kalangsa liitlo, Nang Pumpii mah saryimei tchiinyi makpo?

3. Saryi ngamkatu tchiilo meihang paryitei, Ngamkalu mah pyihung, keipyi humtangle,
Kamalum meihangna, kalakmai doutang, Nang Pumpiimah saryimei tchiinyi makpo?

title: JUST A WORD FOR JESUS
details:
. (S.S. 1111) PS. 71 : 15. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 W.
H. DOANE.1832-1915
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Nyimah kangkasang Pumpii Jesu jaang teipiina Ahna kadaa ngam tchiipo katu tampat
humde
Eitoi Jesu jaangpii nyihangna samkaang nina Maning gongsa ratasa liido tchii njoide.

2. Pumpiina lunsyisa gohmah kem syitoi pyiile Sating gambam kitei pihkabui jaangpii
tchiipyi.

3. Kamaa katchii gohjaang piina Ahna cross pungpyi Taipyisa keikapyi tei tamkaluni gahle.

4. Nangna tinglang kabitei tchiimagah eisulo Tinglang magahsulo rangiitei myi eitangle

5. Kamalum tei nleichii rangii taimaang tutang Pumpii mah ntahkitei liitsa ntak keilo.

title: COMING HOME
details:
.((A. H. 396) LK. 15: 18. REV. ALFRED H. ACKLEY,1887-1960 B. D.
ACKLEY,1872-1958
KEY B FLAT. Moderato.
lyrics:
1. Ina kemhangka punglei kido, Malum gatsa Pumpiida gonglei; Nangna kem gahpyi
kabuitei lei, I kee gong leile.

 Kee gonglei… kee gonglei Kem puidi kitei tatloi laktakle, I gongleile… kee gonglei; Pumpii I
keelam gongleile.

2. Pwi pfiina naago kafii kumpii, Nangna n'goh fiisa tatleile, Kem kiteito nangna latpyisa; I
kee gongleile.

3. Nangna latkalei Ina shiile, Kabi ngamtei Ina toilakle, Kakui kamaa kemtei gahpyile; I kee
gongleile.

4. Mei kating Jesu zaiteipiina, Gohkem hangtei syitoi pyitakle, Ina ratakalei nang roile; I kee
gongleile.

title: COME, SINNER, COME !
details:
(S. S. 336) MATT. 11: 28. W. E. WITTER. H. R. PALMER.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Jesuna latsa leile, gonglo kemmei, Ratatang karam jaangpii gonglo kemmei, Eitoi
tinglang sektakle gonglo kemmei, Jesu tikabui jaangpii gonglo kemmei.

2. Masuipot pungsa kalei gonglo kemmei, Jesuna poimaang pyitang gonglo kemmei,
Jesuniih kachoi makle gonglo kemmei, Jesuna lukei pyitang gonglo kemmei.

3. Karing sam shiitang karam gonglo kemmei, Satoi doukabui jaangpii gonglo kemmei,
Latsa kalei Khristada gonglo kemmei, Kamaa katchii meihangna gonglo kemmei.

4. Mikdwi patsa latleile gonglo kemmei, Satoi pyinesa koilei gonglo kemmei, Ahna kalat
koishiilo gonglo kemmei, Meih poisupii keipyine gonglo kemmei

title: CALLING TO THEE
details:
. (S.S . 418) MK. 10:49. GRACE J. FRANCES. H. P. MAIN,1839-1925
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Zang kadii kito magaa kaleimei, Kamyi sumto tiwo kalak meigo; Goh Pumpii Ahna
lungkasyi kito, Nlei gonglosa kalattei shiipo?

N'go latlei n'golatlei, Gohda gonglosa tingnei latlei, N'go latlei n'go latlei, Jao kakoi piimah
lattei shiilo.

2. Kamyi puidiki datchiisa tatlei, Kahem puidiki tatliitsa leitak, Kateibam nito n'leipat wolo;
Jao kakoi piina latsa leitakle.

3. Kamagekito kalangsa patlo, Pumpiina n'go tchiiha pyinesa, Lat manoisa lungkasyipii
latlei, Jao kakoi piina eitoido latlei.

title: BURDENS ARE LIFTED AT CALVARY
details:
. (GGSH.78) J.M.M. JOHN M. MOORE,1925
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou chiilung katutei Kempiina tokryile, Sazyi pouryina pungwo laksa Jesuna
pungpyile.

Calvary ting pouryito poimaang, Gomah ngam, gohmah ngam, Calvary ting pouryito
poimaang, Jesuna pungpyile.

2. Kamage potpung kaleimei! Jesugo malumlo Nganiitang karam kaki gale, Jesuna pung
pyiitang.

3. Kamage rangii matumpii, Keikapyipii tile, Kemsa hatsa lungkali meigo Jesuna keipyitang.

title: COME UNTO ME
details:
. (GGSH. 326) C. P MATT. 11: 28,29. . J. CHARLES P. JONES.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Satoi kapyi Pumpiina kalat shiipo? Pot masui pungsa lung magekalei mei, Pumpiina
latsa lei kalangsa gonglo, “Pot masui matumpii gohda pung gonglo”.

Gohda gonglo, gong… ntakwolo, Gomah pot masuitei, Ina pungpyi tang; Ina lungmanoile,
n'goh malumlo, Gohmah pot matangtei gongsa poiwolo.

2. Kamaning gongtangsu, swi magemei hang, Swikak swiryi teipii vaangneiwo takpo?

Keikapyi Pumpiina eitoido latlei, “Gomah pot masuitei gohda punggonglo”.

3. Satan mah kahemna n'go ngamtakpo? Kamage kalakpii swi nkii takpo? Khristada
liitdichii Ahna keipyitang; Rangii ntak jaangpii Ahna latleile.

title: NO NIGHT THERE
details:
. (S.S. 1012) J. R. CLEMENTS.1868-? REV. 21 : 25. H. P. DANKS. ?-1903
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Leimik liitkasu mahnam, namdinina leile, Kaluiteido tchiimakle, kamyi teido gale. Jesuna
mikdwi piitpyi, raleidwi dopat makle, Kamyi teido tchiimakle, ka ntah namditei.

2. Namdi teiki kamjaotei, sanapiina tchiibam, Puidido, sana roile, kamyi teido gale.

3. Namdi teiki kamjaotei, kakum katu gale, Rangii karing dwikong lei, kamyi teido gale.

4. Leimikdo tchiihkatu ga; sana namdi kitei, Jaonah mah kavaiteipii vaihumsana leile.

title: HE IS MY GUIDE
details:
. (A. H. 89) JOB 23 : 10. C. H. HOMER.1856-1932 CHAS. H.
GABRIEL1856-1932
KEY F. DUET -S & T
lyrics:
1. Sazyi poudo sating gamdo, Dapei leipo Ina timak Pumpii roina I malumle, Karing puidi tei
doutangle.

Pumpii roina puidi tile, Sating kataa Ahna koipyi Ahpuidi tei suihum tangle Pumpii roina
puidi tile.

2. Kadalampo Ina timak, Kalak kaniih Ahna pungpyi, Ina tile tingnei kana, Sagong pyihung
tei doutangle.

3. Gohpuidi tei bimak kido, Lungkamage tei doumakle, Ina tile tingnei kana, Ka ntah ki
teipih tangle.

title: FACE TO FACE WITH CHRIST
details:
. (A.H. 413) CARRIE E. BRECK. 1855-1934 1 COR. 13 : 12.
G. C. TULLAR,1869-1950
KEY B FLAT. Moderato
lyrics:
1. Pumpii go gohmikpii ngoutang, Malumwo kalak ngamle, N'goh keipyi kabui jaangpii,
Pumpiina taipyi takle.

Junei-ju kangou piinei tei, Kamatei sating gamto, Ahmah lungkasyi paikito, Pumpii go Ina
ngoutang.

2. Eitoi Ina Pumpii jutei, Mateisa ngoumak kido, Satoi kapyi leimik piinei Mateisa ngouleng
tangle.

3. Pumpiida liitkalu piinei, Kamage tei leiloilak, Kaset kalak matumteido Kadiiki tuhum
tangle.

4. Junei ju kangou piineitei, Ina jupei lakkido, N'goh ei tchiisa tampyile, Satingmei tchiitu
tangle.

title: GATHER IN THE SHEAVES
details:
. (S.S. 766) ROBERT BRUCE. PS.126:6. IRA D.SANKEY,1840-
1908
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Lungkasyi tingchoi ngou kasagaa lukitei, Leimik kavaina seipyisa kaleikak, Nyimah kaset
kalak toisana ntahsa, Lukitei maangsa samiihtei poikoide.

Poimakom humde! Poimakom humde, Pumpii jaangpii nyilu rachetmei tchiide, Pumpii
teina kalatkoi tei shiiwo sana, Rangiimah lubam kitei maangliit tude.

2. Tingnei tinglangki rangii ntah ntahsa, Rangii ntahsa kakoi tinglang bile, Tingchoido
tingnaido tingkiido tinghumdo, Lukitei maangsa lutei rachet tude.

3. Puidi myikido lungteina magesude, Sakeisa ngam katchii ati doutangle. Mage ngam
katchii kalangsa lui eisana, Pumpii dateito nyihang ntak tangle.

title: HOW THEY CRUCIFIED MY LORD
details: . (A.H. 144) . MATT. 27:29. 28:8. ARR. F.S. TURNEY.
lyrics:
KEY F
1.Ahnyina Jesugo gikatu tei, Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana; Oh! Mahdo maning keikatu
nigah Le, gahsang gah; Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana.
2.Ahnyina pyiki keikapyi pyihung, Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana, Oh! Mahdo maning
keikatu ni gah Le, gahsang gah; Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana.
3.Ahbaiki jotpyi geh keikatu tei, Kalahtki ngiipiina huikatu tei, Oh! Mahdo maning keikatu ni
gah Le, gasang gah; Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana.
4.Ahnyina rowki goikei katutei, Rowtei koitupiina rakat eitak, Oh! Mahdo maning keikatu ni
gah Le, gahsang gah; Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana.
5.Kateiki teito ringloi keitakle, Pumpiina gohkem hang magapyile, Oh! Mahdo maning
keikalu ni gah Le, gahsang gah; Gohswiki Ina maning gongsana.

title: HEAVENLY SUNLIGHT
details:
. (C.S. S. 103) H. J. ZELLEY.1859-1942 G. H. COOK.?-1948
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Zangtoi kitodo ningkam lungtodo, Pumpiima kavaiki paktusa, Jesuna nyihang go kasui
pyisa Tingnei kado toisang toipyilak.

Satinggam kavai, kavaimah kabi, Ngou kabipii goh rangii tokryi, Halleluyah, ntah beidisa
Gohmah Pumpiigo tammatoile.
2.Oh, Kamyi teina n'goh vangnei tak, Tei tchiikido Pumpiigo ngouhum, Kamyi tchiikasupii
gohmah Jesu Ah peebangto I roisa leitang.
3.Sagoi gamto tchiidek kabam keetei, Gongtang kalu I tatsa leile, Tammatoi lii tchiisana
leitangle, Pumpii ma lungkasyi kavaiki.

title: NEARER, MY GOD, TO THEE!
details:
(S. S. 581) SARAH F. ADAMS,1805-1848 JAM. 4: 8. DR. L.
MASON,1792-1872
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Gohmah Bangpii Sagong! Gohmah Pumpii! Ina tuhpailaksa n'go latlei, Eitoi Ina gonglei,
goda manang tangle, Goda manang tangle, I manang tang.

2. I swikak swiryisa, tisutakle. Kadatei bitangposa nganiilei. Kem malyi teipiina go
tammatoi lii tchii. Gozhei tei latsana, goda gonglei.

3. Sating gam puiditei eitoi titak, Eitoi pangkiih pyisa, ntak pyilo. Sating gam rangiina ngoh
bai jeisa lei, Ahnyi lattei shiisa, I na gong lei.

4. Leimik, sakii, sageiti, majusa, Ina jongpi tangle, lukei pyilo. Ina n'go fiisa gopeebang
gongleile. Goda manang kine, I manang ne.

title: OH BE READY !
details:
(R.S.516) RV. RINGKAHAO. 1912-2006 MAURICEA. CLIFTON.1866-1930
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Myi kapang kadou gonglei takle, Myi kapang kadoutei gonglei tak; Gomeebung tei
vaitakpo? Gokavai tei vaitakpo, Myi kapang tinglangtei gonglei tak.

Tchiidaa wolo; tchiidaa wolo Myi kapang gongkasu ki, Tchiidaa wolo; Tchiidaa wolo Myi
kapang gongkasu ki.

2. Myi kapang kadou gongleitakle, Myi kapang kadoutei gongleitak Teijaangpiina tchiidaalo,
gokemtei syitoi eilo Myi kapang tinglangtei gongleitak.

3. Myi kapang kadou gongleitakle Myi kapang kadoutei gongleitak, Golung ntah rangaalo,
Pumpii latlei shiipyilo, Myi kapang tinglangtei gongleitak.

4. Myi kapang kadou gongleitakle. Myi kapang tinglangtei gongleitak, Pumpiina latkagongki,
Nang Ahdoitei satbuipo? Myi kapang tinglangtei gongleitak.

title: AT THE CROSS !
details:
(S. S. 883) II TIM. 1 : 12. ISAAC WATTS,1674-1748 R. E. HUDSON,1843-
1901
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. I Jesumah tchii eitakle Ahjaangpii ngou roudo, Ina nrousang nroulak Ah kavai cross
jaangpii.

Cross teito, cross teito, Ina ngou wosana; Gohmah potmasui matou eitakle. Kamalum
paito n'goh keipyiile Eitoi Ina ntah doutakle.

2. Jesu gohmah Pumpii teile, Ahzhei tei dikile! Gohmah kamaning matumpii, Matahpii
gahlakle.

3. Latloi tangle Ahnah meigo Gohpfii mah peebang ki! Kamatei Jerusalem to Goh jaangpii
koileile.

4. Ahna tamkapyi sam hangtei, Sat tiitsa leihumle, Mpusa nyi ngam tchiitangle, Tam kapyi
samkito.

title: ROOM FOR THEE
details:
. (S. S. 35) LK. 2: 7. E. S. ELLIOTT,1836-1897 IRA. D. SANKY,1840-1908
KEY F. Slow
lyrics:
1. Sagongbam satinggam toi eisana, Sazyipou gohjaangpii, Kagong Ahkabam nitei gahle
Bethlehem namdiki
Oh pwiwo gohmah lungki tei I kamaa bamnitei leile Liit bampyilo gohmah lungki Teiki
gomah bamleile.

2. Sanyih teinii kabam keedo leile. Ruinaa mah goido lei Galilee sazyi kitei gongsa Ntakbam
tei gahle.

3. Nyigo keikapyi jaangpii nii gongle Ahsam kabi poihtang Halaang taklesana poitangle
Pumpii sam kabitei.

4. Teimahum teipii nleigong tangle Rakotmei kasuisa, Teipiinei kamalum mei hangna Bam
kagah tchiilakle.

title: OH COME, ALLYE FAITHFUL
details:
. (S.S. 31) LUKE 2:15. MERCER. TR.BY F..OAKELEY,1802-
1880 JOHN READING.
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Gonglo, kamalum mei, Ntahsa gongpyilo, Bethlehem nam kitei kalangsa gonglo, Takoi
kokchyi lungki tei majyi bamle.

Gonglo, Ahgo ratade, Gonglo, Ahgo ratade, Gonglo, Ahgo ratade, Khristago.

2. Sating gam kiteito Tinggam Rakot meina Ntah rangaasa tammatoi lii tchiilei, Bangpii
Ahzheitei kisa vai matulo.

3. Amen nyihang toide Kemtei gahpyi kabui, Lungkabam Pumpii zheigotei ratade, Bangpii
ma samtei madousupii gongtak.

title: ONWARD, CHRISTIAN SOLDIERS !
details:
((S.S. 706) DEUT. 31:6 S. BARING-GOULD,1834-1924
ARTHUR S. SULLIVAN,1842-1900
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Christian saryi meihang tude saryini, Reitakle Pumpiina nyi Ahtei suide, Jesuna
pumtangle, nyidoi reipyitang, Teijaangpii teihsana, saryitei ngamde.

Pumpii saryi meihang tude saryini, Reitakle Pumpiina nyi Ahtei suide.

2. Jesu zhei shiiwoki, kahemna hingle, Kahemtei paktusa nyina ngam tangle, Kangam saryi
lattei, sazyi pouryihang, Shiigongsa matumpii gahum tang takle.

3. Christian saryimei hang doilam ntoide, Nyihang teihsa suide kamatei meida, Kahemna
ngamtangle swi nleisulo, Swi njoisu dichii nyina ngam wolak

4. Sazyipou sagong sazyihang gatangle, Jesumah sazyitei kalui tchiilakle, Kahem teina Jesu
gotei ngamlakle, Ngamsang ngam lakle Jesuna Sagong tang.

title: PRAISE OUR CREATOR
details:
. (S. S. 219) MISS FANNY J. CROSBY, 1820-1915 PS. 106: 1.
THEO. F. SEWARD.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Tchiikapyi Bangpii gotei tammatoide, Taikalei kito nyigo kaleipyi, Bangpii Ahtei mahumtei
tammatoide, Kalei kapyi keikapyi Bangpiigo.

Tamma… toide Matum madumgo tchiikakpyi Bangpii gotei, Tamma… toide. Bangpii Sagong
go tammatoide.

2. Nyigo keikapyi Pumpii tammatoide, Ahdahto nyihang mbeih wobuile Nyihang puiditei
Ahna reipyi tangle, Majung kabi dwipok kapat nitei.

3. Lungsyi kati Pumpiigo tammatoide, Ahlungkasyi kito dikiileile Kalui katang karingtei
pyitang karam, Jesu samtei malumsana suide.

title: RINGTHE BELLS OF HEAVEN
details:
. (S. S. 650) LK. 15: 10. REV. W. O. CUSHING,1823-1902
G.F. ROOT,1820-1895
KEY B FLAT. Joyfully
lyrics:
1. Sating gammah pungtei ntahsa laklo, Ralumei nina nlei gonglei; Julo pfiina ahgo kadou
loitakle, Ntah baidisa geiwo takle.

Rakot mei ntahsa lii tchiilei, Ntahsa livii buika konglei, Pumpii saryimei dwi kadi kumpiina,
Ntahsa tammatoi lii tchiilei.

2. Satinggam punglaklei tingnei ntahlo, Rahkatu naago lukei takle; Kem katchiiki teito lung
magejusa, Apfiikee nlei gong loitakle.

3. Sating punglak lei meihang go matilo, Satinggam rakot ntahsa lei; Ka ntah sampaotei
meihangda tamlo, Ama rangii manaloi takle.

title: ALL TO CHRIST I OWE
details:
. (S.S. 855) 1 PET 2 : 24 MRS. ELVINA M. HALL,1820-1889 J. T.
GRAPE,1835-1915
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina katam shii, Gohmah teimahum gah, Rata tisupiina, Naamei kumpii leile,
Ina pungkalei, Jesuna ruipyii, Gohmah kem matum piina, Pumpiina magahpyi.

2. Eitoi gahsupiina, Goma teimahum dou, Gohmah lung kamage, Koitu kumpii leile.

3. Gomah kamarei tei, Lungkasyimah puidi, Eitoi kisa gohmah, Kabitei gahtakle.

4. Ina ringkalei kak, Pumpii ma tchiitangle, Goma lung kasyitei I koisa leitangle.

5. Ina toi eisana Pumpii kalei kalu, Gohmah rangii gotei, Goma tchiimatu tang.

title: MY MOTHER'S PRAYER
details:
(R.S. 739, II ALEX. 116) J.W PROV. 6:20. . VAN DE VENTER W.S.
WEEDEN
KEY D FLAT
lyrics:
1. Gohpwi sam mangei wolakle, Tingneika leimik ahna tam, Gohjaangpiina rata kapyi, I gah
kido mangei sulo.

Sating kataa maning tangle, Tingkei mah koilung kiteito, Gohpwi ma lungkasyi lattei Ina
shiisa maning tangle.

2. Gohpwi goma kamajung lat, Maningsa ntah matule, Eitoi Ina timak kido, Gohpwi samtei
mangei lakle.

3. Tingkumna tattuh eikido Pwi lungkasyi mangei lakle, Ju masuksa rata kapyi, Tingneikado
mangei lakle.

4. Gohpwina rata kapyitei, Kepyisana keipyi tangle, Gohmah kem tchiimatei kapyi, Ina
mangei peiwo lakle.

title: REDEEMED
details:
. (C.H. 546) FANNY J. CROSBY WILLIAM J.KIRPATRICK.
DOH IS AB.
lyrics:
1. Jesu zheito kaleipyi takle Jaonaa zaiteipii keipyile Jumagesa kaleipyi takle Kasangpii I
Pumpii naale.

Keipyi takle Jaonaa zaiteipii keipyile Keipyi takle Jaonaa zaiteipii kaleipyi.

2. Jesu zheikito I ntahle Gohlung ka ntah tampeilak Ina tile Ahma kavai tei Gohlungto Ah
lungsa leile.

3. I malum kalei kapyi piigo Tinglang kaleita malumle I lii tchiisupii touwo lakle Ah
lungkasyitei goh liile.

4. Ah pumtei kavai I ngoutangle Sagong tingshang go ntahle Ahna lungsyile nyi meihang go
Kamyi kito tchii ntahpyi.

title: OH, THE LOVE THAT SOUGHT ME!
details:
(S.S.59) I PET .1:19 W. SPENCER WALTON.,1850-
1906 REV.A.J.GORDON, DD,1836-1895
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ina kemlung to nlumsa, tatkalei kaktei, Lungkasyi piina pangtat pyisa pang gongpyile.

Rakot hangna ntahsana, Ka ntah mah pungdo lakle.

Lungkasyipii pyile, Zai teipii lutakle. Lungkasyi paito panggong pyile Jaonaa kak n'goh
panggong pyile.

2. Ina kamage tinglangki Ahna Keipyile; Lungkasyi samdo tampyi gohmah tang taklesa,
Eisong lungsyi kaki samtei Bikaki ka ntah samle.

3. Baiki jotpyi gehkeisa gohjaangpii zaipatle, Hoksa nuisa pyiki tu pyihung keipyi takle,
N'goh daziika lungsyisa Kadaa tchiipyisa leijoule.

4. Ahma kavai tei gohjaang piido vaisa leile, Kamadat samtei Ina tikeiwo takdichii, Ah
peebangto gong satsana, Tam kamatoi lii tchiitangle.

title: ANGELS FROM THE REALM
details:
. (SS.29) MATT.2:2 T.MONTCOMERY DR.GUANTLETT
DO IS C
lyrics:
1. Sating gamto sating gam rakot sazyi pouryi humpyi, Bangpii teimahumdo Jesu kalungdo
saa mpatle.

Gonglo gonglo ratatude, Khrista Sagong Jesugo.

2. Jao kakoi mei tinghum tingsumka Jao koisa kaleikak Kavai sageitina teibam kitei vai
maraang pyile.

3. Kamalum meihang tatde, sazyipou mah kavai kitei, Mei hangna kamaningle Jesu
Khristago kalungtei.

4. He sazyi pouryi meihangna shiipyilo kabi samtei, Tingnei David namlungto Jesu Khristago
manaale.

title: NOTHING MATTERS
details:
. (Alex 410) ROM.8:38-39 C.A.M C.AUSTIN MILES.
DOH IS D.
lyrics:
1. Goh puidi kamong teina sungwo kido, I na kempuidi teitatsa leikido, Kahemna goh
vangwo kido hingmakle, Pumpii kasuichii hingmak.

I hingmak Pumpiina kasui kapyikito, Pumpiina n'goh koipyi, I hingmak Pumpiina lungsyi
kapyi kito Ahna koi leile.

2. Pumpii ku gongtang karam I hingmakle, Gohkemtei jai katuklung toikei takle, Pumpiina
goh kem matum gahpyi takle, Ahna gohlat shiipyile.

3. Pumpiina n'goh juhmage pyisalei, Ah lungkasyi teipii goh mikdwi gahpyi, Madatle
Pumpiina lungsyi kapyitei, Lungsyi kaki Pumpiile.

title: CHRIST IS RISEN
details:
. (SS.156) MTT.28:6. F.J.CROSBY. GEO. C. STEBBINS.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Jesu ringtak Halleluyah, Kataikito ringtakle, Row kiteito ringkiih takle, Kataigotei
ngamtakle.

Jesu ringtak Halleluyah, Ntahpiina tokryile, Katai teina ngamsu takle, Julo tukam gahtakle.

2. Jesu ringtak Halleluyah, Jesu kangmei ntahlo, Kamage kamyi gatakle, Sagong naa Pumpii
teile.

3. Jesu ringtak Halleluyah, Ahna tam I ringtakle, Ahna Sagongbam kiihtakle, Kasagoi bamki
kiihtak.

title: POWER TO SAVE
details:
. (R.D.S. 128) W.A.O.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Gohlung swipii lii tchiitangle, Gohrangii heisa tchiitangle Kamajung ntak doutangle
Keikabui Pumpiida lei.

Tchiiloilo ntahsana tchiiloi keilo. Eikamadat kasagah samtamle. Tamroilo sazyi pouryi,
Keikabui Pumpiida lei.

2. Oh, liiroktei shiiki hingle Jesuna lung tchiimatei pyi, Meikatihng lungkasyi piina Keikabui
Pumpiida lei.

3. Kemmei gong Ahgo kadoulo, Jesugotei nang malumlo, Go chiilung tchii ntah pyitang,
Keikabui Pumpiida lei.

title: COME THOU FOUND OF EVERY BLESSING
details:
. (Alex274) NORMANDY C.BOST, 1790-1874.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Satoi hangkapyi Abangpii, gohlung kasyi lii tchiine, Lungkasyi dwipok kalui gah,
tammatoi lii I tchiine

2. Satinggam rangiimatei lii, n'gohdo rali pyilo, Golung kasyi zang gamteito, koikapyi lii
tchiitangle

3. Satoi hangkapyi Abangpii, kem tchiisa kasoi I le, Lukei pyitangle malumlo, gokee
panggong pyitangle,

4. Ina diisa tattukido, Jesuna lat kaleipyi, Kataikito keipyinesa, zaipatsa taipyi takle.

5. Satoi hangkapyi Abangpii, goda I gong liitleile, Golungkasyi rengtei piina, n'goh kang
n'japyilo

6. Godato I tukasuta gobai teipii gompyilo. Gohlungdo tchii mateipyilo, satinggam I
pihkabui.

title: PEACE!BE STILL
details:
. (S.S.61) MK. 4:39. MARY A.BAKER H.R.PALMER,1834-1907
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Tingkei tingrot teihjusana adwi mpong humtangle, Sating gamki kamong myi eisa mbeih
katubam gahle, Nyihang lungkasyi tei gahpo, dakumpii zyihum lei? Kamage sadoi kashyi
bam kitei ngalum hum eitang takle.

Tingkei tingrot gohmah katam samtei shiipyilo, Sazyi pouryi ngam meikanado Ina tongsa
kalei malyi eigotei, Meikanado tchiipak peiwolakle adwijai ma dwikadi teinado Ahnyi
gohmah katam suitangle, majunglo, majunglo Ahnyi Ina katam suitangle, majung wolo.

2. Pumpii lung kamage teipii, magesa rataleile, Gohmah rangii mageju tangle, oh
makengmatuh pyilo, Kemki mah kaset kalaktei kamyi kimah ngamle, Gahtangle kasangpii
gah eitangle, kalangsa gongliit pyilo.

3. Pumpii kahing tei gah eitak majungsana ntaktang, Leimik kavai tei vaimaang pyisa, ka
ntah switei gongle, Keikapyi go kasui bamtang, n'goh toipyi sulo, Ntah ntahsa karyiku
gongsa ntahsa ntaktangle.

title: BLEST BE THE TIE THAT BINDS
details:
. (S. S. 506) MATT. 11: 30. REV. J. FAWCETT,1740-1817
H. G. NAGELI,1768-1836
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Lungkasyi reng teipii, Kangkabam Christian le; Sating gammei kum lungkasyi, Rahet kabi
kangle.

2. Nyihang Pumpii doito Ratasa kaang leile, Kahing kachiih matum madum; Nyimei hang
njoile.

3. Kamage doukido, Niniina ninago, Lungkasyi mikdwitei patsa Nyihang pung njoitang.

4. Lungkasyi kangmei hang, Nyihang n'nou kido Lungswi ninasa nlei gong; Kadou maji
deno.

title: ONLY A STEP TO JESUS
details:
. (S.S. 448) I SAM. 20: 21. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915
W. H. DOANE,1832-1915
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesugo malum katu, peekang hangnina roi, Gonglo kemtam mpatsa Pumpiigo malumlo,
Peekaang nina, peekaang nina, peekaang ninaroi, Gonglo kemtei toi eisa Pumpiina
kasuipyi tang Ahlung kasyitei julo, nyigo pyisa leile.

2. Karingmah malumwolo latsa kalei lattei, Lungkasyi piinalatlei, kemtei gahpyinesa.

3. Tingneika ngamjaang teipii, kavaiki liitnesa, Peekaang ninaroile, datchiisa mazhiimakpo?

 4. Nyimeihang jaangpiina Bangpiina Rangiitei pyi, Taikalei kamalum meiteina ringloi tangle.

title: RIDE ON IN MAJESTY
details:
. (C.H. 186) JOHN 12:12 HENRY H. MILMAN, 1791-1868 GEO C.
STEBBINS.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Takoigam tongsana kagong, Pumpii gotei hosanna saa Sazyi pouhang hiipai piina,
Kasuisa tammatoi tangle.

Pumpii hosanna! Hosanna! Gozhei kisa vai matulo, David mah naanapou, Hosanna!

Dikakipii, Hosanna!

2. Satinggam rakot hangteina, Jesugo kaju ntakma, Ahmah katai tinglang gongsa, Swi
magesa jule Pumpii.

3. Takoigam tongsana kagong, Sazyi poumeina tisupa Meihangna girang eitakle, Jaang
tumpiinei ringloi takle.

4. Kem kapungmei hangjaang piina, Pyimasuk sana taikapyi Pumpii Jesu Khrista Ahtei Kalui
tciikasu sagongle.

title: WEDDING HYMN Y
details:
. K. S.1915-2002 Y. K. SHIMRAY.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Myikapang nounah gotei, Bangpiina mazhiipyisa, Apum nina tchiipyile, Kamatei mah
ngamtei.

Rahang piinei ralii peitei, Ahnei lungsyihum matulo, Lungmei kuitulo, Ntahsana Bangpii
kasui pyilo.

2. Myikapang nounah gotei, Apwi apfii toi eisa, Chiilung satei doukalu Ka ntah mah
Chiilung.

3. Myikapang nou naagotei, Lungsyisana leitulo, Kamage kalak pungsa, Katai katang piina.

4. Myikapang mah ngam eitei, Bangpii mah lungmaang katu, Kasang mah keelung tchiisa,
Bangpii naamei tchiitang.

title: WE HAVE A FIRM FOUNDATION
details:
. (S.S. 851) 1 COR. 3: 11. LYMAN G. CUYLER. IRA. D.
SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Kalui tchiikasu sazyi tei Pumpii Jesule, Ka ntah sating gamlei, Bangpii Ahsam sekle,
Kaset kalak gongkido, kamong myi eikido, Ahna mpatpyi lakle, Ahgo malum meigo.

Pumpii go tammatoilo Ahzhei dimatulo Nyihang nsung katuki Tu kaditei sekle.

2. Ahgo malum meigotei toisang toipyi lakle, Sazyi pouryi ngamnado, ngamsang ngam
wolakle, Ahbaipii keipyitangle, sating gam teimahum, Ahbai kiihkangki teito, zangzyisa
ntakle.

3. Sating gammah lungkasyi, Bangpiina keikapyi Kaset kalak kuneisa, rangii keipat pyile,
Beulah sazyibam kito, Ahrok kabiteipii, Meitang tangpii lii tchiile, keikapyi ma liitei.

title: TO GOD BE THE GLORY !
details:
(S. S. 23) PS. 29: 2. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1823-1915 W. H.
DOANE,1831-1915
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii taa kadi gotei tammatoilo, Kemmeigo lungsyisa Ahna taipyile, Ahna kemmei
jaangpiina taipyi takle, Meihang jaangpii karing puidi latpyile.

Bangpii tam matoilo meihang shiimatulo, Bangpii tam matoilo meihangna rangaalo, Jesu
paito Bangpii datei liitwolo. Ahngam jaangpii Ahgotei tam makaanglo.

2. Jesu zaiteipii lusa keipyi takle, Kamalum meigo Pumpiina tampyile, Kem tchiikido
kamalum teilei dichii, Jesu paito keikalu teidou tangle.

3. Ahna ngam kadi ralisa tchiipyile, Naa Jesu paito rangaa doumatulo, Jesu go kangou
piineitei kamadat, Kisa kamatei kasagoi doutangle

title: TRUST ON !
details:
(S. S. 692) Is:12:2 Eliza A Walker. Geo C. Stebbins.
Key F
lyrics:
1. Malumlo malumlo, Kahung kanang doukido, Nangna ngamjou tangle, Pumpiina tchiiha
tangle.

Malum gatlo tinghum kamyi kido, Malum gatlo tingchoi tingtang leitak.

2. Malum gatlo doikashyi, Kahem gongtu kido, Pumpii teina doikashyi, Gotei jupyi tangle.

3. Pumpii teina teimahum, Kalei kang kasangle, Malumlo malumlo Kalui katang koipyi tang.

title: WHEN I GET HOME
details:
.(R.S.466) I THUPH. 21:4 C.A.M. C. AUSTIN MILES.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Gohmah kee maang kalupiinei leimik tei, Gohmah pot kamasui tei matou tangle, Juwo
kalak sana peimani tei keisa, Kee maang katu katang n'goh vaipyi.

Sating gammah gohmah keetei, Pitang kalupiinei tei kalak kaniih, Matum madum toi
eisana, Kalak kaniih tei gatang teibam kitei.

2. Gohmah sating gam pikalu piineitei, Kamyi tinghum katu teido gahtangle, Sating
gammah kavai n'goh seimaang pyile, Keetei pihkasuta goh vaipyile.

3. Gohkee sating gam pihkalu piineitei, Goh mikpii keikapyi piigo ngoutangle, Pumpii
peebang teito sazyi nriit tchiisa, Kalui tchiisupii Ah kasui lungtang.

title: TRIM YOUR LAMPS !
details:
((R.S. 521) ANON . OLD MELODY
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ntahlo tinglang gongtakle, Khristana kamong tongsana Lattang Ahmei hanggo, Tchiidalo
goma meebung,
Tchiidalo goma meebung, Kasangpiina tchiida bamlo, goma meebung, Tingsumka
gongtang, tchiidalo meebung; Gongtangle, tinghum tingsumka gongleng tangle.

2. Bwika lattei konghum sana Sazyi pouryi gaham tangle; Kemmei hatsa leitang.

3. Ntah Khrista kagong kaktei, Kabi katchii meihang gotei, Pangpihtang satinggam.

4. Gonglo gohkang sanameihang, Kem katchii meigo keinesa Pumpiina gongleile.

title: WAITAND MURMUR NOT
details:
. (S. S. 710) Ps. 37: 7. W. H. BELLAMY. WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Lung magesa kaleimei hang! Dajaangpii lungmage leipo? Kalak kaniih kagah kitei, Gonyi
jaangpiile timakpo?

Koisa bamseilo, ntahsana, Koisa bamseilo, ntahsana Koisa bamlo, golung magesulo.

2. Gopot masui beidi eisa, Setjulesa nlik sulo, Julo, lungset tei doutangle. Koisatlo golung
majungsa.

3. Goma puidi tei shyikido, Crosski taikapyigo julo, Gorangiina magekalei Goma Pumpiina
jupyitang.

4. Ngam tchiilo kamage meihang, Karatatei mangei tangle, Ntah leimiktei gonglei tak,
Koisatlo golung majungsa.

title: TRUSTING IN THEE
details:
. (SS. 567) Is.12:2 F.J. CROSBY GEO.C.STEBBINS.
DOH IS AB
lyrics:
1. Keikapyi koikapyi Pumpii Jesu, I Pumpiigo malum leile; Mangei wokalak ntah doutakle
Jesugo malum leile.

Maning….. Malum, Keikapyi Pumpii gotei….. Mangei paiwo kalak ntah doule, Jesugo malum
leile.

2. Tingkei tingrot kahungtei gongkido, I Pumpiigo malum leile; Goh rangii Jesudato ntakne,
Pumpiigo malum leile.

3. Doi kashyi teipii baangnei wokido, I Pumpiigo malum leile; Pumpii Jesuna koipyi
jupyitang Pumpiigo malum leile.

4. Pumpii Jesu keikapyi Pumpiile, I Pumpiigo malum leile; Koipyi tangle jupyi tangle n'go
Kamalum pai kiteito.

title: THY BROTHER CALLS TO THEE
details:
. ((M. H. 471) BISHOP JOSEPH F. BERRY. DR. S. B.
JACKSON.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tulo, Christian! Kazyi kito tulo, kalat shiipo? Kamyilam mah azang kadiikito n'go latlei,
Kempot masui pungsa tat katu kito ahnyina, Keitang karam fiitatsa lei, gohsanapii latlei.

Gohsanamei latlei… Gohsanamei latlei… Karyi kaiwosa kadiiki teito latsa leile,
Gohsanamei latlei… adwijai kaiwosa, Pakpat kabui tisupiina Hatsana latsa lei.

CODA Latlei Ahna, Gohsanamei latlei. (2 times)

2. Tukkaki ma dwijai lungto takliit nasa tatlei, Kalangsa hoisuchii ngalum maang kasang
eitangle, Keikapyi Pumpii tei Ahma kavai matipyilo, Ahnyimah latkalei shiipo? Gohsanamei
latlei,

3. Kemmah azang matum hanggo keipyinesa saalo, Mik ngoukasu meigo kavai lungki
pangpat pyilo, Ahnyi sagong jaangpii ka ntahki liitmatulo, Ahnyido gongliit humdichii,
daziika ntah tang

title: THOU MY EVERLASTING PORTION
details:
. (S.S. 574) COL. 2 : 6. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-
1915 SILAS J. VAIL,1818-1884
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Magah kasu nang gohmahle Kanghego songdo kisa Rangii puidi katang goma, N'go
kasuisa tatne.

N'go manang sana, Goteih suisa tatne Rangii puidi katangpiina N'go kasuisa tatne.

2. Sazyi pou ma ka ntah do Tangha kabido makle Magesa I ngam tchiihum tang, N'go
kasuisa tatne.

3. Katai ningkam majuwosa Dwijai tei pangkai pyilo Karingmah kongmwi katangtei N'go
kasuisa tatne.

title: A CALL FOR REAPERS
details:
. (S. S. 1086) MATT. 9 : 37. J. O. THOMPSON, 1782-1818 J. B. O.
CLEMM. 19TH CENTURY
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Azang ningkamto kalei arii, Bui matum madumtei, Leimik sei kabi teipiina, Ariibui gotei
seisa.

Alu karachet tinglang, Gongkasu kiteika n'goh Rachettang karam jaangteipii, N'goh
tampyilo Pumpii.

2. Tingchoi nuhka tuhsa tingna, Lutaa tchiitang karamtei, Atei mahum pyilo tingkii, Achii
pungtang karamtei.

3. Gongmaji wosana riibui poi, Nkoitang karamtei, Tinglang teina rituh tangle, Kalangsa
gong kasuna.

title: A CHRISTIAN BAND
details:
. (S. S. 1094) HEB. 10 : 22. Words arr. for this work from L. F.
LINDSAY. JNO. R. SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Christian mei matum madumna, Jesu samtei suitang lesa, Kabi rasamtei suidichii,
Karing rangii golung liitne.

Christian saryi meihang, Jesu zhei jumsana Satoi kapyi jaangpii, Ahgo tam matoide,
Lungswi nina tchiisa, Pumpii Ahzhei gotei Christian meihang piina, Tammatoi humtangle.

2. Nyi meihang gong nduiwosa, Khristago tammatoi lii tchii, Lung mateisa fiiwo dichii, Kalui
kagah karing doune.

3. Pumpii ngamtei tchiihum tangle, Tamkabam tei maning humtang, Ahteih suisa
malumwode, Keikapyi tei nang doutangle.

title: ADAM AND EVE
details:
. (R. S. 289) WM. PETTIGREW.1869-1944 WM. G. FISCHER,1835-1912
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Eden toipyi lungkitei, Kareiki katchii meitei; Nounah nina tchiipyisa Hung gatsana
kasuipyi.

2. Kasui kareiki ngamtei, Adam nei Evena tchiipyi, Ahnei hangna myi kapang Bangpiina
kasui pyile.

3. Myi kapang mah ngam eitei, Kasang mah ngamle sana; Bangpii Azheiki teito Nyihangdo
ntahtude.

4. Pei pou haakito reipii, Myi kapang ei tchiisana, Apwi apfii toisana, Ahnei nina tchiitangle.

5. Myi pang kapyi hangna tei, Anounah tchiiwo sana, Lungsyisana lungtulo; Rahetsana
lungtulo.

6. Ahneidoi bimatulo, Naado hangka lungsana, Kasang ngam tchiimatulo Pumpiina kasui
pyilo.

7. Lung bihkido lungshyido, Katai katang teipiina Pumpiigo mataa tulo, Ahlungset tei
doutangle.

title: CONSIDER THE LILIES
details:
. (TUNE S. S. 487) MATT. 6: 28, LK. 12: 27. Y. K. SHIMRAY.1915-
2002 REV. R. LOWRY,1826-1899
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Bomsa kalei dwijai paigo, Maningsa kalei seilo, Neikado ahna langdo tchiilei mak, Pei
daklei makle.

Swi maning gatlo, (Maningsa mashak loilo) Swi maning gatlo, (Maningsa mashak loilo)
Bomsa m,pai kalei dwijai kiteito Tchiigatpiina maninglo maninglo, Bomsa kalei dwijai pai.

2. Bomsa kalei dwijai paigo Maningsa mashak seilo, Neikado peimani gah makle, Malot
mahing makle.

3. Bomsa kalei dwijai paitei Tchiigatpii maning loilo, Solomondo pai ngoukabi tei kumpii
Vaiwo makle.

4. Bangpiina pai eiziika gotei Lungsyi pyipo dichii Sazyipou meigo kisa bimatulo, Makot
pyilo.

title: HOLD THE FORT
details:
. (S. S. 669) REV. 2: 25. P. P. B. PHILIP. P. BLISS,1838-1876
KEY D
lyrics:
1. He goh kangmei ! sating gamki Jesuna tamlei : Nyi hanggo tchiiha pyinesa Eitoi gong
leile:
"Malum gatlo, I gong leile." Jesuna tamle Sating gamtei nnii wolo, Nyihang malum tang

2. Julo, mei hangnaka gonglei Kahemna pangsa, Ahnyi daziika teikito Gahum nitakle.

3. He, Sating gam jumakiihlo Bwikalat shiilei, Ahgo Juhsa juhkarou go Nyi hangna ngam
tang.

4. Saryi tchii humkido nyihang Taitang karam ga, Nyihang kahem tei gong lei tak Teisa tchii
tude.

title: CONQUERORS THROUGH THE BLOOD
details:
. (R.S. 893) C. H. M. 1862-1929 C. H. MORRIS.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Saryi katchii kitei nyina ngamtangle Jesu khristana zaikahum paikito Pumpiitei nyida
leiwotak dichiina Ah teimahumgo meikado ngamwolak.

Nyina ngamtangle Ahzhei paikiteito Pumpiina ngam matutang Ahtei mahum teipii Kem
kapung meijaang piina Taikalei Jaonah tei ringloi tangle. Keikapyi jaangpii nyina ngamhum
tangle.

2. Pumpii paito nyina doilam tattude Mateikasu kahem gotei ngamtakle Nyihangna
Pumpiigo tammatoi tangle Ahzhei paito nyina ngamkalu doutang.

3. Kemgo ngamwo kalu meihanggo teina Satinggam koikabam teipii pyichiitang Satinggam
kangam mah njeido doutang Mai kating peimani pyihung keipyi tang.

title: ABIDING !
details:
(SS.628) C.B.J.ROOT. JOHN 15:4. S.C. WRIGHT.
DOH IS A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Kamadat kajang zyi bamki, Liit kabui Pumpiida gonglo, Ka ntah piina tokryile, Cross
jaangpii I ntah doule.

Pumpiida liitpyilo, Kazangzyi bamki, Bam ntakwolo; Pumpiida gonglo.

2. Pumpiina nyigo tamdekle, Satinggam kamajung bamle; Tampai kalak sating gamtei;
Taikasu karing doutangle.

3. Rangii karingtei pyitangle, Daziika n'tah rasampo Taikido ringloikei tangle, Keipyi tangle
Ahda gonglo.

4. Sazyi pouryi ngam lui eisa, I satinggamki tuhtangle; Kalak kaniihdo gahtangle, Katai
katudo gahtangle.

title: COMING
details:
. (SS.186) W.O. CUSHING. JAMES 5:8 IRA.D.SANKEY.
DOH IS AB.
lyrics:
1. Oh, zang gamto koikalei mei; Tinglangtei nalei tak, Pumpii nleigong tangkaram; Saasa
tamlei takle.

Pumpii humtang karam, Tinglang nalei takle, Pumpii humtang karam Meihangna ratade, (2
times)
Zanghum teido vai eitakle. Pumpii tam makaangde.

2. Zyisa kaleimei hanggotei, Makengsa tampyilo, Satinggam satoi punghumlei, Tchiidasa
koituhde.

3. Doisam katam meina katam, Sagongtei humleitak; Satinggam Pumpii kasuisa, Nyihang
tam makaangde.

title: COME
details:
(G. B. 308) RS. RUICHUMHAO, 1906-1932 MISS ETTA CAMPBELL.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Gonglo, Maralui kalung hang Kamyi sumto tatpatlo, Pumpii Jesugo kasuisa Cross peirah
poimakiide.

Rangii matei go kasuisa, Pumpii ma Crosstei pungde, Taido ringdo Pumpii zheito
Marameigo toisulo.

2. Pumpii sagong saryi meihang, Kadaziika ngoubipo Maramei jaangpii ratade, Keikapyi
Pumpii zheito.

3. Teihsa toilo, sekapyi mei, Nyi jaangpii Pumpiina hat, Nyihang nado Maramei lui,
Lungkalei jaangpii hatde.

4. Lungkasyi gohkang sanamei, Pumpii puidiki liitlo, Pumpii zheigo tam matoide, Sana
pyihung tei doutang.

title: ANGELS, WE HAVE HEARD ON HIGH
details:
. (S. M. 61) LUKE 2:14 IRIS: IRIS:
KEY IS G.
lyrics:
1. Rakot meiteina lii katchii, Azang ningkam hangki shii, Ahnyina katchii liiroktei Sazyi
pouhang shiigongle.

Pa… ryi lampaang Bangpiigo reimatu, Pa… ryi lampaang Bangpiigo reimatulo, Sazyi pouryi
meihang go majung matulo, Sazyipou majung matulo, meihang doibitulo.

2. Bethlehemki maang julosa Rakot meina lii tchiilei Kamatei naa luhngbam takle, Maangsa
ratatu humlo.

3. Takoi kokchyiki zyikalei, Naagotei tam matoide, Joseph Marydo heisana Keikapyi mah lii
tchiide.

title: CLOSER, LORD, TO THEE
details:
. (S. S. 639) PS.73:28 E.G. TAYLOR GEO.C.STEBBINS.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Pumpiida I manang tang, kisa manang tang, Go kiihkangto gohchiilung, ei lungsa leitang
Kempot masuiju takle, teilungto kabiit meisa Saryi bikabui jaangpii, goda manangne.

 2. Nlei gongne Pumpii nleih kasu koitu Tingkei tingrot gongkido dwidet dichiido Goma
peebang kangteito,mbeihtang kahing gahsa! Kalui tchiikasu Pumpii, I gongliit leile.

3. Manang gongleile Pumpii, kisa manang tang, Meinaa sapii mpou jaangpiina rangaalo
Goma lungkasyi teipii n'gohdo lungsyi pyilo Kalui tchiikasu koituda gongliit leile.

title: ANYWHERE WITH JESUS !
lyrics:
1. Jesugo kasuisa katatmei hangtei, Sazyi pouryi doi kashyina ngam wolak, Ka ntah timak
