Ah kasuisu dichii, Jesugo kasui dichii I hing lakle. Abam hang kiteito kahingtei gale, Jesugo
kasui dichii ntah humtang.

2. Jesugo kasuisa I roipii tatlak, Kanghe meina goh toi eichiido Ahlei, Kamyibam ningkam
teito Ahna pangpyi, Jesugo kasuichii ka ntah roile.

3. Sating sazyi pouryito kalei hanggo, Koipyinesa Jesuna latsa leile, Shiitang karam jaangpii
kasangsa leilo, Jesuna n'go puidi tampyi tangle.

title: GATHERED HOME
details:
. (S. S. 912) JN. 14: 2. Words arranged. IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kadou tangpo keeto neika tingchoi, Ngoukabi kavai karyi kuto? Lungkasyi meina koisa
leile Daziikapii ntahtang teikaktei.

Sakeeto nduitang Karyidwina kalong kakteito Nduitang sakeeto Kanghe hango kasuisa
bamtang.
2.Kadou tangpo keeto neika tingchoi, Kemmah kasettei toi eisana Teito nyihang kadou
lepona Ka ntah rangaa kada tamtangpo?

3. Kadou tangpo keeto neika tingchoi, Nyigo keikapyigo kangou kak Lungkasyi kanghe
hanggo ngouchii Ntah rangaatei kada tamtangpo?

title: CHRISTIAN, WALK CAREFULLY !
details:
(S. S. 617) G. C.S. EPH. 4: 1. GEO. C. STEBBINS,1846-
1945
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Christian mei tchii gatpiina tatpyilo, Kagong kamaang kitei kahem leile; Godoi reisa
lungto kahem leile, Gopee bai nlumsana tatpyilo.. Christian mei matumpii tchiigatpii
tatpyilo, Christian mei tchiigatlo, kou eitangle.

2. Christian mei matumpii swikak sulo, Tingkei tingrot teigongtuh podichii, Kamyi gotei
hingkasu jaangpiina, N'go keikapyipii gotei julo. Christian mei matumpii, swikak swiryi sulo,
Christian mei matumpii, gah eitangle.

3. Christian mei ratatei mangei sulo, N'go kalat tei nang mangei supii, Saryinat tei keisupii
tatdichii Golung kitei gongbam pyiwo lakle. Christian mei ratalo, Christian mei ratalo,
Christian mei ratalo, matou supii.

4. Christian mei matumpii, swi njoilo. Tinglang kagongki keipyiwo kabui, Samtak katchii
leimik kagong piinei, Pumpii dato satoitei doutangle. Christian swi njoilo, Christian swi
njoilo, Christian swi njoilo, koipyi tangle.

title: A SOLDIER OF THE CROSS
details:
. (S. S. 672) I TIM. 6: 12. ISAAC WATTS,1674-1748 IRA. D.
SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. I Cross mah saryimei teipo ? Jaonaa teisui leipo? Pumpii jaangpii I hing tangpo? Azheitei
latsupii.

Jesu zai kamatei zai! Ahna gohjaangpii tai Ahmah lungkasyi paikito Saryi pyihung doutang.

2. Ngam katchiimei doutang karam Saryi tchiisa leile. Ina lungset kito bamsa Satinggam
pitangpo?

3. Jukarou mei saryi katchii Ina ngamwo lakpo? Pumpiida liitmatu nesa, Sazyipou
tchiihapo?

4. I saryi tchiileng tangkaram Pumpiina satpyilo Gohbaiki teimahum pyilo Pumpii goh
keipyilo.

title: BRIGHT GLORY LAND
details:
. ((SS.941) IDA G. TREMAIN. REV.21:23 HABERT P. MAIN
DOH IS F.
lyrics:
1. Sageiti lougamto kavai ngoukabi sazyi leile, Leimik liittukido vaipyisa kalei sazyi leile;
Sazyi pouryi ntahrangaa doito kaki sazyi leile, Tinglang kalei taatei satinggam bamtei kamyi
gahle.

2. Bangpii namdi sanakabam vaimaraang sazyi leile, Koitu sagaapii mbaang kabam
vaimaraang sazyile; Sagaa sanapii tchiikabam keekumle kavai sazyitei, Teito vaipyisa satoi
pungsa kalui gahsa lungtang.

3. Kamalum paito nyina jumakiih kavaitei ngoule, Satinggam sazyito Khrista tei
vaimaraangsa lunglei; Tammatoi liitei tchiisa lung ntahsa Ahgotei toitang, Meihang mwipii
Sagonggo toisa kavai ramto lungtang.

title: BEHOLD, WHAT LOVE !
details:
((S. S. 21) M. S. SULLIVAN. J. MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii ma lungkasyi teina Madat kalei takle Kemkito nyigo keipyisa Pumpii naa
tchiipyile. J
ulo… daziika lungsyi! Nyihang go lungsyisa Ahnaa sapii mpougo pyi, Nyihang Pumpii
naameile. Kalui kagah tchiisupii.

2. Nyigo Ahda manang pyile, Meikating zai teipii, Pumpiigo lukakei jaangpii, Pumpii naa
tchiipyile.

3. Sating gam kitei, pidichii Nyihang dakum tangpo? Pumpiigo kangou piineitei, Nyido
Ahkum tangle.

4. Nyihangna malum gatwochii, Kamatei mei tchiitang, Ringkaloi Pumpiigo ngousa
Nyihangdo Ahkumtang.

title: HOW SWEET THE HOUR
details:
(S.S. 321) EP.3:15. F.J CROSBY SCOTCH AIR.
KEY F Moderato.
lyrics:
1. Tingnei tinghum ashum lungto, Jao kakoi meiteina, Jaotei koisa kalei kaktei Rakot teina
humsa, Rakot meina tamle, Hingsulo gonyi jaangpiina Sam kabi punghum lei.

2. Tingnei David mah nam lungto, Naa nina manaale; Gonyina maangsa juhtuhlo,
Luhngkabam naa gotei Takoi kokchyi lungka, Mazyi kabam naatei juhlo; Gonyina ngou
tangle.

3. Luhngsa kalei tinglang kaktei, Rakot teina humsa, Pumpii ma zheitei jumsana Tammatoi
lii tchiilei, Ahgo rataleile, Sazyi pouryi meihang godo Majung doumatulo.

title: HE IS SO PRECIOUS TO ME
details:
. (R. S. 615) C. H. G. CHAS. H. GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Keikapyipii sagong go I ntahle, Ahma kabi liitei Ina tchiihum tang, Ina soihsa leido Ahteih
suihum tang; Ahtei gohjaangpii bikile.

 Ah gohjaangpii meikatihngle; Goh jaangpii Ahna bikile, Sazyi pouna kei kapyipiigo titang;
Ahgoh jaangpii mei katihngle.

2. Kem kapung meigotei kadou tanglesa, Ahna sakai sariido koisa leile, Ahna lungsyi jusa
nyigo koisa lei! Gohpfii tei bikaki piile.

3. N'goh sating gamki pihmatu sana, Kamalum paito Ina Ahgo ngoutang, Ahma lungswi
kabitei Ina titang, Ahtei gohjaangpii kabile.

title: HE HIDETH MY SOUL
details:
. (S. S. 540) Ex. 33:22 MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 WM.J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Madatsa keikapyi Pumpii Jesule Gohjaangpii Ahna taipyile, Gohmah kaset kalaktei Ahna
pungpyi, Ka ntah karyidwi longpyi.

Ahna gohrangii keipyisa kabeihpyi, Gahkalak tukkaki kangto Ahmah lungkasyi lungkito
kabeihpyi Ahbai piina gompyi tangle, Ahbai piina keipyi tangle.

2. Madatsa keikapyi Pumpii Jesule, Gohmah kaset kalak pungpyi, Ina tchiisa kalei ngam
matum hangki Teimahum tei Ahna pyile.

3. Madatsa keikapyi Pumpii Jesule, N'goh nleihum latloitang, Pumpii Ahlung kasyitei I
suitangle. Keikapyi liitei tchiisana.

title: FIRMLY STAND
details:
. (S. S. 685) DR. C. R. BLACKALL. PS. 62: 2. W. H. DOANE,1832-1915.
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouto Pumpii jaangpii satlo, Tingkei tingrot kagong tinglang kaktei, Gahkasu tuditei
Ahroinale, Jukarou kagong kaktei.

Nyi sangtingsa satde koitu kadi dato, Khrista koitu paryito, Nyi kahem kito satsa leilepona,
Jesugo ngouwo laktakle. 2
. Kasang kito sattang karam male, Lung kamatei piina malum wosa, Sazyipou kakui kamaa
matumtei, Jesu teina ngam tangle.

3. Kasang kiteito sat sangting dichii. Tinglangtei tahngkido ngamleng tangle, Jesudato
majungsa lungtangle Tingkei tingrot gahsana.

title: HE LIVES ! HE LIVES
details:
. (GGSH. 75) A.H.A. MAT. 28:6. A.H. ACKLEY,1887-1960
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ringloi kalu Khristago nga ngahtang karamle, Eitoi sekdo Ahteina sazyi pouryi leile, Aha
kalaang gahkasu, lungkasyi sam teipii, Ina kalat sekpiina toipyi makle.

Khrista… Khrista… eitoido ringsa lei, Sating kataa n'goh pangpyi, Ahrasamdo tamle,
Khrista… Khrista… eitoido ringsa lei, Tisu dichii Ina tamne; Gohmah swiki ringlei.

2. Ina katat bamki Ahna kasuipyi humtangle, Gohswi kalak kitei Ahna ntak matule, Ngou
kahing tingkei tingrot Ahna nam masong pyi, Ahna nlei kahum kak lungsyi kitang.

3. Ntah humlo, Oh Christian tammatoi lii tchiilo, Kalui gahsa taksupii Sagong gotei toilo.

Malumsa kafii meigo Ahna toipyi lakle, Ahma lungkasyi kumpii tapii leipo?

title: STAR OF PEACE !
details:
.(S.S. 1064) J. CROSS SIMPSON. REV. XXI. 16 Dr. L. Mason
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ntah ngoukabi sageiti, Goh tchii manui kumpiina Zyibam kagah ahnyi goteido nuimatulo
(2times)

 2. Oh, satoi kapung sageiti, Meigo tchii ntahkapyi Ting tukakto lungsa kaleihanggo
lungsyilo (2times)

3. Malum kabuima sageiti, Kalakmei tchii ntahlo Kanghe kagahmei hango teido tchii
ntahpyi (2times)

4. Chyitatpyi kalei sageiti, Gahkaleih go fiipyilo, Keelam nleigong kabui jaangpiina fiipyile
(2times)

title: HE THAT WINNETH SOULS IS WISE
details:
. ((R.S. 317) E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 J. M.
HARRIS.19TH CENTURY
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii jaangpii ngam katchiimei ntahlo, Sating gamto sesana tei koibamle; Rangii kaki
pangsa kagongmei gotei; Pumpiina satoi pyitang.

Madatle sating gamtei, Pumpii Ahdoiki teika Rangii kaki pangsa kagongmei gotei; Pumpiina
satoi pyitang.

2. Kavai peimani keisa ntah tangle, Lungsyi kaki Pumpii Jesukee teito, Sating sazyiki
meipang kagong meitei Ntah rangaa doutangle.

3. Ratakatu kasuisana tat tangle, Diisa tuhkalei meigotei fiiwosa; Pumpiima Jaokee
gongkaliit paneitei, Pumpiina satoi pyitang.

4. Pumpii rasam kabitei tamsa tatlo, Madatkalei hang Pumpiina tchiipyile, Kemkapung
meihang Pumpiida gongliitlo; Keikapyi teidou tangle.

title: HALLELUYAH HE IS RISEN
details:
. (SS.157) MTT. 28:6 P.P.B P.P. BLISS.
DOH IS G.
lyrics:
1. Halleluyah Jesu ringtak, Jesu satinggam tutak. Katai gotei ngamwo takle, Satinggam
Rakot ntah, Ringtakle, Ringloi keitakle, Taikei lakle, ring takle, Ring takle, ringloi keitakle
Ring takle, taikei lakle.

2. Halleluyah ringkii takle, Nyihang Pumpii tchiipyile, Pumpii rangii teipii nyigo, Sating kataa
kasuipyi, Nyigo kasang tchiipyitakle, Kemtei gahpyi tanglesa Ring takle ringloi keitakle,
Nyigo tchiimatei pyile.

3. Halleluyah ringkii takle, Khrista kataigo ngamtak, Pumrong kasangpii ringkii tak, Ringloi
kalu Jesuna, Malummei ringmatu tangle, Rowto ring matutangle, Malum meigo ring
matutang, Rowto ring matu tangle.

title: FOLLOW ON!
details:
(S. S. 529) JN. 12: 26. REV. W. O. CUSHING,1823-1902 REV. R.
LOWRY,1826-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesugo kasuisa ningkamki maang tangle, Lungkasyi hiipai mpaikalei kongkitei, Pumpiina
pangkatat bamhang kitei suitangle, Kangam mah pyihung doukabui maang tangle.

Suitang suitang Jesutei suitangle, Katalam gongchiido Ahtei suitangle, Suitang suitang
Jesutei suitangle, Katalam gongchiido Jesutei suitang.

2. Katalam gongchiido Jesutei suitangle, Tingkei tingrot dwi kaditei gongtuh chiido, Ahna
pangtat pyitang I hingtang karam gahle, Pumpiina pangkatat ei sadoi bile.

3. Ningkam kido kasagoi zanggam kitodo, Jesugo kasui tatchii I ntah tangle, Pumpiina
pangkatat hangki I suitat tangle, Bangpii Ahma keetei I gong lengtangle.

title: HE ROSE
details:
. (EASTER) MATT. 28: 6
KEY G. REFRAIN: (Joyfully)
Ringtak… Ringtak… Kataiki teito. Ringtak… Ringtak… Kataiki teito. Ringtak… Ringtak…
Kataigo ngamsa Bangpiina sating gam pang kiihtak.
lyrics:
1. Jehudi meina girang Cross pouryi kito (3 times) Bangpiina satinggam pangkiihtak.

2. Josephna pumrong gotei, Rowlungki goikei (3 times) Bangpiina satinggam pangkiihtak

3. Rakot matei humsana, Koitutei koktoi (3 times) Bangpiina satinggam pangkiihtak

4. Mary hatsa hatsana Rowkitei fiimaang (3 times) Bangpiina satinggam pangkiihtak.

title: FOR YOU AND FOR ME
details:
. (S.S. 414) MATT. 11: 28. W.L.T. WILL L. THOMPSON,1847-1909
KEY A. Slow.
lyrics:
1. Jesuna lungkasyi rokpii latsalei, Gojaang gohjaang piinale, Jesuna pangkanyi jaangpii
latsalei,
Nyijaangpii koisa leile. Ahkee gonglo kamage marii meihang, Jesuna lungkasyi rokpii
latsalei, Gong humlo Ahma keetei.

2. Jesuna latsa kalei kaktei nyina, Dajaangpii paksa leipo? Pumpii ma juhmage kapyi
lungkasyi, Gojaang gohjaang piinale.

3. Nlei kasu Pumpii ma lungkasyitei, Kem kapung meijaang piina, Ahma juhmage kapyi
liitbam sana, Nyina kakaang tei pyile.

title: GIVE, O GIVE !
details:
(M.H. 391) ANON. WM. B. BRADBURY,1816-1868
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Karyi dwina tamle, Pumpii ngamtei tchiilo, Karyi dwina tamle, Sazyi pouryi bamhangki
Hang kakto kasettei Ile, teikido ntakmak, Katat katat bamlyikito dwitei Ina kajuilei. Lii
katchiitei njasa Pumpii ngamtei tchiilo, Lii katchiitei njasa kaleihang pyilo.

2. Kajik dwina tamle, Pumpii ngamtei tchiilo, Kajik dwina tamle, kamajung tinghum
tinglang, Taikalei ralui teigodo, huikalei hiipaido, Taksupii dwitei pyileile, boiloi kabuijaang
piina.

3. Sageitina tamle, Pumpii ngamtei tchiilo, Sageitina tamle, Sazyi pouryi bamhangki, Go
kavai chengsa leikido, myikalei tinghum lam Raasa kaleimeina ngousa zyi bisa lung ntahle.

title: HOLY SPIRIT, FAITHFUL GUIDE !
details:
(S.S. 194) PS. 25:5. M.M.W. M.M. WELLS,1815-1895
KEY G. Not too slowly.
lyrics:
1. Koikapyi Rangii matei, toisulo Christian meigo, Baikokto chyisa tatlei, rangiitaa katchii
meigo, Kaset kalak ntahpyi, Ahma kakum samteipii, Lungsyisa latsa leile, n'go kee
panggong pyitang.

2. Neikado toipyi makle, kasang kito pangpyile, Kamyibam kahing kito, nyihanggo koipyisa
lei, Tingkei tingrot kagongki, hingbeidi jutanglesa Lungsyisa latsa leile, N'go kee pangong
pyitang.

3. Nyimah ngamtei lui eisa, mpat kapyi koileile, Sating gam liittang karam, nyihang zheitei
ryibampo? Kaset kalak tinglangki, Ahzeiteipii keipyile; Lungsyisa latsa leile, N'go kee pang
gongpyine.

title: HALLELUYAH ! S
details:
.K.D.1928-1991 S.K. DANIEL.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Magenaa kumpii kalung Ahnaa tei, Meihang ma Sagong teile, Malumlo keikapyi Pumpii
gotei Katai kito ringtakle.

Halleluyah… halleluyah… Rowtei nado ngamwo makle, Halleluyah… halleluyah…
Satinggam kee kamwi latpyitak

2. Keikapyi Pumpiigo gikatuki, Juhkarou meina ntah Kahem teinado ntahsa leile, Madatsa
ringloi takle.

3. Juhlo juhlo sazyi meihang gotei, Zaiteipiina lutakle, Ahgo malum katu meihang teina,
Keikapyi tei doutangle.

title: BEULAH LAND
details:
. (S.S. 944) DEUT. 33: 28. EDGAR PAGESTITES. JNO. R. SWENEY,1837-
1899
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. I sazyi kabi bamki maang, Teiki kalei tei gohmahle, Abam tei vaisa leihum tang, Tinghum
kamyi tei tutakle.

Oh Beulah ram! Kasagah nam! I na kamyi tei majusa Zang gamto satsa jumaangki, Kadaa
tchiikabam tei gohmah, Teiki pumtei kavai kalei, Sating gam keetei gohmahle.

2. Majung kalei abam teiki, Rangii mah dwi longsa leihum, Hiipaido huisang huimakle,
Keiram kabipii tokryile.

3. Sating gammah swi kamajung, Lii katchiitei lungsyi kile, Pei mani kahaa baasana, Sating
gam rakot ntahlei.

title: COME TO THE SAVIOUR
details:
. ((S.S. 1165) PS. 66:1. G. F. R. G. F. ROOT,1820-1895
KEY B FLAT. Earnestly
lyrics:
1. Kei kapyipiina nyigo latlei, Risupiina kalangsa gonglo, Nyi meihang kakto satsa leile,
Gonglosa latleile.

Ntahsa nyihang kadou tangle, Nyi meihang kem tchiimatei eisa, Keikapyi piigo kasui
bamtang, Kalui kagah kito.

 2. Pumpiina kalattei shiipyilo, Swi ntah rangaatei kasuisa, Nyi meihangpiina kaleiwode,
Rikalei tchiisupii.

3. Nyihang go Ahna kasuisa lei, Ahna tamkapyi samtei shiide, Ah kinapwi meigo gonglosa,
Lungsyisa latleile.

4. Kaset kalak kem pungsa liitlo, Rata dichii Ahna jupyitang, Gojaangpii katai Cross ki liitlo,
Kemmeigo latleile.

title: BLESSED ASSURANCE
details:
. (S. S. 873) 1 JN. 3: 2 MISS FANNY.J. CROSBY,1820-1915 MRS.
JOSPH F. KNAPP.1839-1908
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Satoi kapyipii Jesu Gohmah, Kamadat lungkasyi tei pyitakle, Jesu zhei malum katu
meigo, Kalui kagaa karing pyitangle.

Ei gohrasamle, ei goh liile.

Keikapyi Pumpii gotei toile. (2times)

2. Kamatei kasang teipii pyide, Ringloi tangkaram kasagah samtei, Sating gam rakot
kamateina, Punghum leile lungkasyi samtei. 3. Gohlung matumpii pyi eitakle, Pumpiina
lungkasyi satoi pyile, Sating gamka juhsa koileile, Malum dichii pangkii pyitangle.

title: GO AND WORK !
details:
((S.S. 748) LUKE.24:23. E.A.BARNES WM.J. KIRKPATRICK.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Tulo Christian zyisulo Mei daziika hatsalei, Bai ketsa leijou depo? Pumpii sam suisupiina.

Tattulo… Ahngam tchiilo Gaakalei… meigo fiilo Kem kapung mei matumpii Takbeiki tei
pang gonglo.

2. Jesu zhei nyilung syipo? Malum sana lungleipo? Kaleihang pyitoi eisa, Ahngam nyi
tchiisudepo?

3. Pumpii gotei malumsa, Nyihangna lungsa leipo? Nyi Ahmei tchiisaleipo? Ngam teipii
mangou tude.

4. Pyihung doukabui jaangpii, Crosstei nyina pungtangle Ntahsa doilam tatde, Tinglang
teina gahtakle.

title: ARMY OF ENDEAVOUR
details:
((S.S. 1097) TIM II:1 I.D.S. TRA D SANKEY
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Christian saryimei hang teina shiipyilo; Nyigo ngoukarou saryimei gongleile; Khrista
Jesutei nyihang mah Pumpiile, Nyigo saryi ngam matu tangle
Dajaangpii saryigo hingsa leitangpo? Ahna saryibam kito jupyi tangle; Mazahng kapyipii
gotei malum dichii; Ahna saryi ngampyi tang.

2. Pumpii ngamtei nyimei hangna tchiitude, Kaset kalak hangna rangaa doutangle; Ahku
gonglosa latkaleitei shiilo, Ahna saryi ngam matu tangle.

3. Kasang taajaangpii doilamtei tatpatlo; Kavai peiratei poisana tatpatlo Ahsamtei suichii
satoitei doutangle, Ahna saryi ngam matu tangle!

title: GIVE HIM THE GLORY
details:
.(RS.316) E.A.H REV. ELISHA A. HOFFMAN.
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesu peebang kaumaang ratale Tingnei ntah rangasa! Malum paito lung majung doule
Gohkem hang syitoi pyile.

Ahlungsetpii tokryi kabui raasamtei Ina tamne, Kamadat lungkasyi kapyi jaangpii, Ina Ahgo
halaangle.

2. Jesu peebang kaumaang ratasa, Tchiigatpii ntak doule; Teito gohrangii kavai doule,
Gohrangii satoi doule.

3. Jesu peebang kaumaang ratasa, Goh kemhang tchiimagahle; Teito gohkamaa
tchiimagahle, Kalui kagahtei doule.

title: AWAKE, AWAKE, O HEART OF MINE !
details:
(S.S.222) IS. 26 : 19. MISS FANNY J.
CROSBY,1820-1915 JNO. R. SWENEY.1837-1899
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tuhlo, tuhlo, he gohrangii, Pumpii tam matoilo, Kalui kagah liitei tchiilo, keikapyi mah
liitei, Gohmah kemtei gaapyinesa Cross paryito taipyi, Gorangii tei keipyiwosa, tchiimatei
pyitakle.

Tuhlo, tuhlo he goh rangii! Pumpiigo tammatoi tuhlo. Kalui kagah liitei tchiilo, Keikapyi
doutangle.

2. Sating kataa keikapyipii, gohmah Pumpii Jesu, Daa ngam tchiisa lungkasyi mei, Ina
pourui buipo, Teisong kisa hakalaang tei tingrot kumpii ryipyi, Lungkasyi ma paiki teito
sating gamtei pihtang.

3. Hinglak tang karam lung kasyi, maningdo doukasu, Goh Pumpiima kati kangou, tapiina
tibuipo? Sazyipou meigo lungkasyi maning gongwosana, He gohrangii gongkii sana, Ahgo
tammatoide.

title: “BELOVED, NOWARE WE THE SONS OF GOD”
details:
(S. S. 504) 1 JN. 3 : 2. EL NATHAN. 1840-
1901 JAMES MCGRANAHAN. 1840-1907
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina lungkasyito, Madat keikapyitei doule! Jesu Ahma paito nyi go ei, Ahma naamei
takle.

Toina nyi ei Ahma naamei tchiitak, Eitoina dakum tangpo tisutakle; Titangle, Ahna kagong
piinei, Titang Ahna kagong piinei; Nyi Ahkum tangle; Ahgo reihtangle, Nyi hangna Ahgo ngou
tangle.

2. Nyihang lung mateidichii, Ngou tanglesana malumle; Keikapyi Pumpii jutei ngoutang Nyi
kalangsa ngoutang.

3. Nyimah jeilui kalikalu, Piineitei nyimei hang nado, Pumpii ma jeilui keipyisana, Nyido
Ahkum tangle.

title: ARISE MY SOUL
details:
. K.K. K.KHAYAKRING
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi ei kembamle, Alung teito gohmah rangii, Kakem kahatpii tokryi takle,
Keipyilo Pumpii ngoh.

2. Kemmah dwidet kadilungto, Nlum eisa gaatukalei Kamaa tchiilesa Pumpii Khrista,
Hungat sana keipyile.

3. Keikapyi ma kamage tei, Maning sana he Christian mei! Kazyi kumpii leiwo laktakle;
Tuhlo, tuhlo, Christian mei!

4. Gongkii rousa jyisa kalei, Mangei sana bamsa kalei! Tisupii Pumpii kagongki tei, Katai
meebam maang nipo?

5. Katai meebam kimaang rouchii, Pumpii Ahda teito kaanglo, Kamaning hangtei douleng
tangle, Kalui tchiikasu Pumpii.

title: BRINGING IN THE SHEAVES
details:
. (S. S. 757) PS. 126: 6. KNOWLES SHAW,1834-1878 Arr.
from GEO. A. MINOR.1845-1904
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Tingchoido tingnado; Tingkii lamto kido, Kabimah luirou tei, Ralihum tangle, Rachet
tinglang kaktei, Kabi kapat hangtei, Ntahsa poigongtang, Pumpii keelam tei.

Kabi kapattei, Kabi kapattei, Ntahsa poigongtang Pumpii keelamtei. (2times)

2. Sazyi kabikido, Sazyi kashyi kido, Rali katukak tei Swi magelakle Rachet luiwosana,
Pumpii ma keelam tei Ntahsa poigong tang, Pumpii keelam tei.

3. Ariibui jaangteipii Pumpiigo maninglo, Tingneisang magedo Toisang toisulo, Mage
tinglang luichii Pumpiina lattangle; Ntahsa pihtangle Pumpii keelamtei.

title: DOES JESUS CARE ?
details:
(M. H. 278) I PETER. 5: 7. REV. F. E. GRAEFF, 1860-1919 J.
LINCOLN HALL,1866-1930
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Mage Jusa katukki liitmak Gohswi mageju sana; Keipyi tangkaram gahsa kaleikak, Jesuna
tchiiha pyimakpo?

Oh sahngle dajaangpii Ahna, Gohmah kaset timak tang Kamyi tinghum lam teitodo,
Tinghum tingnado Ahna juhpyi.

2. Gohrangii tei kamyi bamkito Mik kachet kumpii tatlei, Maning kei kalu gahsa kaleikak,
Jesu Ahna tipyi makpo?

3. Kahemna kagong tinglang kitei, Ina ngamwo kalakki, Swikali gongsa mikdwi kahum kak
Jesuna lungsyi pyimakpo?

title: CLING TO THE BIBLE
details:
. (S.S. 263) Ps. 119: 105. M. J. SMITH. J. R. MURRAY,1841-1905
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Matumpii toikido Bible jumtatlo; Kamatei sam tei toisupii jumlo; Zyitukalei nyihang mah
rangii gotei; Katai kito karinglam makengpyi.

Bible jumtatlo! Bible jumtatlo! Bible samteipii goma meebungle.

2. Bible samtei jumtatlo, karing rangii, Mei matumpii keikapyi doutakle. Amei pyi pailakle
Ahma samtam tei, Rangii fiikeilosa tamkapyi sam.

3. Gopyito housa matum vaimatulo, Takkii tangle matei matu humlo, Kem kapung meilesa
maning matulo. Kabi Bible samtam tei lukeilo.

title: FAINT, YET PURSUING
details:
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Magekido toisang toilakle. Ka ntah tei douleng tang karam, Jesu Khrista mah teihsui
sana, Ratahum tang, toisang toisupii.

Sating kataa ratahum tangle, Magekido toisang toilakle, Pumpii Jesuna pyitang pumtei,
Katai katangpii ratahum tang.

2. Magekido toisang toilakle Sadoi kashyitei dousa leido; Jesu Khrista gohjaangpii taipyi,
Ngam kabui teimahum kaki gah.

3. Magekido toisang toilakle, Pungtang pungtang Jesuma Cross tei; Nyina tile kamage
kalak, Gahhum tangle mangeihum tangle.

4. Magekido toisang toilakle, Kasang gotei ratahum tangle, Tingtang tangkaram nalei takle,
Sagei tingtangpwi gonglei takle.

title: GATHERING AFTER TEARS
details:
. (SS.992) REV.7:17. F.J. CROSSBY WM. J. KIRKPATRICK.
DOH IS B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Nyi keelam gongtang kabui jaangpii, Doilam paang ntoisa tatlo; Lungkasyi meina koisa
leile, Madousupii nyi kadou tangle.

Mikdwi piittoi eisa ntaktangle. Ngamtei tchiilui eisa ntak tangle, Keipyi kalumei na lii katchii
tei shiilo, Keipyi kaluteito nduitangle.

2. Nyihang mah keetei manang leitak, Namki tei juhkahum kaktei; Keikapyipii mah kavai
ngoutang, Kaset kalaktei leiloilakle.

3. Kisa vai kaki tei nyi keetang, Ngoukabi namtei lungsyi ki, Ka ntahma liitei nyitchiisa
Ntahsa tammatoi humtangle.

4. Nyihang mah kee kamatei bamtei Teikakum kabi ngoumakle, Lungkasyi meigo kadou
piinei, Kaset kalak matum gahtangle.

title: HE LEADETH ME : O BLESSED THOUGHT
details:
. (C.W. 405) IS. 41 : 13, 43 :2. JOSEPH H.
GILMORE, 1834-1918. W. B. BRADBURY, 1816-1868.
KEY D. Not too fast.
lyrics:
1. Ahna pangtat pyi bamlyi ki! Katchii kapung matum hangtei, Katat kagong kamaang
hangki, Pumpiina n'goh pangtat pyi.

Gohdoi reipyi gohdoi reipyi! Ahbai piina chyitat pyile, Malumsa Ahtei suitangle, Ahna
pangtat kapyi jaangpii.

2. Kamyi bam hangki teitodo, Ntah rangaa bamki todo, Dwikadi bamlyi hangkido, Bangpiina
n'goh pangtat pyi.

3. Bangpii gobai teipii n'goh, Kahem kito chyitat pyilo, Tikasu ngoukasu Ile, Bangpiina n'goh
koipyilo.

4. Sazyipou taa tchiilui eisa, Goma lungkasyi kiteito, Katai godo I hing makle, Bangpiina
n'goh koipyilo.

title: HE LEADETH HIS OWN
lyrics:
SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY D. Tenderly
1.Ahma baipii nyigo pangtat pyile; Kamadat keikapyi doule! Ahkakum kanghe sazyipou
meido gah, Lungkasyi tei Ahdatole.

Madat kaleile, madat kaleile, Go razangsa koisa leile, Nyida kavaitei mangpyisa Daziika
maning makaang tangpo.
2.Ahma baipii nyigo pangtat pyile; Nyina kamalum paikito, Kateih mahum bamkito satoi
pyile, Kajikdwi kumpii maang pyile.
3.Ahma baipii nyigo pangtat pyile; Lung kamage tinglang kido, Ahlung kasyi paito nyigo lat
gongpyi, Pumpii peebangto bamtangle.
4.Ahma baipii nyigo pangtat pyile; Nyina katatbam hangkito, Ntahsa Ahbam kito ntak
doutang, Gahsupiina leihum tangle.

title: HOLY, HOLY, HOLY, LORD GOD ALMIGHTY
details:
. (SS.22) REV. 4:8. R. HEBER,1783-1826
JOHN B. DYKES,1823-1876
KEY E. With exaltation
lyrics:
1. Matei, matei, matei bikaki Bangpii, N'go tingchoi tingkii tammatoi humtangle. Matei,
matei, matei lungsyi kati Bangpii! Apfii Anaa Rangii kamatei go.

2. Matei, matei, matei kamalum meina, Sana pyihung keisana n'go ratalei; Cherubim
Seraphim kok kumsa ratalei, Ndaneido tingneido nang humle.

3. Matei, matei, matei go pumtei kavai, Kahong sazyi pouryina titang wolakdo; Kamatei
nangroile, meikaki kado gah, Lungset teimahum, kalui tchiimakle.

4. Matei, matei, matei teimahum Bangpii! Sakou chyi kangeilui hangna go tammatoi, Matei,
matei, matei lungset kati Bangpii! Apfii Anaa Rangii kamatei go

title: DWELLING IN BEULAH LAND
details:
. (M.H. 320) IS. 62 : 4. C. A. M. C. AUSTIN MILES. 1868-
1946
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Louh kadii kito lat hangnina, Gohda shiigongle; Sazyi pouryi kamaa gahpyi, Tanglesa
shiile; Kahing kachiih maning wokalak, Matum madum tei, Gahtangle gongwochii, nam
kabiki;
I tuhtang teito bamtang, Kamong kagah niteito; Kalui kagah tchiikasu, dwipok kabi teido
leile, Teiroina domakle, saryi lakle Majyi lakle kamatei namdi kabi kitei.

2. Sating kamou kamong kachyih, Kumle sazyi pouryi; Ngou karou juhkarou kashyi, Katchii
moitakle; Pfii Bangpii peeki teito mbeihchii I hinglakle Kahing tei gahtangle nam kabiki.

3. Tingkei tingrot kahung kahing, Kadou katu teido; I hinglakle pfii Bangpiina, Kasuipyi chii
nii; Kalui kaga leimik liitkasu, Kitei gong dichii; Lung kalak gahtangle nam kabiki.

title: I'LL BE A SUNBEAM
details:
(S.S 1129) NELLIE TALBOT (2 Samuel. 23 :4) E.O. EXCELL
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Leimik seiteikumpii vaipyi Jesuna go lungsyi Kee to school to nhokbam to Ina ngam tei
tchiitang
Kavai mah seitei kum Ina kavai Jesu Marei Oh, satinggam kavai Ido vaimaraang nyile

2. Kadou kaluhanggo lungsyi Goh Jesuna mareih Ntah karangaa mangoulo Jesuna goh
tamle
3.Leimik seitei kumtang karam Teisa ngamtei tchiitang, Taksupii ngaatei ngahsana, Pumpii
tchii ntah tang

title: GOD BE WITH YOU TILLWE MEETAGAIN
details:
. (S. S. 298) ROM. 16: 20. J. E. RANKIN, D.
D.,1828-1904 W. G. TOMER, 1833-1896.
KEY D FLAT. In moderate time
lyrics:
1. N'go kadouloi kasu tatei, Bangpii kasuipyi matulo, Ahna go koipyi matulo, N'go kadou
loikasu tatei.

Kadoune... Kadoune… Jesuna kasui pyisa, Kadoune… Kadoune… Bangpiina n'go kasui
pyilo.

2. N'go kadouloi kasu tatei, Ahbaipii gompyi matulo, Tinglang taa pyichii matulo, Tingchoi
tingkii koipyi matulo.

3. N'go kadouloi kasu tatei, Kamage tinglang kiteido, Pumpii Ahna keipyi tangle, N'go kadou
loikasu tatei.

4. N'go kadouloi kasu tatei, Lungsyisa koipyi matulo, Kataido taimatu sulo, N'go kadouloi
kasu tatei.

title: HE WILL HIDE ME
details:
. (S. S. 547) M. E. SERVOSS.1849-? IS. 49: 2. J. MCGRANAHAN.1840-
1907
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Kahem mah dwiki mpongsa, Tinghum tingna tchiimakle, Kashyina Juhkarou kaktei,
Pumpiida pakliit humtang.

Goh rangiigo….. kabeih pyisa, Adoi kashyi kadou makle; Goh rangiigo….. kabeih pyisa,
Ahma peebangto bamtangle.

2. Kamage kalak gongkido, Sating gamki liitkalu, Lungsyisa maziisa nyigo, Pumpiina lukei
pyilo.

3. Swi daziika liitmatusa, Kamage kalak pyisa; N'goh saryi tchiituhkido Pumpii lei mado
hingmak.

4. Kashyi kahem mah cross pungsa Swi kamage gongkido. Ngamwo sana sating gamto,
Pumpiigo kasui lungtang.

title: TRIUMPH BYAND BY !
details:
(S. S. 1120) C. R. BLACKALL. H. R. PALMER,1843-1907
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Nyina maangsana ngoutang karam bamhang kiteito, Pumpiina n'go koisa leitangle,
Sating gam saryimeina koikalei bamki teito, Jesuna nyigo koisa leitangle.

Tingneika Ina Ahgo kadoutang sating gamto, I Jesugo kasuisa ntahsana. (2 times)

2. I Ahtei suisa Ah chiitak tei chiisa bamtangle, Pumpiina katam samtei suitangle, Ahdato
poi mpatpyi lak lung tchiimadi pyitang, Malum meigo Ahna toipyi lakle.

3. Nyihang mah sating gamki teito nyi ntahsana, Jesuna nyigo kasuisa lungtang, Nyihang
Ahtaa tchiitang teito Ahgo tammatoi tang. Tam kabam Ahsam hangtei gahlakle.

title: FOR CHRISTAND THE CHURCH
details:
J. KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY D
lyrics:
1. Khrista zheikito tchiigatpii satde, Nyi Sagong gotei sazyi nriit tei tchiide, Teimahum
kaleikak lungliitsa tchiide,
Kasang puidi lamto tchiigatpii tatde. Khrista nyijaangpii teipyi, Pumpii ma zaiteipii, Nyihang
go Ahna lutakle, Tchiimatei pyitakle.

2. Khrista jaangpii nyi hangnina tchiisa, Ahma peirahtei sating kata mashatde, Rangiima
teimahum doukabui kaangsa, Pumpii Ngamkitei lungliitsana tchiide.

3. Khrista jaangpii ntahsa pung laksa, Pumpii jaangteipii kalei hangtei pyi eide, Ngamkabui
hangkakto kabitei pyide, Lungkasyi lei kaleihang tei pyi eide.

4. Khrista paito Christian meihang jaangpii, Lungkasyi saryi kangam peirah poikiide, Kahing
det katchii matum toi eisana, Teito nyihangna ntah zangzyi doune.

title: I LOVE THE LORD
details:
. (C. E. 72) CHAS W. VAUGHAN. G. KIEFFER VAUGHAN.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. I Pumpiigo….. Lungsyi humtang Ahzheigo tammatoide….. meihangna Zaiteipiina…..

Nyimei hanggo, Tchiimatei pyisa ntah matule.

I Pumpiigo…..Lungswi pyisa Lungsyitang sating kataa lungsyitang, Ahna n'goh….. Lungsyi
pyisa. Ahma puiditei Ina suitangle.

2. Sazyi pouki….. I na tamtang. Pumpiigo Ina lungkasyi masam, Goh rangiigo ….. Ahna
vaipyi Kasang Pumpii Ahgotei malumne.

3. Sazyi pouna….. toi eikido, Lung magesana hatloi keilakle, N'goh Ahna….. juhpyi
humtang, Ahna kasang meitei tchiimatule.

4. I Pumpiigo….. Lunghang pyisa, Ahgotei kasuisa tathum tangle, Goh rangiigo... matapiina
Ahma satinggam kavai tokryipyi.

title: JUSTA LITTLE HELP FROM YOU
details:
. (Alex.394) MAUD FRAZER GAL.6:10 GEO.C.STEBBINS
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Nangna sazyipou kaikapat kak, Gohhe meigo nam eimakpo? Nangna chengnaka
tchiikahato, Meikang kago keiwo makpo?

Chengnaka tchiikahaato Chengnaka tchiikahaato, Pumpiina kamadat ngam, Kabi hangka
tchiibui takle.

2. Eitoi lungset ngam kacheng teipii, Meikang kago keiwo buile, Kamage pot pungsa
kaleimei Matou nesa maning makpo?

3. Jesuna lungkasyi samkito, Meikangka rangii keibuile; Kakui kamaa hang rattoi eisa,
Ngangtuh Pumpii peekaang suilo.

4. Nyihang sating kata ngam tchiide, Nyigo latkalu malumde; Khristana sazyipougo ngamle
Nangna Ina tchiihaa kido.

title: HE IS MINE AND I AM HIS
details:
. (R. S. 337) PS. 29: 2. GRACE ELIZABETH COBB. CHAS. H.
GABRIL
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou daziika bisa Bangpiina tchiipo? Ah gohmah… I Ahma. Ahsam teina sating gam
liisongdo bikile, Ah gohmah… I Ahma.

Ina tatsa kalei hangki Ahna koipyile, Ah baipiina jumsa n'goh pangtat pyileile, Ahtei
gohjaangpii doikabi gohkang kasangle. Ah gohmah… I Ahma. Ngoukabi Bangpii Ahtei
gohmah Laamkalei hiipai Ahtei gohmah Ah samteina sating gam lii songdo bikile Ah
gohmah I Ahma

2. Ahma jumage lungkasyi liitei I tchiitang, Ah gohmah … I Ahma. Kamatei tingchoi mpai
kaleitei ngou tangle, Ah gohmah … I Ahma.

3. Kamyi katai puidiki tatkido I hinglak, Ah gohmah… I Ahma Ahna n'goh toisang toisupii
kasui pyitang, Ah gohmah … I Ahma.

title: LET THE SAVIOUR IN !
details:
(S.S. 363) REV. 3.20. J.B. ATCHINSON, 1840-1882 E.O.
EXCELL.1851-1921
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kamwito meisat leile, maliitlo Ah taksupii gongleile maliitlo; Tuhkasu ki liitwolo Pumpiitei
kamatei le Bangpii naa Jesu teile maliitlo.

2. Goma lungtei mateisa maliitlo Teisu dichii nleitang maliitlo; Ahtei gohkang kasangle.

Ahna n'goh tchiihatang Kalui katang koipyitang maliitlo

3. Ahlat n'niikabi shii maliitlo Ahgotei gomah tchiilo, maliitlo; Kamwikuto satleile N'go ntah
matune Nangna Ahgo jeititang maliitlo.

4. Satinggam kang kasangle maliitlo N'godo satoi pyitang maliitlo; N'go kemgah pyitangle
Gomah ngam tchiilui sekchii Sating gam pangkiipyi tang maliitlo.

title: GOD IS CALLING YET !
details:
(S. S. 339) JER. 22: 29. G.TERSTEEGEN.1697-1769 E. O.
EXCELL.,1851-1921
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou ngamgo lungsyisa, Pumpiina go kalat kitei, Shiisupiina goma rangii, Tingkum
matum zyihum tangpo?

Eitoido latsana lei, Ahlat shiipyilo nang, Pumpii Jesuna eitoido lathumsa lei, Shiipyilo latsa
lei eitoido latsa lei, Pumpii ma latkaang gotei shiipyilo.

2. Ahna latsa keekam kakii, Keipyinesa koisa leile, Rangii teina koisa leile, Ahgo mage
matutang po!

3. Pumpiina eitoido latlei, Kemteina gomnei ei kido Ahna toikalei tchiisupii Latleile
kalangsa gonglo.

title: SAFE WITHIN THE VAIL
details:
. (S.S. 938) "Within the vail" Heb vi.19 REV.E.ADAMS. J.M.
EVANS
KEY G. (Beating three times in the measure.)
lyrics:
1. I sazyi poulung kalei kak, Kamarei tei dousang lak Tingnei kana sating gamki Pumpii
kasui lungtangle.

Tei teito lakkei lakle, Sama kado hinglakle Ina maning matumtei Jesuna lukei pyitang.

2. I karing tinglang gaatuhchii, Raakarii tei gahtangle, Ina matasa leidichii, Keikapyi tei
doutangle.

3. Go ngamtei tchiilui eisekchii, Sazyi pouryi majusa Kateih mahum mei kadoutang, Goh
swi rangaasa lungtang.

4. Kahemki teito pattosa, Kaset kalak tei gahsa Gahkasu Pumpii ratasa, Ahna kee pang
gongpyi tang.

title: DID YOU THINK TO PRAY?
details:
(A.H. 427 ) COL. 4:2. MARY. A. KIDDER,1820-1905 O. W.
PERKINS.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Nang gokito tatpat tunaa, Nang rata leipo? Keikapyi Khrista zhei jumsa, Lung kasyipii
goma kokryi Tchiikabui kangpo?

Karatapii tchii mateipyi, Kamyi kaktei vai matu, Chiilung kamyi kagong kaktei Rata hum
tangle.

2. N'go kahem kagong kaktei, Ratasa leipo? Go puidi pangtat pyikabui, Rangii mateimah
teimahum, Tei nang poiwolo.

3. Nang raakarii kadou kaktei Nang rata leipo? Kamaa magah njoikabui, Lungkasyi mah
teimahum tei Nang poiwo takpo?

title: KEPT BY THE POWER OF GOD
details:
.(SS.549) I PET. 1:5 E.E HEWITT. WM.J.KIRKPATRICK.
DOH IS AB.
lyrics:
1. Bangpiina gobai jumsa, Bangpiina koipyi tang; Ina malum dichiina, Bangpiina koipyi tang.

Kahingki mpatpyilak, Tchiigatpii koipyi tangle, Kamalum tei nleilak, Bangpiina koipyitang.

2. Kashyi kahong hangkito, Bangpiina koipyi tang; Mpou kashii kangteito, Bangpiina koipyi
tang.

3. Sazyi pou gahkasuta, Bangpiina koipyi tang; Kaluitei nyina ngamtang, Bangpiina koipyi
tang.

4. Sating gamto lii tchiisa, Bangpiina koipyi tang; Kamadat lungkasyi tei, Bangpiina koipyi
tang.

title: HE'LL WALK WITH ME
details:
. (T.H. 190) L. J. WILLIAMS. CHAS. H. GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Gohmah kamalum tei toisang toilakle, Keikapyi Pumpiina toisang toipyi lak, Gohmah
katat bam hangki kasui pyisa, Ahna kasuipyi humtang.

Ahna kasuipyi humtang, Ahna pangtat pyihum tang, Kahem kagongki Ina ngam kabui, Ahna
kasuipyi humtang.

2. Puidi kabibam kitei pangpyi sana, Meina tikasu ngoukabi bamki tei, Ahteih kasuimei
sama kado gahlak, Ahna pangtat pyihum tang.

3. Tinglang hangki tei ngoukabi roinapii, Jesugo kasuisa oh ngou kabitei! Kahem kagongki
lungkasyina dile, Ahna kasuipyi humtang.

title: WHY YOU DON'T WANT TO WORK FOR THE LORD? SK
details:
(TUNE: C.S.S. 24) .DANIEL
C.AUSTIN MILE .
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Nang dajaangpii Ahngam tchgiirou tangpo? Gotei mahum kalei kaktei, Pumpii Jesuna
tam rahang ralii, Gonyi sazyi poumah kavaile.

Nang teikasuki rangii jaangpiina, Pumpii Jesu ngamtei tchiilo, Supou tamsulo, tingnei
malumlo, Gotei mahum matum pyilo.

2. Mage jusa kalei rangii hanggo, Gonyina maangsa tampyilo, Pumpii Jesuna tam rahang
ralii, Gonyi sazyi pouryima taile.

3. Sazyi pouryito lungnaaka lakle, Chiilung mpai naaka lakle, Pumpii Jesuna tamle
meihangtei, Tingneika jaangpii mbui gongle.

title: THE ROCK THAT IS HIGHER THAN I
details:
. (H. P. 29) E. JOHNSON.1826-1909 WM. G.
FISCHER,1835-1912
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ina lungmage tinglangki, Goh lungto maning humkido, Kaset kalak tingkei tingrot, Nkiilak
tang karam kumle.

Kada jaangpii nkii laktang, Keikapyi tukadi kaleikak, Ina tudigo baang tangle Ahroinapii
mage pungpyile.

2. Gohswi kamage tinglangki, Puidi diisa tattahng kalak, Rabwipii myisa kaleitei Nkiilak
tangkaram kumle.

3. Ina masuisa kahat kak, Pumpiina gohdoi gong satpyi, Lungset kabitei ngousana Mongjyi
kamyi tei gahtakle

title: GLORY ALLTHE WAY !
details:
. (R.S. 362) REV. J. H. SAMMIS D.B. TOWNER
KEY F
lyrics:
1. Bangpii samgo malum meigo keipyile, Tanghaa kabi doutangle, Kavai kito tatjousa
lungset doulo, Tanghaa kabi doutangle.

Doutang tanghaa, Kabi puiditei doutang, Doutang tanghaa, Kabi puiditei doutang.

2. Keikapyi piina jupyi sulepochii, Tanghaa puidi doulakle, Ahmikjot teipii sepyile dichiina,
Puidihang tanghaa doule.

3. Ahzhei kito lungkali kalu hangtei, Tanghaa kabi doutangle, Cross poimakiisa satoi
doukalu hang, Tanghaa kabi doutangle.

4. Kem meihang keikapyi piigo malumlo, Tanghaa kabi doutangle, Ahna matapii nyikamaa
gahpyile, Tanghaa kabi doutangle.

title: THE CORONATION DAY
details:
. (A.H.39) PS.86:1. JULIA H. JOHNSTONE. 1849-1919
D.B.TOWNER,1850-1919
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Keiwokalu rangii matum hang gotei Puidi diikido mahat matusulo Ranamki tatkido sahng
katei gahsa Kangam mah lii tchiisa ntahsa tatlo
Ngou kaku pyihung keisa Kangammah peimani keisa Satoi kapyi lii tchiisa Ka ntah mah
leimik tei taanglei makle.

2. Sating kata ma kamage katutei Maning supiina gomah doilam paangtei Saryi katchiitei
nangna ngam humtangle Doilam paang tattulo napii ntaklo.

3. Tinglang ninaki nyi Pumpii dateito Saryi kangam mah pyihung tei keipyile Tingnei
shangkak satinggam rakot meina Kok kumsa Ahgo ratasa toileile.

title: FAITH OF OUR FATHERS
details:
. (GGSH. 22) HEB. 6:12. FREDERICK W. FABER,1814-1863
HENRY F. HEMY,1818-1888
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ringlei pfiimei ma kamalum, Katai katchiih kahing gahle, Goh rangiitei ntah takle Pumpii
rasamtei shiiwosa
Kamatei pfiimei ma malum, Katai katang malum tangle.

2. Kamyi kabiing to bam katu , Nyilung kito leihum zoule, Ahnyi naamei dazii doibi, Bangpii
jangpa taiwo dichii.

3. Pfiimei ma malum nyi suitang, Meiluihang Ahda panggong tang Bangpii ma kasahng
majyipii, Meihanggo kasa

title: THE COMFORTER HAS COME !
details:
(S. S. 198) REV. F. BOTTOME.1823-1894 WM. J.
KIRPATRICK,1838-1921 JN. 14: 16.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Meika leihang daka Ahsamtei tampyide, Rangii kamage lehsa kaleibam hangki, Ntah
rangaa samtei Christian meihang tamde, Keikapyi gongtakle.

Keikapyipii gongtak Ahgong kasang takle, Rangii kamatei tei nyida magong pyitak; Kabi
sampao meihang datam ralipyide, Keikapyipii gongtak!

2. Tinghum majutakle sazyi pouryi vaitak, Kamage kahing matumpii gahhum takle; Leimik
seitei kumpii kavai punghum pyisa, Gongtak keikapyipii.

3. Sagong hangdoito Sagong kadi Pumpiile; Gahkalei rangii keipyi tanglesa gongpyi; Rangii
kasoi meihang ntahsa lii tchiide, Keikapyi gongtakle.

title: TEMPERANCE BELLS
details:
. (S. S. 700) JN. 12: 47. W. S. WM. STEVENSON.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Koikinglo kamajung pungkoi Ka ntah lii tchiileile Lung liitsana katchii liitei Gahkalei
meihang jaangpii.

Koikinglo….. ka ntah….. Keikapyi ma lii katchii Koikinglo….. karangaa Rangii ma pungkoi
teile.

2. Juhkarou meina kataangka Pumpiima Jaonaa meigo Kaset kalak pyi eitakle Eitoi
teimahum gahtak.

3. Lungkasyi kangsana meihang Nyihang lii tchii njoide Kamage mangei hum eisa Ntah
tinglang gongleitak.

title: THE FIGHT IS ON
details:
. (A.H. 229) C. H. M.1862-1929 C. H. MORRIS. I TIM. 6:12.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Saryi gonglei, bwika kongleile tchiidalo, Kamalum mei baitui kasangwolo, Kangam
Pumpiina meihang doito satsa kaleitei juhlo, Ahmei teina ngamtang.

Saryi gonglei, Christian saryi, meitei nleisang nleisulo, Peimani keisa kadaa tchiiwolo, Kabi
kashyi tingnei titang Saryi gonglei tei nleisu, Teisa saryi liitei tchiitulo, Pumpii Ahteina kasui
pyidichii, Saryi kangam lii tchiitangle.

2. Saryi gonglei, Christian saryi meitei satlo, Kamalum mah kokryi teipungsana, Bwika
kakongtei kasuisa ngam tangle kalui katangpii, Saryitei ngamtangle.

3. Juhlo, juhlo, nyidoi mazahng kapyi Pumpii Satsa leile sazyi pouryi hangki, Ahtei mahum
gotei sazyi pouryi meihangna ngoutangle. Tinglang taanglak takle.

title: AT CALVARY
details: . (GGSH .74) WM.R.NEWEL,1868-1956 LUKE 23:33 D.B.TOWNER,1850-
lyrics:
1919
KEY C.
1.Goh lungki det katchii tamwolak, Pumpii meikanado timakle; Gohjaangpii Ahna taipyi
takle, Calvary to.

Lungkasyi tei kalui tchiimakle, Goh kemtei syipyi kabui leile; Gohpot masuitei poimaang
pyile Calvary to.
2.Nyihang Pumpii ma samshii wosa, Gohmah kakui kamaa maning gong; Kemtei syitoi
kapyi Ina maang, Calvary to.
3.Eitoi I Jesuda pyi eitak, Ahtei gohmah sagongtei sekle; Eitoi gohmah rangiina liitchii,
Calavry to.
4.Oh keikapyi ma lungkasyi tei, Kasangpii kalui kagah tchiimak; Oh Pumpii ma dikaki ma
ngam, Calvary ki.

title: GOD WILL TAKE CARE OFYOU
details:
.((S.S. 517) PS. 121: 8. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-
1915 IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Bangpiina n'go pangtat pyitangle, Kagong kamaang kajyi kabam hangki Lungsyisa Ahna
koipyi jupyi tang, Ahna n'go toisang toipyi lakle.

Bangpiina n'go koipyi humtangle; Kadaziika lungkasyi kanghepo! Nangna kalat Jesuna
shiipyi tang, Malum gatlo, Ahna koipyi tangle.

2. Sating kata n'go koipyi humtang, Puidi katat hangki pangtat pyitang; Ahtei n'go koikapyi
Bangpiile, Dwi kamating bamki pangmaang pyitang.

3. Golui gohaa Bangpiina koipyi tang, Kalui tchiikasu satoitei pyitang, Kalui katang piina
kasui pyitang. Napii sating gamki pangkii pyitang.

title: TELL ME THE STORY OF JESUS
details:
. (C. S. S. 269) PS. 86: 11. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-
1915 JNO. R. SWENEY1837-1899
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii Jesuma rasam tei, Gohlungki ryikei pyilo, Bikaki meikating rasam, Shiisang
shiikasu rasam, Jesugo Kamanaa kitei, Satinggam rakotlii tchii, Pumpiigo reipyi matulo,
Meihang majung matulo.

Pumpii Jesu ma rasamtei, Gohlungki ryikei pyilo, Bikaki mei kating rasam, Tei kakum sam
douloilak.

2. Ahna nyikem ruikapyi tei, Kabi samtei tampyilo, Nyikem kapungmei jaangpiina, Ahna
kahem meigo ngam, Nyi jaangpiina mpusana, Kaset kalak pung kapyi, Ngou karoumei
bailung teito, Mikdwi humsa leh pyile.

3. Cross gamto Ahgo kagikak, Kaset kalak leh kapyi, Pumpiigo rowlungki goisa, Teito Ahna
ringkiisa, Kataigodo ngam wosana, Tatkapat nyina ngoule, Ahma kalaktei maningki, Mikkito
mikdwi humle.

title: TAKE ME AS I AM
details:
. ((S.S. 476) PS. 145: 18, 19. ELIZA H. HAMILTON. IRA D.
SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY E. Moderato
lyrics:
1. Pumpii Jesu Ina kaanglei, Tchiiha kasuna I taitang; Kalui tchiikasu tei pyilo; N'goh ei
poipyiilo.

 N'goh ei poipyilo, Lungsyisa poipyilo, Kemjaangpii taikapyi Khrista N'goh ei poipyilo.

2. Kem tchiisa kasoi ei Ile, Goh jaangpii Khrista zaipatle, Patkapyi zai teimahumpii N'goh ei
poipyilo.

3. Makado maning kalugah, Jesu nangroile goh jaangpii, Gozheitei latsa gongleile, N'goh ei
poipyilo.

4. Pumpii peebang gongliit leile, N'goh ei nangna juhpyilo, Goh ngamtei tchiilui eisekchii,
N'goh ei poipyilo.

title: GOD IS LOVE
details:
. (S. S. 1190) 1 JN. 4 : 8. SIR JOHN BOWRING,1792-1872 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii ma lungkasyi vaipyi, I na katatbam hangki, Kamyi puiditei vaipyi, Ah kavai lung
kasyipii.

Ah kavai lung kasyipii, Ah kavai lung kasyipii.

2. Sazyi pouryi mah ngam hangtei Neika magah humtangle, Nlena Ahlung kasyi Kalui kagah
tchiimakle.

3. Kamyima ngam matum hangtei, Ahna vaipyi hum leile, Lungkasyi Ahma kavai Ahzhei
tammatoi humtang.

title: SOME HAPPY DAY
details:
. (S. S. 934) REV. 15: 3. E. E. REXFORD. FRANK M. DAVIS.1839-1896
KEY D FLAT. Duet. Slow, with expression
lyrics:
1. Lii katchii mah lat Ina shii, Detkatchii swi teitoi eisa, Pumpii Ahna mazhiidichii, Neika Ina
liitei tchiitang.

Ka ntah mah leimik kitei, Lungkasyi ma rokteipiina, Ina liitei sating gamto, Jesugo kasuisa
tchiitang.

2. Sazyi pouryi ngamtei neika, Tchiilui eisa gahhum tangle, Shaangnaka roi tchiiwosana,
Pumpii Ahgo kadou tangle.

3. Neika Ina kongmui kitei, Piwosana ntak doutang, Majungsana ntakkatu, Tinglang tei
vaigong leitakle.

4. Tinglang tei gong katukaktei, Gohkee kasang teigaa tangle, Bangpii Ahgo kasuisana,
Sating gamto lungtu tangle.

title: SINCE I HAVE BEEN REDEEMED
details:
. (R. S. 379) TIT. 2:14. E. O. E. 1851-1921 E. O. EXCELL.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ina tamkanyi hangka lei, lii teipii kasuisa; N'goh keikapyi Pumpii, nyi Sagong ma
rasamtei,
Kalei kapyi jaangpii, Kalei kapyi jaangpii, Ahzhei tammatoi tangle, Kei kapyi jaang piina,
Ahzhei kito vaipyi humtangle.

2. N'goh keipyi kalu kito, eitoi Khrista gohmah; Ahma ngamtei poi makiilei gohmah ka
ntahpii.

3. N'goh lukei pyiwosana eitoi keipyi takle, Swi myisa kaleihang kadii kika toi eitangle.

4. N'goh lukeipyi wosana bam tchiikadaa pyile, Lukei kapyigo kasuisa Ina lunghum tangle.

title: A LIGHTALONG THE WAY
details:
. (R. S. 462 ) E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 J. LINCOLN HALL,1866-
1930
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi Bangpii baichem daziika ngoubipo? Tingchoi tingna leimik vaipyi sakiina
pangtat pyi! Nlena meima rangiitei kamyikito tatlei, Ahnyi go ngoukabui jaangpii nyigo
pangtat pyilo.

Pumpii n'gohdo vaikabui tei keipyilo, Gohlungkito lungkasyi pat tokabui keipyilo; Pumpii
n'gohdo vaikabui tei keipyilo, Gohchiilung kito lungkasyi pat kabui keipyilo.

2. Kabi lungkasyi sam shiikasu mei tang tang leile, Lungkasyi kavai doukasu mei tingneika
teitang; Ahnyi gotei karing puidi tampyitang karamle, Gohlung kamalum chengsa leikido
kavai pyilo.

3. Kangka leimik kumpii vaile kangka sageitikum, Pumpii teina kavaitei songdo kisa vaikile;
Gohrangii vaipyilo sating kata pangtat pyilo, I soisa leikido kavaiteipii pangptat pyilo.

title: BRING THEM IN
details:
. (C. H. 625) JOHN 10:14,15 A. THOMAS.19TH CENTURY W. A.
OGDEN.1841-1897
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jao kakoipii lat shiipyilo, Lung laksana saa kalei lat. Tuhsulosa Jaonahgo lat, Kadii kitei
tattuh takle.

Fiiwosa pang gonglo, Kembamki teito poipatlo Fiiwosa pang gonglo, Jesuda ka pang
gonglo.

2. Tana maangsa tchiiha tangpo? Kadou katu tana maangtang? Tapiina pang gongpyi
buipo? Majung bamki tana maang tang.

3. Ahnyi mah ntah latkaang tei Azang ningkam hangki shiile Pumpiina nyihang go tamlei,
Gohmah Jaotei maang fiiwolo.

title: HOW GREAT THOU ART
details:
. (G.H.F. 37) PS. 48:1 CARL BOBERG, 1859-1940 SWEDISH
MELODY Trans. by STUART K. HINE.1899-? ARR. BY. MANNA MUSIC INC.
KEY B FLAT. Slowly.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii goma teimahum tei ngouwosa, Tampei wolak, swipii maning kido; Sakii leimik,
sageitima ngou kabi Sazyi pouryi matumpii vaitakle.

Goh rangiina tammatoi lii tchiilei, Keikapyipii Pumpii Jesu! Goh rangiina tammatoi lii tchiilei
Sagoi kaki nyihang Bangpii!

2. Zang sagoito ruina hangma lii katchii, Tingnounii hiipaa mah lung kamajung; Karyi dwima
longkalei lungkasyi rok, Tingkei matei, golung kasyi kilei.

3. Sagoi kaki Bangpii goma lungkasyi, Gonaa sapii napou katangdo pyi! Gohpot masui
kemtei magah pyinesa. Calvary ting paryito gitakle.

4. Tingnei kana Khristana n'lei gongsa, Gohmah keetei ntahsa pangkii tang Tamwo kalak
pumtei kavaitei ngousa, Tiwo buile goma pumtei matum.

title: DRAW ME NEARER
details:
. (S. S. 607) HEB. 10: 22. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 W. H.
DOANE,1832-1915
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. I goma, Pumpii, I golat shiile, Pumpii lungkasyi lattei; Kamalum baitui poimatu nyile
Goda pang manang pyilo.

Manang pyilo, satoi kapyipii Nangna katai cross kitei, Manangpyilo, satoi kapyi Pumpiida
Kahung zai kapat nitei.

2. Go ngam jaangpii goh tchiimatei pyilo, Lungset teimahum teipii, Goh rangii teina
gorazang leile, Matum tei goma tangle.

3. Kamatei karangaa tinglang kaktei, Sagong bam doito sattang; Bangpiigo matasa kalei
kaktei, Kanghe go kasui tangle.

4. Dwijai marum maju kasutatei, Kalak mage hangka lei, Sating gam gohpfii bamtei pidichii;
Ntah rangaasa lungtang.

title: SEND THE LIGHT
details: KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Nyi pungbaangki latnina saahum leile, Maangpyilo kavaitei! Keikapyi rangii doukanyi
kangka lei; Maangpyilo kavaitei!

Maangpyilo, sampao kabi kavai! Vaipyilo, nyipung baangki! Maangpyilo, sampao kabi
kavai! Vaipyilo, kalui katang.

2. Tingnei kakui kamaa meigo latsa lei; Maangpyilo kavaitei! Nyihang nado ntah rangaasa
latlei; Maangpyilo kavaitei!

3. Jesu Ahzhei tei bamhangki tampyilo; Maangpyilo kavaitei! Pumpii Ahrangii tei meihang
dou kabui; Maangpyilo kavaitei!

4. Kamahat tei gahsa meihang ngam tchiide; Maangpyilo kavaitei! Keikapyi doutang karam
nyingam tchiide; Maangpyilo kavaitei!

title: DEEPER, DEEPER
details:
. (C.S.H. 28) C.P.J. CHARLES PRICE JONES.
KEY A
lyrics:
1. Sating kata lungliitsa tatne, Pumpii lungkasyito; Lungkasyi tei tikabui Sagoi kaki swirek
pyilo.

Lungkasyi tikabui, Pumpii rata leile, Aswi kabi pyilo, He, Pumpii satoi pyilo.

2. Tuk kisana matipyilo, Rangii matei satoitei; Gohmah chiilung matum Jesuda, Toikei kasu
doito.

3. N'goh jeikaju tinglang ki Tukkisa tatmatulo; Goma lungkasyi tiwosa, N'goh dikii matulo.

4. Sating kataa sagoi kaki, Lungswitei n'goh pyilo, Kalui katangpii satkabui Swirek tei n'goh
pyilo.

title: BLESS THE LORD, MY SOUL !
details:
(S. S . 209) PS. 34 : 1. E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 JNO. R.
SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Bangpii sagong go meihang tammatoide. Ahma kamadat matumtei tisana, Ahna kasuipyi
tangle toipyilakle. Tinghum tingna kamongpii pangtat pyile.

Toide kavai naamei! Kachem heisana, Ahgo rata humde, Pumpiigo tisa, Taksupiina toide,
sazyipou hangna, Sazyipou sating gam, Bangpii gotei toide, Taksupiina toilo,Goma
rangiido.

2. Keipyi kalujaangpii, toilo rangiihang. Toide Ahgo kamatei dwipok teipii, Kalui tchiimakle
kaku lungkasyi tei, Teihsa karata tei ahna kepyile.

3. Toilo kahemgo lung kasyipii ngamle. Sating gam ngamki tei manang matule, Lungkasyi
meina kabam sating gamki Malumsa kangam jaangpii pangmaang pyitang.

title: O FOR A THOUSAND TONGUES TO SING
details:
. (A. H. 291) C. WESLEY,1707-1788 PS. 9 : 1.
W.H. HAVERGAL, 1793-1870
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Meitang tang piina lii tchiisa, Pumpii tammatoide (2 times) Sagong Khrista teimahum tei,
Keikapyi Pumpiile (3 times)

2. Lungkasyipii Pumpii Sagong, Keipyile juhpyile (2 times) Sazyi pouryi kalei hangna, Gozhei
tammatoile (3 times)

3. Pumpii zheito kahing gahle, Kamage gahtakle (2 times) Kem kapung meido ntahlei,
Majungpii tokryi pyi (3 times)

4. Kakui kamaa tchiimagah pyi, Kemkito mpatpyi (2 times) Khrista zaipii syimatei pyi,
Zaiteipii keipyile (3 times)

title: I HOPE TO MEET YOU ALL IN GLORY
details:
. (R. S. 952) EMMA PITT. WM. J. KIRKPATRICK1838-
1921
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ina gonyigo kadou tangle, Kalak kaniih majusa; Lungkasyi samtei tam mangou tang,
Satoi kavai bamnito. Kavai bam sating, sanabam kito; Gohpfii bam kabi, karangaa nito, Ina
gokadoutang, Ina gokadoutang, Saryi kangam pyihung keiwosa.

2. Ina gonyigo kadou tangle, Kasagah kavai namto; Keikapyi piigo tammatoine Lungsyi
kapyijaang teipii.

3. Ina gonyigo kadou tangle, Karangaa bamki teito; Pumpii saryimeigo kasuisa, Lungkasyi lii
tchiitangle.

4. Ina gonyigo kadou tangle, Sazyipou ngamlui eisa, Ntahsa baido kapyi tangle, Kavai
kasagah bamto.

title: I WILL
details: KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Goh rangii pumpot lungswi matumtei, Pumpiida pyileile; Eitoi Pumpii baikiih kangki teito,
Kasoi I gong leile.

Tchiihalo Pumpii nangna n'goh tchiihalo; I gong leile, Jesu zaiteipii syimatei pyilo, Kasoi I
gong leile.

2. Pumpii lungkasyipii ngoh keipyi, Lungsyisa gahpyile, Jesu roinale Ina kamalum; N'goh
toipyi sulo. 3
. Gohmah kasoi Pumpii nangna tile, N'goh toipyi sulo, Swilat teimahum teido keipyilo;
Pumpii ngam tchiitangle.

4. Tingnei leimik n'goh satoi pyilo, Pumpii mataleile, Khrista mah teimahum tei tamtangle;
Pumpii mei tchiitangle.

title: PASS IT ON
details:
. (ALEX. 182) 2 TIMOTHY IV:2 M. FRASER JAMES MCGRANAHAN
KEY F. ALLEGRETTO MODERATO
lyrics:
1. Pumpii Jesuna latleile meihang gong majipyilo; Tampyilo... tampyilo; Pumpii lungkasyi
sam ei kamajyi saryimei daka; Tampyilo… tampyilo.

Pumpii Jesuna latleile tampyilo kabi rasam; Sazyi pouryimei luihangna Khristago timatulo,
Matilo, matilo tampyilo Pumpii rasam.

2. Jesuna meihang go pyile kamajung kabi rasam; Tampyilo… tampyilo; Rangii kasoi
kasetmeigo tampyilo kabi rasam; Tampyilo… tampyilo.

3. Pumpii satoi doumatulo, tampyilo kabi rasam; Tampyilo… tampyilo Kamyi kito kalei
meigo tampyilo kabi rasam; Tampyilo… tampyilo

title: I'VE FOUND A FRIEND
details:
. (S. S. 871) PROV. 18: 24. REV. J. G. SMALL.1817-1888 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Gohkang nina Ina doutak, Ahna n'goh lungsyile, Ahlung kasyi teipii n'goh Ahdah pangong
keipyile, Gohlung kitei liitbam pyile meikanado ngamwo lak, I Ahma Ah gohmahle kalui
kagah tchiisupiina.

2. Gohkang nina Ina doutak zai patsa n'goh keipyi, Karing kapyi roina makle Ahma rangiido
pyile, Ina karingtei gohjaangpii mak Pumpii jaangpii ringlei, Goh chiilung teimahum kalei
hangtei Pumpii Ahmahle.

3. Gohkang nina Ina doutak teimahum hang Ahda lei, Ahna n'goh koipyi sana sating gam
pangkii pyitang, Kalui kagah bamki teito Ina taa tchiilui eisa, Gohtaa matum tchiilui sekchii
ntaktang kalui gahsa.

title: LET US HEAR YOU TELL IT
details:
. (S. S. 898) PS. 66 : 16. J. M. W. J. M. WHYTE
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Goh Pumpii! Jesuna n'go keikapyi, Gozheito maziisa tampat eitakpo? Taipyi tangkaram
cross datei gongwosa Nyihang godo nleiloisa tampyilo, Kavai mah satoi bamki roileipo?

Kem tchiimagasa matei takpo? Tinghum tingna Ahdato ntah doupo? Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi
shiinyile.

Shiitude tampyiloi keilo, Bikaki mah rasamtei, Satoima kakum rasamtei, Ka ntah bamki
pangmaang tang Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi shiinyile.

2. Taa katchiiki keikapyi piigo doupo? Tampyi loikeilo nyihangna shiinyile, Jesuna tchiihapyi
koipyisa leipo? Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi shiinyile, Kalak kamage tchiimagah buile Ah kakum
kang kasangtei gahle, N'go tchiikapyi hangda tammangoulo, Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi
shiinyile.

3. Satoi kapyi samtei tampyi eitakpo? Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi shiinyile, N'nhiitang karam kaki
kadi gahle, Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi shiinyile, Rangiikito kamage hangkalei, Ntak katu
dousang dousupii Jesu keikapyi sam liipiina tamlo Nleiloisa tampyilo nyi shiinyile.

title: KEEP STEP WITH THE MASTER
details:
. (S.S .1092) MATT. 8: 19. IDA S. TAYLOR. W.
A.OGDEN.1841-1897
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ngam katchii hangki Pumpii kasui tatlo, Tinghum kamyi kido Pumpiigo latlo, Juhkarou
ngou karou saryi gongkido, Jesugo kasuilo teimahum heihsa.

Ngamwolo teimahum heihsa Mateihsa teihsa tatlo, Khristago kasuihum dichii, Bamlyi
hangki Ahna koipyitang.

2. Pumpii kasuilo kagong kamaang hangki, Kamyiki teito puidi tampyi tangle, Ah kavai teina
puidi mangou pyitang, Katuk katong katutei kadou lakle,

3. Pumpii go kasuisa taatei tchiihumlo, Pumpiina katam samhang tei suihumlo, Ahma
teimahum tei poisa ngam tchiilo, Bamlyi hangki tei nangna ngam joutangle

title: TENDERLY GUIDE US
details:
. (SS.533) ISA.41:10 MRS.W.R.GRISWOLD GEO.F ROOT.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Lungkasyi jaokakoipii juhpyilo Hiikabi dwitahng kasu sazyiki Tingchoi tingkii taksupii
sepyilo Godato pak wolakle.

Paklak - paklak….. Paklak….. oh, Pumpiigo I toilakle Paklak….. paklak….. Godato pak
wolakle.

2. Sazyipou sakai madei myikido Lamryi lamkaa tingkei tingrot gongdo Pumpii ma kavai
teipii vaipyilo Godato pak wolakle.

3. Soikalei nyigo teimahum keipyi, Teimahum kamajung tei keipyilo Pumrong tei mahumpii
tammatoine, Godato pak wolakle.

title: LET US GO FORTH
details:
. (S. S. 1115) HEB. 13: 13. EL. NATHAN. J. MCGRANAHAN.
KEY A FLAT. ( Beating three to the measure)
. Pumpiina kalat latkaang tei, Christian meihang shiipyi humlo, Gahtu kalei rangii hangtei,
Fiiwolosa n'go latlei.
Nyi maang tude… Ahna latlei… Pumpiima taa… lunglatsa tchiide… Khrista gongchii… satoi
pyitang… Sana pyihung… keipyi tangle…
lyrics:
2. Zai teipiina luwokalu, Christian meihang gongkiih wolo, Kem kapungmei Ahnyi gotei,
Sampao kabi tam mangoulo.

3. Bangpii ma naa khrista roile, Nyigo kemkito keipyile, Kem gahpyisa Ahna koipyi Ahzhei
gotei tamma

title: LONGING
details:
. (A.H. 414) A. R. HABERSON. GEO. C. STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Goma samtei kisa tinyi humle, Golung kasyi roktei shiitang karam, Goda kisa manangsa
bamnyile, Nangna bile katutei mareile.

2. Goda manangsa lungsa leinyile, N'go roina ratatangle Pumpii, Lungkasyi teipii pangtat
pyihumlo, Sating kataa koipyilo gonaa go.

3. Pumpii ma pumtei kavai tinyile, Sating kata Pumpii teitei suitang, Goh swiki ntah rangaa
teipiina, Pumpiigo ngoutang neika gohmikpii.
4.Oh kahing tei gahsa koisa leitang, Ina kisa lungliitsa fiitangle, Keikapyi lungkasyi tei
tiwosa, Gohlungki keipyilo Ina poine.

title: IN THE SHADOW OF HIS WINGS
details:
((S.S. 644) J. B. ATCHINSON. 1840-1882 E. O.
EXCELL.1851-1921
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii Ahma peebang teito ntak wolo, Jaang kanang kasoi kaset mazyi saryi hang, Mage
marii kemkapung meihang nado, Gongsana ntak wolo Pumpii ma peebang kiteito.

Ntaktang majungsa ntahle, Ah peebangto… bamtangle. (2 times)

2. Pumpii ma peebang kitei kamajung doutang, Tikei kalu kalui tchiimak lungkasyi tei;
Majung kalei Ahlung kasyi ma bamle, Lungkasyi ma kamajung tei Pumpii peebangki leile.

3. Pumpii ma peebang kitei daziikii ntah, Ngou kasagah mah tamwo kalak ntah tei,
Eikakum bamtei douloi keiwo lakle, Ntahle ntahle Pumpii peebang kitei bamsana.

title: LOOK UNTO ME, AND BE YE SAVED
details:
J.MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Juhhumlo, keikapyi piigo nang karing doutangle? Keikapyi ei matapii pyi, sazyipou
tamroilo,
N'goh juhlo gonyi ringtang Sazyipou kaleikak Kaki gahle (keikapyi) Keikapyipii n'goh juhlo
gonyi ringtang.

2. N'goh juhlo, kamagemei crossmah paryi teito, Goma kemtei poitoi takle malumlo
mateisa.

3. Juhhumlo Khrista, ringtakle, kamyisum lungteito, Lungkasyi matapii pyile, kahemgo
ngam kabui.

4. N'goh juhlo, tchiihakapyi meikado gahtakle, Kamajung lungkasyi teipii, goh rangii
keipyilo.

title: I WILL NOT FORGET THEE
details:
. (A.H. 118) ISAIAH 49:15. ARR. C.H.G. CHARLES H.
GABRIEL, 1856-1932
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina go mangei laklesa tamle, Gorangii doikashyi doumatu lakle, Kamyi teina n'goh
bangnei wokido, Vaipyi tangle Pumpiina kalui piinei.

Ina n'go mpatpyi lakle, Gohbaipii n'go sating kata chyitangle, Ina n'go mpatpyi lakle, Pumpii
Jesu roina n'goh jupyilei.

2. Jesugo daziika tammatoi tangpo? Ahlung kasyi paito n'goh keipyile, Ah rasam kabi meigo
tam mangoulo, Ahnyina malumsa lukeiwo kabui.

3. Samtei malumlo n'go mangei lakle, N'tah rangaa lii tchiisa roitutangle, Kangmei hemeina
n'goh toi eikido, Jesuna kasuichii ntah doutangle.

4. Ina sana namkitei piwodichii, Kamage kalak kaniih gahtutangle; Gonglosa kalat koitei I
shiinyile, Goh malum meigo kito koisa leitang.

title: JESUS LOVES EVEN ME
lyrics:
1. Gohmah rangii ntah beidi sana, Sating gamto kalei gohpfii teina, N'goh kapyi Bible karing
samtei, Jesu n'goh lungkasyi ryibamle.

Kisa Jesuna n'goh lungsyi, N'goh lungsyi n'goh lungsyi, Kisa Jesuna n'goh lungsyi, Jesuna
lungsyile.

2. Ahgo mangei eisa n'noukido, Ina katat hangki lungsyi pyile, Ahma lungkasyi tei maning
gongsa, Mikdwi patsa Ina nlei gongle.

3. Ina liitei tchiiti podichiina, Sagong mah kasagah kangou piinei Jesuna n'goh lungkasyi
samtei,

title: I LOVE TO TELLTHE STORY
details:
.((S.S.46) PS. 66:6., MK. 5:19 MISS CATHERINE HANKEY,
1834-1911. W.G. FISHCER, 1835-1912.
KEY A FLAT. Joyously.
lyrics:
1. I rasam tei tamnyile, sating gammah sampii, Jesuna ngou kasagah Bangpii ma lungkasyi,
Kasangle katu tile, Ina tamnyi humle; Gohmah swiki kamarei kaki mado gahle.

Rasamtei tamnyi humle kabitei eiroinale,
Ndouma samtei sekle Jesuna lungkasyi.

2. Rasamtei tamnyi humle, kamadat ma samtei, Sesana ma peimani keesoi song sagoile,
Rasamtei tamnyi humle gohlung tchii ntahpyi, Teijaang piina Ina eitoi n'go tamleile.

3. Rasamtei tamnyi humle, nleisa tamnyile, Samkaang hangkitei kakum samkaang roina
patle, Rasamtei tamnyile titangkasu shiikasu, Kem kapungmei jaangpii keikapyi ma
sampaotei.

4. Ina rasamtei tamnyi, shiikanyi mei jaangpii, Mazyi kumpii koileile, saryisa koileile,
Kasagah namto Ina kasatei lii tchiitang, Kareimah rasamtei Ina liipii tchiitangle.

title: JOY TO THE WORLD! THE LORD IS COME
details:
. (C.W. 190) PS.98:1. ISAAC WATTS, 1674-
1748 GRORGE F. HANDEL,1685-1759
KEY D. With joy.
lyrics:
1. Ntah tulo Pumpii gonglei, Sagong go kadoulo, Meihang lungki abam pyilo. Sating liitei
tchiilo, Ahgo tammatoilo, Ahzhei gotei tammatoilo.

2. Sazyi poumei ntahtulo. Sagong manaa takle, Zanglyi roklyi Ahsam tamlo, Sagoisa lii
tchiilo, Kisa tchiiloi keilo Rok sagoisa saa loikeilo.

3. Sazyi pouryigo ngamtakle, Kasang satoi pyile, Ahma pumtei kavai hangtei, Madat
lungkasyile Madat lungkasyile, Jesu zheikito ntahlo.

title: LO, THE GOLDEN FIELD ARE SMILLING
details:
.(RS.645) F.J. CROSBY. WM. J KIRKPATRICK.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Juhlo sanalu myileitak, nang mahatsa leitangpo? Rachettang karam mei gahle, Pumpiina
golat leile. Tattuhlo Ahngam tei tchiilo, golungtei nanglaht pyilo, Ahna latsa latsa leile,
Pumpii I eiki leile.

Koikinglo sating gam taa katchii meilii; Ngoukabi lukitei maangsa fiitulo lubamtei,
Pumpiina golatleile.

2. Satoitei nang gong poiwolo, Golung tchii ntah pyitang, Lungmage kalei meihangna,
kazangjyi doumatulo. Kamasui pottei punghalo, magesa kalei meigo, Tuhlo, Ahdatei nang
maangsa, Ahgo rata njoilo.

 3. Tuhlo, rangii poi nkomlo, mai kating rangii gotei, Lungkasyi kikam mangoulo, latlosa
ralipyilo, Pumpii jaangpii rangii fiilo, ngam tchiilo ringkalei kak, Taksupii taa katchii meitei,
ka ka ntah tei doutangle.
4.Tattulo Ahngam tchiitulo, tattulo mahatsupii, Tinglang tei tchiimagaa sulo, Pumpiina
golat leile, Ahna teipyiile gohjaangpii, goh rangii ringtang karam Ahna latleile ngam tchiilo,
Nang golungtei pyiil

title: ONLY TRUST HIM
details:
. (S. S. 392) MATT. 11: 29. J. H. S.1813-1877 J. H. STOCKTON.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Kem kapung meihang tei gonglo, Pumpiina latleile, Madou supii ntak pyine, Ahgo malum
dichii;
Malum gatlo Pumpii gotei, Eitoi malumlo, Keipyi tangle, keipyi tangle, Eitoi keipyi tang.

2. Jesu Khristana zai patsa, Taipyisa satoi pyi, Zaikitei gong ngalum dichii, Syitoi pyitang
kemtei.

3. Jesutei kasang puidile, Ntakni pang gongtang, Ahgotei malum reiwolo, Satoi nang
doutangle.

4. Gong heihlo mateimei hangtei, Ntahsa tattulo, Gong lungtangle kabi bamto, Ntah kalui
gahsa

title: JESUS PAID ITALL
details:
. M. S. SHAFFER. SAMUEL W. BEZZLEY.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Gohmah kem matum hangtei Jesuna ruipyi takle, Nlum kalei kemkito tatpat wotakle;
Ngoh keipyi kabamtei I poutei ruiwo makle, Gohmah keelei hangtei Jesuna keipyi tak.

Sp- Jesuna ruipyitak, Calvary Cross paryi teito, Gohmah rangii keipyi takle Katai katchiih
kalak matumtei Gojaang gohjaang piina taipyi takle kalak lehsa. Ruipyi takle gohmah
poujang kalei hangtei Pumpii Jesuna.

Bass- Jesuna ruipyitak poujang kaleihang Calvary Cross paryiteito, gohrangii keipyile
Jesuna teipyi takle gojaang gohjaang teipiina Tchiimateipyi gohmah kamaa kaleihang.

2. N'goh ntah matutang, gohrangii ki kavailei, Ahgo malumtang n'goh keikapyi jaangpii,
Gohjaangpii ruipyi takle keelei matum hang jaangpii, N'goh kavai rangiitei punggong
pyitakle.

3. Jesuna taikapyi tei gohjaangpii roinamakle, Gohmah kem teikumpii, meihang jaangpii
teipyi, Gokemtei syimateilo, gorangii vaiki tangle, Ka ntah keikapyi tei go jaangpii tangle.

title: JUST AS I AM
details:
. (S.S.473) JN. 1:29. C.ELLIOTT,1789-1871 W.B.BRADBURY,1816-1868
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Makado gahsa I gonglei, Goma azai gohjaangpii pat, Nangna n'goh kalat kitei, Teijaang
piina gonglei Pumpii.

2. Makado gahsa I gonglei, Swikak swiryisa kalei ki, kahing kachiih tokryisa Teijaangpii I
gongleile Pumpii.

3. Makado gahsa I gonglei, Gohmah kemtei loktoinesa, Goma zaipa syitoi pyilo , Teijaangpii
gongleile Pumpii.

4. Makado gahsa I gonglei, Gohlungki liit tokryi pyilo, Eitoi gomah tchiitanglesa, Teijaangpii
gongleile Pumpii.

title: LET US CROWN HIM
details:
(III ALEX 176) PS. 8:9 REV. E. PERRONET. JAMES MCGRANAHAM.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Jesu zheitei tam matoide! Sating gammei toile, Pumpii gotei lukei wode, Ah sagong
pyihung tei.

Sagong pyihung… keipyi tude, Pumpiitei meihang Sagongle lukeilo, Sagong pyihung…
keiwo sana, Pumpiitei nyi Sagongle.

2. Sazyi pouryi lungkalei hang, Sanah pfiinahmei hang, Kakui kama matum hangtei, Tchii
magahpyi tangle.

3. Oh! Karyi lougam kaleihang, Ratade Pumpiigo, Kalui kagah liitei tchiitang, Bangpii
Sagong kito.

title: NO BORN KINGS LIKE JESUS
details:
. ANON.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pou Sagong naa lungkalei hangkakto, Sagong Khrista kumpii meikado lungmakle,
Keikapyi sagongtei kamage kemjaangpii. Tchiimatei pyinesa sazyipouto lungle.

Ntahsa toihumde, Sazyipou sating gam! Lungkabam sagong Jesu zheitei jumsana, Keikapyi
sagongtei kamage kemjaangpii, Tchiimatei pyinesa sazyipouto lungle.

2. Rakot meina tingsumka tam matoisalei, Samtei Jao kakoi meida reipii tampyile, Jao
kakoi meiteina Jaotei toi eisana, Pumpii Sagong go fiigongsa rataleile.

3. Leimik kapatlam kati kangou meinado, Sageiti ma kavai teihtei suiwosana, Ahnyina
Bethlehem katang fiimaang sana, Maikatihng potpyisa Ahgo mataa leile.

4. Sagong Herodna samtei shiiki lunglakle, Kapatlam kati kangou meida nganiile,
Bethlehem naamei hanggotei gi eitakle; Naa Jesu gona Bangpiina keipyi takle.

title: MAY GOD DEPEND ON YOU?
details:
((R.S. 841) W. C. MARTIN.19TH CENTURY IRA B.
WILSON.1880-?
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Kasang majyi doutang karam, Lungliitsa saryi tchiilo, Ngoukarou kasang kiteito,
Bangpiina kasang kito, Kateihmei kafii kaktei, N'go kalei wobuipo?

Bangpiina goparyi tei, Kamalum tei leitangpo? Kasang teipiina tamlo, Nang golungtei
pyitangpo?

2. Kahem mah teimahum pungsa, Ngou karoumei gongleile, Kemki mah kamyi teinado,
Baangkalu tinglang kaktei, Bangpiina goparyika, Kamalumtei leitangpo?

3. Go Bangpiina satinggamto, Nyihang go keipyi tangle, Jesuna nyihang go pangsa, Ngam
kasutei tchiilakle, Kasang jaangpii Bangpiina, N'go kalei wobuipo?

title: GO, TELL IT ON THE MOUNTAIN
details:
.(BH.82) JOHN W. WORK, 1872-1925 NEGRO
SPIRITUAL.
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Maangsa samtei tampyilo, zangtoi kido ningkam kido, Maangsa sam ei tampyilo,
Jesumah lungkasyi sam, Kem kapung sazyipou, kahem kinaapwitei; Bangpii juhpeiwo
laksa, Ahnaago maangpyile, Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, zangtoi kido ningkam kido;
Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, Jesumah lungkasyi sam.

2. Maangsa samtei tampyilo zangtoi kido ningkam kido, Maangsa sam ei tampyilo keikapyi
manaa takle; Koikinglo lii katchii, satinggam mei liitei, Sazyi pouna shiikabui, Jaokakoi
meigotam, Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, zangtoi kido ningkam kido, Maangsa sam ei
tampyilo, keikapyi manaa takle.

3. Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, zangtoi kido ningkam kido, Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, gojaang
goh jaangpii gongpyi, Sagong hangmah sagong, sating gamto humpyi, Gojaang gohjaangpii
kamage, pungpyi nesa humpyi; Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, zangtoi kido ningkam kido
Maangsa sam ei tampyilo, gojaang gohjaangpii humpyi.

title: THE ANGELS` SONG
details:
. (S. S. 28) LK. 2 : 14. R.L, 1826-1899 ARR. BY R. LOWRY.
KEY A FLAT. With energy
lyrics:
1. Tinghum tingsum satinggamto Lii katchiitei Ahnyina shiile Lungkasyi sam kamanoitei
Sating gammeina lii katchii tei.

Paryilamto (paryi lamto) Bikitangle Sazyipou hang majung matulo Magah supii (magah
supii) Lii tchiihumtang Sazyipou hang tokryitang.

2. Jao kakoi meina madatle Rakot meina katuh ngouwosa Lungkei kabam Ahnaagotei.

Ratatang karam jaangpii tuhle.

3. Bangpii ma naa sapii mpou Kemgah pyitang karam jaangpiina Sazyi pouryi gongpyi takle
Ntahsa tammatoi lii tchiilo.

title: THE LITTLE LORD JESUS
details:
. (A. H. 314) LK. 2: 16. MARTIN LUTHER,1483-1546 CHAS. H
GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Tom raangki teito naa zyidou sutakle Naa Jesugo mazyikei katu bamtei Satinggam
sageitina vai pyisalei Naa Jesu ragou paryito zyisalei.

2. Tomna maraa kito naatei gongkiihle Pumpii Jesuna maakado hatmakle, Sating gam
jumakiisana he Bangpii, Gohmah jyiku hum manangsa bampyilo.

3. Pumpii! N'goh kasuisana bampyilo Toisupiina lungsyisa kasuipyilo Ahnaa meihang
goteido keipyi seilo, Sating gamto nyihang kasuisa lungtang.

title: THE CHILD OF A KING !
details:
(S. S. 946) JAM. 2: 5. HATTIE E. BUELL.1834-1910 JOHN B.
SUMMER.1838-1918 (Arr)
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Goh Bangpii eina dikakipiile Sazyi pouryi pot matum Ahda lei I sana teido, sagah
humteido Ahma kanitei tampai wolakle. I sagong naateile, Pumpii sagongnaa Jesugo
kasuisa, I sagongma naale.

2. Goh Bangpii ma naa keikapyi piitei Matang rangsa ngeika sazyi pougong Eitoi sating gam
kalui gahsa lung N'gohdo sating gamto kee pyitang.

3. Sazyipou n'goh koisa leitangle Kemlung teito lungkei kalei jaangpii, Eitoi Ahma naa
tchiimatu wosa, Sagong mah pyihung Ina doutangle.

4. Gohmah sazyi poukee datchii tangpo? Gohjaangpii keesoi kadaa tchiisalei Kee ei toi
eisa, tammatoi tangle, Bangpii sagong naa tchiisa lii tchiitang.

title: TAKE TIME TO BE HOLY
details:
. (S. S. 608) LEV. 20 : 7. W. D. LONGSTAFF,1822-1894 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Matei kaki fiilo, ratasa leilo, Ahtei suitat humlo, Ahsamtei shiilo Kasoi kaset meigo,
tchiihasa leilo Pumpiima satoitei, nang fiikeiwolo.

2. Matei kaki fiilo, ri matusulo, Sating kata Jesugo ratahumlo, Jesugo juhlo nangdo Ahkum
tangle, Godato meikakina Jesu titang.

3. Mateikaki fiilo, Ahnii kasuitang, Pumpii Jesudato diisupii tatlo Ntahdo magedo Pumpii
teisuilo Jesugo juhumsa Ahgo malumlo.

4. Matei kaki fiilo, ri eisupiina Lungswi matumpii Ahda toikei eilo Lungkasyi dwipokni
panggong pyitangle, Pumpiima ngam kitei Ido liit tangle.

title: THE HAVEN OF REST
details:
. (RS.790) H.L.GILMOR. GEO. D. MOORE.
KEY AB.
lyrics:
1. Kemmah dwijai lungkito I roitatsa, Swiki kamajung gahsana, N'goh gonglosa kalat Ina
shiitakle, Kamajung bam ntakdou tangle. Sating gamtei pibam wochii, Gohmah swikalak
hangtei gahtangle, Tukkalei karyina gomneisa leikido, Ina hingtang karam tei gahle.

2. Ina Pumpiima ngam katchii kiteito, Ahma sam suisa sattangle, Gohbai ki peimei kabam
kemmah rengteido, Mpat pyisa ntah doutangle.

3. Pumpiina kasui pyisa gohswi ntah, Jesuda liitchii toipyilak, Kamatei keikapyi bampyisa
liitdichii, Oh tingnei Jesuda tei gonglo.

4. Gonglo Jesuna n'go koisaleile, Tingkei tingrotna ngamwolak, Ntahsa majungsa ka ntak
doutangle, Oh tingnei Jesuda tei gonglo.

title: THE EASTERN GATE
details:
. ((GGSH. 186) I. G. M. Arr. I. G. MARTIN.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tingneika sating gam teito, I n'go kadou loitang, Rangii mah ngamtei tchiihumlo, Madou
supii ringtangle.

Ina ngo kadou tangle, Leimik kapatlam kongmwi kiteito, Ina ngo kadouloitang, Neika
tingchoi ngoh teito kadoutang.

2. Pumpiina katam suisuchii, Kongmwi tei tiwolakle, Ahna tingchoi tei gongdichii, N'go
koiloi keilakle.

3. Goma meebungtei seiwolo, Pumpiina koisaleitak, Nyihang go kongmwi kiteito, Pumpiina
pang nduitang.

4. Kamatei meigo kasuisa, Daziika ntah tangpo Kongmwi teito ka ntahmah, Tammatoi lii
tchiitangle.

title: PARDON, PEACE ,AND POWER
details:
. (S. S. 780) JER. 33: 8; PS. 29: 11; ACTS 1: 8. EL
NATHAN.1840-1901 JAMES MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii zheito ntahsana Rangaasa leihumpo? Ahtei suilo kalui tchiimak Pumpii Ahma
swirek.

Kamajung teimahum lei, Lungkasyi tei sating gamlei, Ahbai kitei, goh jaangpii lei, Pumpii
zheito ntahsa lii tchiide.

2. Samah kado poisupiina Kem tchiimatei pyile, Lung kamajung teido Ahna Nyigo matapii
pyi. 3. Ntah rangaa lungkasyido Ahdato leihumle Lung kamajung lungkasyi tei, Nyihang
lungki keipyi.

4. Sazyi pouryi go ngamkalu, Rangiido keipyile. Pumpii paito nyina sazyi Pouryi go
ngamtangle.

5. Satoi pyilo gonaa meigo He sating gam gohpfii Nyihang mah lungki naamei, Lung kumpii
keipyi loilo.

title: IF JESUS GOES WITH ME
details:
. (C.S.H. 66) MATT.7 :14. C. A. M. C. AUSTIN MILES. 1868-1946
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Ina Sadoi kashyi ningkam ki tatsa leido, Sating kata jing jing katu bamto tatkido, Ina tiwo
lakle kabi kashyi matum, Jesu kasui dichii I teitui maang tang.

Jesuna kasuipyi dichii I maang tang, Ina kaleibam sating gam puidi, Ah leidichii ngohdo
ntah matutang, Crosstei pungtang Jesuna kasuipyi dichii I maangtang.

2. Ina karing samtam rali pyisa tatkido, Kempiina tokryi kaleibam fiisa leikido, Gohmah
kabitei tikalu fiilei kido, Jesu kasui dichii I teiki maangtang.

3. Cross kapung teipii gohmah doisyisa leikido, Kaki meina kaset kalak matum pungwosa,
Ahma kasang matum Ina doi sattangle, Ahna kalei bamki Ido leihum tang.

4. Pumpii ma samtak tei Ina tampai wolakle, Pumpii ma kasang samtamtei Ina tamhum
tang, Tatkido bamkido keetodo lukido, Jesu kasui dichii I teitui maangtang.

title: I HEAR THY WELCOME VOICE
details:
. (S.S. 475) MATT: 11 : 28. L. H, 1820-1872 L.
HARTSOUGH.
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. N'goh kalat teishii, Pumpiina gohlatlei, Calvaryto kalong zaipii N'goh tchiimateipyi.

Pumpii I gonglei goda gongleile! Syi matei pyilo n'goh. Calvary zaiteipii.

2. Kasoi I gongleile. Kem kamyi bamkito Zaiteipii syimatei pyilo. Lung manou supiina.

3. Pumpiina goh latlei, Malum kalu tchiipyi, Lungswi lahtsa gongliit losa, Teito Ahna lupyi.

 4. Jesu nyihang lungki Kabi ngam tchiipyisa Ina kempungsa leikido Eitoi lukei pyitak.

5. Lung kamatei meigo Pumpiina koipyitang Pyitangle katutei doutang Kamalum paikito.

title: LEAD ME, SAVIOUR !
details:
(S.S.537) PS.31:3 F. M. D.,1839-1896 FRANK M. DAVIS(ARR.)
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina pangtat pyilo! Kagong kamaang lyihang ki, Ahbai piina keipyi tang, Teiki Ido
heitangle.

Pangtat… pyilo, N'goh poikapak sulo, Tingkei tingrot gongkido, Pumpiina pangtat pyilo.

2. Rangii kamage kaktei, Pumpiigo Ina razang, Keipyi kalu paikito, Ina keikalu doutang.

3. Eitoi goh pangtat pyilo, Kamage hangtei toisa, Pumpii bamki pihtutang, Teito kahat
gahtangle.

title: I'LL MEETYOU IN THE MORNING
details:
. (GGSH. 112) A. E. B. ALBERT E. BRUMLEY.
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ngo tingchoi kadou tangle kavai karyi kuto Kamage gahhum kalei teihto Kongmwi kalaht
tinglang ki kamwiku satsa leitang Kamage hang majuhum eisa.

Sp:- Tingchoilam kadoutang (2times) Bai kajumsa (2times) Kasuisa lungtu tang (2times)
Kadou loichii rahet bikitang Nangna n'goh ngoutang (2times) Ntahsana (2times)
Tingchoilam kadousa (2times) Ngou kabinam kasagah ranam kito.

Alto:- Tingchoi n'go kadoutang Bai kajiim lungtangle Nyi karyikuto lunghum tang Kadou
loichii rahet bikitangle Nangdo n'goh ngouleng tang Ntah ntah sana Tingchoi kadou wosana
nyi, Kadi kasagah ranam kito.

2. Neika sudo neika n'go tingchoi kadou tangle Crosstei pyihung teipii kateitang Katai
kachiih lung kamage tei leiloi keilakle Leimikna liitkasu bamkitei.

3. Taatchii kalui piinei tingchoi n'go kadou tangle Kabi sana sazyiki teito Teito nyimei hang
ndwisa ntah njoitangle Tingkum tinglang kalui piineitei.

title: LET OTHERS SEE JESUS IN YOU
details:
. (M.H. 244) B. B. MCK.1886-1952 B. B. MCKINNEY.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ngo kasuisa kabam mei, Jesu Ahma kasang tei, Goda teito tiwokabui, Pouh lungtei matei
matulo.

Godato tikeiwo kabui, Jesuma kasang rasamtei, Kagong kamaang bamhang kito tampyilo,
Godato tiwo matulo.

2. Goma katchii kapung Jesu, Ahnyi nado tibuile, Kasangtei nang mangou sana Goda teito
tiwobuipo?

3. Kadaziika ntah tangpo Kabi ngamtei tchiidichii, Sating gamto kadou piinei, Nangna fiikei
kalumei tei.

4. Khristago kasuisa lungtang Kamyi kagah bam kito, Teibam kitei gonghum kalu, Goda
teito timatulo.

title: IN A LITTLE WHILE
details:
. (R. S. 314) E. E. H. E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Nyihang ntahmah liitei tchiisa tattude Saangnaka teihto tattu tangle Kalui kagah
bamkitei tinghumdo gahle Saangnaka teihkitei gongtangle.

Saangnaka teihto, saangnaka teihto Dwijai kadi kaasana Tingkei tingrot majusa nyi kadou
tangle Saangnaka teihto tattu tangle.

2. Nyina tchiitang karam ngamtei tchiilui eisa Saangnaka teihto tattu tangle Ntah piina
lungkasyi meigo kasuisa Saangnaka teito tattu tangle.

3. Ka ntah sating gamto nyihang ntaktang. Saangnaka teihto tattu tangle Sating gam sazyiki
kakem kahat gahle Ka ntah teipiina tokryile.

title: JESUS, THE LOVING SHEPHERD
details:
. (C.H. 572) W. A. O.1841-1897 W. A. OGDEN
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Jao kakoipii Jesuna lungsyisa latleile, Kalangsa gohki gonglo ntak bamnileile, Eikakum
tinglang kito Pumpiigo fiiwolo Kasang puidiki tatlo, paktuloi keisulo.

Lungsyisa Pumpii nii latsaleile, Paktu kalei gonyi nleigonglo Lungsyisa Pumpiina koisaleile,
N'goh koikapyi Jesu.

2. Jao kakoipii Jesuna gohjaangpii teipyile Lungsyisa ragupyile Ahna koipyileile. Kahemna
koisa leile tchiimagah einesa Pumpiigo riiwodichii kahemna ngam lakle.

3. Kalanglo oh kalanglo magahhum eitangle, Jesuna lungsyi sana gonglosa latleile,
Lungkasyi keekamtei latpyisa kaleikaktei, Ntah rangaa kitei gonglo gokei pyitangle.

title: SUNLIGHT IN MY SOUL
details:
. (S.S. 862) JN. 16 : 20. J. W. VAN DE VENTER,1855-1939 W. S.
WEEDEN,1847-1908
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Kamyi kito tatlei I Jesuda gong kasuna, Lungkasyi kavaiteipii kamyitei vaipyi takle.

Kavai kavai gorangii kavai, Kavai kavai puidi hangkitei, Ahna n'goh fiisa kamaa gahpyile,
Ahma lungkasyi kavaitei gohda lei.

2. Sating gam kamong teina n'goh baangnei wokido, Sazyipou myikido gohrangii da kavai
leile.

3. Pumpii kasuisa kavaiki katat hangka bile, Ina ratatangle Pumpiigo sazyipou toisa.

4. Ina lubam ningkam kamajaa tatmaju sana, Ahlung kasyi kavaikito sanalu rachettang.

5. Gohjaangpii teikapyi Pumpiigo Ina ngoutangle. Pumpii ma kavaiteina kalui tchiisang
tchiimakle.

title: MURMURING STREAM
details:
. (S. S. 701) PROV. 20: 11. L. H. EDMUNDS.19TH CENTURY WM.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Zang gamto leimik sei vaimaangsa lei Ntah rangaa lii tchiisana Leimikna kavai seipyisa
leile Gong kasuni gahle.

Ntah rangaa lii tchiisana Dwizaiki longliitle Ntah rangaa lii tchiisana Ei ahnyi mah liile.

2. Sateidou tingnouniih hiinii paryi Kajikdwi tei mahum pyile Sakao ruinah hangnado
shaksana Ntah ntah takle.

3. Karyikito sating gamto kisa Gohda longhum n'goh vaipyi Rangii mah gahkasu satoi pyile
Ntah ntah sana.

4. Satinggam mah kajikdwi tei kumpii Alii tchiisa tammatoilo Tchiikapyi Bangpii go
tammatoilo Lii tchiisa lii tchiisa.

title: IN A CAVE
details:
. H.B.F 1889-1967 HEROLD B. FRANKLIN
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Namdini takoi zyiki teito Khrista lungle; Kamatei tinghum tingsum rakotmei lii tchiilei,
Noel, Noel, Noel, Noel; Sating gam bamtei, Noel, Noel, Noel, Noel; Pumpiigo toide.

2. Jao kakoi meitei liirok tei shiisa hingtakle; Sam kabi punghum lesa katamteito ntah.

3. Jaogotei toi eisana naa bamki tei fiimaang; Takoi kee katang piina kavai sagei vaipyi.

4. Nyihangdo eitoi tinghum Pumpiigo fiiwode; Jyilungki kasang gotei maangsa kadou
tangle.

title: IT IS WELL WITH MY SOUL
details:
. (S.S. 901) H. G. SPAFFORD,1821-1888 P. P. BLISS,1838-
1876
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kamajung karyidwi na kalong kaktei, Mage marii pa dwijai kum, Kata tchiikido Ahna goh
ralipyi, Teijangpa gohrangii ntahle.

Ntahle….. Goh rangii….. Ntahle….. Goh rangii ntahle.

2. Kahem teina ngamnesa kagong kaktei, Ahlung setpii gommei takle. Khristana gohmah
mage tei ngouwosa Goh rangii jaangpii zai pat pyile.

3. Ina kempung kalei tampei wolakle, Gohmah kem matum madumpa, Cross kika daita,
Ina pungloisu tak Pumpiigo tammatoi goh rangii.

4. Pumpii gongpyilo malum ngou matulo , Kamong tei tchii matei pyilo Bwika kongsa
Pumpiina nleih humtang Teijangpa goh rangii n-tahle.

title: SOWING TO THE SPIRIT
details:
. (S.S 769) II COR. 9 : 6. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915
JNO. R. SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Rangiimah lwiroutei marou keihumlo, Lungkasyi ma lwiroutei bamlyi hangki; Pumpiigo
malumsa marou keikalu, Satoi kapyima laangtei nyimah tangle.

Tinglangta maroulo leimik kaleiki,
Tingkii tingkahk sulo luikasu tatei.

2. Karatatei heisana marou keilo, Lunglatsa malumsa marou keidichii, Bangpii satoi tingrot
kumpii maangpyi tang, Kabi lwiroutei nyina rachet tangle.

3. Nyimah kamalum tei chengsa leikido, Kamage mei jaangpii marou kakei tei, Kamage
lehsa marou keikabam tei, Ntah ntahsa rachetsa poigong tang.

title: LAUNCH OUT
details:
.(R.S. 874) JOHN.21:5 J. B. MACKAY. JNO. R. SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Gonyi tinghum matang karyi kuto, Matapii ngam tchiisa leipo? Dwi katuk ki ralangtei
rotkeilo, Dwijai kiteito hoitulo, Katang kito ntaksa leisulo, Katuklung ralang rotkeilo, Jai
katuk kito moisa doutangle, Ntak sana leisulo.

Hoilo… hoilo. Kamyi kiteito hoitulo, Pumpii dato magemai doutangle, Pumpii latlei gonglo.

2. Nangna ngam katchii gongtang sutakle. Nang mahatsana leitangpo? Khrista go jusa
kamalum jaangpii, Malyitei doilam hoipatlo, Pumpii satoi swirek tei doutangle, Kalui
tchiikasu doutangle, Kashyi ngam hangtei rattoi eisana, Pumpiida jisa gonglo.

3. Lung kamage meihang go latleile, Malyikito doilam patlo. Khristana kalat koitei
shiimakpo? Malyiki teito mananglo, Kamaa sazyi kamarong kiteito, Dajaangpii lungnyi
lunghoupo? Jesugo juhlo Ahna keipyi tang, Kasagahsa lungtangle.

title: I SHALL KNOW HIM
details:
. ((S.S. 967) MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 JNO. R.
SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Rangiima ta katchii kaset kalaktei luisana Tingchoi ngoukabi kavaitei ngoutangle, Goh
keikapyi Pumpii Ahgotei kadouhum tangle, Kadou kaluma lungkasyi lii tchiitang.
