Ina ngoutang goh Pumpiigo, Pumpii Ahdoito I sattangle, Ina titang goh Pumpii go, Kamage
leh kapyi paikito.

2. Sating gamto kaleimeina n'goh pihlosana, Bai Jeisana n'goh latsana leile, Edento
ahnyina n'goh kadousa lii tchiitang, Teikido Pumpiigo kadou reitangle.

3. Ngou kabi kasagah namdi lungtei Ido liitsa, Kamage kalak kagah bamki liitsa, Ka n'tah
mahlii katchiiki Ido heitutangle, Liitkido Pumpii go kadou reitangle.

title: LORD I'M COMING HOME
details:
. ((S.S. 471) MATT. 11: 28. W. J. K. WM. J. KIRKPATRICK,1838-
1921
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Kadii kitei tutaang eisa, Gaatu eitakle, Kem lungkito nlumtatsa, Eitoi keegong lei.

Kee gonglei….. keegonglei… Keetei gongleile, I tattu loikei lakle, Pumpii! Keegonglei.

2. Gohmah tinglang dii eitakle, Raasa I katat, Eitoi Ina mikdwi humsa, Keetei gongleile.

3. Kem kalaktei, jurou kasang! Eitoi titakle. Pumpii gomah lungkasyito, Eitoi keegonglei.

4. Gohmah rangii lakbei disa, Juh ngaryi gonglei, Tamtang karam kaki gaale; Pumpii!

Nangroile.

title: PRAISE AND MAGNIFY OUR KING
details:
. (S. S. 229) PS. 34: 3. L. EDWARDS,1809-87 JNO. R.
SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Sagong sazyi matum madum Bangpii; Tam matoide tam matoide; Bangpii mah
teimahum matum madum; Poi sagoisa lii tchiilo.

Keikapyi Pumpiigo, lungkasyi rokteipiina; Tammatoi tude, kaki Bangpiigo; Keikapyi
Pumpiigo, kisa tam matoide; Kasagoi Bangpiigo.

2. Sagong sazyi matum madum Bangpii; Ratatude, ratadude; Sazyi pouryi matum Bangpii
mahle; Ratade nyi meihangna.

3. Atei mahum matum madum Bangpii; Gongtu satsa lii tchiitude; Sating meido, sazyi
pouryi meido; Meihangna lii tchiitude.

title: REJOICE IN THE LORD
details:
. (S. S. 207) PS. 68: 3. M. E. SERVOSS,1849-? J.
MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ntah rangaalo meihangna, Lung kamatei mei matumpii! Kalak kaniih kahung kanang,
Matumpii toisa ntahde.

Ntah….. Ntah! Pumpii jaangpiina ntahle. Ntah….. Ntah! Pumpii jaangpiina ntahle.

2. Sazyi pouryi nei sating gam, Tchiikapyi piitei Bangpiile Swilat kapyi paito ringlei,
Nyihangna tingnei ntahde.

3. Ngou karou meina ngamnesa, N'go vangnei katu ngousa, Sating gammei saryi hangka,
Goda teito satsa leile.

4. Tinghum kamyitei gonglei tak, Go rangii tei myi eitangle. Pumpiima zhei kajum paito,
Kamyi kamoutei gahtangle.

title: LOVE LIFTED ME
details:
. (A.H. 379) MATT.14:31. JAMES ROWE 1865-1933 HOWARD E.SMITH.
1863-1918
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Kemlungto ngalumsa gongkiih wolaksa leitak, Kok makiih pyitang karam meikado
gahtakle, Keikapyi Pumpiina golat tei shiiwosana, Lungkasyi piina n'goh chyiimakiih pyi.

Lung kasyipii chyimakiih pyi, Tchiiha kapyi meido gah Khrista roile, Lungsyi sana chyimakiih
pyi, Meikado gahle Khrista Ahroinale.

2. Rangii ringkabui puiditei Jesu roinale, Ahna lungsyi pyisana n'goh pangtat pyile, Rangii
kamage meihang Jesugo fiihdichii, Dwijai katuk kito Ahna keipyitang.

3. Lung kamage kahingpii tokryisa kalei kak, Jesuna pangtat pyile gohbaito jumsana,
Kamage eisa mang pumpiina sam tampyile, Ahda kagong meihang tei n'tah tangle.

title: JESUS SHALL REIGN
details:
. (S.S. 1084) PS.72:8. I.WATTS,1674-1748 JOHN HATTON,d.1793
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Leimik kapat sazyi humtei, Pumpiina Sagong tangtakle, Sagong sazyitei dikiihtang, Teito
kalui kagah tchiimak.

2. Sazyipou lung kaleihangna, Jesugo kasui lungtangle, Kacheng kadi gong kadoutang,
Pumpii Ahzheigo toitangle.

3. Ahzheigo karata hangtei, Kalui tchiisupii ratatang; Ahzhei tei keiram kabikum, Bamlyi
hangki tokryi tangle.

4. Sazyi pouryi meihang teina, Ahgo sazyi nriit tchiine, Rakot meina lii katchii tei, Meihangna
tammatoi tangle.

title: LOOKINGTHIS WAY
details:
. ( III ALEX - 55) J.W.V. "NEITHER SHALL THERE BE ANY MORE
PAIN." -REV. XXI. 4. DUET - S., T., & CHORUS
DOH IS G.
lyrics:
1. Karyi lougamto meinina lei, Tingchoi kum kabi teitam wolak, Doi kashyi kaset kalakdo
gah, Lungsyisa Ahna koisa leile.

Eilam juhsa, juhsa leitakle. Lungsyisa n'goh koisa leile. Tingchoi kum kavai tei tamwolak,
Sating gamto nyigo juhsalei.

2. Kanghe meihang goteihto tatlei, Namki teito nyigo koisalei, Satingmei kasuisa lungtangle
Lungsyisa Ahna koisa leile.

3. Lungkasyi meitei kavai kito N'go koisa leile nang gonglo, Leimek seitei kumpii vaipyi lei,
Ahna nyigo juhsa koileile.

4. Jesu tei sagei tingtang pwikum Gah kaleimeigo fiihsa leile Ahsam teishiilo, tuthang sulo
Jesuna latlei kemmei gonglo.

title: REPENTANCE
details:
. (G.T. 25) Y.K. SHIMRAY. 1915-2002 B.B. MCKINNEY. 1886-1956
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ina sazyi pouryi gong, Jaangnai jaangtum jaangpii; Pumpiigo nga ngahtang karam,
Pumpiina magong pyile.

Pumpiigo malum humtang, Katai katang teipiina, Mei kakido malum kabui, Kasang
samtamtei tamtangle

2. Ina sazyi pouryi bam, Jeishang tisupiina, Pumpii mah kamarei taatei, Hangninado
tchiimakle.

3. Sazyipou taana ngamsa, Pumtei kavai gotei, Mangeisa leitu eikido, Neika maning
gongtangle.

title: PRAISE HIM ! PRAISE HIM !
details:
(S. S. 208) PS. 146: 2. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 C.
G. ALLEN.
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Tam matoide! Keikapyipii Jesu gotei, Liipii tchiide, hakalaang mah samtei, Toide, toide!

Sating gam rangiigo suisa, Sazyi nriit pyisa Pumpii zheigo, Jao kakoipiina Jaogo koikatu
kum, Jesuna nyigo koipyi humtangle.

Tam matoide! Pumtei kavai gotei toide, Katei mahum Pumpii Ahgo toide.

2. Tam matoide! Keikapyi Pumpii Jesugo, Kemjaangpii Jesuna taipyi takle. Tuhde, nyina
nganii kabui keikapyile, Tam matoide! Keikapyi Pumpiigo. Ahna kem kalak kaniih pungpyi
takle Lungkasyi tei hangdoito moikile.

3. Tam matoide! Keikapyi Pumpii Jesugo, Sating gam rakotmei hosanna saa, Pumpii Jesu!

Kalui kagah sagong teile, Rata tuhde, nyihang sagong gotei, Ah gongleile, sazyi pougo
ngamnesa, Pumtei kavai kateih mahum Ahmah.

title: JESUS LOVES ME !
details:
(S. S. 1155) I JN. 4: 19. ANNA B. WARNER,1820-1915 W. B.
BRADBURY,1816-1868
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. N'goh Jesuna lungsyi, Bible ki ei tchiisa tam Naamei hangtei Ahmale, Kateih mahum
Jesule.

Goh lungsyi makpo! Jesuna lungsyi! Goh lungsyi makpo! Bible ki ryibamle.

2. Lungsyisa Jesu taipyi, Sating gam kikam latpyi, Gohkem tchiimatei pyisa, Sating gam
liitmatu tang.

3. N'goh Jesuna lungsyi, N'goh Kasuipyi humtang, Katai piinei tinglangdo, Sating gam
pangkii pyitang

title: THERE'S ROOM FOR ALL
details:
. (S.S. 820) LK. 14: 22. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915
GEO. C. STEBBINS1846-1945
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Magah kalei rangiitei, gonyi maang fiihwolo, Puidi kamarong kitei, pangsa tatmatulo,
Keikapyi piina kalat Ahnyida tampyilo, Kachii kasak tchiidaabam, mei kaleihang gonglo.

Hang jaangpii….. tchiidaa bam (hang jaangpii tchiidaa bamle) 2 times. Kachii kasak
tchiidaa bam, Meikalei hang gonglo.

2. Lung magesa kalei hatsa kalei Ahnyi go, Ka ntah mah kavaiki kamajung bamkitei, Jesuma
peebang tei gong pyilosa tampyilo, Kachii kasak tchiidaa bam meihang gong chiipyilo

3. Lungsyisa Pumpii ma zhei jumsa latgong pyilo, Rangiigo keikapyi tei bam hangki
tampyilo, Tingna leimek kaleiki kamyi gongkasuki, Takbeiki heihwo kabui meihang gotei
latlo

title: ONE SWEETLY SOLEMN THOUGHT
details:
. ((S.S. 987) HEB. 11: 16. P. CARY.1824-1871 PHILIP
PHILLIPS,1838-1876.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Lungkasyi lat shiisa, gohlungki liit dengpyi; Gohlung ranuloisa tingnei, keegong manang
leitak.

Manang leitak, gohkee lamtei, Gohkeelam tingnei gongleile, Gong manangsa leitak.

2. Gohpfii ma keeteina, kamage kalak gah, Sagong Bangpii ma bamkitei, Tingnei gong
manang lei.

3. Gonyi ringloi takle, Gopot matou eisa; Gohmah crosstei matou eichii, I pyihung
doutangle.

4. Pumpii kasui pyilo, gahtang karam chiilung; Keetei manangsa gongleile, tingnei gongliit
leile.

title: JESUS, ROSE OF SHARON
details:
. (C.S.H. 80) IDA A. GUIREY. CHAS H. GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Sharon hiipai Jesu goh lungto mpai, Kasangmah kamatei songdo ngou kabi, Pumpiima
lungkasyi swikabi teipii, Bam hangki todo go tammatoi pyile.

Jesu…..(Bikakipii) Sharon hiipai (Sharon hiipai) Vaikaki lungkasyi goh lungto mpai.

2. Sharon hiipai Jesu juki jusatmak, Hiipai hangsongdo ngoukabi bisangle, Sating kata
golungkasyi teipiina; Goh chiilung lung kaleita kasui pyilo.

3. Sharon hiipai Jesu mpaisa leihum, Gotei mahum sazyipou timatulo; Kalak kaniih kadou
rangii hang gotei, Nangna tchii mbipyi ntah matulo.

title: MY FAITH LOOKS UP TO THEE
details:
. (S. S. 235) PS. 25:1 RAY PALMER,1808-1887 LOWELL
MASON,1792-1872
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. I na malum katu, Calvaryki jaonaa, keikapyipii! Ratalei shiipyilo, kamaa tei gahpyilo,
N'goh lukei pyisa, gomei tchiilo.

2. N'goh lungsyi pyisa, Goteimahum pyilo, Gomei tchiitang Nangna gohjaangpii tai, N'go
Ina lungsyi, Kisa matei kabui karing teipyi.

3. Magekalei rangii, goh karingtei pyilo Gomei tchiitang, Kamyi bamki teito, Kamage lung
eito, Lung tchiimatei pyisa, Gomei tchiilo.

4. N'goh lungkaluto, katai katang piina, Gomei tchiitang, Kamyi bamki teito, kamage bam
eito, Lung tchiimatei pyisa, Gomei tchiilo.

title: SOLDIERS OFTHE KING
details:
. (S.S.684) 2 TIM. 2 :3. D.W. WHITTLE.1840-1901 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Nyi Sagong saryimei, Zaipii lupyi takle; Saryi jaangpii nyigo kalei, Pumpii Khrista jaangpii,
Saryinat keiwosa, Ntahsa lii tchiitang, Ahnii nyilung tchiimadipyi, Sagong saryi meihang.

Nyi Sagong saryimei, Ahgo tammatoi tang; Nyina saryido ngamtangle, Lung latsa ngam
tchiide.

2. Nyi Sagong saryimei, Ahzhei poisagoide, Cross paryito mage kapyi, Khrista nyi Sagongle,
Nyi jaangpii lakpyile, Rajiim pungpyi takle, Pumpii Jesu zheigo toide, Sagong saryi meihang.

3. Nyi Sagong saryimei, Ahgo kasuitangle Ahgo kasui lii tchiihaane, Kaset pung njoitang;
Peirah poisagoisa, Ahjaangpii sattangle, Pyihung kadou piinei gongtak, Sagong saryi
meihang.

title: STAND UP, STAND UP FOR JESUS
details:
. (C.W. 371) PS. 66:16. G. DUFFIELD,1818-1888 G. J.
WEBB,1803-1887
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Satlo Jesu jaangpiina Cross ma saryi meihang; Ahma peirah poikiilo, Tchiimagah
wolakle, Ngou karougo ngamkalu, Ahma saryi meigo, Ngam kasu katang piina, Khristana
koipyine.

2. Satlo Jesu jaangpiina, Bwika lattei shiilo; Gonyi doilam tatliitlo, Saryi mahbam kitei; Ngou
karoumei daziika, Sakeisa ngam wolo, Teihlam doilam tei jusa, Doilam tei tatliitlo.

3. Satlo Jesu jaangpiina, Ahma teimahumpii; Pumtei piina ngam wolak, Ahgo tei malumlo;
Sampao kabi saryi nat, Kei wosana koilo, N'go kalat tinglang ki, Kalui kagah tchiilak.

4. Satlo Jesu jaangpiina, Tinglang tei thanglakle: Tingnei samlat moileile, Supounei lii
tchiitang, Kateih mahum meigotei Karingmah pyihung pyi, Pumpiigo kasuisana Kalui gahsa
lungtang.

title: FAIRER THAN THE MORNING
details:
. (S.S. 98) SONG 5: 16. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-
1915 JNO. R. SWENEY1837-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tingchoi kavai songdo kisa, Oh keikapyipii Sagong, Goma kangam ngoukabi tei, Ntahsa
lii tchiitangle.

Kamatei tingchoisong vaile, Tingna kavai song kisa vailei, Ahna lungsyi kapyi jaangpii,
Kamou kamyi gahtakle.

2. Julo Sagong sazyi kitei, Peimani kahaa keisa, Keikapyi Sagong pyihung tei, Gahkasu
gohmah tangle

3. Satoi kapyi lung kasyitei, Kalui tchiimak teibamki, Gahkalak Sagong sazyiki, Gojaangpii
tchiida bamle.

4. Kalak tinglang tei majuchii, Kataigotei ngam wosa; Meitang tangpii gong nduisa, Lii
tchiisa tammatoi tang.

title: SUNSHINE IN THE SOUL
details:
. (SS.872) II SAM.23:4 E.E.HEWITT. JNO.R SWENEY.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tingnei rangiiki kavai lei, Leimeksong bikisa, Vai kalei Pumpii ahteina, Gohmah kavai
teile.

Satoi kapyi leimiktei, Kavai kamajung ka n'tah tinglang Jesumah jeishang kabitei, Goh
rangiiki liitpyilo.

2. Pumpii go tammatoi leile, Ahlat Ina shiile, Ina tchiikalak liihangtei, Pumpiina tchiibuile.

3. Pumpiina gong manang kaktei, Gohrangii makengpyi, Golung kamajung kumpiina,
Gohrangiiki liitpyi.

4. Tingnei gohrangii ntah dou, Pumpii zheito ntah, Kadapodichii Pumpiina, Satoitei maang
pyile.

title: SWEET BY-AND-BY
details:
. (S. S. 964) I COR. 2 : 9. S. F. BENNETT,1836-1898 J. P.
WEBSTER,1819-1875
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi kabi hangnina leile, Kamalum paito nyihang ngoutang, Pumpiina nyihanggo koisa
lei, Teikibam katu kadaa tchiilo.

Ngouleng tang….. tingneika…. Sating gam ngoukabi bamkitei, Ngouleng tang…..
tingneika….. Satinggam ngoukabi bamkitei.

2. Christian meina teibamki teito, Ntah rangaa liitei tchiitangle. Rangiitei mageloi keilakle
Satoi kapyi dousa ntaktang.

3. Nyigo kasui kapyi Pumpiigo, Tammatoi humsana leitangle, Pumpii Jesugo fiipyi sana;
Nyihang gotei keipyi eitakle.

title: OH, BUILD UPON THE ROCK!
details:
(S. S. 451) MATT. 7 :25. G. F. R. G. F. ROOT,1820-1895
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Goma kee tchiikalei Daangtui gorangii leipo? Kangneng paryi ki tchiikabam, Keetei
shyiloi laktakpo?

He tudima pungbam, Gahlak tangkaram pungbam, Nleih kasumah pungbamtei, Khrista
sekle koitutei.

2. Tingkei kagong kaktei, Nangna kadapei tchiitang? Kangneng fiitat katukito, Nangna
satwo buitakpo?

3. Koisang koikei sulo, Sating karyi tinglangki, Nang kahem kadouloi lakle, Goma kee
mpong eitang.

title: THE ENDEAVOUR BAND
details:
(S.S. 1094) HEB. 10:22 L.F. LINDSAY. JNO. R. SWENEY.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Christian mei matum madamna, Jesujei ralitang karam, Pumpii samtei tamtang karam,
Ntahsana gong n'duide.

Christian mei matumpii Jesu zhei matade, Lungswi nina tchiisa toide Ahzhei gotei,
Tchiigatpiina satlo Pumpii sazyi jaangpii, Rata dichii Christian meigo keipyi tangle.

2. Nyi meihangna lii tchiisana, Ntahsana Jesu datei, Lungranusa liitwo dichii, Kalui kagah
karing doune.

3. Pumpii ngam katchii jaangpiina, Tamkabam tei nleisude, Ahteih suide malum sana,
Sating gamki pikasuta.

title: THE CROSS THAT HE GAVE
details:
. (SS. 747) ACTS. 14:3 B.B COM. BALLINGTON BOOTH.
(ARR BY W.J.K)
KEY EB
lyrics:
1. Crosstei hangkapii masui kido, Lungkasyi kalui tchiimak, Kahing katchiih gohku
gongkido, Ahju ngoukasu tchii lakle.

Crosstei Ahlung kasyi song dile, Kamouna Ahju sung wolakle, Jesugo kasui dichii, Samah
kado hinglakle, Ngou karou meigo ngamtang.

2. Kavaipii vaipyisa kaleikak, Gohlung kalak gahtangle, Jesuna lungsyi kapyi jaangpii, Goh
ngam ei tchiilui pyitakle.

3. Sazyi pouryito lung kaleikak, Ahna kamarei tchiitang, Gohmah teimahum matum
madum, Pumpii Ahma tei tchiitangle.

title: SWEET HOUR OF PRAYER !
details:
(S.S. 318) PS. 55: 17. REV. W. W. WALFORD.1772-1850
W.B. BRADBURY,1816-1868
KEY D. In moderate time.
lyrics:
1. Rata tinglang kabikitei Ngo latlei juhpyinesa, Gohpfii bamki teipidichii, Ina mareihangtei
doune Kalak kaniih kadou kaktei Goh rangiina ntak doune.

Kahem kiteito pattakle, Ratasa kaangkatu jaangpii. (2 times)

2. Rata tinglang kabi kitei, Ntah rangaa kadou hangtei Pumpii nlei kagong koisa Rangiitei
ntahsa leitang, Bangpiigo ngoutang karamni, Ina pihtumaji tangle.

Ntahsa bam ntak doune Ahgo koisa rataleile. (2 times)

3. Rata tinglang kabi kitei Ina kakaang tei poipyisa, Ahgotei malumsa koine, Kasang
kamalum tei doune Ahgotei fiilosa tamle, Ahsam malumsa lukeilo.

Matumtei Ahna pyitangle Ahgo koisa rataleile. (2 times)

title: LAY IT DOWN
details:
. (S. S. 347) PS. 55: 22. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 W. H.
DOANE,1832-1915
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. He gonglo kemkapung meihang tei, Jesu peebang ki, Pot masui pungsa kalei meihang,
Jesuda gonglo.

Pot kamasui matoulo, Kamage pot toi eisa, Pot matoulo toi eilo, Jesu peebang ka.

2. Kem kapung matum madum hangtei, Jesu peebangka, Kaset matum teitoi eisana,
Jesuda gonglo.

3. Gojaangpii bamtei tchiikada lei, Jesu peebangka, Jesuda pot kamasui hangtei, Gong
toikei pyilo.

title: TRUE-HEARTED,WHOLE-HEARTED
details:
. (S.S.602) REV.2:10. FRANCES R.HAVERGAL,1836-
1879 GEO.C.STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY F
lyrics:
1. Lung matum pyisa Ahgo zyirou tangle, Nyi sagong lungset dousa lung tangle, Ahgotei
tammatoisa zyirou tangle, Gotei mahum poisa saryi tchiitang.

Rakatsa magusa makektangle, Nyihang rangiido ntah ranga tang, Rakatsa magusa zyirou
tangle, Nyi sagong lungset dousa lungtangle.

2. Lung matum pyisa Ahgo zyirou tangle, Rachettei poisa sagongda kiihde, Ntah ntahsana
katamtei suide, Ntah rangaatei nyigo pyitangle.

3. Lung matum pyisa keikapyipii tangha, Teimahum teipiina lhung tuhtangle, Nyina kamarei
hanggo tei ngamtangle. Matum madum goda pyilui tangle.

title: WE SINGTHE REALM OFTHE BLEST
details:
. (G. B. 421) MRS. ELIZABETH MILLS.
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Lii tchii satoi kapyi sazyi, Ntah kabi sazyi teile, Ngou kasagahpii tokryile, Nang
kadakumpii leitangpo?

Sating, sating Sating katubam teikitei, Ntah ngoukasagah hangtei, Kadakum piina
leitangpo?

2. Nyi hangna saasa tamleile, Kemki teito patwosana, Kaset kalak douloi lakle, Teibamki
kadakum tangpo?

3. Tinghum katutei gahtangle, Satinggam meigo kasuisa, Sagah sana lii tchii tangle, Sating
gamtei dakum tangpo?

4. Pumpiina tchiidaa kabamtei, Ngou kasagah matum hangtei, Tinglang shangnaka teitona,
Satinggam pihsa titangle.

title: TRUST IN JESUS
details:
. (III ALEX.161) W.C.MARTIN. (PROV. 16:20) WM. J. KIRIKPATRICK,
1838-1921.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesugo malumtei bile, Ahsamtei suitang takle; Ahsam kasuimei kalakgah, Ahsam
kasuimei bile. J
esu Jesu I malumle, Samalyi bikakipii; Jesu Jesu bikakipii, Ngo malumsa ringne.

2. Jesugo malumtei bile, Ahzaipii syitoi pyile; Malumkito tchii mateipyi, Karing dwipoktei
pyile.

3. Ahgo malum jaangtei piina, Kemtei tchii loilak takle; Karing ntak rangaa majung,
Jesudato douleile.

4. Ntahle kamalum jaangpii, Meikahung Jesu gokang; I tile Ahnii kasuilei, Kalui katang
kasuitang.

title: THROW OUT THE LIFE-LINE
lyrics:
1. Kahing tingkei tingrot kahung bamto, Keipyi kabui kang hangnina leile, Ahma chiilung
rangii teinitakle, Tapiina rangii keipyi kabui leipo?

Rangiigo keikabui reng toikeilo, Dwikangto nluhm leile, Chiilung keitang karam reng
toikeilo, Dwikang nluhm tuhtakle.

2. Baichem piinado keiwolak takle, Nang eitoi dajaangpii lungnang leipo? Kalanglo ahtei
nluhm nitakle Chiilung malyi teipiina keipyiwolo.

3. Doi kashyii kadou kalu meihang go, Keipyii tangkaram rengtei toikeilo, Tingkei tingrotna
pungtu eitangle Madousupii nluhm tangle dwijei lung.

title: THE FIRST NOEL
details:
. (GGSH. 283) LUKE. 2:8 English Carol before 1823 ENGLISH MELODY
TRADITIONAL. From Sunday's Christmas carol, 1833
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Karei Christmas Rakot meina, Jao kakoi meigo katamtei, Ahnyina Jao koisa bamle,
Sateidou tinghum ting sumka.

Christmas, Christmas (2 times)
Israel Sagong manaa takle.

2. Sageiti teina hum pyisa, Bethlehem to ntak pyile, Oh humsa Jesuna kazyi, Paryito Ahna
ntakle.

3. Leimek song kisa vai kaki, Sageiti kadiikika ngou, Sazyi pouryi hang vaipyile, Tinghumdo
tinado vaipyi.

4. Teiki kati kangou meina, Gong kok kumsana ratale, Pumpiigo sanado pyile, Keirum kabi
teido pyile.

title: TO THE WORK
details:
. (S. S. 751) MATT. 21: 28. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 W. H.
DOANE,1832-1915
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Ngam tchiilo, ngam tchiilo, nyi Pumpii kabangle, Nyi meihangna Pumpii teihsuisa
tattuhde, Nyina ngamkabui jaangpii Pumpii kasuipyi, Nyimah teimahum tei heihsana
tchiituhde;
Lungniisa… ngam tchiide… Lungniisa… ngam tchiide… Tchiigatpii ngam tchiide… Pumpii
gongkasuta tchiide.

2. Ngam tchiilo, ngam tchiilo kagah meigo pyilo, Kaset kalak meigo dwipokki pangkeilo;
Crosstei nyimah kem tchiimatei kapyi teile, Matahpii kapyi, Ahma rasam tamroilo.

3. Ngam tchiilo, ngam tchiilo Pumpii zhei jumsana, Kamage ma maitei kangam pyihung
pyitang; Sating gam mah bamki pihkalu piineitei, Matahpii kapyi keikapyi ma lii tchiitang.

4. Ngam tchiilo, ngam tchiilo Pumpii baitui poisa, Ngam katchii meigo Pumpiina koipyi
tangle; Kamalum meibamtei nyina doutang takle, Keipyi takle karing doutaklesa saade.

title: LET US BREAK BREAD TOGETHER
details:
. LUKE 24:30 Words and tune BREAK BREAD
TRADITIONAL NEGRO SPIRITUAL
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Nyihang kuk kumsana chiiroktei chii njoide, Nyihang kuk kumsana chiiroktei chii njoide,
Ina kuk kumsa ratakatu tinglangki Pumpii N'goh jumage pyilo.

2. Nyihang kuk kumsana darkha jousak njoide, Nyihang kuk kumsana darkha jousak njoide,
Ina kuk kumsa ratakatu tinglangki Pumpii, N'goh jumage pyilo.

3. Nyihang kuk kumsana Ahgo rata njoide, Nyihang kuk kumsana Ahgo rata njoide, Ina kuk
kumsa ratakatu tinglangki Pumpii, N'goh jumage pyilo.

title: WHERE HE LEADS I'LL FOLLOW
details:
. (S.H.217) W.A.O, 1841-1847 WILLIAM A.OGDEN
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Lungkasyi kamatei kabi rasam, Tisang tikasu makum rasam ei shiilo; Kakui kamaa kagah
khrista gotei, Goh kamaa jaangpii Cross gamto gi eitakle.

Kalei kapyi Pumpii I Ahtei suine Jesu Khrista teih I sating kata suitangle.

2. Jesuna lungkasyi lung kamatei, Sazyi pouryito lungkasyi eikakum gah, Kakui kamaa
katchii meigo lungsyi Jesu gotei jusa nyido kalung tchiine.

3. Ahda gonglosa latkalei shiilo, Pot masui kapung meihangna Ahda gonglo, Jesu khrista
dato ntah doutang, Kalei kapyipii kuto gongbam ntaklo

title: “THERE SHALL BE SHOWERS OF BLESSING”
details:
(S. S.306) EZEK. 34: 26. EL.
NATHAN,1840-1901 J. MCGRANAHAN, 1840-1907
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tingrot kum satoi pyitangle, Ei lungkasyi sam sekle Lungtei tchiiranu pyitangle Sating
gamto maangpyi tang.

Satoi maangpyilo Tingrot kumpii maangpyilo Golung kasyi tei maangpyilo Gosatoi nyi
kangleile

2. Tingrot kum satoi pyitangle, Rangii matei pyitangle Sazyi pouryi zanglyi roklyi Tingrotkum
satoi pyitang.

3. Tingrot kum satoi pyitangle, He pumpii lungsyi pyilo Nyilung tei tchiiranu pyilo Gosam
tammakaang tangle.

4. Tingrot kum satoi pyitangle, Tingnei leimik maangpyilo Pumpii kem tchiimagaa seilo
Nyina Jesugo latlei.

title: WHEN THE BRIDEGROOM COMES
details:
. (S. S. 185) MATT. 25: 6. E.R. LATTA.1839-? WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Khrista gongtang karam tinglang tei naleitakle. Nyi meihang meebung seisa tchiidaasa
leitakpo? Tingsum douka gongdichii, Tchiidaasang kalumeigo roina pangtangle,
 He….. Tchiidaalo He….. Tchiidaalo Oh, Pumpii tei gonglei tchiidaalo.

2. Tchiidaa karimeigo Pumpiina toi eitangle. Kikamdo latpyi lakle, Pumpii kagong piinei, He
jyisa kalei gonyi, Tuhsana tchiidaalo Pumpii tei gongleitak.

3. Pumpiina lat kagong tei nyi meihang shiitangpo? Nyi meihang meebung seisa tchiidaasa
leitangpo? Tinghum tingsumka gongsa, Tchiidaasa kalei meigoroina pangtangle.

4. Pumpiina kagong piinei kamalum mei hangtei, Ntahsa kadou tangle Pumpii kagong
piinei, Halleluyah ntahsa, Sating gam kito Ahgo kasuisa lungtang.

title: TIS THE BLESSED HOUR OF PRAYER
details:
CROSBY ,1820-1915 W. H. DOANE,1832-1915
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Karatamah tinglang tei bikaki tinglangle Keikapyi Jesugo kanghe tchiiwosana Malum
gatsa kaangdichii, pyitanglesa tamle Kasuikapyi tinglangtei manang gonglei takle.

Ka n'tah tinglang karata tinglang Kamage maning paikalak jaangpii gongnyile.

2. Karatamah tinglang tei, nyimah lung mateipyi Rangii ma samkaang hangtei, Ahmeina
shiile Kamage kalak teido, Ahpeebang keipyile Eikakum rata katu teimahum pyitangle.

 3. Karatamah tinglang tei, bikaki tinglangle Kahem kagong tinglangki kahingtei gahle
Pumpiigo lungkasyimei Ahna keipyi tangle Lung matum pyisa ratachii nyilung liittangle.

4. Rata katu tinglangki, kasangpii doutangle N'tah rangasana Pumpiina pyitangle Sazyi
poumah kamaning kamage tinglangki Ratachii gahtangle kamage kalak hangtei.

title: THE ROYAL ROAD
details:
.(R.S. 154) MATT.7 :14 JENNIE WILSON. L. E. JONES. 1865-1936
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sagong keelam maangtang karam, Puidi hangnina leile, Keetei doutang karam jaangpii,
Puidi teito tatleile.

Oh Sagong puidi teina, Kadaziika bitakpo, Puidiki teito tatwosa, Nang gohtei suinyi makpo?

2. Jesuna puiditei tatlei, Calvary zang sekteito, Bangpii bamki gongtang karam, Ahna puidi
tchiibamle.

3. Ina puidi kabi tatsa, Bangpii Sagongki maangne, Ina kamalumki teito, Satinggam mei lat
shiile.

title: WALKING IN THE SUNSHINE
details:
. (S. S. 1099) MATT. 4: 19. W. ROBERT LINDSAY. IRA D.
SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Ngou kasagah kavai lungteito tatsa, Lungsyi kaki kavai tingchoi tingkiikum; Sating kata
doilamtei ntoisana, Jesuteih nyi suihum tang.

Suide Jesu teihnyi suisa tatde, Tingkataa suide, Doilam Ahna pangtat pyitang, Nyihang
Jesuteih suitat humde.

2. Tingnado tinghumdo tinglang kaleita, Sakaa sarhii tingkaang tingrot tinglangki; Keikapyi
Pumpii ma kalattei shiisa, Jesuteih nyi suihumde.

3. Sating kavai kido kamyi sumtodo, Tingkei tingrot kagong tinglang kiteido, Ahma lungkasyi
tei malum humsana, Jesuteih nyi suihumde.

title: THE LOVE OF GOD
details:
. (A.H. 417) JN. 3 : 16. H.L. HALDOR LILLENAS.1885-1959
KEY G. Moderato
lyrics:
1. Bangpii ma tamwo kalak lungkasyi, Mikpiina ngoupai wokalak ngamle, Swipiina maning
paiwo kalak ngam Gahkasu tei gohmahle.

Lungkasyi… (Alto) Lungkasyi teipii keipyi Teipii n'goh keipyi, (B-T) Lungkasyi teipiina n'goh
keipyi.

Teipii… poilo…(Alto) Lungkasyi jaangpii n'go pyile. (B-T) Lungkasyi piina pyile.

Gahkasu (Alto) Gahlak tangkaram lungkasyi tei n'go pyile, (B-T) Kalui tchiikasu lungkasyi
teipii.

 Lungkasyi ei (Alto) Bangpii Ahteina mataapii pyi (B-T) Bangpii Ahna mataapii kapyile.

Bangpiina pyi (Alto) Bangpii Ahna lungsyi sana nyigo pyibam takle. (B-T) Ahna lungsyisa
pyile.

(ALL) Gahsupiina leitang karam lung kasyi.

2. Sazyi pouryi ngam toi-eipo dichii, Kadi kathang do maning routangle, Kamage kaset godo
hinglakle; Lungkasyi jaangtei piina.

3. Goma kemtei daziika leikido, Bangpii ma lungkasyi teina dile, Tinglang kaleita ntah
matule, Lungkasyi kasang jaangpii.

title: WE SHALL MEETAND REST
details:
(S.S. 1009) HEB. 4:9 DR. H. BONAR. GEO. C. STEBBINS
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Huikalei hiipai laamtangle, Ramkalei huiloilakle; Tingkamoudo vaipat tangle, Vaikalu
myiloi lakle, Tingchoi ntahsa tukalu, Tingna majaang ntahle. Leimek raguiliit tuchiido,
Kamatei lii tchiitangle.

Nyikadousa ntaktang, Kamatei satoi dousa, Lougamto nyi kadoutang, Tuhkalei meihang
gotei; Nyi kadousa ntaktang, Kamatei satoi doutang.

2. Lungkasyi kamachiih gahtang, Hiiniido huiloi lakle, Lungkasyi ntahtei doutang, Sating
gamtei pihdichii, Lungkasyipii tokryi sana; Kisa lungsyi tutangle, Huiloi kalak hiipaiteina,
Dwipokni liitbam tune.

3. Kamou kamong kagah nitei, Kalak kaniih majuchii, Zyi maang kalak niteitodo, Mangdo
mailoi lak takle, Naana pwigo doukaluni, Pwina naa doukaluni, Marou maruksa kaleihang;
Panggong, nduihum tangle.

title: THE GATE AJAR FOR ME
details:
. (S.S. 372) "THE GATES OF IT SHALL NOT BE SHUT AT ALL BY
DAY." -REV. XXI. 25. MRS. L. BOXTER. S.J. VAIL.
DOH IS C.
lyrics:
1. Kavai kiing hangnina leile Ahma vaikaki teina Crossmah kavai seimang pyile Keikapyi tei
mangoule.

Ahlung kasyi paikiteito, Ina teiki liitwo buipo? Gohmah… gohmah… Gohjaangpii liit takpo?

2. Kangmei teina tchiilei makle, Ahgo kafiimei hangna, Kani kahii kagah kacheng, Meihang
tei liitwo buile.

3. Kongmwi tei latpyi bamsana, Doilam pangtei tatliitlo, Sagong pyihung tei poiwolo,
Lungkasyi mah tchiikahaa.

4. Nyina pungsa kaleiCrosstei, Poimaangsa matou sekchii, Rangii sagong pyihung keisa,
Pumpii gotei toitangle.

title: WHEN LOVE SHINES IN
details:
. (R. S. 300) MRS. FRANK A BRECK, 1855-1934 WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesuna teimahum tei heihsa humtangle, Sazyipou kateih mahumtei gahhum tangle, Lung
kasyipii tokryitang lungkasyipii vaipyi tang, Tinghum kamyi katutei leiloi lakle.

Lungkasyipii vaikapyi kak, Daziika ntah liitei Ina tchii tangle Lungkasyi teipii kapyi kak, Ntah
kamajung tei hangda liit humtangle.

2. Sazyipou vai chii daziika ngoubi tangpo? Kavaitei gohlung liitchii kamage gahtang, Kamyi
kahing hangteido sageiti kumpii vaitang, Kasatei chiilung tei Ina doutangle .

3. Kavai gohlung liitchii kamyi kahing gahtang, Kamage kaset hangtei gahhum eitangle,
Sazyipou taa toisa satinggam mei tchiituhtangle, Kavai lungkasyi satoitei doutangle.

title: MARLOW
details:
. (Sowing the Seed) ANON MATT. 13 : 8. JOHN CHATHAM,1685-1763
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Sazyi kabibam kiteika, Lui ralikei dichii, Madousupii rachet tangle. Ntahsa koileile.

2. Pumpii rasam kabisam tei, Tapii lungki teito; Luirou ralikei pyiwosa, Lhungpat
majitangpo.

3. Lutaa tikasu meihangna, Sazyi kashyi kitei, Luitei ralikei bamkido, Kalakmei doulakle.

4. Ei tchiisa goki naameihang Mado timak kido; Kabi kashyido timakle, Pumpii roina tile.

5. Sazyii kabi bamni kitei Tam mangoulo Pumpii Goma luirou kabi teido Nyina ralikeine.

title: YOU MAY HAVE THE JOY-BELLS
details:
. (T. H. 90) J. EDW. RUARK.19TH CENTURY WM.
J.KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou tingkei tingrot kahing bamto, Ngamkabui tei Jesuna n'go pyitang. Ahgotei
toisupiina kasuisa leihum dichii; Pungkoitei goda leihum matu tangle.

 Ntahle pung kalak koitei, Pung koitei Nangna katat bamlyi hangki Jesu kasui dichii, Pung
koitei golungki leihum tangle taksupiina.

2. Ka ntah pungkoi golungki leitangle, Sazyi pouryi ma chiilung maning supii, Kasang
puiditei tatsana maning gongsu dichii Pung koitei goda leihum matu tangle.

3. Jesuma lungkasyi tei nangna titang Lungkasyi ka kumsam meida tampyilo; Sating kataa
tampyilo lungkasyi ma samtam tei, Pungkoitei n'go shiihum matu tangle.

title: WHOSOEVER WILL
details: KEY D. Joyfully
lyrics:
1. Pumpii rasam shii kalumei hangteina, Kabisamtei meihangda tammangoulo; Ntah
rangaasam tei hangda tampyilo; “Liitkanyi meihang gonglo.”
Liitkanyi meihang teina gongpyilo, Sazyi pouryi meihangda tei tamroilo, Pumpiina gahkalei
meigo latleile. “Liitkanyi meihang gonglo”.

2. Liitkanyi meihang teina gongmajilo, Keekam latpyi kalei kaktei liittulo, Jesutei kasang
karing puidi teile, “Liitkanyi meihang gonglo”.

3. Ahna tamkatu samhang tei kasangle, Kamarei hangna lukeilo Ahsamtei, Kalui kagah
karing rangii pyitangle, “Liitkanyi meihang gonglo.”

title: WORKING, WATCHING, PRAYING
details:
. (R.S. 926) MRS. FRANK M BRECK.1855-1934
POWELL G. FITHIAN.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tatlo, tatlo, Jesu jaangpii sakeisa ngam tchiilo, Jesuna ralipyitang rata katutei, Goma
kamarei toi eisa Ahna tchiimatu kanitei, Ngam tchiilo, sakeisana tchiilo.

Tatlo, ngam tchiitang karamni, Jesuna golatlei, Lu gattang karam koisa lei, Matumtei
poikoilo.

2. Tatlo sazyi pouryi bam hangkitei ri eisulo, Lungkasyi sam hakalaangtei tam mpatlo,
Keikapyi jaang teipiina ka n'tah lii hangtei tchiisana, Taa tchiilo sakeisa ratalo.

3. Tatlo goma lungswi matum sakeisa ngam tchiilo, Kahem teimahumpii doikashyi
doukabui, Fiisa leikido nangna ngamtangle Ahtei mahum teipii, Ngam tchiilo sakeisana
tchiilo.

title: I WILL SING THE WONDROUS STORY
details:
. (S.S. 875) Ps. 89: 1. F. H. ROWLEY. (arr.). PETER
P. BILHORN,1865-1936
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. I kamadat sam lii tchiine Khrista gohjaangpii taile, Sating gam tei toi eisana Calvary
Cross gamto tai.

Goh jaangpii taikapyi rasam, Liitei Ina tchiitangle, Sating gam rakot kasuisa, Sating gamto
nduitang.

2. Gahkalei matum madum tei, Fiihsana doukalu tei, Jaonaago koi kapyi kumpii, Nyigo
koipyi humsa lei.

3. Katchiih kaniih tei bikapyi, Mage meigo tchiikahaa, Kaset kalak leiloi lakle, Sabwi kumpii
mateipyi.

4. Bikaki tei kaki gahle, Jesu gohmah lheiteile, Tinghum tingna tchiisupiina Jesu gohda
bampyile.

title: “VERILY, VERILY”
details:
(S. S. 359) JN. 6: 47. J. MCG. 1840-1907 J. MCGRANAHAN.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Madatle Jesuna taikapyi ei Gokamaa matumpii gahpyi takle Naa sapii mpougo
kamalummei Kalui gahsa lungne.

Kasang sekpii Ina gonyigo tamlei, Kasang piina eitoido tamsa leile Naa sapii mpougo
kamalum mei Gah supiina lungtang.

2. Goma kemhang tei Ahna pungpyile Goma kempou matum Ahna pungpyi Taitang karam
gorangii go keipyi Kalui gahsa lungtang.

3. Magekido Pumpii malum tangle Soihsa leikido Ahtei suitangle Pumpii naamei ntah
rangaa tulo, Kalui tchiilak takle.

title: WALKING IN THE LIGHT
details:
.(SS. 1158) EPHESUS.5:8-11. L.H.EDMUNDS. WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK.
DOH IS Db.
lyrics:
1. Keikapyipii peekaang teisuisa tatlo, Keikapyipii nyi sagong tei suilo; Ahma jei tingshang
kabitaa teisuisa, Ntah ntahsa Ahma lii tchiilo!

Kadaziika bipo keikapyipii teikasui, Kavaiki tatlo, kavaiki tatlo! Kadaziika bipo keikapyipii
teikasui, Kavaiki tatlo!

2. Ahna doirei kapyi kitei nang suilo, Kahem puidikito nrik wolo; Kalei kapyipii gotei nang
malumlo, Rangaa piinei leimiktei ngoutangle.

3. Kamalum kiteito tchiigatpii tatlo, Sating gam katang kasui pyitangle; Nyina sagong go
kangou piinei leimik Ntah rangaasa Ahbamki gontang.

title: WONDERFUL GRACE OF JESUS
details:
. (C.S.H.399) II COR. 8:9. H.L. HALDOR
LILLENAS,1885-1959
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesuma lungkasyi ei goh kamaasong dile, Ah hakalaang tamwolak tam kaluni gahle,
Gohmah pot kamasui tei Ahna poitoi pyile, Jesuma lungkasyi tei gohda hum pyile.

S.P. Alto: Madat kalei ahma lunkasyi tei Dwijai katuk song teido tukle songdo tukle.

Kamadat lungkasyi ei kalui tchiimakle. Kamadat ma lungsyi kapyi tei kalui tchiimakle, Sagoi
kakimah jangsongdo sagoi, gohma kemsongdo Kisa dile, amai pyikalak Jesu zheigo
toihamde.

Ten, Bass: Madat kalei Ahlung kasyi ei, Dwijai katuk songteido tukle, Madat kalei Ahlung
kasyi kalui tchiimak, Ahlung kasyi kalui tchiimakle, Sagoi kakima zangsongdo sagoi kile,
Gohma kemsongdo kisa dila, kisa dila, Amai pyipei wokalak, Jesu toihumde.

2. Jesuma lungkasyi ei meihang jaang piinale, Ina kem tchiikido Ahna tchiimagah pyile,
Gomah puidi kamaatei Ahna tchii majipyi, Jesuma lungkasyi gohda hum pyile.

3. Jesuma lungkasyi ei gongtang kasuni gah, Ahtei mahum paikito, Bangpanaa tchiipyile,
Ahzaipa kamajung pyi, kaluikaga bamtei Jesuma lungkasyi gohda hum pyile.

title: YESTERDAY, TODAY, FOREVER
details:
. (R.S.385) A. B. SIMPSON.1843-1919 HEB. 13 : 8. J. H.
BURKE. 19TH CENTURY
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kadaziika ka ntah kakum mah rasampo? Ndaneido tingneido Jesu Ahtei humle, Eitoi
katang Ahna kemkapung meigo lungsyi, Katchiih kaniih mei matumpii Ahna bipyile.

Nda neido tingneido Jesu Ahtei humle, Pot matum tinglang ninakina gahhum tangle.

Pumpii Jesutei, gahsang gahlakle, Matumtei tinglang ninaki gahhum eitangle

2. Ndou kareiki Jesu kadaziika bipo? Tingnei shangma Jesudo meitam katu gahle, Kem
kapung meigo lungsyisa Ahna latsalei, Ahna kalattei shiilo, he kem kapung meihang.

3. Petergo tei kadaziika kemtei gahpyipo? Thomasgo kadaziika bisa ralipyipo? Ahteih
kasuimei hanggo kadaziika lungsyi, Eitoido nyihang go latsalei Ahda gonglo.

title: MUST JESUS BEAR THE CROSS ALONE ?
details:
(C.W.366) JOHN 19:17. T. SHEPHERD1665-
1739 GEO. N. ALLEN,1812-1877
KEY A. With dignity.
lyrics:
1. Jesu roina Cross pungtangpo, Sazyi pou heisupii? Meihang jaangpii Crosstei leile, I do
gohmah Cross lei.

2. Pyitoi kalei Cross I pungtang, Katai katang piina, Sana pyihung keipyi tangle, Keetei kapih
piinei.

3. Ntah rangaa kee kagongkak Jesuma peebangto Pyihung tei loktoi eisana, Ahzhei tei lat
humtang.

4. Ngou kaku sana pyihung tei! Oh ring kakii leimek! Sating gam rangii humwosa, N'goh
pangkii pyitang.

title: THE SUMMER LAND
details:
. (R.S.375) REV. 21:23. R.C. ROBERT CROSBIE.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Tingchoi tingkii taksupii satingam rakot lii tchiilei, Halleluyah Hosanna sagong zheigo
tam matoisa, Ntah kalei Ahkeeto nyi neika pibamtuh tangle, Kaset kalak kagahni ntah
rangaa bamki teito.

Oh, Kadazii! Ka ntah Sana pyihung keipyitang, Tamkei kaluni kagah; Bam hangnina lei
teibamki

2. Tamkei kaluni kagah bam teiki tei nyihang mahle, Kamage marhii, luisa nyihang teito
nduitangle, Teitinglangki keikapyi Jesugo kadou lengtangle. Hakalaang ka ntah lii kalui
gahsa nyina tchiitang.

3. Ka ntah rangaa piina tokryisa kalei bamkitei, Kasagah bamkitei meihang jaangpii ki
tchiidek bamle. Keikapyi piina kalat shiisa malum kalu meihang, Kada tchiikabam Pumpii
keeteito ahnyi gong lungtang.

title: WILL JESUS FIND US WATCHING ?
details: (S.S. 791) MATT. 24:42 F.J. CROSBY. W.H. DOANE.
lyrics:
KEY B FLAT
1.Jesuna satoi pungsa kahumki, Tinglang tei tiwo lakle, Malum meigo Ahna pangwo tangle,
Meebung tei seisa koilo.

Nyi tchiidaasa leilesa tambuipo? Rangiikee kasang takpo? Nyina tchiidaa kasuki gong
dichii? Koide koide Pumpii kagong tei.
2.Tingchoi nuka Pumpiina nyihang go, Nsang sangpii latgong tang, Nyihangna Pumpiigo
kakeh kitei, Bilesa kepyi tangpo?
3.Pumpiigo tchiigatpii malum sana, Ahngam tei nang tchiileipo? Nyilung kito kashyitei gah
dichii, Nyina ntak doutangle.
4.Mekraksa dou kalumei doi bile, Ahlungset tei doutangle, Pumpii Jesuna kagong
tinglangki, Keikapyi tei doutangpo?

title: WE`RE MARCHING TO ZION
details:
.(S.S.823) PS.149:2 ISAAC WATTS,1674-1748 ROBERT
LOWRY,1826-1899
KEY G.Spirited.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiigo lungkasyi, Gonglo ntah tuhde, Lungkasyi latpii lii tchiide, Lungkasyi latpii lii
tchiide Sagong bam doiteito, Nyi maguisa satde.

Nyi hangna tattuhde, Ngou kabi Zion namki, Ngou kabi Pumpii bamkito, Nyihang tuhde
Zion namki tei.

2. Lii tchii karou meitei, Pumpiigo ngoulakle; Sating gam sagong naamei tei, Sating gam
Sagong naamei tei, Ntahsa lii tchiilei, Ntahsa lii tchiilei.

3. Zion zangki teina, Kabipii tokryile, Sating gamki pihkasuki, Sating gamki pihkasuki, Sana
puidi kitei, Nyihang tatkasuki.

4. Nyina liitei tchiide, Mekdwi tangmatulo, Immanuel sazyi kitei, Nyi meihangna tatkiituhde,
Ngoukabi sating gam, Nyihangna doutangle.

title: WE WALK BY FAITH
details:
. SS.842 2 COR.5:7 F.J. CROSBY. W.M.J. KIRKPATRICK.
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Malum puidi tatkatuh ei, Puidito lungkalei hiipai, Keirum kabi pungsa tatde; Kalui kagah
rangii doutang.

Malum puidi ki tatpyilo, Nyimei hanggo koisa leile; Ahgo kasuisa tatdichii Ahna taksupii
kasuitang.

2. Malum puidi tatkatuh ei, Ahna puidi tampyi tangle, Puidi kashyi kadou kido, Ahna nyigo
pangpyi tangle.

3. Malum puidi tatkatu ei, Ahdato satoi doutangle, Ahgo kisa malum dichii; Lungkasyi tei
kisa doune.

4. Kalui katang tei malumlo, Pumpii teinyi kang kasangle; Kavai bamki gongkasu ta, Kalui
gahsa kasui tangle.

title: YIELD NOT TO TEMPTATION
details:
. (S.S. 698) REV. 2 : 7. H. R. P H. R. PALMER, 1834-1907
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Kahemki latsulo, kahem tei kemle, Ngamkalu Ahtei lei kakina ngamlak, Teihsana ngam
tchiilo rahang mei tchiisa, Jesugo juhlo n'go keipyi tangle.

Keikapyi piida kaanglo, Teimahum tei keipyi tang. Gojaangpii tchiihum tangle. Ahna n'go
keipyi.

2. Kashyi kahong ngam hangtei rattoi eilo, Pumpii ma zhei kamatei gotei jumlo, Kasang
katu switei maningwo sana, Jesugo julo n'go keipyi tangle.

 3. Kahem hanggotei Jesuna ngamtakle, Bangpii mekjot kito kangam mah pyihung, Doukalu
tei kumpii nangdo doutangle, Jesugotei juhchii n'go keipyitang.

title: TRUSTAND OBEY
details:
. (S. S. 642) PROV. 16: 20. REV. JOHN H. SAMMIS,1846-1919 D. B.
TOWNER,1850-1919
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Bangpiima peebangto kavaiki roitatsa, Ahma kamarei ngamtei tchiitang, Bangpii go
malumsa katam kasuimeigo, Ahna toisupii kasuipyile.

Katam suilo, puidi kaki gahle, Katam kasui, teina ntah rangaa doutangle.

2. Nyihangna Bangpii go malumtiit wosana, Katam tei suidichii satoi pyi, Swi kamage
marhii, kahingtei gahtangle, Tchiimatei pyitangle Jesuna.

3. Bangpii go malumsa, katamtei suidichii, kempot kamasuitei pungloilak, Pumpiina
pungpyi tak, zaipii mateipyitak, Bangpii katam suilo, malumlo.

4. Nyimah kalei hangtei, Bangpiikee poigongsa, Nyina matumpii pyiei kido, Bangpiima
lungkasyi ka ntah rangaa tei, Nyihangna doulak, suisu dichii.

title: DRIFTING DOWN
details:
. (R.S. 233) JESSIE B. POUNDS.1861-1921 W. E. M. HACKLEMAN.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Gopuidi tei sahngmakle, Nang kabilam tatmakle Kashyi puidi nang nryisa tattuhtak Nang
katuk kajing kito, Nleipatlo kalangsa Tatlei takle kashyi puidi lampaangto.

Nang kamaa puidi tuhtakle, (Nang Kamaa puidi tattuh takle puidi tattuh takle) Nang kahing
katuk kajing lamto tattuhtak, (tattuhtak) Nang Bangpii mah lungkasyi tei tatmaju eitakle.

Tattuh takle kashyi puidi lampaang tei.

2. Satinggam kaleimeina, Gokeisyipii latleile, Kashyi puidi nang nryisa tattuhtak. Nang
tattuh thangtak dichii, Nang nlei gong loilakle, Tattuh takle kashyi puidi lampaangtei.

3. Satinggammei latshiilo, Tatmaju beidi takle, Kashyi puidi nang nryisa tattuhtak
Gohsanapii ritakle, Tamkalei samtei shiilo Tattuh takle kashyi puidi lampaangtei.

title: SAVED BY GRACE
details:
. (S. S. 978) EPH. 2: 5. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Neikasudo neika pattang, lamryi lamka poikateitang Eito katchii ngam dakumpo, teigo
tchiisang tchiiloi lakle
Goh Pumpiigo kadoutangle, hakalaang mah Raasam tamtang, gomikpiina go ngoutangle,
Keikapyi samtei tamtangle.

2. Ahma kasang kagong piinei, sazyi pouryi gah eitangle I n'go kadouleng tangle, sating
gamtei gomatangle.

3. Leimek tei liitkalei teito, myibung bungsa kalei teito, Tingkum tinglang kaluikak tei, sazyi
pouryi ei gahtangle.

4. Teipanei leimek koitangle, kavai meebungtei seisana, Pumpii kagong leimek piinei, goh
rangiigo pangwo tangle.

title: FROM GREENLAND`S ICY MOUNTAIN
details:
.(S.S.1070) ACTS 16:9. BISHOP HEBER,1783-
1826 DR.L. MASON,1792-1872
KEY F
lyrics:
1. Greenland zangtong kito India zang kabi kitei, Africa sazyito kangneng kumpii seh sana;
Zanggam ningkam karyi matum madam kiteito, Rangii keipyi nesa kemmei go latsa leile.

2. Dwipii magui kalei Ceylon sazyi matum tei, Swikasyi tingkeido guibung bungsa guileile;
Mahkabi teido Bangpiigo tikasu kito, Kapang kamang meina tingtugo ratasa lei.

3. Sating gammah taimahum doukalu nyihang tei, Sam kabitei tamsupii matapii leidepo?

Keikapyi piile katuh hanggo timatulo, Sazyipou hangki Messiah zhei shiimatulo.

4. Bangpii rasam kabi tingkei dwikadi hangdo, Zanglyi roklyi kabi rasamtei tamroi pyilo,
Khristana katai karing samtei tam mangoulo, Jumage kapyipii Khristana Sagong tangle.

title: DEDICATION HYMN
details:
. RV. R, 1912-2006 RV. RINGKAHAO.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Kamage sazyipou bamkitei, Ngam katchii jaangpiina maangpyile, Nyimah kaleihang tei
pyi eisa Mateisa, lungsyisa poipyilo.

Mateile, pyikalei Mateisu dichii datchii tangpo, Gozhei ki pyitoi kalei, Kee ei mateipyisa
poipyilo.

2. Solomonna pyikatu keetei Mateisa poikapyi teikumpii Shyikido nyihangna pyikalei, Kee
ei mateipyisa poipyilo.

3. Ngam hangteido tchiilui kalumah Nangna maning kapyima switei, Nyihangma lungki
gongliit pyilo, Lung matumpii pyitoi eitakle.

title: FROM SALEM'S PLAINS
details:
. (K.K. 530) ANON.
KEY F
lyrics:
1. Salem ningkam tolii katchii, Rangii matei kadalam topo? Zion zangki to kalat koi, Ka ntah
lat kamateile,
Gongkalei sagong Ahgo doi reipyi matulo, Pumpii zheikito kagongmei doi bimatulo. (2
times)
SP;- Hosanna… Hosanna… Hosanna… Hosanna… Hosanna… Hosanna… Hosanna…
Part:- Tammatoide, Hosanna… Hosanna David naa, Pumpii zheito Hosanna… Hosanna
bimatulo, Bimatulo Hosanna saa Hosanna saalo, Hosanna… Hosanna… Hosanna.

2. Juhlo kadaziika ntah Sagong hangma sagong zheikito, Hosanna saa Hosanna saa, Nyi
meihangna tammatoide.

3. Hosanna saa Hosanna saa, David ma naa sapii mpougo, Sazyi poudo sating gamdo,
Ahmah zheipii reimatulo.

title: I WILL WAIT FOR YOU
details:
. ((C.E. 6) J. G. B. JAMES G. BUCHANAN.
KEY B.
lyrics:
1. Gohmah chiilung sazyi pouto thanglak takle, Tattuhtangle, lii eipiina Ina tamni, Ina teiki
koisa leitang.

Ina n'go koisa leitang, ngoukabi nam Teiki n'go koisa leitang, bam teikito, Meitang tangna lii
tchiitangle.

2. Sating gamto kanghe mei matum hanggotei, Kadou tangle, kabiroipii ntahteipii,
Gahsupiina lungsa leitang.

3. Sating kavai tinglang kitei, gohpumpiigo, Kadoutangle, lungkasyi ma, baiki teito, Kalui
tchiimak, Ah sazyitei,

title: TAKE THE NAME OF JESUS
details:
. (S.S. 91) Ps. 72: 19. MRS. LYDIA BAXTER,1809-1874 W. H.
DOANE,1832-1915
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesu zheigotei kasuisa, Nangna tat kanyi kitei, Ntah rangaa lungswi humtei Taksu piina
doutangle.

 Kahung zhei lungsyile, Sazyi pouna kamaning, Kahung zhei lungsyiile, Sating gamto
ntahtang

2. Jesu zheigotei kasuisa, Kokryi kumpii pungwosa, Kashyi teina hempo dichii, Ahma zhei
ratatangle.

3. Jesu gokasui kalumei, Kakum sampii tamsana Sating kataa lii tchii sana Lungki ka ntah
roile.

4. Jesu zheigotei shiiwosa, Kuk kumsana ratalo; Ahgo malumsa kaleimei, Kashyi ngam
tchiiloisulo.

title: THE DEATH MARCH
details:
. (C.P. 64)
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Kemgotei kabaa sanii tatkalei mei tangtang gotei (juhkeilo) Meikanado tchiihaa supona
keikalu doulakle (oh pwiwo) Kacheng kadi kating chiinahang (matum go) Kateimei kasoi
kasetmei do (tatsa lei) Kasangdo timak kashyi puidilam paangto tatsa leile.

Kasang tisupii tatlei (juhgonglo) Eichiiziika hingkalei puidi kitei, Gahkalei jaonah keitang
karam (kalanglo) Kalanglo Christian madat takle.

2. Kemgo kabaasa tatleile, kashyi katutei gahsa, (juhgonglo) Apwima lungkasyi ratakapyi
teido timakle. (oh pwiwo) Kemgo roina kabaa tuhsana, (matum hang) Pwinei anaa
lungkasyi teido (lungkasyi) Gah eitang taklesa lungkasyi hangtei mangei eitangle.

3. Kemteina kabeipyi takle, meima ka nrou hangtei, (maninglo) Kemkito keipyi tanglesa
Jesuna teipyi takle, (oh pwiwo) Ngou kasagah ngam tchiitang karam (tatsa lei) Kamatei
ngamtei tchiilo sanii (tatsalei) Teimahum pyi Pumpiina saryi kangam mah lii tchiikabui.

title: I DO BELIEVE !
details:
(S.S. 493) PS. 88:9 C. WESLEY W. G. FISCHER,1835-1912
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Gohpfii gohbai hampat leile, Goh juhmage pyilo, Pumpiina kasuisu dichii, Dalam I gong
tangpo?

I malumle I malumle, Goh jaangpii Jesutai, Mei kahung Jesu zaiteipii, Gohkem tchiimagaa
pyi.

2. Gohkem jaangpii Ahna gongpyi, Bangpii naa Jesutei, Kalak kaniihtei lehpyisa, Goh rangii
ringmatu.

3. Jesu teimahum tiwosa, Ina malum leile, Keipyi kabui tingnei leimek, N'goh ei keipyilo.

title: THE CITY OF GOLD
details:
. (S.S. 819) REV. 21 : 18. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 W. H.
DOANE,1832-1915
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Katainam tojuhki namdinina ngoule, Teinitei kabitam wolakle, Teito leimek liitmak,
hiiniido ngalyimak Kabi sana namdiki teito.

Teito leimek liitmak, Hiiniido ngalyimak, Kamalum meiteina Bangpiigo ngoutangle, Kabi
sana namdiki teito.

2. Kalei kapyipii Jesu teikito leile. Kamalum meiteina ngoutangle, Kamatei meitei sageiti
kumpii vaitang, Kabi sana namdiki teito.

3. Cross kitei n'gohpang keikapyi rangiitei, Jaonah pangkagong mei hangteina, Sesana
mateikum piina mateitangle, Kabi sana namdiki teito.

title: GUIDE ME, O THOU GREAT JEHOVAH
details:
. (GHF.291) PS. 73:24. W. WILLIAMS,1717-1791
JOHN HUGHES,1873-1932
KEY G. With Spirit.
lyrics:
1. Koipyilo, teihmahum Bangpii, Rangii kasoi tinglangki, Kasoi kaset teido I le, Nangroile
ngam kabuitei, Sating gammah kachii kasak, N'gohdo pyichii humlo, Rangii mah lungswi
pyilo.

2. Kamating dwipok bamki tei, N'gohdo pang maang pyilo, Tinghumlam meesong teipiina,
Goh puidi pangtat pyilo, Keipyi kabui, keikapyipii, N'gohdo pangtat pyilo, Gohmah kokryi
tchiipyilo.

3. Kataimah peebangto tatsa, Kahingtei hingju tangle, Jordan karyitei kaiwosa, Cannan
pangkaliit piinei, Ka ntah mah karangaa lii, Ina n'go toihumtang, Kalui gahsa toitangle.

title: SAIL IN THE LIGHT
details:
. (S.S. 921) JN. 1 : 5. M. FRASER JAMES MCGRANAHAN 1840-1907
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ngou kahing dwijei katuk paryito Gohmah malyi naatei (malyi naatei) Jonggong
jongmaang sana leile Crossmah kavai lung teito.

Tatlo kavai ki (tatlo kavai lungki) Tatlo kavai ki (tatlo kavai lungki) Pumpii sagong naamei
hangtei (Pumpii mah naamei hang) Calvary mah ngoukabi tei (Calva, Calvary mah, kamatei
tei) Kavai nangna ngoutang (Nangna ngoutang)

2. Calvary to kapat kavai humtei Gohda humpyi sana (humpyi sana) Ahna gohjaangpii
taipyile Kasangpii ngou wotakle.

3. Kalvaryto kapat sating seitei )Ngoubi gatsa vailei (Vai kasanglei) Gohmah keelam
maangtang karam Kavai teina pangmaang pyi.

title: ONCE IN ROYAL DAVID'S CITY
details:
. (S.S. 32) LUKE 2:11. C.F. ALEXANDER,1818-1895 DR.
GAUNTLETT,1805-1876
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. David sagong namlung teito, Tomkee hangnina leile. Tomzyini kokchyi lungteika,
Naagotei mazyi bamle Pwi manaa peitei Maryle, Naatei Jesu Khristale.

2. Pumpii sating gamto humsa, Meihang Pumpii tchiipyile, Ahkee teina tomkee teile,
Kokchyi lungtei Ahzyile, Kamatei gohmah Pumpiile Kasoi kasetmei kumpii.

3. Jesu chiina kalei doutei, Pwina katam tei suile, Pwimah peebangto bamsana Pwigo
lungsyi gatsana Christian meinaa hang teinado, Ahma kumpiina tchiilo.

4. Nei neika dikii tusana Swi rekdo kibui buisa, Nyimah katchii kapung hangki, Njoisana
tchiitule Meima kamage ka ntah Matum Ahna pungpyile.

title: HARK, HARK! MY SOUL
details:
.((S.S. 231) HEB.1:14 F.W. FABER ARR.BY.CC.CONVERSES
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Shiilo shiilo! Rangiimah liitei lunglei hiiboi madek Dwidet kadi kuto, dazii kabi satoi
doukalu meisam Magah kalaktei leiloi keilakle.

Sating gammei go kasuisa lii tchiine, Nyigo satinggam lii tchii mangoulo Tinghum kahattei
tingchoi patsek Gahtang, lungkamage hang ntah doutangle

2. Sazyi koi kapyi kumpii Jesuma latkaang shiigongle Bamhang ki gongwosa, pot kamasui
tang tanggo Poimatou pyi jao kakoipiina kaset magahpyi.

 3. Sating gamlii shiiwosa doilam patde kamage, Meigonglo Jesu dato, kamage meigo
toisupii, Latlei latkaang kabipii keepang gong pyitang.

title: WONDERFUL WORDS 0F LIFE
lyrics:
1. Lii gohda tchiimagou loilo, Kamadat karing sam! Kabitei kisa tchiiloilo, Kamadat karing
sam! Karing mah samtamtei, N'goh rali pyilo!

Kabisam tei! Kamadat sam! Madat karing samle! (2 times)

2. Khristana kapyi satoitei, Kamadat karing sam! Lungsyisa latkalei shiilo! Kamadat karing
sam! Matahpii pyileile, Sating gam pangkiine!

3. Kabi samtam ma rambowtei, Madat karing samle! Meihang kamajung doutangle, Madat
karing samle! Jesuroi keikapyi, Tchiimatei kapyitei!

title: GO YE INTO ALLTHE WORLD !
details:
MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Tattulo malum kasu kamyi kitei, Kem kapung rangii matum gahtangle, Ta tana kabisam
tamsa tattangpo? Jesu Khrista go kamalum kito?

Goda teimahum pyitakle; Goda teimahum pyitakle; Tattulo meihangda kabisam tamroilo,
Taksupii Ina kasui lei.

2. Juhlo kamwi latpyisa latlei takle, Khrista saryimei tuh satsa leile; Christian meihang
swininasa satwolo, Kabi samtamsa kem tchiima gahlo.

 3. Datchiisa nang teitang Pumpiina latlei, Pumpii zheikito ntah rangaalo; Jesuna kem
jaangpiina teipyi takle, Saalo kalui kagah karing doune.

title: HARK ! TEN THOUSAND HARPS
details:
. (S.S. 149) THOMAS KELLY,1769-1854 HEB. 1: 6.
LOWELL MASON,1792-1872
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Koikinglo bwika kakongtei, Meitang tang tammatoi lei; Jesuna sazyi pouryi ki; Sagong
tchiisa lhungleile, Sagongbam kito bamsa, Jesuna lhungtu tangle, Halleluyah! Halleluyah!

Jesuna lhungtu tangle.

2. Kalui tchiikasu nyisagong, Sagong pyihung tei goma; Goma lungkasyi meihang tei; Kalui
kagah tchiilakle, Ntah piina tokryi tang, n'go kadou loiwosa, Halleluyah! Halleluyah! Jesugo
ngouloi tangle.

3. Sating gam rakot meihangna, Kok kumsa ratasa lei, Paradise Sagong mah bamtei, Jesuna
bamsa leihum, Bangpii baiziilam bamsa Meijaangpii kaangpyisa lei, Halleluyah! Halleluyah!

Kalui tchiikasu Sagong.

4. Keikapyi kalangsa gonglo, Gonaa mei koisa leile, Pumpiina kagong piineitei, Sating gam
kamwi lattang Lihvii bwika kongsana Nyi kasuisa lii tchiitang, Halleluyah! Halleluyah!

Jesuna lungtu tangle.

title: HARK! THE HERALD ANGELS SING
details:
. (S. S. 30) LK . 2: 14. CHARLES WESLEY,1707-1788
FELIX MENDELSSOHN1809-1847
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Rakot meina lii tchiilei, sagong kamanah jaangpii, Sazyipou majung tuhlo, Pumpiigo
kasuisana! Meimatumpii ntahlo kangam mah liitei tchiilo Meihang go tam mangoulo,
Bethlehem to kamanah Kamajung mah sagongtei, vaikaki sagong teile.

2. Rakotmei tammatoilei, kalui kagah Pumpiigo Myikasu peina manah, juhlo Ahna kagong
tei, Sazyipou jeilui reisa, sazyipouto gong lungle, Kamatei Pumpii Jesu, nyi meihang mah
Pumpiile Immanuel toitude, ntah matulo sagong.

3. Kamajung Sagong Ahtei, kasang kamaji Pumpii, Karing rangii Ahna pyi, kataigodo
ringmatu, Ahna ntah matusa tailoilak tangkaram pyi, Sazyi pougo ringkabui manahloi
matunesa, Gong manah kapyi Sagong, vaikaki Sagong teile.

title: SAIL HOME
details:
. ((A. H. 181) PS. 107: 30. ADA R. HABERSHON. CHAS H. GABRIEL,1856-
1932
KEY E FLAT. Allegro
lyrics:
1. Tingkei tingrot teihjusana, Adwi mpong sana leido, Jesuna kasuipyi sana, Hoilo malyi
hoilo.

Hoilo hoilo tingkei nkii maanglei, Kamyitei leiloi keilakle, Hoilo hoilo. Karing Pumpiina
tamsalei hoilo!

2. Tingkei tingrot nkii tangle, Lungswi kalaktei gahsana, Adwi mpong kalei paryi, Hoilo
hoilo hoilo.

3. Tingkei tingrot ma tchiikashyi, Dwi mpongsa kahing kito, Pumpii ma samtei suisana,
Hoilo hoilo hoilo. 4. Sating gamtei pikasuta, Kamalum peirah tei poisa, Tingnei tingneika
hoitulo, Keetei hoigong tuhlo.

title: I AM PRAYING FOR YOU
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi kang gahsa leikido, Keikapyipii Jesuteina toipyi makle, Gohjaangpii Ahna
samalyi tchiipyile. Pumpii teina nyihanggo keikapyi piile.

Ina ratalei, gojaangpii ratale, Gohlungto karatatei, Ahna shiipyile.

2. Sating gammah gohpfii hangnina lei, Kahing katchiih go keikapyipii Sagongle, Ahna
latgong tangle satinggam teito Pangkii tangle nang kasuisa tatni makpo ?

3. Gohlung kito kavai hangnina lei, Sazyi pou meina kado tipaiwo kalak. Gohkeipyi tang
karamtei Ahroinale, Nangna doukabui jaangpii Ina ratalei.

title: I AM REDEEMED!
details:
(S.S. 864) ISAIAH 43:1 JOHN STERLING. IRA D. SANKEY.
DOH IS Bb
lyrics:
1. N'goh kemkito kaleipyi, Pumpii tammatoilo, Goh jaangpii Ahna teipyile, Teito ntak doule.

Goh kaleipyi goh kaleipyi, I kisa lii tchiine, Kalui kagah karing doune, Pumpiigo tammatoi.

2. I Calvary crosstei juhsa, Karing dwipok ngoule, I mateisa lii tchiileile, Pumpiigo
tammatoi.

3. Pourui eitak I mateitak, Ahtei mahum piina, Ahzaipii kemtei syitoitak, Toina I mateih tak.

4. Kavai namki piwo dichii Katai katchiih gahle, Matum Jesuda pyitangle, Sattangle Ahdoito.

title: I'D RATHER HAVE JESUS
details:
. (BCC. 70) PH. 1:21; PS. 71:23; MTT. 16:24-26 MRS.RHEA F.
MILLER,1894-1966 GEORGE BEVERLY SHEA,1909-
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Sana pyihung shongdo Jesu bikile, Sagah shongdo Jesutei bikile, Sazyi pouryi lei doutang
karam shong do Jesu zaihum kapyi na dihle.

Kem katchii sagong pungtang karam shong, Jesutei kasui bile, Leikabi kadaziika leikido Jesu
kumpii gahle.

2. Tam kamatoi shong Jesutei bikile, Meima sazyi nriit shong bikile, Sazyi pouryi meina
maning makaang shong Jesu zaiteina kisa bile.

3. Jesu teina hiipai shongdo ngoubile, Kuidwi kakum godo tam sadaalak, Jesu rangii
ringtang karam chiitakle, Mazyi saryi kagah dwipokle.

title: I KNOW THE BIBLE IS TRUE
details:
. (M.H. 237) G. ROUTH B.B.MCKINNEY.1886-1952
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Bible tei Bangpii sampii ryile, Sangle katu I tile, Rangii mateimah sam roinale, Bible
samtei kasangle.

Ina… tile….. Bible samtei kasangle, Rangii matei samle Bible tei, Sangle katu I tile.

2. Jesu ma rasamtei kasangle, Ah sazyi pouryi humpyi Taisa ringka lutei kasangle Ah nlei
gongloi keitang.

3. Kasang Bible rasamtei shiiki Mei kakigo tampyinyi, Ahnyi nado shiiwosa samtei Sanglesa
timatulo.

title: LET US SINGAGAIN
details:
. (S.S. 234) PS 95 : 1. LYMAN G. CUYLER IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Keikapyi ntah lii tchiisa toide, Lungkasyi ma paikito Ahna teipyile, Sazyi pouryi Ah
lungkasyi paito, Sating gamto Ahna nyihang jaangpii kaangpyi.

Rasam hangtei nyina tamne, Cross to taikapyi samtei, Ahzhei go ngou kabipii dimatulo,
Nyihang go keipyinesa Ah taipyile.

2. Ka ntah pou jaangpii nyihang toide, Karing mah samtei nyihang jaangpii keipyile, Ahgo
kamalum meigo kasuipyi, Aha kalaang lungkasyi do mangoupyile.

3. Tamdek kabam sam teijaangpii toide, Sating gammah lungkasyi meigotei ngousa; Namki
nyihang ntahsa nduitang, Ka ntah Lungkasyi tei tampei wolakle

title: I NEED THEE EVERY HOUR
details:
. (S.S.577) PS. 86:1. MRS. ANNIE S. HAWKS.1835-1918 REV:
R. LOWRY,1826-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii nangna n'goh lungkasyi pyi, Kamajung tei kapyi meikaki gah.

N'goh nangna tchiihalo, Tinglang kaleita tei, I gong liitleile pumpii, Satoi pyilo.

2. Satoi teipyi humlo, goku bamne, Gopai kito kahem gotei ngamle.

3. Kalak ntah rangaa, nangna tchiipyi, Gohda gongliit pyilo, go rangiitei,

4. I Goma tchiitangle, rali pyilo, Goma samret kapyi samtei gongtak

title: IF GOD BE FOR US!
details:
(S. S. 508) ROM. 8: 31. G. M. J. JAMES MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiida teito ntah rangaa humlo Ahna makeng makii pyile Eitoina Ahna nyigo keipyi
takle Hingtang karamtei gahtakle.

Bangpiitei nyimah tchiiwo dichii Nyigotei tchiimagah kabuitei tah leipo? Tah leipo? Nyi
tago hingtang karam leipo?

2. Pumpii zheito ntahsa lei mahumlo Lung mateisana suihumlo Kasang teipiina kahem gotei
ngamlo Ahna nyimah teimahumle.

3. Ahma samtam teina gahloi keilakle Sazyi pouryi pot matumtei Magah kido Ahsam teina
gahlakle Eitamloi tamloi joutangle.

4. Ahda gongkaliit meitei magah lakle Karing rangiitei doutangle Malum kasu rangii
kasoimei hangtei Samakado tchiiwo lakle.

title: LOOK, AND THOU SHALT LIVE !
details:
(S. S. 427) IS. 45: 22. F. T. W. J. H. STOCKTON.1813-
1877
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Calvary mah ting paryi juhlo, Nyi jaangpii daziika mage; Kaset kalak ahnii pungpyi, Juhlo
nang ringtang.

Juhlo nang ringtang, Juhlo nang ringne, Juhlo Cross gamto katai Jesu, Juhlo nang ringtang.

2. Nang kempot masuitei pungleipo? Gorangii ringloinyi makpo? Da tchiisa Jesugo juhmak?

Juhlo nang ringtang.

3. Rowbam kito kapattei juhlo, Kalangsa Pumpiitei suilo, Ahgo juhchii ntak pyitang, Juhlo,
nang ringtang.

4. “N'goh juhlo” Jesuna tamlei, “Goma kaset Ina tile, Ahteih suisa Ahgo juhlo”. Juhlo, nang
ringtang.

title: JESUS LEADS HIS ARMY
details:
. ((S.S. 689) JOSHUA 5:15. A.S. DYER.1785-1835 J. H. BURKE.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Jesuna latsa lei, gohmah saryi mei, Gongkii wosa saryi nattei keiwolo, Teito gohtei suilo,
ngou karou meigo, Ngam wokabui jaangpiina saryi tchiide.

 Jesu ma saryimei, Pumpii peirahpii, Jukarou go ngam, Sazyipou ngam tangle,

2. Pumpiigo kasuisa ngamkalu tchiilo, Kahng kokryi pungsa kahemgo ngam tangle, Kamatei
kasang kamajiki teito, Pumpii jaangpii lung latsa saryi tchiide.

3. Jesuma saryi mei lii tchiisa tatde, Meihangna nduisa saryitei tchiide, Sagong ma zheikito
tammatoi tuhde, Kasang lii tchiisa saryiki maang tuhde.

title: LET THE BLESSED SAVIOUR IN
details:
. (R. S. 188) L. H. P. REV.. 3: 20. L. H. PARTHEMORE.
KEY E. FLAT
lyrics:
1. Shiipyilo kamwi kakii kaleitei, Latpyilo… maliitlo… Pumpiina kakiisa lei liitpyilo,
Pumpiigo maliitlo.

Kamwito satsa kaleiteina, Keikapyi Pumpii Jesu sekle; Keikapyi piina goma lungkito Liit
bam kabui Liitpyilo… maliitlo.

2. Pumpii tei goma kang kasang teile. Liitpyilo….. maliitlo, Pumpiigo rashiileng tang liitpyilo,
Pumpiigo….. Maliitlo.

3. Matapiina kakii matusulo Liitpyiilo….. maliitlo, Pumpii tei nleigong loi keilakle
Pumpiigo….. maliitlo.

4. Pumpina liitkalei sam shiipyilo, Latpyilo….. maliitlo, Tchiigatpii Ahgo nyikadou sana
Pumpiigo….. maliitlo.

title: JESUS IS PASSING BY
details:
. (RS.150) E.E.HEWITT. JNO.R. SWENEY.
KEY DB.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii na sazyi pouryi meigo lungkasyi kito, Ahnaa Jesuna mei jaangpii Cross gamto
teitakle.

Gongpyilo…. Gongpyilo, Kakui kama katchii meihang, Jesu Khrista datei liitlo, Go kama
gahpyine.

2. Rangii jaangpii mazyi saryimei Jesu da kaanglo, Ahna n'go karing mah chiitak tei pyichii
tangle.

3. Kem pot kapung meihang teina Jesu datei gonglo, Ahna n'go pottei pungha tanglesa
koileile.

title: JESUS IS MINE
details:
. (S.S. 1045) SONG. 2 : 16. MRS. J. C. BONAR.,1821-1884 T. E. PERKINS.
1831-1912
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou pottei fiikei bamkido, Kanghemei lungkasyi tei gahsana, Kamyibam ki tatsa
ntak nitei gahle, Jesuna satoi pyi Jesu gohmah.

2. Kamyi tinghum tei maju eitakle, Ina kamyi kitei tatloi lakle, Kavai bamtei gohjaang piina
tchiidek bamle, Teibamki kavaitei Jesu gohmah.

3. Katai katchiih nnou katu gahtang, Gahkasu mah karingtei dousana, N'goh lungkasyi mei
ntahsa doutangle, Keikapyi Pumpii Jesutei gohmah.

4. Mang kashyi meikido Jesu gohmah, Kavai tei gahkido Jesu gohmah, Rangiina tchiidaasa
matumtei keibamle, Matumtei pyibuile Jesu gohmah.

title: IS NOT THIS THE LAND OF BEULAH ?
details:
(R. S. 396) HARRIETT WARNER RE QUA. REV. J.
W. DADMUN.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ina kabam mah zang gamtei, Sanama kavai namle, Sazyi teiki ngoukabi tei, manglam todo
meimakle! Kasatei tingkei kaguitei, hiipai mah keiram roile Karyidwi longmagui sana,
hiipaido kalui tchiimak.

Namtei Beulah namtei makpo? Ka ntah kavai sazyi! Hiipaido kalui tchiimakle, Leimekdo
kaliit tchiimak.

2. Karyidwi tei Ina shaksa, Ina teikito lungtang, Kamatei dwitei shaksana, goh rangii ntak
doutang. Sazyi pouryi mah ntahdo, kabido I marei mak! Kalui kagah nkiikasu, ki leitei Ina
doutang.

3. Julo Cross mah ngoukabi tei, kasangpiina titakle, Kamage mah puiditeito, Cross teipii
puidi tchiipyi, Jesuna lungsyisa tamle, Cross pungsa gohtei suilo, Nangna maangtang
namlung kitei, Ina n'go pangmaang tang

title: GOLDEN HARPS ARE SOUNDING
details:
. (S. S. 87) F. R. H, 1836-1879 ACTS 5: 31. FRANCES R.
HAVERGAL..1836-79
KEY A
lyrics:
1. Sana pungtei laklei sating gammeina, Sana pungtei laklei sagong mei jaangpii; Ngou
kasagah Pumpii jesu lungkasyi, Katai gotei ngamsa sating gam tuhtak.

Ahngam tei tchiilui tak tammatoi tuhde Sating gam kamatei mei tchiituh takle

2. Nyigo keipyi nesa Ahna zaipat pyi, Sana pyihung tei keitang sagong doito; Katei katchiih
kamage leiloi lakle, Ngou kasagah sagong bamki tuhtakle.

3. Ahna meihang jaangpiina rata pyilo, Karangaa bamki pihkabui tei kaanglei; Ahma
keekabitei tchiidaa bamtakle, Jesutei kalui tchiisupii leihumtang.

title: GLORIOUS THINGS OF THEE
details:
. (A.H. 327) JOHN NEWTON,1725-1807 D. B.
TOWNER,1850-1919
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Goma pumtei kavai tei; Bangpii ma Namdih Zionki; Makado tchiimagah kalak, Bangpii ma
bamtang karam.

Koitupou tchiikabam keetei, Tahpiina tchiimagah tang! Keikapyipii ragupyisa, Ntahsa
lunghum tangle, Pumpii ma lungswi kabitei, Teipiina ragupyile.

2. Keikapyi Zion Namki, N'gohdo pangmaliit pyilo, Sazyi pouna hoksa nuido, I gozheito
ntahtang.

3. Sazyipou keelei hangtei Neikapii gahkabui humle, Gahwo kalak karing samtei, Zion
naameiroi teile.

title: I KNOW HIS VOICE
details:
. (S.S. 861) JOHN 10:4 REV. J. OATMAN. HOWARD E. SMITH.
DOH IS A b
lyrics:
1. Keikapyi piigo ngoumakdo? Ahna n'goh koilei joule; Ahgo lukei kalu sekto, Pumpiigo
tammatoi leile!

Ina tile Pumpii lattei, Teito gohlung ntah pyile, Ahna n'goh katam kaktei, Ahlat tile, Ahgo
toile.

2. I samahdo timak kido, Tingrot sumto Ahlat shiile, Dwidet godo Ahna ngamle, Leimek
patsek kingrik takle,

3. Ahna kasang gohda tamle, Lougaamto ntak doutangle; Kamajung lungkasyi sampii,
Satingaam bam tammangoule.

title: IT CAME UPON A MIDNIGHT CLEAR
details:
. (M. H. 11) MIC. 5: 2. EDMUND H. SEARS.,1810-
1876 R.S. WILLIS1819-1900
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ndouto tamkalei samkaang, Tingnei tinghum pattak, Rakotmei teina lii chiilei bwika
kachem heisa, Sazyipou majung matulo meihangna ntahlo, Sazyi pouryi meihang majungsa
lii katchii shiilo.

2. Sating gam rakottei kalak gahsa lii tchiileile. Kalui tchiisupii ntah rangaasa lii tchiileile.

Sazyi pouryi meido mage marii toi eisana Shiilo rakotmei tei nlei nleisa lii katchii.

3. Mage mariimei kaset kalak pungsa kaleimei, Mikdwi patsa hatsa kaleimei mage loisulo,
Julo ntah lii tchiileile, sating gam rakotna, Ntaksana ntahsa lii tchiikalei tei shiilo.

4. N,dou kating sam katam meina tamkabam samtei, Tingkum teina doi doi tchiisa tatsa
gongtang takle. Sazyiipou majung tangle Pumpii kagong tinglangki; Meihangna liitei
tchiitangle rakotmei mah liitei.

title: I GAVE MY LIFE FOR THEE
details:
. (S.S. 621) JN. 10 : 15. MISS FRANCES R. HAVERGAL
(arr)1836-1879 CANON HAVERGAL.
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Goh rangii maang pyile, Mei kating zai humpyi, Teipiina keipyile, Katei kito ringloi, Go
rangii tei pyile, Nangna kadapei pyi!

2. I go jaangpii humpyi, Kamage lehsana, Gahmatu supiina, Ka ntah tei pyile, I go jaangpii
humpyi, N'goh dapei pyipo!

3. Pumpii Ahbam kitei, Vaikaki ki teile, Kamatei bam teile, Teibam tei goh mahle, I matum
toi eisa, Nang kada toi bampo?

4. I go jaangpii humpyi, Goma mwitei piina, Katam songdo kisa, Meebam katang piina, I go
jaangpii lehpyi, Nang kadakum tangpo?

5. Rangii tei maang pyilo, Ah jaangpiido koilo, Sazyipou Ah jaangpii, Lungkasyi keikapyi,
Keipyi kabui gotei, Ahtei suisa gonglo.

title: JESUS SAVES !
details:
((S.S. 1079) ACTS 16:31. PRISCILLA J. OWENS,1829-1907 W. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ntahlat teinyi shiile, Jesuna keipyile! Meihangda samtei tamde, Jesuna keipyile! Bam
hangki shiimatulo, azang ningkam matumpii, Bangpii ma lungset kito, Jesuna keipyile.

2. Sating kataa tamtangle, Jesuna keipyile! Kem kapung mei matumgo, Jesuna keipyile!

Meihangna shiiwosana, ka ntahpii tokryi tang; Teiteito nyi Pumpiina meihang go keipyile.

3. Ngam tchiisa liitei tchiide, Jesuna keipyile! Pumpiina teipyisana nyihang go keipyile!

Sazyi pouto lungsana, kateipiinei leimek tei; Nyi meihangna saatangle, Jesuna keipyile.

4. Sampao kabitei saade, Jesuna keipyile! Mei matumpii ntahde, Jesuna keipyile! Sazyi
pouryi matumki, keikapyi tei tamtuhde; Kangam ma liitei tchiisa, Jesuna keipyil

title: JESUS, LOVER OF MY SOUL
details:
. (C.W. 414) PS. 9:9. CHARLES WESLEY,1707-1788 SIMEON
B. MARSH,1798-1875
KEY F. In moderate time.
lyrics:
1. N'goh lungkasyi Jesu, Gopeebangto I bamne, Dwikadih tei gongkido, Tingkei tingrot
gongkido, Goh nangna nsung pyilo, Doikashyi bamki teito, Goh nangna pangptat pyilo,
Sating gam pangki pyilo.

2. Goh rangii nsung katu, Mei hangninado gahle, N'goh toisang toisulo, Sating kataa
koipyilo, Ina ngo malumle Nang roile tchiihaa kabui Teimahum kagah n'goh sating kataa
koipyilo.

3. N'go Ina mareile, Godato douhum tangle, Katchiih kaniih hang bipyi, Mik kachetdo
ngoumatu, Ngoukabi hang gomahle, Mateikasu tei Ile, Ina kempii tokryile Golung kasyitei
pyilo.

title: O WHY NOT TONIGHT ?
details:
((GGSH. 236) ELIZABETH REED
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii gotei toi eisulo, Kavaitei gahkasu tchiisa Kem kapung mei gonyilung tei, Eitoi
manalo.

Oh tingnei tinghum. Lung kalidichii, Keipyi tangle Oh tingnei tinghum.

2. Supounei katutei gahle, Golung kalitang karamtei Eitoi tinghum tinglang kakka, N'go
keipyitang.

3. Sazyipou ngampii keiwolak, Nang matei tangkaram tei gah, Khrista ma zheitei roinale
N'go keikabui.

4. Pumpiigo lukakei gahle, Pumpiigo lungkasyi meigo, Malumchii Ahna keipyitang, Oh eitoi
tinghum.

title: ON JORDAN'S STORMY BANKS
details:
. (S. S. 973) IS. 33: 17. REV. S. STENNETT, 1728-1795 T.
C. O 'KANE, 1830-?
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Jordan karyi kuto satsa, Kadii kitei jumaang, Ka ntah Cannan sazyi tei, Gohmah nam
tchiitangle.

Ka ntah namto nyi ntaktangle, Kamadek karyi peebang teito Moses nei Jaonaa ma liitei
tchiisa nyina Jesu kasuisa lung tangle.

2. Ngoukabi ningkam kiteina, Leimik teido liitmak, Teito Pumpii naamei lungsa, Tinghum
katu leilak.

3. Namtei I gongliit katuki N'goh kasui lengtang Gohpfii jutei kangou piinei Ahna goh
geitangle.

4. Goh rangii ntah katuhtei, Sazyi pou nnouki, Jordan dwina dihum kido, Kahingtei gahtangl

title: ONCE FOR ALL
lyrics:
1. Jesuna zeipatsana teipyile Keikapyi lungkasyi doukalu mei Kemjaangpii n'go ngousabaa
po? Lungsyisana keipyi takle.

Kahing katchiih kito keipyitak, Bina keipyi dichii luitakle Goma kem hangtei Cross kiteito
Syimatei sagei pyitakle.

2. Cross pungsa goma kem poimaang pyile Apyiki tupyihung tei keisana Kemgotei nleisa
hinglakle Goma kemtei syipyi takle.
3.Eitoi nyi gahtang karam gahtakle Jesu teina keipyi kasang takle Gohda gonglo Jesuna latlei
Gonglo Ahna keipyi tangle.
4.Pumpii naameigo lungsyisa latlei Lungsyi sana Ahna keipyi tangle Kateikito ringmatuh
tangle Magah pyisa keipyi takle.

title: I BELIEVE !
details:
(ALEX.59) EDGAR LEWIS. ROM.10:10 L.E. JONES.
KEY C
lyrics:
1. N'goh kemkito keikapyi jaangpii ntah Lungswi pyisa Pumpiigo malumle, Kem gahkapyi
jaangpii kamajung doutakle Bangpii naa Khrista go malum.

I malum, I malum keikapyipii Jesu Khrista gotei, I malum, I malum Bangpii naa Jesu Khrista
go.

2. Kareiki Ahna n'goh lungsyi pyitakle. Teijaangpii keikapyi piigo malum, Gohmikrak
matusa kavai mangou pyile, Bangpii naa Khristago malum.

3. Alung kasyi dousa Ahgo malum takle, Lungswi heisa Pumpiigo malumle, Lungkasyi
tingkeipii goh paryito guilei, Bangpii naa Khristago malum.

title: OUR GOD IS MARCHING ON
details:
. (S.S.697) PS.24:8. JULIA WARD HOWE.1819-1910
WM.STEFFE.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina kahum ngou kasagah tei gohmikpii ngou, Sazyi pouryi pot matumtei Ahna
peepii kutakle; Pumpiina sating kalik kumpii kaangtei punghum sana Kemhang
tchiimateipyi.

Tam matoide halleluyah! Tam matoide halleluyah! Tam matoide halleluyah! Pumpiina
kasuipyi.

2. Pumpiina saryi hei vangnei kabamgo matipyi., Ahnyina Pumpii jaangpii mee mpung nina
tchiipyile. Meebung tei seisa Ahma kabi kashyi matum madum Ina tiwo buile.

3. Pumpiina bwika kongsa lat hum katupiinei tei; Pumpii Ahdoito meihang go sam tchiisa
kaleitangle. He gohrangii nang Pumpiigo kalangsana kehpyilo Ntah rangaa doutang.

4. Hiipaina mpai kalei kumpii Pumpiina humpyi, Sazyi pouryi meigo tchiimatei nesa Ahna
teipyi, Nyihangdo Pumpiina katei kumpiina tei eisana, Kamatei mei tchiide.

title: JESUS IS CALLING !
details:
(S. S. 396) MATT. 11: 28. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY1820-1915 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Jesuna lungkasyipii latleile Tingnei latlei, tingnei latlei Lungkasyi jaangteipii sating gamto
Dhiisa tuhkalei kito.

Tingnei latlei, tingnei latlei Jesuna lungkasyipii tingnei latsa leile.

2. Kaset tei ntaklosa latleile, Tingnei latlei, tingnei latlei Goma pot kamasuitei poi gonglo,
Ahna n'go toilakle.

3. Jesuna gonglosa koisaleile Koisa leile, koisa leile, gokem mateitang karam ratasa Gonglo,
kahing tei gahsa.

4. Jesuna tamkapyi kakum samtei. Shiipyi loilo, shiipyi loilo. Ahzheigo kamalum mei ntahsa
Gongkii wosa gongliitlo.

title: NUMBERLESS AS THE SANDS
details:
. (S. S. 998) HOS. 1: 10. F. A. B. F. A. BLACKMER (Arr).
KEY A FLAT
lyrics:
1. Jordan karyi kaisa ndwituh kak Keipyi kalumei kadou tangle Piipai kalak kangneng mazii
kumpii; Daziika ntah ranga tangpo ?

Piipai kalak karyi kangneng ziika, Piikalak sageiti maziika Oh dakumtang hang nduikatu
leimik kaktei! Keipyi kalu meihang go kadou tangle.

2. Kamage kalak majuhum eichii, Peipou hang godo kadouleng tang Gohkang gohhe hanggo
kadou humtang Daziika ntah ranga tangpo ?

3. Rangii ma ruibang kii kangto bamsa Ngou kasagah karyi kuteito Nyijaangpii tchiidek
kabam sazyitei Ka ntah tei kada tamtang po !

4. Keikapyi Pumpii kavai kangou kak Kasagah tei dapei tamtangpo? Ahna meihang go
latkagong kaktei Mei kangka gona toi eitangle.

title: WEARY WANDERER
details:
. (SS.404) LUKE 14:18 GRACE J. FRANCE. HUBERT P. MAIN.
DOH IS F.
lyrics:
1. Sazyii pou maju kasuki, Tingkum lung kalei kaktei; Kanghe meihang ngou kalei kak,
Nnoutang karam magele.

Sating gam gong kasuki, Nyihangna nnoutang takle, Sating gam Pumpii bamki to,
Nyihangna kadoutangle.

2. Nyi meihang nnou tukido, Karangaa lungkasyi tei, Ninanii ninago maning, Lungkasyi mei
mangei sulo.

3. Nnoutang karam kalak tei, Lunglaksa mikdwi humlei, Pungpyide kamalum kangmei;
Jaangnei jaangtum roinatakle.

4. Eitoi nyi nnoutu kido, Pumpiigo malum meihang, Pumpii naa tchiisa kadou tang; Ntah
rangaa sating gamto.

title: TELL MOTHER I'LL BE THERE
details:
(GGSH 272) C.M.F CH. M. FILLMORE
KEY E
lyrics:
1. Inii Cheng kalei dou, gohmah jeisang maning gongle ; Gohpwigo dajiika tchiimakem,
gohswi kagah pa. Toinii ah satinggam tuhtak, ahgo raswisa lei. Gohpwi go tamlo, I teiki
leitang.

Tamlo teiki leitang, Pwi mah rata paito Sampou ei Bangpii tampyilo pwi go. Gohpwi go
tampyi lo, teiki to ntah tang. Lungkasyi pwi go tamlo, I leitang.

2. Inii rahsa leikido, ahnii goh lungsyi humle, Inii reishyisa leikido, ahlungniih manoile, Inii
Chiinadou tchiimage, ahma mage ngoumak. Gohpwi go tamlo, I teiki leitang.

3. Rampousa Inii kee kashyi toisa katuh kaktei, Ahlung paknesa mage mariisa hatsa leile.

Tinghiim tingnai gohjangpa Bangpiigo rata pyile; Gohpwi go tamlo, I teiki leitang.

4. Tingnaikii sampou gohda gong, kalangsa gonglosa, Bangpii nii pangtuhsu ki, gohpwi go
ngou wolosa. Gohpwi taikasu ki, Inii tam gohbam tchiidai losa. Gohpwi go tamlo, I teiki
leitang.

title: OUR LAND FOR CHRIST
details:
. ((S.S. 1110) PS. 144: 15. C. G. CLARK. CHAS. H. GABRIEL,1856-
1932
KEY G. Allegretto
lyrics:
1. Nyimah sazyi teina, khrista ma tchiitangle, Malum gatlo Pumpiimah Cross teipii, Nyilung
mateipyile, Khrista jaangpiina nyi ndwi tchiide.

Nyimah sazyi khrista mahle Pumpii sagong jaangpiina tei mahumsa ngam tchiide.

2. Nyimah sazyi teina, khristamah tchiitangle, Ahma tchiitang, mikpiina ngoukasu, Katchii
mei doutangle, Kalui tchiisupiina kasuitangle.

3. Nyimah sazyi teina, Khristamah tchiitangle, Ahgo rata, Khristamah ngamteina, Sating
kataa tchiitang, Rangii pangmaang pyide, Pumpii jaangpii.

4. Nyimah sazyi teina, Khrista mah tchiitangle, Ahgotei toide, lung mateisana, Kemtei poitoi
pyile, Pumpiigo malumde, kalui gahsa.

title: MORE THAN TONGUE CAN TELL
details:
. (SS.648) J.E.H JOHN 15:13 J.E HALL.
DOH IS G
lyrics:
1. Jesuna n'goh lungkasyi, Cross paryi teito taipyile, Taipyi katu jaang teipiina, Goh rangiigo
keibui.

Ahmui piina tampei kalak, Muipiina tampeiwo kalak, Goh Pumpii mah lungkasyi tei, Tampei
wolak takle.

2. Gohmah kamage matumtei, Pumpiina poimaang pyisana, Tupyihung tei keiwo sana, Goh
jaangpii pung pyile.

3. Pumpii mah zhei paiki teito, Gohlung majung katu doule, Keikapyi mah zai kapattei, Goh
jaangpii patpyile.

4. Kem malyipii tampei kalak, Swipiina maning pei kalak, Pumpii n'go toihum tangle,
Tampei kalak kito.

title: “RESTING IN THE EVERLASTINGARMS”
details:
.(S.S. 647) DEUT. 33:27. REV E.A.
HOLFFMAN,1839-1929 A.J. SHOWALTER.
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Oh kadaziika, oh lungkasyipii, Ahma bai ziilamto bamsana! Ah satoikito, kamajung teido
Ahma bai kangto leihum tangle.

N'tah ….. n'tah Kalui tchiikasu bai kangto, N'tah….. n'tah Kalui tchiisupii ntak tangle

2. Puidi tatkido, keeto bamkido Ahma bai ziilamto bamsana Ngam hangtei kavai, lam
pangtat pyisa Ahmah bai kangto bam humtangle.

3. Sazyipou kalak, sating gammah zhei Ina hingtang karamdo gahle Kei kapyipiida,
kamajung leile Ahmah bai kangto leihum tangle.

title: WILLTHERE BE ANY STARS ?
details:
(S. S. 787) DAN. 12: 3. E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 JNO. R.
SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Leimek liittuchii doutang karam ngoukabi, Sazyi tingnei Ina maningle, Lungkasyi kito Ina
Ahdaa piwochii, Pyihungki sageiti leitangpo?

Leitangpo sageiti sageiti pyihungki, Tingkii lampaang leimek liittuchii (liittuchii) Zyisa
kengtu ntak bamnitei piwochii, Leitangpo sageiti pyihungki.

2. Pumpii teimahumpii ngam tchiisa ratatang, Rangii keipyi kabui jaangpiina, Kavai sageiti
Ina kadou piineitei, Pyihungki sageiti leitangpo?

3. Daziika ntah tang Ahju kangou piinei, Karing hangna Ahpeebang gongchii, Kasagah satoi
sana bamni pihwochii, Pyihungki sageiti leitangpo?

title: THE NEW SONG
details:
. (RS.444) FLORA L.BEST. JNO.R.SWENEY.
KEY D. Moderato.
lyrics:
1. I ntah lii humtei tchiisa leine, Gohmah lung ntahsa kaleikak teido; Liitei roinapiina ntah
matule, Teipiina kamyi tei gahpyi takle.

Karanu liitei karanu liitei; Ina tchiitangle kalei kapyi ma, Lungsyi kapyi Pumpii godato
lungne, Halleluyah Pumpiigo tammatoi.

2. Lungswi magesana kaleikak tei, Nyihang jaangpii Pumpiina ntah pyitang; Lungkasyi
latpiina n'go latleile, Nyii]hang jaangpii bam tchiisa koileile.

3. Sating gam kavaiki piwo dichii, Leimek liitkasu bamkitei pidichii; Kalak kaniih katuteido
ngoulakle, Pumpiina kavaiki panggong pyitang.

title: PASS ME NOT
details:
. (GGSH.235) ACTS 11:21; ROM 10 :13; JOEL 2:32. MISS FANNY J.
CROSBY,1820-1915 W. H. DOANE. ,1832-1915
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Toi eisulo Pumpii n'goh, Ina kahngleile, Nangna latkagong tinglangki, Gohdo toisulo.

Koi kapyipii n'goh jupyilo, Pumpiina latkagong kitei, Gohdo toisulo.

2. Lungkasyi Sagong bamkitei, Pangmakii pyilo, Ina ratasa kahng kalei, Nangna tchiihalo.

3. Nangna katchii I malumsa, N'go fiileile, Goh rangii kamage kaktei, Nangna koipyilo.

4. Gohmah rangii ringkabui tei, Pumpii nangroile, Sazyipoudo sating gamdo, Go kasui
lungne.

title: MY REDEEMER
details:
(S.S.896) Ps. 19:14 P.P. BLISS. JAMES M'GRANAHAN.
KEY A.FLAT (Beating three times to the measure)
lyrics:
1. Gohmah pumrong gohmah rangii Keipyi kasoi jaangpiina, Kahing katchiih matum
hangtei, Cross gamto taipyi takle.

Lii tchiine keipyi kaluma, Ah rangiipii goh lule Cross paryito gohkem gahpyi, N'goh mpatpyi
wole.

2. Gohmui piina tamhum tangle, Pumpiima lungkasyi sam; Gohmah lhei gahkalei hangtei,
Pumpiina fiipyi takle.

3. Tammatoide keikapyi go, Kemgo teido ngamtakle, Kataigodo meebam godo, Ngamtakle
Pumpii teina.

title: MORE LOVE TO THEE
details:
. (GGSH. 358) ELIZABETH PRENTISS,1818-1878 JOHN 21:15.
W.H. DOANE,1832-1915
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Pungpii n'goh lungsyi kitang karam, N'go kuk kumsana rataleile Shiipyilo he Pumpii,
ratasa kahng leile, Lungsyi kitang, lungsyi kitang.

2. Sazyi pouryi ntah roina fiisa, Eitoi Pumpii I n'go fiihgonglei, Gohmah karatatei matumpii
eiroile, Lungsyi kitang, lungsyi kitang.

3. Kaset kalak teipungsa leikido, Goma sampao kabi pung kagongmei; Ahnyina n'goh
kasuisa liitei tchiitang Pumpii n'go lungsyi kitang.

4. Goh lungkito hatsa hatsana lei, N'go matasana ratatangle; Gohmah lungswi matum
tammatoi humtangle, Pumpii ngo lungsyi kitang.

title: MORE ABOUT JESUS
details:
. ((S.S. 571) HOS. 6: 3. E.E.HEWITT,1851-1920 JNO. R.
SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesu rasam tei shiinyile, Ahsamtei I tiwotangle, Gohjaangpii taikapyi teido, Meihang go
tammagou tangle,
I Jesu rasam tei I kisa shiinyile, Goh jaangpiina taikapyitei I na kisa tikei nyile.

2. Jesuma kamatei samtei N'goh kisa ralipyilo, Rangiina ralipyi sana N'goh tikeipyi matulo.

3. Jesuma bikaki samtei N'goh kisa ralipyilo, Ahlattei nyihang koikingsa, Ahgo kasuisa
lungtangle.

4. Pumpii Ahma sagong bamtei, Kani kahii matum hangtei Sating gammah dikiikatu
Makado poi sadaawolak.

title: SAVED THROUGH JESUS' BLOOD
details:
. (R.S. 434) COL. 1: 14. J. W. V. J.W. VAN DE
VENTER,1855-1939
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Sam katchiini neikana sattangle Kataikito ringsa Nyimah zheiryi kabam matum hangtei
Pumpiina pyitangle.

Keikaluni Ido heitangle Peimani kahaatei keisana N'goh kalatki tei ketangle Khrista mah
paito.

2. I keikalu sagong pyihung doutang Pumpiina pyitangle Kalui tchiisupii teito lungtangle
Kamaa fiiloi lakle.

2. N'nou katu gahsa nyilung tangle Sazyipou ngam luisa Potmasui Jesuda toikeisana
Gahsupii lungtangle.

title: MUST I GO -AND EMPTY- HANDED?
details:
(S.S.789) DAN. 12 : 3. C. C. LUTHER 1847-1924
GEO. C. STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY D. DUET ( Soprano and Contralto)
lyrics:
1. Bai marhongpii I gongtangpo? Keikapyi Pumpii doitei; Ngamtei tchiinyisa leido, Ina
tchiiwo kalak gongtang.

Bai marhongpii I gongtangpo? Keikapyi Pumpii doitei, Rangiitei pangwo supiina,
Matahpiina gong tangpo?

2. Katei katchiih gotei Ina Nleiloisa hinglakle, Makado poigong supiina Pumpiigo kadou
tangpo?

3. Sazyi pouryi ma ngamluisa Goh Pumpii ma doikitei Goma katchii matum madum, Rangii
jaangpii tchiidaalo.

4. Tingnei tinglang kaleiki tei Gongkii sana ngam tchiilo, Katai tinglang gongtu dichii Rangii
jaangpii tchiidaalo.

title: SOWING THE SEED OF THE KINGDOM
details:
. (R.S. 875) F. A. F. FRED A. FILLMORE.
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Goh sanahpii! Nangna sating gam luiroutei, Rali keibam ei takpo? Goh sanahpii! Nangna
tingkei tingrot Sumto kabi samtam pyitakpo?

Lu rachet tinglang tei gonglei tak; Kalangsa lutei rachet tangle, Golutei hangka rachet kalu,
Teisa tchiilo Bangpii kee poikoitang karam.

2. Goh sanahpii! Nangna sating gam luiroutei, Meigo tampyi eitakpo? Goh sanahpii! Nangna
sating gammah, Luirou tei meigo ralipyipo ?

3. Goh sanahpii! Nangna sating gammah Luiroutei meigo matitakpo? Goh sanahpii! Nangna
sating gammah Luirou meigo shiimatu takpo?

title: THE COMING OF THE KINGDOM
details:
. (S.S. 168) LK. 21:28 EL NATHAN. 1840-1901 J.
MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
DOH IS B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Nyi jaangpii tchiideksa koikalei sating gam Sagongbam Kamatei meiteina pihdou tangle,
Tinglang teina dwikalong kumpiina tattu eitakle Jesu gong tangkaram tei naleitakle.

Jesugong tangkaram tei naleitakle (2) Bwika kakongtei shiihum tutangle, Tchii daasa Ahgo
koilo, Sagong jutei ngoutangle.

2. Sagong bam kitei gong kanyimei tchiidasa leidichii, Khristana katam samtei suiwolo,
Ahsamtei sangsa suidichii Ahbamki gongsang tangle Jesu gongtang karam tei naleitakle.

3. Jesu nlei kagong ki satoi kapyi Pumpii ngoutang, Jesu samtei meidaka tampyide, Jesu
samtei suiwosa Ahgo ratasa kaangdichii, Ahsam kasuimei tei Ahda gongtangle.

title: THE CHURCH IN THE WILDWOOD
details:
. (D.H. 145) W.S.P. 1830 -? WM.S. PITTS.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
