1. Lungkasyi bikaki ranam lungki tei, Pumpii ma church hangnina lei, Kamatei song lungsyi
kaki gah; Ina lungsyile, lungsyi humle.

(Oh, gonglo, gonglo). Gonglo Pumpii ma church kitei, Lungsyi kakima church kitei, Lungsyi
katubam kaki gahle. Ina lungsyi humtang, lungsyitang.

2. Lungkasyi bikaki ranam church kitei, Lungkasyi hiipai mpailei, Lung kamajung ma liido
tchiisa, Swiki kaset kalak gongmakle.

3. Ringkaloi tingchoi kavai ngou kabitei, Lung kamajung ma punglaksa, Swi majung piina
latsa leile Gongpyilo lungkasyi church kitei.

4. Sazyi pou ei kamaju leimik piinei, Kavai namki maang tangkaram; Lungkasyi ma church
eibamkito, Gohmah peekaang patsa tatutang.

title: THE BEST FRIEND IS JESUS !
details:
. (S.S. 1191) P.B P.HILHORN
KEY G. DUET- S. & C. (or Soprano & Tenor)
lyrics:
1. Hangkakto bikaki kangpiitei Taksupii nyigo kasuileile Ra kani meigo bipyi, Mage
meigodo jupyi, Oh hangkakto bikaki kangle Hangkakto bikalei kangle,
Hangkakto kabi Jesule, Tchiipai kalak tchiipyile Kasoihgo pumtei keipyi Oh hang kakto kabi
Jesule.

2. Kadaziika bikalei kangpo? Ahna gohrangii tchiimajung pyi Ngoukarou mei baikito N'go
keikapyi piitei Oh hangka bikaki kangpiile

3. Hang kakto bikaki kangpiitei Sazyi pouhmah kalak pungpyile Satan ma kahem kito Ahnii
n'go keipyile Oh hang kakto bikaki kangle

title: SAVIOUR, LIKE A SHEPHERD LEAD US
details:
. (S. S. 1164) PS. 23: 1. DOROTHY A.
THRUPP,1779-1847 W. B. BRADBURY, 1816-1868
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jao kakoipii goh koipyilo, Nyihang go kasuipyilo; Nyigo rangii chiitak pyilo, Nyi jaangpii
daa tchiipyilo. Jesu satoi, Jesu satoi, Ratasana kaangleile, Jesu satoi, Jesu satoi, Ratasana
kaangleile.

 2. Nyigo gokangmei tchiipyilo, Nyipuidi tei sepyilo; Nyigo jaokoiki pangliitlo, Gahkalei
fiigong pyilo.

3. Nyina kem tchiisa leikido, Nyigodo lukei pyilo; Nangna nyigo kaleipyilo, Nyikem
tchiimagah pyilo.

4. Eitoi nyihang goda liitlei, Nangna kamaning teilo; Satoi kapyi keikapyipii, Nyigodo
lungsyi pyilo.

title: NEVER THIRSTAGAIN
details:
. (R. S. 474) DEUT. 8 : 7; JOHN 4. 14. ISAAC WATTS 1674-1748
(VERSES) H. GEORGE ALAN
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Ka ntah bam hangnina lei, Kamatei mei bamle, Kamyi teido gahle, Kamage kalakdo gahle.

 Karing chiitak tei dousana, Karing dwipok dwitei shak kalumei, Dwisaryi loilakle, saryi
katutei gahtangle, Dwisaryi loilakle, saryi katu gahtang, Saryi loikei lakle, saryitang karam
gahtakle, Pumpii Jesuna tamle, saryiloi keilak takle.

2. Dwipoktei kalui tchiimakle, Hiipaido huimakle, Neika bamteito nyi meihang, Maangwosa
bamtutang.

3. Lung kamanou teigahsana, Teitui maang wobuipo? Canaan katumah bamkitei, Nang
liitwo buitakpo?

title: THE CHURCH'S ONE FOUNDATION
details:
. (C.W.423) EPH. 5:23. SAMUEL J. STONE,1839-
1900 SAMUEL S. WESLEY,1810-1876
KEY E FLAT. In moderate time, with dignity
lyrics:
1. Church mah pungbam teina Pumpii Jesu Khristale, Ei Pumpiina Ahma sampiina
tchiikalule, Kamyi sumki teito Pumpiina gongsa fiiwo, Rangii m'maangpyisa Ahzai piina
luwole.

2. Jat matum madum heihum kido hangnina roi, Kalungtei kamalum Pumpii hangnina roile;
Meihang chii njoisa kamatei azhei takpyi, Malum matu wosa lungkasyi teipii tokryi.

3. Saryi tchiisa jaang nangsana kaset kalakdo, Pumpiina magahpyi wosa majung matutang;
Ka ntah doutang karam Pumpiina kasuitang, Kangam mah Church tchiisana ka ntah
doutangle.

4. Oh, ka ntah kamatei Apfii, Anaa, Rangii! Sazyipou Churchna godaka kasuiwosana, Ntahsa
ntaktang karam liitpyilo Pumpii! Sating gamto n'go kasuisa lungsa leine.

title: WHAT SHALLTHE HARVEST BE?
lyrics:
1. Tingchoi nuka rali kabam tei, Tingnalam ralikabam teido, Tingkii lam rali kabam teido,
Zing zingkalei tinghum ralido.

Oh rachet katuki tei, dakum piina leitangpo? Kamyi kido kavaiki teitodo, Katai kasoi hangna
rali kabam; Tinglang nina rachetgong tangle, Madousupii na rachettang.

2. Puidi kika rali kabamtei, Koitu paryika ralikabam, Turat kakka ralikabam tei, Sazyi kabiki
rali teido.

3. Ntahsa ralikei kabamtei, Lungmagesa rali kabamdo, Rachet kagong piinei leimiktei,
Ntahsana kee pang gongtangle.

title: SAFELY THROUGH ANOTHER WEEK
details:
. (C.W. 448) REV. 1:10. JOHN NEWTON,1725-1807
LOWELL MASON,1792-1872
KEY G. In moderate time
1.Tingnei ntak piineile, Pumpii leimik piineile; Ahkeetei gong bamsana, Pumpiigo ratatude,
Kabipiinei leimik tei, Pumpiido ntak leile. (2 times)
2.Pumpiina koipyi leile, Nyi hanggo satoipyile; Pumpiina lung switeido, Ntah rangaa matule,
Ngamtei rattoi eisana, Pumpiigo ratatude. (2 times)
3.Neikado mpat pyimak, Pumpiina kasui pyilei; Tei jaangpii Pumpii keeto, Pumpii gotei
ratade,
Pumpii roina maningsa, Kaki matum toi eide. (2 times)
lyrics:
4. Tingnei leimik piineitei, Sazyi pouryi meihangna; Pumpiisam shiikalu tei; Malumsa
ratatude,
Sazyi pouryi meihangna, Pumpii ngamtei tchiitude. (2 times)

title: SEEKING THE LOST
details:
. (S. S. 817) MARK 16 : 15. W. A. O. 1841-1597 W. A. OGDEN.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Gahkalei meigo tei fiigongnesa, Marou maruk kalei jaonaago, N'goh Pumpii Ahna eitoi
latlei, Kalangsa gonglo gohda gonglo.

Zang gamteito….. Marou maruksa….. Gahtu kalei….. matum fiikei, loiwolo Keipyi kalu…..

Pumpiima jaonaa. Liitkabui tei….. Pumpiigo tei ratawolo.

2. Gonyido maangsa jaotei fiih halo, Rangii hangka magesa leile, Keikapyipii puidilam pang
gonglo Katai kiteito pangpat pyilo.

3. Hakalaang sam tamtang karam jaangpii, Nyimei hang tingnei Ahgo toide Koukalei meigo
kokmakiih pyisa Lungkasyi teipiina liitwolo.

title: SILENT NIGHT
details:
. (M. H. 405) LUKE 2:16 JOSEPH MOHR, 1792-1848 F. GRUBER, 1787-
1863
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kamajung, kamatei, tinghumle, zing zingle; Meikem tchiikasu meipwi, naa narei
manahtakle, Pwinah paryitei, vai, pyisa zyileile.

2. Kamatei, tinghumle, majungsa vaitakle, Rakot meina lii tchiilei halleluyah Sagonggo
Keikapyipii ting nei, tinghum manahle.

3. Kamatei tinghumle, sageiti vaitakle, Jaokakoi meinaa teina, Jesugo tammatoile, Kabisam
pungong, keikapyi manahle.

4. Kamatei tinghumle, kavaipii tokryile, Bangpii lungkasyi kito kavai puidi mangoule.

Tingnei tinghum Jesu manah piineile.

title: STANDING ON THE PROMISES
details:
. (S. S. 877) 2 COR. 1: 20. R.K.C. R. KELSO CARTER,1849-
1928
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina tamkapyi sam matum hangtei, Kamalum paito samtei suihum tangle, Pumpii
zheikito sazyi nriit teipii, Tamkapyi samtei suihum tangle.

Sat hum tangle, Kamalum paito nyisatsa leihum tangle, Sat hum tangle, Tamkapyi samkito I
sat humtang.

2. Tamkadek samtam kito sattat wosa, Sazyi pouryi tingkei tingrot kagongki, Kahingtei
gahsa Ina sat wo buile, Tamkabam samgotei malumsa.

3. Tamkabam samgotei Ina malumsa, Jaonah ma zeihum kapyi jaangtei piinii; Khristana
nyigo keikapyi jaangteipii Tamkabam samtei nyisui wode.

4. Gahkasu ma samtam kiteito satde, Kahing katchiih teido gahtutang takle, Karing Pumpii
samtam teipii ngam tangle, Pumpii samtam kiteito satde.

title: SUN OF MY SOUL
details:
. (S.S. 302) LK. 24 : 29. JOHN KEBLE,1792-1866. KATHOLISCHES
GESANBUCH,1774.
KEY F. In moderate time
lyrics:
1. Goh rangiigo keikapyipii; Nang goh rangiimah leimekle, Nang n'goh kasuipyi dichii,
Kamyi kitei I tatlakle.

2. Kajik dwina kahum kaktei, I magesa kagong kitei, Kabi kamaning ritakle, Pumpii dato
ntak tangle.

3. Tingchoi tingkii kasuipyilo, Nang kasuna I ringwolak. Tinghum matang koibampyilo.

Nang gahdichii Ina hingle.

4. Paktu kalei gonaa kangka, Pumpiina latpyilo tingnei, Eitoi Pumpii! Lungsyi pyilo, Kemki
teito mpat pyilo.

5. Nyida gongliit kasui pyilo Tingchoi nyi ngam tchii kasuki, Gomah lungsyi kapyipaito,
Nyimei hangna lungsa leitang.

title: THE CROWNING DAY
details:
. (A.H. 198) MATT. 24:30.. EL. KATHAN.1840-1901 JAMES
MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii gotei sazyi pouryi meina maziimak, Meikamoi kana eitoikatang malum makle,
Ahna kalangsa gongtang kasangpii gongtangle, Sagong pyihung douwo kalutei taangmak.

Jesuna gongtang karam leimiktei taangsu takle, Nyihang mah Pumpii Ahna sating gamto
kahum panei, Oh, Ah kagong kakoimei ntahpii tokryi tangle, Sagong mah pyihungtei
douleng tangtakle.

2. Paryilam mah kavai kamalum meima kavai, Jesuna baipyitakle Ahnyimah pei mani,
Keikapyi jeitei ngouwosa kaleiwo tangle, Sagong pyihung douwo kalupiinei tei.

3. Kaset tei mangei eitangle kemtei gah eichii, Tingkei guiloilak kahing teido leikei laktak,
Keikapyi tei ngouwochii swi ntahtu tangle, Sagong pyihung douwo kalu piineitei.

4. Ka ntah mah leimiktei kadadou gongtangpo? Lung ka ntah teipiina nyi koisa leitangle,
Magah kalei jaonah ahnyi gotei fiiwolo, Sagong mah pyihung tei douleng matulo.

title: SHALL WE GATHER AT THE RIVER?
details:
(GGSH. 88) R.L. REV. 22.1. ROBERT LOWRY,1826-
1899
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Bangpii sagong peebang teito; Patkalei dwipok kabi, Kamating karyi peebangto Nyi
meihang kadou tangpo?

Nyi bamteito kadou tangpo? Ngoukabi bam karyi louhgamteito; Pumpii meigo nyihang
kasuisa, Kavai Bangpii dateito.

2. Vaimaraang karyi peebangto, Nyi gongliitsa sattangle, Kem kamaatei syitoi eisa Ntahsa
nyi kasuitang.

3. Kavai karyi doukasuki, Nyikem matou eitangle, Sagong mah peimani keisa Sana pyihung
keitangle.

title: SEEK FIRSTTHE KINGDOM
details:
. (C.P.49) MATT. 6 : 33.
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Go tchiilung ki ka ntah mareipo? Sazyipou kamatei kumpii? Matei kaki ngoukabi peitei,
Baiwosana ntah tangpo?

Reipii fiihlo, sagong mah sazyi, teito kasang tei, Kalang sana reipii fiihlosa Pumpiina tamle
(N'go makukei pyitangle, n'go makupyi tangle) (2times)

2. Jongsa kalei ruinaa gotei julo, Ahnyina marou kei makle; Rachetsa poi nduido makle;
Bangpiina Ahnyigo pyichii.

3. Luki hiipai goteido maninglo, Hungsa karachetdo gahle; Teitchii kido Solomon ahna,
Meinii keikasu nat keile.

4. Jesu Sagongmah kamatei bamki, Jaonaa keetei gongliit pyilo Kalui tchiikasu kitei pihtang.

Se sanapii lupai lakle.

title: TAKE MY LIFE AND LET IT BE
details:
.((Alex.248) II CRON.26:31. F.R. HARVERGAL FROM
MOZARAT.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Goh chiilungtei poipyilo, Poisa tchiimatei pyilo Tinglang kaleita nyihang Ahgo tam
makahng tangle.

2. Gohbai teido poipyilo, Ahngamki tchii matulo, Gohpee hangna poipyilo, Ahjaangpii
tatmatulo.

3. Gohrok teido poipyilo, Gohlii tei tchiimatulo. Kabi rasam hangteido Gohmuipii
tammatulo.

4. Sesana, lhei matum tei Nangna lukei pyisana Swilat teimahum teido, Gojaangpii
satmatulo.

5. I na kamaning hangtei, Gohswi gohlatlak takle, Gohlungto liitbam pyilo, Nangna gohbam
tchiipyilo.

title: THE BANNER OF THE CROSS
details:
. (S. S. 675) PS. 60: 4. EL NATHAN.1840-1901 J.
MCGRANAHAN.1840-1907
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii saryimei go tchiiha tangkaram, Sating gam Rakotmei lei; Hingsa kalei kaktei liitei
tchiisana, Nyihang go keipyitangle.

Maangtude… Saryi ki… Khristana saryimei shyilei, Ahma zhei jumsa ratade, Sating meigo
kasuisa.

2. Juhkarou daziika gongkatu kaktei, Sating kamyitei kumtang, Pumpii ma saryimei
teimahum poichii, Ka nroutei doulakle.

3. Zang gamto ningkamto kabammei hangna, Pumpii ma mei matumpii, Hinglak tangkaram
samtei shiimatulo, Pumpii ma samtam teile

title: TENDERLY PLEADING
details: .((S.S. 449) JOHN 10:9. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 IRA D
lyrics:
SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY G.
1.Ju ngaryi gonglo gahkalei meihang, Shiilo kabi jao kakoipii teina, N'go fiileile kem
gahpyinesa, Risulo nang Jesugo kadoulo.

Lungkasyi latpii latgonglei n'go, Jao kakoi piina kalat shiilo, Lungsyisa latlei keisyipii fiilei,
Lungsyisa latlei gohku gonglo.
2.Koipyi leile, datchiisa gahtangpo, Kadiiki tuthang kalei kitodo, Katai katangtei Ahna
koileile, Madatsa lungsyi takle nyihanggo.
3.Shiilo Ahsamtei, maninglo lungsyi Gohmah kemjaangpii Jesu taitakle, Kakui kamaa
matumpii gahpyisa, Kalui kagah rangiitei pyileile.
4 Liitpyilo malum kasang puidiki, Jesu Khrista kasang puidi teile, Pumpiina latkalei tei nang
shiilo. Tatthang tusupii Pumpiida liitlo.

title: THE CHURCH'S RALLYING SONG
details:
. (S.S. 810) LEV. 25: 9. MISS FANNY J.CROSBY,1820-
1915 JNO. R. SWENEY,1837-1899
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Tuhlo tuhlo tchii kapyipiina latleile tulo tulo, Ahsamtei koikinglo; Paklo paklo kabi
rasamtei tampyilo, Mei hangdaka Pumpii rasamtei tam seilo.

Doilamtei tattuhlo, Tingchoi sageitina nyigo vaipyi leile; Doilamtatlo, lii tchiisa ntahsana
doilam tatlo, Bangpiina nyigo puidi tampyitangle, Hosanna sa nyimei hangna saatangle;
Kasang saryimei tchiine, Jesuna n'go tile, Teito halleluyah tamsa tuhtangle.

2. Tulo tulo kadiikito kavai gonglei takle tulo, Dwikadi paryito; Paklo paklo kabi rasamtei
tampyilo Rangii majyi saryi meihanggo tampyilo.

3. Tuhlo tuhlo tingkum tinglangtei natakle. Tuhlo tuhlo Bangpii tammatoilo; Paklo paklo
ntah rangaapii tokryisa, Bangpii go kasuisa nyihang lhungtuh tangle.

title: THE GRAND OLD STORY OF SALVATION
details:
. (R. S. 130) E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sating gam puidi tatkalei taitei Ina tamtang, Kalui kagah doukabui samtei; Lungkasyi
liitei nyina ntah rangasa tchiine, Kalui kagah dou kabui samtei.

Tampyilo, tampyilo, Sazyi poumei hangda tamlo, Tampyilo bam hangki, Keikapyi mah kabi
rasamtei.

2. Kemki liitkalei meigotei Ahzeipii syipyine, Kalui kagah doukabui samtei, Ahlung kasyi
teipii kalui kagah kavai pyine, Kalui kagah doukabui samtei.

3. Saryi hang goteido nyina lii tchiisa ngamtangle, Kalui kagah doukabui samtei, Kalak
kaniih hangtei gahsa nyi liitei tchiitangle. Kalui kagah doukabui samtei.

4. Sating gam meinado madatsa jutang tinyiisa, Kalui kagaa doukabui samtei, Keikapyii
Jesugotei kasuisa tam makaangne, Kalui kagaa doukabui samtei.

title: WE'LL WORK TILL JESUS COMES
details:
.(S.S.920) JER. 31:16 E. MILLS. WM. MILLER. 19TH
CENTURY
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Ntah sazyitei kada tinglangki gongliit tangpo? Gohmah pot masui kada tinglangki toi
eitangpo? Jesuna gongkasu doika nyihang ngamtei tchiide, Ei tchii luisa satinggam
nduitang.

2. Sazyipou bam eikito kamajung tei doulakle, Ngoukahing sazyipou tei gohkee kasang
teimakle.

3. I Jesugo fiihsa n'goh Pumpiina mazhiipyi, Ahpeebangto bamsa n'goh Ahna koipyi tangle.

4. Jesugo kadousa Ina paktu loilak takle, Kataido hingmakle gohmah kee satinggam
kiihtang.

title: SINCE JESUS CAME
details:
. (A.H. 378) II COR. 5:17. R.H. MCDANIEL. CHAS. H. GABRIEL,1856-
1932
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Jesuna gohlung liitkalu tei sekpiina, Daziika gohlung ntahle! Eiziika myikalei gohlung tei
vaitakle, Jesu gohlung liitkalu teih.

Jesu gohlung liit kaluteih (2) Ka ntah gohlungto dwikalong kumtakle. Jesu gohlung liit
kaluteih.

2. Ina katat hangki kamong sungloi lakle, Jesu gohlung liit kaluteih! Gohkem matum
madamtei syitoi eitakle, Jesu gohlung liit kaluteih.

3. Goh lungto kamaning kabitei doutakle, Jesu gohlung liit kaluteih! Goh puiditei kamyi
leiloi keilak takle, Jesu gohlung liitkalu teih.

4. Kavai kasagah nam teina goh matangle, Jesu gohlung liitkalu teih, Ina ngoutang kadiiki
namdi kamwitei, Jesu gohlung liitkalu teih.

title: THERE IS A FOUNTAIN
details:
. (S.S. 129) W. COWPER,1731-1800 ZECH. 13 : 1. OLD MELODY
(arr)
KEY C
lyrics:
1. Zeipii tokryi kalei dwipok Khrista zaiki tole; Kem kapungmei gong ngalumchii, Kakui
kamaa gahtang. Kakui kamaa gahtang Kakui kamaa gahtang Kem kapungmei gong
ngalumchii Kakui kamaa gahtang.

2. Ntahle rangaamei teina Dwipok tei ngousana Ido Ahkumpii kem pungle, Gohkem syitoi
pyilo. Gohkem syitoi pyilo. Gohkem syitoi pyilo Ido Ahkumpii kem pungle Gohkem syitoi
pyilo

3. Kalaht jampung kalei kito Azai longkahum tei, Kakui kamaa gahkapyi tei, Mangei lakle
Ina. Mangei lakle Ina. Mangei lakle Ina. Kakui kamaa gahkapyi tei, Mangei lakle Ina.

4. Goma keikapyi teimahum Ina sating gamto, Gohmui teipiina lii tchiisa Maning gonghum
tangle. Maning gonghum tangle. Maning gonghum tangle. Gohmui teipiina lii tchiisa Maning
gonghum tangle.

title: SOWING THE PRECIOUS SEED
details:
. (S. S. 1080) W. A. O.1841-1897 W. A. OGDEN.
KEY IS B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Maikating luirou tei bamhangki rali keipyilo Maikating luirou tingchoi rali pyilo
Maikating luirou tingchoi tingna rali katutei Ninado magahlak matum lhungtangle.

Maikating luiroutei (2times) Lingkabam luitei madousupii lhungtangle. Kabi samkaang
rangii chiitak meihang go jeipyilo Maikating lui chengnaka ralipyilo

2. Maikating luirou tei katat bamlyi hang kiteika Maikating luirou nangna ralikakei
Maikating luirou Bangpii zheikito rali kakei Maikating kalangsa lungpat tangtakle.

3. Meikating luirou lung rangii heisa rali kakei Meikating luiroutei paa m,paitangle
Meikating luiroutei tinglang bisana doutangle Ninado magaalak nang rachet tangle.

title: THERE'LL BE NO DARK VALLEY
details:
. (S. S. 1026) REV. W. O. CUSHING,1823-1902 PS. 23: 4.
IRA D. SANKEY.1840-1908
KEY F
lyrics:
1. Jesu n,lei kagong tinglang kitei, Sazyii pouryii tei myiiloi keilakle Pumpii teina kagong
tinglang kitei, Nyii meihang n,duitangle.

Pumpiina lungkasyii mei Ahsam kasuimei pangne Pumpii doito meihang n,duitangle,
Kamyiitei leiloi lakle.

2. Jesu n,lei kagong tinglang kitei, Kamage mariih leiloi keilakle, Ka n,tah rangaapii tokryii
tangle, Ahmei hang n,dui piinei.

3. Jesuna n,lei kahum tinglang ki, N,tah n,langsa liitei tchiitangle, Meihang n,tah rangasa
n,duitang Pumpiina lungkasyii mei.

title: WE SHALL STAND BEFORE THE KING !
details:
(S. S. 966) E. O. E.1851-1921 E. O. EXCELL.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii sagong doiteito, nyimeihang pihsat tangle, Tingneika… Tingneika… Ngoukabi
sanabamto Ah tammatoi lii tchiitang.

Tingneika… Tingneika… Tingneika… pih hum tangle, Rangii matei kasuisa tammatoi lii
tchiitangle, Halleluyah!... Halleluyah!... Tingneika ngouleng tangle.

2. Sating gam pungtei laksa nyimeihang pihsat tangle, Tingneika… Tingneika… Kaset kalak
gahtangle, ntahpii tokryi tangle, Teipiinei… Teipiinei…

3. Goh rangii tusat wolo, nangdo heihsa sattangle, Tingneika… Tingneika… Nyi Pumpii teina
latlei nang kada maning leipo? Tattulo… Tattulo…

title: WE'LL NEVER SAY “GOOD-BYE”
details:
. (S. S. 961) E. W. CHAPMAN. 1859-1918 IS.35: 10. J. H.
TENNEY.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou kangmei kadou katu, Ei dazii ka ntah Teikido nleisa N'nou eitangle madousupii.

Sating gam pihkalu teina Nnou loikei lakle Kasagah sazyiki teito Kapak keilak takle.

2. Teikido kadou loikei tangle Maningki ntahle Sazyipou ngam luisa Hang nleisa kadou
loitangle.

3. Sating gam sazyiki teitona N'nouloi keilakle Tinghum tingna gahle Ntah rangaa mah lii
tchiitangle.

title: THERE IS LIFE FOR A LOOK
details:
. (S. S. 123) IS. 45: 22. A. M. HULL. E. G. TAYLOR.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Juhlo cross gamto taikapyi Ahgotei, Ahdato nyi karing teileile, Juhlo nyikem gahpyi kabui
jaang piina, Cross gamto taikapyipii Ahtei.

Juhlo, juhgonglo Taikapyipii Ahgo judichii, Ring tangle, Gojaangpii karing lei, Eitoi sek.

2. Nyikem kapung mei jaangpii sumak piina, Dajaangpii cross gamto taitangpo? Kempou
ruitang karam jaangpii sumakpii, Zaipatsa dajaangpii taitangpo!

3. Gonyina hatsa mikdwi kahum teipii, Keikapyi tei douwo buitakpo? Lhong kahum jesu
Ahma zai paikito, Gonyina keikapyi doutangle.

title: WELCOME FOR ME !
details:
. (S.S. 469) L.K. 15 : 10. F.J. CROSBY. WM. J. KIRKPATRICK
KEY B. FLAT
lyrics:
1. Ruina kumpii diisa dwijei pouto jongsa, I godato diisa jongtu tak, Nlena goma lungkasyi
koitei shiiki N'goh lungsyile katu tile.

Gohlat leile, gohlat leile Lungkasyi latpii latleile; Mahou kum majungsa ntaktang, Ntahtei
tampai wolakle.

2. Lungnyi lunghou katu matum gah eisana, Pumpii peebangto ntaktangle Godoito I
kadaziika ntah tangpo! Ka ntah tei gohjaangpii nale.

3. Jesugo kasuichii tingkei tingrot hinglak, Tingkei tingrotna vangnei kido, Kamyi kagah
sating gamkitei juhsana Rangii ntah liitei tchiitangle.

title: SEEKING FOR ME !
details:
(S. S. 40) EZEK. 34 : 11. A. N. E. E. HASTY ( arr)
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Bethlehemki Jesuna humpyile, Tomkee teito Jesugo manahle, Madat kalei Ahgo Ina rata;
N'goh fiihpyi fiihpyi. N'goh fiihpyi fiihpyi, (2) Madat kalei Ahgo Ina rata N'goh fiihpyi,
fiihpyi.

2. Cross paryito Jesugo gitakle, Gohkem tei Ahzhei piina syipyile, Maningki madatle Ahlung
kasyi, N'goh fiihpyi, fiihpyi. N'goh fiihpyi, fiihpyi. (2) Maningki madatle ahlung kasyi N'goh
fiihpyi, fiihpyi.

3. Kem kapung n'goh ahna latpyile, Kamaa katchii matum Ahna keipyi, Kahemna tinglang
kataangka hemtak, N'goh latpyi latpyi. N'goh latpyi latpyi. (2) Kahemna, tinglang kataangka
hemtak, N'goh latpyi, latpyi

4. Pumpii tei nleiloi gong keitangle, Maningsa gohswi hangka magele, Kamong kakto kahum
Ina ngoutang. Gohjaang piina humpyi. Gohjaang piina humpyi. (2) Kahemna, tinglang
kataangka hemtak N'goh latpyi, latpyi

title: JESUS I COME
details:
. (S.S. 498) PS. 71 : 4 W. T. SLEEPER,1819-1904 GEO. C STEBBINS,1846-
1945
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Kamage masuipot pungsana, Ina gonglei Jesu goda. Pumpii ntah kavai bamkitei, Ina
gonglei Jesu. Katchiih kaniih katai bamkitei, Kem puidi tatkalei hang toisa, Godato karing
doutang lesa, Ina gonglei Jesu.

2. Ka nrou sangam bamki teito, Ina gonglei Jesu goda. Ngoukasagah goma cross kitei, Ina
gonglei Jesu. Tingkei tingrot sadoi kashyi bam, Hang gotei Ina ngam wosana, Ntak
tangkaram Pumpii datei, Ina gonglei Jesu.

3. Det katchii satang sale toisa, Ina gonglei Jesu goda, Gomarei tchiitang karam jaangpii, Ina
gonglei Jesu. Go lungkasyi kito ringkabui, Goma ka ntahki liitkabui, Ruinaa kumpiina kashii
pungsa, Ina gonglei Jesu.

4. Katai katchiih kahing bamkito. Ina gonglei Jesu goda, Goma kavai ka ntah kitei, Ina
gonglei Jesu. Tampei kalak gahkasu kitei, Majungsa bamtang karam kitei, Kalui tchiisupii go
juhnesa, Ina gonglei Jesu.

title: THE KING'S BUSINESS
details:
. (R.S. 75) E.T. CASSEL,1849-1930 FLORA H. CASSEL. 1852-1911
KEY E.
lyrics:
1. Ina mbui tatsa sazyipou eiki gong, gohmah kee, Kasangtei kadiikito leile, eiki kagong eina,
Ina nyi Sagong mah, ngatei ngahpyi nesa gongle.

Ina gonyigo katam ei Bangpii Sagong mah sampaole, Pumpii teina tamle lung manaloiwosa,
Bangpii Ahdatei liitwolo.

2. Kem kapung meiteina lungtei kaliwosa, kahemki, Teito nang nlei kagong meitei, kalui
kagah Sagong, Gotei kasui bamtang, sam ei Pumpiina katamle.

3. Namdi kadi Ahma kee ngoukabi keeto, gohmah Sating gammah keetei biki tangle, teito
Sagong Ahma, Ngatei ngahpyi dichii, teiki gong lhunglosa tamlei.

title: THERE IS A PARADISE OF REST
details:
(S. S. 989) ISA. 14:3 W. ROBERT LINDSAY IRA. D.
SANKEY
KEY Eb
lyrics:
1. Kasagah bam hangnina lei, Karyi louhgam teito, Teikitei kamajyi kaset kalak, Mikdwi
kapat gahle.

Kadoule! Teito n'go! Tingchoi kamajung ma kavai kiteito, Kadoule! Teito n'go! Karyilouh
gamteito n'go kadoule!

2. Kavai namdi hangnina lei, ntah tamwo kalak, Teikitei pihdichii sagong go ngoutangle
kalui gahsa.

3. Pyihung kasagoi gamto lei, Khristana pyitangle, Pumpii nlei kagong koisa ntah rangaasa
lungtangle.

4. Katai katahng Ahtei suichii, satinggam puidiki; Tatkaliit piineitei kamwi latpyi, tangle
teipiineitei.

title: SEEDS OF PROMISE
details:
. (S. S. 768) GAL. 6: 9. JESSIE H. BROWN,1861-1921 F. A.
FILLMORE.
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Lungkasyi ma luirou goikatu, matapii makle; Kabi tinglangki rachet tangle, nangna
goikabam.

Sating kata….. tchii kabamtei….. (Sating kata tchiikabam tei) Matahpiina galak (Ma tahpii na
gahlak) 2 Tinglang kaktei….. satoi doutang, (Tinglang kaktei satoi doutang) Goma njei…..
tangle….. (Goma njei tangle) x 2

2. Raleidwi patsa ngam tchiikabam, matahpii gahlak; Kisa ntah kisa kamage, katchiimei
gahlak.

3. Neika Jesu gongloitang, karachet tinglang jaangpii; Leimik piinei amai tchiikasu, satoi
pyitangle.

title: JESUS SAVIOUR, PILOT ME !
details:
(S.S.556) PS. 78 :72. EDWARD HOPPER,1818-1888
J.E.GOULD,1822-1875
KEY B FLAT. In moderate time
lyrics:
1. Jesu goh pangtat pyilo, karing ma dwibam kitei, Tikasu dwi kaditei, koitu kadigo kahing;
Chyitat kabui nang roile; Jesu goh pangtat pyilo.

2. Pwina naago kahemkum, Pumpiina nyigo hemlei; Tingkei tingrotgo katam, dwikadi godo
katam Pangtat kabui nangroile, Jesu goh pangtat pyilo.

3. Dwijeiku pihkaluki, kahing katchiih doukido, Gohbaito Ahna jumsa, Ahna gohsam
tamtangle, Hingsang hingloi keisulo, Ina n'go pangtat tang.

title: LETTHE GOSPEL LIGHT SHINE OUT
details:
. (R. S. 358) J. OATMAN JN, 1856-1922 ADAM
GEIBEL,1855-1933
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tinglang kaleitatei vaimaraang tuhlo, Kemmah kamyi gongkatu tinglang kitei, Sampao
kabitei kisa vaimatulo, Lungliitsa ngam tchiitulo.

Kabirasam kavaitei kisa kisa vaipyilo, Goma meebung tei masoisa vaipyilo, Kabisamtei
toisulo.

2. Kasoi kaset ahnyi meihangka leile, Pumpoumah kamareipii ngam kalumei, Ahnyi sadoi
kashyi doukasu jaangpii, Kavaitei masoi pyilo.

3. Goma kavai samtei makum seisulo, Goma meebung gotei vaihum matulo, Kabi sampao
kavaitei kamyi siimto; Vaidichii go toitangle.

title: THE MASTERS' CALL
details:
. (S.S. 756) MATT.21.28. JULIA STERLING. IRA D. SANKEY,1840-
1908
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Shiilo Pumpiina latsa leile, Kasangtei pinesa, Myitakle gatnesa koileile; Kagat meitei
gahle.

Tatlo lungkasyi lung kamanoi, Pumpiima zheikito; Kalangsa satoi kapyi samtei, Meihanggo
tam pyilo.

2. Kemkito kaleimei hanggotei, Maangsana fiihwolo; Gobai piina chyi mpatpyilo, Anyigo
keikabui.

3. Tulo lungkasyi mah takbeiki, Mazyi meigo latlei, Kalui kagah chiitak pyinesa; Gonyigo
latleile.

4. Kalanglo leimik liitni takle, Kavai gahni takle; Tinglang kashyi kadou tudichii, Ngam
tchiilui wolakle.

title: LOVE DIVINE, ALL LOVE EXCELLING
details:
. (C.W. 379) I JOHN 4:8. CHARLES WESLEY,1707-
1788 JOHN ZUNDELL,1815-1882
KEY B FLAT. In moderate time.
lyrics:
1. Kamatei kabi lungkasyi, Sazyi pouryi magong pyi; Goma lungkasyi tei nyida Keipyisa
kasui pyilo, Lungsyi kapyi Pumpii Jesu, Kalui kaga lungkasyi Lung kamage rangii gotei,
Keikapyi tei humpyilo.

2. Rangii kashoimei hang gotei, Lungkasyi tei keipyilo, Goma ka ntak bam keetei, Nyi godo
maliit pyilo! Nyimah kem tchiimatei pyilo, Tchiikapyi Pumpii nangle, N'go kamalum paikito,
Lungki liitbam pyihumlo.

3. Keikapyi piitei gong pyilo, Goma karing tei suitang! Nyimah lungki liit bampyilo, Toisupii
kasui pyilo; N'go tammatoi humtangle; Goma ngamtei tchiihum tang; Magah supii tammatoi
tang, Goma lungkasyi paito.

4. Mei kasatei tchiimatulo; Sabwi kum haa matulo, Goma lungkasyi kaditei, Nyidaka
mangou pyilo, Sating gam pihtuh kasuna, Kamatei mei tchiipyilo, Gopee bangki kagong
piinei, Gah supiina toitangle.

title: RESCUE THE PERISHING
details:
. (S. S. 814) LK. 14: 23. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY, 1820-1915 W.
H. DOANE, 1832-1915
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Gahtu kalei meihang, gotei latgonglo, Chyi makiihlo kemroubam kiteito, Kakui kamaa
meigo, chyi mpatpyilo, Keikapyi Jesu samtei tampyilo. Gahtu kalei meihang, taisa kaleimei;
Gonglo Jesu datei, keipyi tangle.

2. Kamaa tchiilei kido Pumpiina latlei, Lung kalikalu meigo koileile, Kahemna hemsa lei,
gahhum eitangle, Malum dichii Pumpiina keipyi tang.

3. Gahtu kaleimeigo kalangsa latlo, Eitoi gonglosa Pumpiina tamlei, Kagong kamaang
hangki, samtei tampyilo, Tampyi humlo, Jesuna taikapyi.

4. Kem pungsa kaleimei, gonyigo latlei, Gonglo, gonglo, kemtei syipyi tangle, Kalangsa
malumlo, tam ralipyilo, Kalui kagah karing tei doutangle.

title: NOR SILVER NOR GOLD
details:
. (A.H . 403) I PETER 1 : 18. J. M. GRAY.1851-1938 D. B.
TOWNER, 1850-1919
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. N'goh keikapyi sesana piina makle, Sazyi pouryi kani piinado makle, Cross mah zaitei
roinapiina n'goh keipyi, Pumpiina taipyisa n'goh keipyile.

Keipyi wosana lyikalu tei, Sesana piina makle, Tampai kalak Jesu lungkasyi, Ahzhei piina
lutakle.

2. N'goh keikapyii sesana piina makle, Gohmah kempot kamasui kapung hangtei, Cross mah
zaitei roinapiina n'goh keipyi, Pumpiina taipyisa n'goh keipyile.

3. N,'goh keikapyi sesana piina makle, Kamatei sampii n'goh manang pyile, Crossmah zaitei
piina kemgotei ngamtakle, Pumpiina taipyiisa kahing gahtakle.

4. N'goh keikapyi sesana piina makle, Sating gam puiditei lyipai wolakle, Cross mah zaitei
mahum teipiina lyibuile, Pumpii teina kahing gahsa taipyile.

title: LET THE LOWER LIGHTS BE BURNING
details:
. (S. S. 805) P. P. B. MATT. 5: 14, 16. PHILIP.P.
BLISS,1838-1876
KEY B FLAT
lyrics:
1. Goh Pumpiima alungkasyi, Kee teimah kavai teipii, Nyigo kavaitei vaipyisa, Sazyi
pouryiki vaitang.

Kavaitei vaikimatulo, Dwijei teikaa matulo, Kemlungto mage hanggotei, Ahnyi go nangna
keibui.

2. Kem kimah kamyitei nado, Magesa saasa leile, Lungswi laksa koisa leile, Kavaitei dounyi
sana.

3. Goh kangmei goma meebung tei, Chengkido vai makiihlo, Myi eisa gahkasu jaangpii,
Gomah kavai matilo.

title: THE HANDWRITING ON THE WALL
details: . (S.S. 432) DAN. 5 : 5. WORDS AND MUSIC by
lyrics:
KNOWLES SHAW,1834-1818 ARR. IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY F.
1.Belshazer mah takbei ki sagong tang tang nduisa, Kamatei sana pekkikii jou keisa
sakmatusa, Tinghum matang saksa ntahsa kaleiki teito, Kamadat kahing bai nina mbaang
kito mangoupyi.

Bangpii bai kasang teipiina (Bangpii bai kasang gek ryi kapyi tei) Mbaang kito ryi kapyi tei
(mbaang kika ryi kapyi gek hangtei) Meikado tamti sutakle meikado fiiti sutak Mbaang kito
karyi gek hangtei (mbaang kito karyi gek ryi kapyi tei)
2.Jailki kalei Danielna kisoi gamto satsana, Sagong doito satwosana ryikabam gek fiipyile,
Ryikabam tei fiipatsa tchiigat piina tampyile, Sazyipou sagonghang gahtak, eitoi tinghum
gahtakle.
3.Nyigo tchiikapyi piina eitoi katang ryisa lei, Kem kapung meihang Jesugo malumsa
manaloilo, Kem meigo tchiimagah tang karamtei naleitakle, Meihang mah ngamtaktei suisa
mbaang kito ryimangou.

title: THE GREAT PHYSICIAN
details:
. (S.S. 89 ) MATT. 28 : 20. W. M. HUNTER, 1811-1877 J.W.
STOCKTON.
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Peimhii kati naatei leile, Ahzheitei Jesu teile Kalak rangii tchii ntah pyi Teipii Jesuda
liitde.

Lungkasyi liitei tchiide, Lungkasyi rasam tamde, Jesuna Sagong tangle Lungkasyi Pumpiile.

2. Gohkamaa matumpii gahpyi; Liitde Jesuna latlei, Satinggam ntahsa kiine, Pumpiina satoi
pyitang.

3. Kataigo ngamkalu Jesu; Ahtei nyihang Pumpiile, Keikapyi Pumpiigo lungsyi, Nyikem
jaangpii taipyile.

4. Zaiteipii kamaa gahpyile, Gah kapyitei Jesule; Jesuzhei shiikalu kito, Ntahle goh rangiina.

title: THE LIGHT OF THE WORLD IS JESUS
details:
. (S.S. 417) JOHN 12:46. P.P.B. P.P. BLISS,1838-
1876
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi kemteina myi eitakle, Sazyipou kavai Jesule, Tingna leimikna kavai kumpii
vaile, Sazyipou kavai Jesule.

Liitlo liitlo kavaiki liitlo, Kabi kavai tei nyimah tangle, Gohmik kachet teido ngoutakle
Sazyipou kavai Jesule.

2. Jesu malum dichii kamyi gahtangle. Sazyipou kavai Jesule, Jesutei suidichii kavai
doutangle, Sazyipou kavai Jesule.

3. Gonyi gonii kemteina myi eitakle, Sazyipou kavai Jesule Pumpii samtei suilo gomek
ngoutangle Sazyipou kavai Jesule.

4. Sating gamto leimek kavai gahlakle, Sating gam kavai Jesule Jesuna sana namdi kavai
teile, Sating gam kavai Jesule.

title: JESUS ONLY
details:
. (S. S. 711) MATT. 17: 8. H. M. CONREY. 1862-1929 R. LOWRY,1826-1899
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kamyisum kamajung kakto, I roinapii katat ki, Meikagodo ngoumak kido, keikapyi Ina
tile, Jesuroi Jesuroina lei, gojaangpii kahing gahle, Pumpiitei kavai leimikle, Bethlehem
sageitile.

2. I na katatlyi hangkitei, kaset kalak doukido; Raleidwi patsa magesa, kamaning ntak
doumak, Teitchii kido Jesu doito, I na kantak doule Pumpii tei puidiku hiipai, Sharon mah
hiipai teile.

3. Ina kamage tinglangki, lungkasyi maning kapyi, Gohmah kamage mangeisa, ka ntah
tinglang doule, Jesugo Ina kadousa, tinglangtei goh kasuipyi, Manglamto Ahgo ngouwosa,
na rakot meina pangtat.

title: I AM RESOLVED NO LONGER TO LINGER
details:
. (M.H. 235) ACTS 9:19,20 PALMER
HARTSOUGH.1844-1932 J. H. FILLMORE,1849-1936
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi ntah rangaa tei Ina mareiloi lakle, Kisa bikaki kisa dikaki tei, Ina titakle.

Jesu n'go malumle, Daziika ntah Sagoi kaki nyi Pumpii I gong leile.

2. Keikapyipii kasui lungtang karam, Gohkem mateipyi tak, Kasang mah Pumpii kamatei
Pumpii, Ahgo kasui lungtang.

3. Sating gamki I na liittang karam, Kemgo tei ngou roule, Meina ngou rousa namsa leikido I
na nlei lakle.

4. Pumpii nangna tchiilo katu tchiitang, Tamlo katu tamtang, Karing mah puidi keikapyi
piile I Ahtei sui tangle.

title: JESUS WAS BORN AT BETHLEHEM
details:
. N. JOHNSON,1928-1983
KEY B
lyrics:
1. Matei kalei sating gam toisa, Doikashyi ma chiilung, Kaleiwosa kinapwi kumpii, Sazyipou
Ahna gong, Kem kapung mei sazyi poumei, Ka ntah leimik teile.

Jesugo Bethlehemto manah, Meihang manahloi tang karam, Meihangna manahloi tang
karam Jesu Bethlehem manah.

2. Bangpii Sagong naa sapfii mpou, Kokchyiki mazyi bam, Myikasu pwi Maryna lhungle,
Rangii kamatei na Judea ningkamtei vai sana Sageisong vaiki sana.

3. Bikaki ma zhei Pumpii Sagong, Jesu Ahma zheile, Ka ntah mah sating gam toisa, Rangii tei
pyinesa, Tingnei leimik manah takle, Sagong hangmah sagongle.

title: WILL YOU MEET ME IN THE MORNING?
details:
(S.S. 1007) MATT. 25.34. E.O.E, 1851-1921
E.O. EXCELL.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Tingchoi n'go kadou tangpo? Sana namdi kiteito Gohmah meebung tei seisana, Pumpiina
kagong kitei. Nle I go kadouleng tang
Part- (Douleng tangle, douleng tangle) Pumpiina kalat kitei (Pumpiina kalat tinglangki)
Kadaa tchiikapyi kiteito (Kadaa tchii, kapyi kiteito) Gonghumlo keikapyi mei (Gonghumlo
keikapyimei meihang gonglo).

2. Kamong kagah tingchoi tinglang, I n'go douleng tangle Jesugo kasuisa roitang, Kalui
gahsa lhungtangle.

3. Jesugo nyina kangou kak, Tinglangki ka ntah tei, Nyi meihang ndui katuki Ka ntah
tampeiwo lak.

4. Kasoimei rangii ntahtang Pumpiigo lungkasyi mei Pumpiina kalangsa gongpyi Nyihang
go latgong tangle.

title: LET US WALK IN THE LIGHT
details:
. (S. S. 631) MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 Arr. by IRA
D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Keikapyi kavai hangnina Paryi lamto humle Bangpii teina maang kapyile Teimah mee
kavai tei.

Paktude… Kavaiki… (2 times)
Pumpii Ahma kavai kitei

2. Ngou Kasagah kavai nina Nyimah doilam leile. Kavai teina seisa leitang Kamakum
gahsana.

3. Kamatei kavai hangnina Eitoi nyina ngoule Ngou kasagah namdi mah kong Kavaipii
vaipyile.

 4. Lungkasyi kavai hangnina Vaisana leihumle Vailo vailo rangii jaangpii Kalui gahsa vailo.

title: THE GOSPEL BELLS
details:
. (S.S. 356) JOHN 3:16. S.W.M,1862-1935 S. WESLEY MARTIN.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Sampao kabi pung laklei, sazyi pouryi maguisa, Matahpii kapyi keikapyi, gojaang
gohjaang piinale, ‘Sazyipou lungsyisa, Bangpiina naago pyile, Ahgo kamalum mei teina,
karing rangii doutangle’.

Pao kabi… saasa lei… Sazyipou maguisana, Pao kabi… Ahna pyi… Gohmah, goma, ahma le.

2. Sampao kabi pung laklei, takbei jaangpiina latlei, Meikado gongkasu tchiisu, gongsa tak
chiisei humlo, ‘Oh pwiwo karingmah, kachii kashak teisekle, Gomah kemtei gaangsa leido,
sabwikum haamatu tang’.

3. Sampao kabi pung laklei, sating kataa latsa lei, Rangii keikapyi doukalu, rijusulo gohkang
mei, ‘Taikasu pakwolo, ningkamki n'taksulo, Teilam ju n'leigong sulo, gonyi tai eitang takle’.

4. Sampao kabi pung laklei, gongtang kasu nam gahle, Ahaa kalaang mah samsekle, keikapyi
paiki teito, ‘Mei matum hang jaangpii, sampao kabi pung gonglei, Gonyi jaangpii Pumpii
Jesu, keikapyi lungpyi takle’.

title: THE NAIL- SCARED HAND
details:
. (M.H. 291) B.B. MCK.,1886-1952 B.B. MCKINNEY.
KEY F
1 Gomah kamaning tei gongtang supiina Lung kamage sana leipo? Kamajung pyikabuitei
kaki gahle Keikapyitei Jesu roile.
Ahbaiki jotpyi jum julo Gobai teipii dengsa julo Ahroinale gojaangpii lungsyi kapyi Kang
kakitei meido gahle.
lyrics:
2. Sazyi pouna toisa lungmage leipo? Gomekdwi humsa leikido Jesuteina latsa leile
gongliitlo Gopot masui poimaang pyine.

3. Katei puidi nangroinapii tatleipo? Kamarong zing zing puidito, Jesuna latleile gohda
gonghumlo Akang hemeitei gahlakle.

title: LIFE AT BEST IS VERY BRIEF
details:
. ((S.S. 437) ANON PS. 144: 4.
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Meilui kalung chiilung ei, sazyi pouryi tinglangna, Mikhiit ninago roina njoile, tingnouniih
ngalyi kumpii, Riibuina myikalei kum, sazyiki huihum kalei kumtangle.

Kalanglo….. Kalanglo! Jesuna latsa kaleikak kalanglo. Nang riju beidi eichii, Kikamtei latpyi
lakle. Nangna latsa leikido ritangle.

2. Karanu katu eido, rahang ralii katudo Chiilung tei ranusa leihum wolak, Pumpiima rangii
teina, n'go latsa kaleiki, Rangii zhei keitang karam tchiidaalo

3. Tinglangna tukalei tei, meikado koiwolakle, Katai tinglang tei gongsa leitakle, Sam
tchiitang karam leimik, tinglangtei gongkasuki, Rangii ringkabui jaangpii tchiidaalo.

4. Kem kapung mei gonyihang, tamkalei tei shiipyilo, Malumsa gongliit wolo kalanglo,
Gonyimah Pumpii teina, lungmaang katu tchiisana Sating gam puidi fiihlo, kalanglo.

title: WHAT A FRIEND WE HAVE
details:
. (S. S . 319) JOSEPH. SCRIVEN,1820-1886 PROV. 18 : 24. C.
C. CONVERSE,1832-1918
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Jesu gohkang kasang tchiisa, gohkem tchiimatei pyile, Gohswi kalak kamagedo, Pumpiina
tchiimateipyi, Kamage kalak tinglangki, Jesugo ratatangle; Kadapo dichii Pumpiina, kalak
ntahdo tile.

2. Kahemtei kagong tinglangki, Pumpiigo ratatangle, Kadapo dichii Pumpiina, kahem gotei
ngamtangle, Kasang kanghetei doulakpo, masuipot pungha kabui? Ahna nyigo ragupyi tang,
Ahna nyigo keipyitang.

3. Nang potmasui pungsa leipo, gopottei ntak pyine, Maikating Pumpii nyida lei, Pumpiigo
ratatangle, Kanghe meina toi eikido, Pumpiigo ratahum tang, Ahbai teipiina gompyisa
keikapyi tei doutangle.

title: LOYALTY TO CHRIST
details:
. (S. S. 1102) JN. 2: 5. E. T. CASSELL. 1849-1930 FLORA H.
CASSELL.1852-1911
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Leimek kaliit lamto peirah kajatsana, Khrista lamtei gojutei nryi gongsana, Tinghum
tingna taksupii lii tchiihum sana Khrista jaangpii gopeetei ntaksupii gonglo.

Ngam Kalu saalo, ngam kalu saalo, Nyigo Ahna latleile, Ahma samtei suisa, sazyitei
poitangle, Nlei supii sattangle, Ahtei mahum teipii.

2. Kateih saryi meihang, latkalei tei shiilo, Khrista jaangpii ngamkalu tei, nyihang teile.

Kahem mah peirah tei kajatlei lougamto, Ngam kaluma bwika kong kalei tei shiitangle

3. Teimahum kaleihang Jesuda pyitangle, Khrista goroina Jusa mpat pyilakle Sazyi pouryi
bamhang lamryi lamkaa matum Ngam kaluma saryi samtei hangda tampyilo.

title: I KNOW WHOM I HAVE BELIEVED
details:
. ((A. H. 148) 2 TIM. 1: 12. EL. NATHAN, 1840-1901
JAMES MCGRANAHAN,1840-1907
KEY E FLAT. Moderatto.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii Ahma lungkasyi tei, N'goh dakumpii pyi! Khristana n'goh lungsyi pyi, Maning
kido doumak.

Ina tile ti kasang takle, Keikapyi ngamtei madou supiina, Gohmah taa katchii matumtei,
Teipiinei tampat pyitang.

2. Keikapyi masam kamalum N'goh dakumpii pyi, Ahgo kamalum jaangpiina Gohlung
majung doule.

3. Kamagedo ka ntahdo, Gohjaangpii dapei lei Ahna tchiidapyi kabamtei, Ina titang lakle.

4. Neika Ahna latgong tangle, Madou supii gongtang, Kadadou tinglang ki tangpo, Tinghum
tingna timak.

title: WE'VE A STORY TO TELL TO THE NATIONS
details:
. (R.S.636) MATT. 28: 18,20 COLIN STERN
H. ERNEST NICHOL
KEY F. UNISION
lyrics:
1. Nyina tamtamg karam rasam leile, Kasangki pangliit tangkaram, Lungsyi kati kasang
rasam, (Kavai kamajung rasam). (2 times)
 Harmony:- Kamyi hangteido vaitu tangle, Kavaipii vaimarang pyitang, Pumpii Sagong sazyi
gongtangle, Ahlung kasyi kavai tei.

Unison:- Kamyi humteido vaitu tangle, Kavaipii vaimaraang pyitang.

Harmony:- Pumpii Sagong sazyi gongtangle, Ahlung kasyi kavaitei

2. Nyina meidah lii tchiitang karam lei, Pumpiida pangliit tangkaram, Kashyi kahem akahng
angii, (Ngam chiitang karam alii). (2 times)

3. Nyina kabisam tamtang karam lei, Pumpii ma karing rasamtei, Keikapyi piimah rasamtei,
(Pumpii ma lungkasyi sam). ( 2 times)

4. Nyigo keikapyi meidah mangoude, Kem tchiimagah kapyi piigo, Sazyi pouryi na
kasangtak, (Pumpiidah gongtang karam). (2 times)

title: WHAT MUST IT BE TO BE THERE !
details:
(S. S. 923) MRS. E. MILLS. REV. 21: 4. GEO. C.
STEBBINS1846-1945
KEY C.
1 Nyina razangsa kaleitei, Ngoukabi kavai sazyile, Teibamki gongtang karammei, Kada
kumpiina gong tangpo? Gong nyile teibamki, Kada kumpiina gong tangpo? (2 times)
lyrics:
2. Kazang jyibam puidi kitei, Sana songdo vaisa leile, Tampai kalak madat bamni, Kada
kumpiina gong tangpo?

3. Kakui kamaa kagah bamki, Kahem kalak kagah bamni, Gonglhung tangkaram meihang
tei, Kada kumpiina gong tangpo?

4. Kemki teito patwosana, Kahem kamage koi kamoi, Kaset kalakdo tchiimakle, Teibam
kitei dakum tangpo?

title: THE LORD IS MY SHEPHERD
details:
. (R.S. 610) LEONARD WEAVER. M. E. UPHAM.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ina lungsyile keikapyi piigo, Ahma lungkasyi tei tamwo lakle, Cross paryito taipyi zaido
patpyile; Lungkasyi kito I lhung tutangle.

Sating kata Jesuteih suitangle, Ahna koipyisa doikashyi doumak, Tinghum tingna katutei
gahle, Jesu n'goh keikapyipii teile.

2. Karanu chiitaktei nyigo pyile, Dwi kamatei bamki panggong pyile, Ahma lungset teido
nyigo maang pyile, Ahna koipyisa kahing gahtakle.

3. Ina puidi rahsa tattu kido Ahna kasang puidiki pangtat pyi! Kamyi ningkamki todo
pangtat pyile, N'goh koipyisa pangtat pyihumle.

4. Sazyi pouryi ngam luikalei teito, Ahna sagah bamki pangkei pyitang; Teito Ina sagahsa
lhungtuh tangle, Lungkasyi kangmeigo kasui lhungtang.

title: THE LORD'S MY SHEPHERD
details:
. (G.H.F. 293) F. ROUS. JESSIE S. IRVINE1836-1887
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Pumpii n'goh keikapyipii Ina makii lakle Chiitak kabi dwipok kabi Kitei pangkei pyilo.

2. Gohmah rangii keipat pyisa Kasang puidi kitei Sating kataa n'goh pangtat Ahzhei kadi
jaangpii.

3. Katai katchiih ki liitkido Kahingtei leilakle Pumpii goma koktui teipii N'goh kasui pyilo.

4. Kachii kashak tchiidaa pyisa Juhkarou meidoito Gohpyiki thao manuk pyisa Ka ntahpii
tokryi.

5. Lung kamanoi lungkasyipii Goteih suitat humtang Bangpii keelam kakiih piinei
Magahsupii lhungtang.

title: THE OLD RUGGED CROSS
details:
. (GGSH. 65) HEB.12:2 G. B.,1873-1958 REV. GEO.
BENNARD1873-1958
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kem kapung meijaangpii Jesuna taipyile, Cross tei daziika shyi eitakpo? Ka nrou
kahingpii juhkarou samteipii, Teikido I na lungsyi humtang.

Cross gotei Ina lungsyi humtang Katai katangpii maning humtang, Ngoukahing kamage
Cross teito, Neika pyihung teidou lengtangle.

2. Sazyi pouna toikalei Cross mah kavaitei! Kadaziika madat eitakpo? Sating gammah
jaonaa Ahma keetoi eisa, Calvaryto taikapyi gongle.

3. Ngoukahing Cross gotei I na lungsyi humtang, Nrou kido I na punghum tang, Tingneika
Pumpiina n'goh latgong tangle, Ahma ntah kitei gonglosa.

title: THE PRECIOUS NAME
details:
. (RS.465) Ps. 72: 19. MRS. LYDIA BAXTER,1809-1874 W. H.
DOANE,1832-1915
KEY A FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesu zheigotei maninglo, Kaset kalak kadoumei, Ntah rangaatei pyitangle, Ahgotei kasui
dichii.

Kabizhei, lungsyile, Maningki doule kabi, Kabizhei, lungsyile, Sating gamto ntah tang.

2. Jesu zheigotei toisulo, Meilui kalunghang jumlo Kahem gongkadou tukido, Jesu zheigo
maninglo.

3. Oh, kabi Jesu zheigotei, Shiiki lung ntah takle. Ahna nyigo lukakei kak Jesu zheigo
maninglo.

 4. Jesu zhei shiikalu hangna, Ahpee bangto koutangle, Sating gam pihkalu piinei Sagong
pyihung keipyine.

title: THE SAVIOUR'S CALL
details:
. (H.P. 115) VONTA PATRICK. WILL W. SLATES.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Koikinglo Pumpiina lungsyi sanii n'go latlei, Kalangsanii Ahdah gonglo, He kemkapung
meihang!

Gonglo… gonglo… N'go… latlei, He kemkapung meihang, Gojaang piina… azai kapat… Nang
malum makpo rei?

2. Rangii laksa kalei meihang Pumpiina latleile, Oh, nang Ahdah gong ntakchii Kaset gahpyi
tangle.

3. Ahna kamwi latpyilosa, n'go latsa leile, Ahlung kasyitei poiwolo, Kemtei gahpyi takle.

4. Ntah rangaabam kiteito, Ahsam kasui meigo; Gonglo datchiisa pakleipo? Nang sadoi
shyinyipo?

title: WE'LL MEET EACH OTHER THERE!
details:
((S.S. 939) I THESS. 4. 17. R. L. R. LOWRY,1826-
1899
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Leimek liit majitangle, Nyingam tchiilui kasuki, Rangii mage beidi kasuki, Neikana nyi
Pumpiina Nyigo gong makeng pyisa, Zion zangto gong kadou tangle.

Nyihang kadou tangle, Zion mah bamki teito, Pumpiima pumtei kavai, Ngou kabi bamki
teito, Nyihang kadou tangle, Pumpiima pumtei kavai, Nyimeihang mah tchiitangle.
2.Kamyima kamou teina, Tingkei tingrot tchiimatu, Kamwitei kamyipii dangneisa,
Pumpiina kadaa tchiisa, Sagong mah sazyi kitei, Tingkei tingrot katu leiloilak.

3. Mikdwi patsa leikido, Rangii laksa leikido, Sazyipouryi nrong leikido, Pumpiina kagong
kitei, Ahma keetei pang gongsa, Kaset kalaktei douloi keilak.

title: WHAT DID HE DO?
details:
((RS. 881) HEB. 7:25. JAMES M. GRAY, 1851-1935 W. OWEN.
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Kamadat rasam tei shiipyilo, Gahkalei meigo fiihlei, Sating gamto Ahna humpyisa,
Nyihang go keipyi takle.

S.P. Tana nyihang go keipyipo?

Part. Nyi Bangpii naa Jesunale
S.P. Dapei tchiipyi?

Part. Gojaangpii tai,
S.P. Ah daki lei
Part. Sating gam lei
All. Satinggam nleitu tak.

2. Rangii matei bamnyi pihwolak, Ah sagoi kaki piile; Cross paryito gikalei Ahtei; Bangpii
naa Jesu teile.

3. Sam hangtei kasangpii pat eitak. Goswiki tikei pyilo Sating gamto sat kapyipii tei, Nyimei
hang Pumpii Ahle.

4. Keikapyipii go nang mazhiipo? Nlei gonglo Pumpiida; Nangdo Ahma lungsyi kapyitei,
Tidichii keipyi tangle.

title: WHAT A WONDERFUL SAVIOUR!
details:
(S. S. 119) E. A. H. E. A. HOFFMAN,1839-1929
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Khrista kemjaang piina gongpyi, Koikapyipii sekle, Gahkasuma meitei pyitakle, Keikapyi
Pumpii teina.

Bikaki Pumpii lungkasyi, Tei Jesu sekle, Bikaki Pumpii lungkasyi, Tei Jesule.

2. Matei kapyi zheigo toile, Koikapyipii sekle Pumpii rangii kei kapyipiile, Koikapyi pumpii
teile.

3. Gohkem matum matei pyile, Koikapyi Pumpiina, Ahna Sagong hangmah pumteile,
Koikapyi Pumpii teina.

4. Kangam teimahum n'goh pyi, Koikapyi Pumpiina, Tinglang hangkitei ngam matule,
Koikapyi Pumpii teina.

title: THE SONG OF THE SOLDIER
details:
. (S.S. 1174) II TIM 2 : 3. Arr. from FALKNER 1723 -?
JAMES MCGRANAHAN. 1840-1907
KEY B FLAT.
1.Tuhlo Khrista teih kasui mei, Kakui kamaa kagah mei, Tchiidaa wolo katei saryi Zion
zangtei natakle
Saatude kateih saryi lat, karyidwi kalohng kumpii, Keikapyi Khrista zhei paito, nyihangna
ngamtang takle, Saatude kateih saryi, karyidwi kalohng kumpii, Keikapyi Khrista zhei paito,
nyihangna ngamtang takle.
lyrics:
2. Kateih saryi meihang teina, Doireisa tatlei takle, Juhlo ahnyi baitui hangtei, Jesu zhei
paito ngamtang.

3. Nyina kataigo hingsude, Khristana nyigo keipyi Pumpiina kagong tinglangki, Ahtei kavai
doutangle.

4. Nyi Pumpii doi sattang takle, Ahtei mahum ngoutangle, Meihang Ahma satoi doutang,
Ahgo tammatoi tangle.

title: THE SOLID ROCK
lyrics:
1. Jesuma zaitei sumakpii, Malumtang karam kakigah. Sazyi pouryi sam suiwolak, Jesuma
zheigo malumtang.

Ina tukadi pou satlei, Kalui kagah tu Khristale Kaki matumpii nlumtang.

2. Kamyi teina vaangnei kido, Ahma lungkasyito ntak, Tingkei tingrot kagong kaktei I teih
nleitang karam gah.

3. Pyitoi kalei Azaiteipii Kem kiteito keipyitakle. Goh rangiigo keipyiwosa, Ahgo malumsa
ntah tang.

title: THE WHOLE WIDE WORLD
details:
. (C.S.S.35) MK. 13: 9- 13. J. D. HAMMOND. WM. J.
KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou baang maguisa Jesu jaangpii tchiitang, Azang dwijei kido sam ei gonghum
matulo; Sazyipou meihangna Ahgo rata matulo, Namdi kacheng kadido Jesuma humtangle.

Apei apow haa katangpii, Ahma sampao kabitei tampyi matulo, Meilui matum Pumpiigo
tam mpat kasudoika, Ahjaangpii Cross pungchii doi shyitang karam gah.

2. Sazyipou maguisana Jesu jaangpii tchiitang, Ahma zaipiina luwosa rangii ntahle; Swikak
swiryi sulo Cross kimah paiki teito, Sazyipou maguisana Jesu jaangpii tchiitang.

3. Sazyipou maguisana Jesu jaangpii tchiitang, Mei kadou hanggotei sampaotei tampyi
humlo; Ahma meihang teina sadoi kashyi gaatangle, Kamalum saryi tchiisa sazyipou ei
poitang.

4. Sazyipou maguisana Jesu jaangpii tchiitang, Goh Bangpii mahkito bamkatu kadaa
tchiibam; Apei apow meima kangammah mei matumpii, Goma tchiihum tangle, Sagong
hangmah Sagongtei.

title: THE WAY OF THE CROSS LEADS HOME
details: .( (R.S. 882) JESSIE BROWN POUNDS,1861-
lyrics:
1921 JOHN 22: 46. CHAS H. GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY A FLAT.
1.Gohkee maang tangkaram Cross puidisupii, Puidi kakitei gahle; Cross puidi teipiina
maangsu dichii, Kavai katutei ngoulakle.

Cross tei gohma puidile, Cross tei gohma puidile, Sating gamkee pitang karam jangpa, Cross
piina puidi tchiipyi.
2.Pumpiima zai jaohum katubam teito, Ina Juhsana tattang, Ahtei suisa pitang kalupiinei,
Pumpiima doito bamtangle.
3.Teiteitona Ina sazyi pouryito, Roitatsa leiloi keilak; Pumpiina n'goh latsa leitakle,
Ibamtang karam kee pitang.

title: WHEN THE ROLL IS CALLED UP YONDER
details:
. (S. S. 983) I COR. 15: 52. J. M. B. J. M. BLACK ,
1856-1938
KEY A FLAT. Moderato
lyrics:
1. Pumpiima ngoukasagah bwika tei kongsa kahumkak, Kalui tchiikasu kavaitei ngoutangle,
Kalei kalumei hangtei bam teituito gong nduitang, Zheitei fiihsa lat kagongki I bamne.

Pumpiina latkagong kaktei (3 times) Zheitei fiihsa lat kagongki I bamne.

2. Kamalum mei ringkakiih piinei matei sageitangle, Ringkalu piinei ngou kasagah tangle,
Ahnii kalei kalumei tei Ahpeebangto bamtangle, Teitui lat kagong kitei I leitangle.

3. Leimik tinglang kaleitah Ina Pumpii ngam tchiitangle, Goh mwipiinado Ahjaangpii
tamtangle; Sazyi pouryima ngam chiilung matumtei lui ei sana, Teitui lat kagong kitei I
leitangle.

title: THERE IS A GREEN HILL FAR AWAY
details:
. (C.W. 230) JOHN 19:16. CECIL F.
ALEXANDER,1818-1895 G.C. STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY E. In moderate time.
lyrics:
1. Zang kacheng hangnina leile, Jesu taitang karam. Nang I gohjaangpii Cross pungpyi,
Nyigo keipyi nesa.

Oh daziika lungsyi pyiipo? Nyinado lungsyile, Hum pyikalei Ahzai gotei, Malumsa ngam
tchiide.

2. Daziika magesa teipo? Nyina titang makle, Peebai kika jotpyi gehsa, Ting paryika gile.

3. Kemmei gotei keipyi nesa Ahna teipyi takle, Sating gam pihkabui jaangpii, Mai kating
zaipatpyi.

4. Meikanado rui pyilakle, Kemmah pougong gotei Jesuna kamwi latpyile, Sating gam
liitkabui.

title: THE WONDERFUL STORY
details:
. (S. S. 73) C.H.G. PS. 89:1. CHAS. H.GABRIEL,1856-1932
KEY D FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Jesu Khrista mah kabi raasam Meilui kalung hanggo lungsyi, Kem jaangpii Ahna teipyi
takle, Ina tamsa tamloi keine.

Kisa kisa madat rasamtei, Jesuna nyigo ralipyi, Kamadat raasam mateikito I sattangle. Ahna
n'goh pangpyi tangle.

2. Ahna kem gahpyi nesa gongle, Zaipatsa kalei pyitakle, Kalui tchiikasu karing pyine,
Keipyi kabui Pumpii teina.

3. Ahtei lungkasyi kalui tchiimak, Lungkasyi matapii pyile, Nyina marei hangtei pyileile,
Kalui tchiisupii keipyile.

title: TRUST, TRY AND PROVE ME
details:
. ((M. H. 449) L. S. L. LIDA S. LEECH.1873-1962
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. ABangpii mah njeitei poigonglo, Leikalei doukalu njeitei, Poigongsa Pumpiigo malum
katu, Lungkasyi latteipii lat kalei kak.

“N'go... juhsa Lungkasyi ngamdo hakalaang satoi kapyido, Nangna titangle, Tiwosa malum
tangle”

2. Gomah swikak swiryisa kaleiki, Lungkasyi mah baipii goh keipyi, Keipyisa n'goh eitchiisa
tamle; “Gohda gongliitsa nang tikeiwolo”

3. I eitoi Ahgo malum wotakle; Kaleihang teido Ahma humle, Ahjaangpii maakado kamachii
gah; Ahna n'goh lungsyi pyisa leile.

title: WOULD YOU BE FREE ?
details:
(S. S. 145) I JN. 1: 7. L. E. J.1865-1936 L. E. JONES.
KEY B FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Gokem hangtei tchiimagah nyimakpo? Pumpii Jesutei mahum leile, Nang kahem doiteito
leihum tangpo? Jesu zaiki teimahumlei.

Teimahum lei, Jesu zaikitei, Kamadat jao zaiki, teimahum lei, Jesu zaikitei, Ahdato gong
kamaa gahlo.

2. Goma kemngam hangtei toinyi makpo? Jesu zaiki teimahum leile. Calvary gamto gong
tchii mateilo, Jesu zaiki teimahum lei.

3. Nang sabwisong teido haanyi makpo? Jesu zaiki teimahum leile, Kem kapungmei hangtei
gahhum tangle Jesu zaiki teimahum lei.

4. Nang Jesu Sagong ngam tchiinyi makpo? Jesu zaiki teimahum leile, Ahgo tammatoi lii
tchiinyi makpo? Jesu zaiki teimahum lei.

title: WEEPINGWILL NOT SAVE ME !
details:
((S.S. 337) EPH. 2: 8. R. L. REV. R. LOWRY,1826-1899
KEY E FLAT
lyrics:
1. Hatkido keiwolak; Mikdwi tei humsa leido, Kahingtei makiilakle, Kemtei magah
peiwolak; Hatkido keiwolak!

Gohjaangpii Jesu hatle, Gohjaangpii Jesu teile, Kemtei gaapyii tangkaram Jesu Ahroinale.

2. Ngam teipii keiwolak! Ngam tchiikati teipiina, Swi maning katipiina, Goh rangii
keiwolakle; Ngam teipii keiwolak!

3. Koileido keiwolak! Makado tchiiwo lakle Lungkasyi lattei shiisa; Ribeidichii gahtangle,
Koileido keiwolak!

4. Malum paito keibui! Khristago n'nii dichii, Ahsamtei suiwo dichii, Pumpiigo malum
dichii; Malum paito keibui!

title: WHEN THEY RING THE GOLDEN BELLS
details:
. (M.H. 422) ANON DION DE MARBELLE.
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Sazyi kabi hangnina lei, Ka ntah kalui tchiikasu; Teibam kitei kamalum meina maangtang,
Sating gamtei gongliit wosa, Katai katu leiloilakle; Nyihang jaangpiina sanapung kalakki.

Shiitangpo, laksa kaleitei? Shiitangpo, sating gam ma lii? Ka ntah mah halleluyah jubilee!

Kalui tchiikasu namdibam Kavai mah bamki kagong kak Nyihang jaangpiina sanapung tei
laktang.

2. Sating gam nyihang kagong kak, Kamage leiloi keilakle, Se sana dwibam kutei
suimaangsana; Nyihang kadoutang keikapyi, Sating gam gohpfii dateito, Nyihang jaangpiina
sanapung kalakki.

3. Sazyi poutei gah eisana, Ntah tinglang kagong kaktei; Sagahsa lungtang karam fiisa
liittang Potmasui matou eisana, Lungkasyi bamki maangtangle. Nyihang jaangpiina
sanapung kalakki.

title: THERE IS JOY
details: . (R.S. 461) LK. 15 : 7. MARGARET MOODY. W. A. OGDEN. 1841-1897
lyrics:
KEY C.
1.Kem kapungmei manaloi katukak, Ntahle! Ntahle! Pumpiilam juh nryi gong katukak
Daziika ntahtang!

Kemkito manaloi wosa, Pumpiida kagong kaktei, Rakotmei nado ntah lei, Meihang ntahlii
tchiide.
2.Rangiima manaloi kalukak tei, Ntahle! Ntahle! Bible samsuisa katat tinglang kak, Daziika
ntahtang!
3.Kamajung karyiki kamaang kaktei, Ntahle! Ntahle! Nam teiki lungkalu tinglang kaktei,
Daziika ntahtang!

title: THEY SING A NEW SONG
details:
. (S.S. 1020) REV. 5: 13. JULIA H. JOHNSTON,1849-1919 P.
BILHORN,1865-1936
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Keikapyi doukalu rangii matumpii, Pumpii Sagong doito bamsa lii tchiilei, Kalak kaniih
lungmage mangeisana, Satinggam rakot kasuisa lii tchiilei.

Jesu zheikito, Lii tchiisalei, (2 times) Jesu zheikito, Kalui gahsa, Tammatoi tang.

2. Ringloi kalumah lungkasyi lii katchii, Keiram kabi hiipai songdo lungsyiki, Kamyi
tinghum gotei maju wosana, Ngou kabi tingchoi songdo vaiki tangle.

3. Kamatei meiroina satinggam pihne, Lii tchii katimei hangteina lii tchiitang, Teijaangpii
Pumpii nyigo rali pyilo, Ka ntahlii katchiiki nyido heine.

title: WHEN WE ALL GET TO HEAVEN
details:
. (R. S. 400) E. E. HEWITT,1851-1920 MRS. J. G.
WILLSON.
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Jesu lungkasyi lii tchiilo, Ahlung kasyitei tamlo; Vaikabi satoi kapyibam, nyihangna
doutang.

Nyi satinggam kakiiki, teipiinei leimiktei ntahtangle. Jesugo kangouki, nyi saasa kangam lii
tchiitang.

2. Kabisam tamsa katatki, kaset kalak douchiido; Sazyipou kaamaju patchii, ntah doutangle.

3. Nyihang kasanggo malumde, kasang taatei tchiitude, Kalui kagah ka ntahmah, taksupii
doutang.

4. Nyina doutang karam sazyi, kitei pihmanang sekchii, Sating gam kamwi latpyitang, nyigo
liittuh tang.

title: OH, WHERE ARE THE REAPERS ?
details:
(C. H. 620) MT. 9:37,38 EBEN E. REXFORD. GEORGE
F. ROOT,1820-1895
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Rachet tang karammei daki leipo? Kamatei meigo kalei tangkaram Kadou tei poisa lutei
gattulo. Rachetlui kasutaa ntaksulo.

Rachet tangkaram mei dakilei, Ntah rachet kitei heitang karammei, Ta tana rachet ki
heitangpo? Matei meigo kaleitang karam.

2. Sazyi pouryi hangki maangsa fiilo, Rhiima kakto kalei rhiibui gotei, Meikagodo toisupii
pang gonglo, Meihang go sating gamki pangkeilo.

3. Lubam kaditei myisa leitakle, Rachettang karam tinglang gongtakle, Lurachet tangkaram
meikado gah, Rachet supii magah maleitangpo?

4. Rachet tangkaram kadou poigonglo, Sona rhiibuitei poi nduitulo, Pumpii gong kasuta
ngamtei tchiilo, Ka ntah takbei bamtei doutangle.

title: THIS IS OUR ENDEAVOUR
details:
. ( S.S. 1118) MATT. 25.40. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-
1915. IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Kamage meigo swi tchii ntah kapyi, Hatsii kalei meigo tchii ntah kapyi; Mage kalei jaonaa
gotei fii wosii Jao koiki lat kagong, nyihangmah ngamle.

2. Nyi meihang – gotei kabi tchiimatusii, Myisii kalei meigo poi matu kapyi; Mage meigo
tchiikaha nyimah ngamle; Bangpii ma kamarei nyihang mah ngamle.

3. Kaset mai pyitang lesa tam katu lei, Malum mei ngou kabi peitei basanii Bangpiigo
kasuisii lhungsii lei tangle; Nyihangnii mang tangle, doilam pang tatlo.

title: THEYTHAT WAIT UPON THE LORD
details:
. (S.S.753) IS. 40:31. G.M.J.1840-1907
J.MCGRANAHAN.
KEY A FLAT. Allegretto
lyrics:
1. Alu kagat bamki kaleimei, Gonyi swicheng sulo, Lu Pumpiida teito kaang wolo,
Teimahum pyitangle.

Pumpiigo koikalei mei na, Teimahum doutang, Kashii keipyi tangle, Kalaang kumpii jongtat
buile, Ahnyitei mageloilakle jongsa tatsa leikido, Ahnyitei mage kei lakle mage loikei lakle.

Ahnyitei mageloi lakle, mage loi laktakle.

2. Dajaangpiina mageloi tangpo? Lungswi chengtuh sulo, Ringkalei Khristago malumsa,
Lungswi tei cheng sulo.

3. Ntahlo Ahna kasui pyitang, Katai katang piina, Teihsana doilam tei tattulo, Ahna kasuipyi
tang.

title: WILLYOUR ANCHOR HOLD ?
details:
(S. S. 879) HEB. 6: 19. PRESCILLA J. OWENS,1829-1907
WM. J. KIRKPATRICK,1838-1921
KEY F.
lyrics:
1. Gomah rangii kamyi kemlung teito Jyikalei kiteito gongkii lakpo? Kemma dwijai kaditei
ditukak, Goma lungswitei hingsang hinglakpo?

Nyina maning kitei rangiilei Tudi paryiki tchiikabam tei, Tingkei tingrot gongdo nleimak
Pumpiina meihang gotei lungsyile.

2. Tingkei tingrot kagong bamki teido Pumpii baizii teipiina keipyile Rangii kamatei
gohlungki humpyi Kamalum teimahumpii keipyile.

3. Ahna keipyile kahing bamkito Pangtatpyi sadoi kashyi bamkido Tingkei tingrot kagong
tinglang kido Pumpiina nyihanggo ragupyile.

title: WHAT A GATHERING !
details:
(S. S. 159) GEN. 49: 10. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY, 1820-1915 IRA.
D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY C. Moderato.
lyrics:
1. Sanakumpii Kavai tingchoi tei, Jesuna gongdichii, Pumpiimah ngou kasagah tei
ngoutangle. Teitinglang ki kamalum meihang golat nduitangle. Keikapyi doukalu mei
kadoutangle.

Nduisa kasuisa bamtang. Pumpiigo lungkasyi meihang kadoutangle, Sating gam ntah bam
lungkasyi namtei, Keikapyi dou kalumei sating gamto.

2. Jesugo kamalum mei taikido ringloi keitangle. Kamyi row ninado adwijai kito, Gohpum
potpii sating gamto Pumpiigo kadou tangle Keikapyi doukalu mei kadoutangle.

3. Nyi mikpiina ngoukasagah sating gam ranam ngoutang. Teitui karyi ngou kaku tchiisa
longlei, Nyi kapak kaleimei hangtei gongsa kadouloi tangle, Eiziikapii lungkasyi ei leitangle.

4. Oh! Sagong Pumpiitei sazyipou gong manang leitakle Teitinglang ki satoi kapyi titangle.

Mikhiit ninakito leimik tei poikatei eitangle Teito Pumpiimah ntah tei titangle.

title: WHEN I SURVEY THE WONDROUS CROSS
details:
. (S.S. 115) GAL. 6 : 14. I. WATTS,1674-1748
E. MILLER,1735-1807
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina Cross mah paryito Taikapyi tei ngouwosana, Gohmah det katchii matumpii
Mahkado gahsang gahtakle.

2. Pumpiina kati sumakpii Ina det tchiikalu gahle; Pot matumtei mahkado gah, Toi eisa,
Pumpiigo pyitang.

3. Apee, abah, apyi heisa, Kaset kalak lungkasyi pyi, Hangnaa eipii kasuisana, Pumpiina
gohjaangpii taipyi.

4. Pumpii Jesu ma lungkasyi, Pumtei kavai Cross teipiina Gohmah kalei atei rangii Pumpii
Jesu jaangpii pyitang.

title: WHEN THE MISTS HAVE ROLLED AWAY
details:
. (S. S. 945) SONG. 2 : 17. ANNE HERBERT
( ARR.) IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY D. Moderato.
lyrics:
1. Kamongna gahsa zang ningkam hangma ngoukasagah tei, Tingchoi mah kavai teina
dwiparyito vaiki tangle, Teitinglang kaktei Bangpii ma kamadat kavai ngoutang, Kamong
kamyitei gah eichii meihang juh kangou tangle.

Ngou tangle… ngouleng tangle… Hangnina… roina lakle… Karanga tingchoi kavai nyina
ngoukalu piineitei, Matei tengsana ngoutangle kamong gakalei teihto.

2. Sazyi pouryi kaset kalak bamki teito bamsana, Tingkei tingrot ma kahung lungkamage
meihang gotei, Kasang kamajyi ma taatei tchiisa katat meihang go, Keikapyi piina pangwo
tangle kamong tei gahsekchii.

3. Pumpiina nyimei hanggo nleihum latkatu kaktei, Sagong ma doiteito nyi meihang gong
nduisa leitang, Keipyi kaluma liitei magah supii nyina tchiitang, Kamyi tei leiloilak takle
kamong gahkalei teihto.

title: WHERE MY SAVIOUR LEADS
details:
. (S. S. 544) PS. 139: 24. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1823-
1915. IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Ngoh keikapyi Pumpiina Ina katat bamlyi pangtat Pumpiina lungkasyi paito Ina Ahtei
suihum tang. Pumpii! I dalam suimaang tang;
Pumpii! I dalam suimaang tang; Pumpiina pangkatat kitei Ina Ahtei suihum tang.

2. Gohpuidi tei myi eisana, Mage Juhsa kalei kaktei N'gohtei tchii ntah pyile Ina Ahtei
suihum tang.

3. Gomah switei myi eikido, Kaset kalak kadou kido Pumpiina lungsyisa gompyi Teijaangpii
suihum tangle.

4. Kaset matou kalei piinei Pumpii keeto bamhum tangle Lungkasyi mah anam lungto,
Pumpii go kasuihum tang.

title: WHILE THE DAYS ARE GOING BY
details:
. (S.S. 802) ROM. 8:23 GEORGE COOPER, 19TH
CENTURY IRA D. SANKEY,1840-1908
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Lunglaksa kaleimei gonyi, ntah rangaa doutangle Pumpii lungkasyi kiteito, kamajung tei
doutangle Pumpii Ah swiki teika, nyimei hanggo mangoulo Ina karingta gomah teipii,
gosam suitangle
Eikaktei eikaktei (2 times) Ngou kabi katu gotei, Eikak tei tchiiloi buile

2. Pumpiina lungkasyi teina nyi mwipii tamwo lakle Kaset kalak kadou meigo, hatsa kalei
meigodo, Ntah rangatei pyile Ina kamarei hangtei Pumpii tinglang tei gongchii eisong kabi
doutangle

3. Lungkasyi gohkang goh hemei pumpiigo ratatude Kakui kamaa tingshang humtei,
satinggam ma jeimakle Nyi ngamtei kasang dichii sangsa Ahgo matalo Nang karingtei
doutangle, pumpiina lukei pyitang.

title: TRUSTING IN THE LORD
details:
. (TUNEA.H. 149) ARR. BY ADA R. HABERSHON. T.P.
WESTENDORF.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou kamarong bam eito Gohpfii N'go ratatang karam; Gonaameina tchiikabam kitei
Gongliit bamseilo.

Tchiimatei pyilo, Oh Pumpii! Gonaa meina pyikalei kitei Gozheigo nyihang malum; Keikapyi
Pumpii.

2. Jukarou saryimeina n'goh Kaset kalak kapyi tinglangki’ Kee eito Ngo ratatangle, Oh
Pumpii Sagong.

3. Kemteina tchiimage kaleikak, Gozhei jumsa ratahum tangle, Nyihangna kakaang
lukeikapyi, Pumpii nangroile.

title: WHILE SHEPHERDS WATCHED
details:
(S.S. 33) LK. 2: 10 N. TATE ESTE'S PSALTER.
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Jao kakoi mei Jaotei koisa, Tinghum kaleikito, Bangpii rangii matei humsa, Matumpii vai
takle.

2. Ahnyi hingsa kaleiki tei, Hingsupii shiipyilo, Ntah rangaa kabi samtei Gonyida pung
gonglei

3. Pumpii Jesu Khrista Ahtei, David meilui kito, Tingnei leimik manatakle. Sam tamsa
gongleile.

4. Ntah rangaa kabi samtei Gonyida pung gonglei Tingnei leimik manatakle. Sam tamsa
gongleile.

title: WHITHER , PILGRIMS, ARE YOU GOING ?
details:
((R.S. 681) ANON NUM. 10: 29. WM. B.
BRADBURY, 1816-1868
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Mbui tatsa kaleimei hang, Kadalam tatsa leipo? Bangpiina katamtei shiilo, Nyi meihangna
tattuh humde, Kamage kalak matumpii, maningsupiina tatlei, Ntah rangaa nlangsana,
Pihmanangsa leitakle.

2. Tamlo shiile daa maninglei, Teibamki maangtang suchii Kabi peimani pyihungdo,
Keikapyi piineitei pyitang Katai tchiikasu dwi humle, Rangii tei ntahtangle Jesu peebangto
bamtangle, Kalui tchiisupii lungtang.

3. Eizhiikapii razang sanii, katat teito hingmakpo? Kahing kachiihtei gahsa, ahnyi dato suisa
tatleile, Jesuna tinglang kaleitaatei, Ahnyigo pangtat pyi, Malumsa bai kajumsana, kabikitei
maang tangle.

4. Jugonglo puidi katatmei, nyi ei gongwolak takpo? Satinggam katu kitei, nyigo kasuisana
maangtangle, Gonglo gonglonang, kalangsana, kem gotei toi eisa, Kanghe meigo kasuiwolo,
matumpii gongwo buile.

title: SO NEAR TO THE KINGDOM
details:
. (Alex.91) C.D.MARTIN MK.12:34 CHAS H. GABRIEL.
DOH IS G.
lyrics:
1. Sating gam sazyi na kasangtak, Pumpii gongtang karam, Tei jaangpiina nang tchiidasana
koisa leilo.

Manang leitak sating gam sazyitei, Na kasang takle Sagong sazyitei, Ribeidi sulo Ahda
liittang karam, Sagong sazyi na sektakle.

2. Satinggam sazyi na kasangtak, Eitoi n'go latlei, Keikapyi piigo malumlo tinglang kaleita.

3. Satinggam sazyi na kasang tak, Kang meina latsalei, Karing kasagahtei pyitang karam
jaangpiina.

4. Satinggam sazyi na kasang tak, Kamwito satleitak, Go rangii gahtang karam kito keipyi
tangle.

title: THE SAVIOUR WITH ME
details:
. (RS.9) JOHN 10:4 Lizzie Edwards. Jno.R.Sweney.
DOH IS E
lyrics:
1. Pumpiigo tei mpat lakle, I roina tatwo lakle, Ahnii n'go kasui pyisa, Ahbaipii gompyi
tangle.

Rangii hing loilak takle, Ah bamki pangpi pyine, Rahkarii gahsa tattangle, Ntahsa suijou
tangle.

2. Pumpii gotei mpat lakle, Goh rangii hangka soihle, Ahmah lattei shiiwo sekchii, Ahgo
kadou wosekchii.

3. Jesu gotei mpat lakle, Ahkumpii kangmei gahle, Tingkei kashyi gongtukido, Ahnii
kasuipyi tangle.

4. Jesu gotei mpat lakle, Gohmah chiilung matumtei, Magekido ntah kido, Ahna kasui
pyitangle.

title: SOWING AND REAPING
details:
. (SS.1054) GAL.6:7 EMILY S. OAKEY. W.H. DOANE.
DOH IS G.
lyrics:
1. Meikangka tingchoi lui marou leitak, Ahnyina tingna lui marou leile, Ahnyina tingkiido lui
marousa leile, Tinghum lam lui marou meido heileile. (Dapei rachet tangpo?) (4times)

2. Kangka sampii taapii lui maroulei, Ahnyitei tingkei tingrot timakle, Kabi samtam
lungkasyi taa teipii nado, Kaset kalak lungtei tchii ntah pyile. (Kabi rachet tangle) (4 times)

3. Kangkana sazyi nriit ngam tchiilei, Kajyi kabam tchiisupii marou mei, Kamahat gahsa
lingkei kabamhum teido, Lutei myisa vai marangsa leitakle. (Malot moiki tangle) (4 times)

4. Kamyisum kavai kito marou mei, Kaset kamahat gahsa luimarou, Rakarhii rhiikasudo
marou kabam hangtei, Ranamki ting tukak lui marouteido. (Kalak mei doutang lak) (4
times)

title: I KNOWTHAT MY REDEEMER LIVETH
details:
. (RS.919) JESSIE H. BROWN. ROM.10:13 J.H.
FILLMORE.
KEY DB.
lyrics:
1. Kalei kapyipii ring takle, Ah sazyi pouryi nleihum tang, Kalui kagah karing pyile, Ah
lungset pumtei Ahna pyitang.

Ah ringkalei Ina titakle, Sazyi pouryi Pumpii tangle, Ahna karing nyigo pyitakle, Lungset
pumtei Ahna pyile.

2. Jesu samtei nlei lakle, Ahma samtam hangtei kasangle, Ahgo malumsa katei mei,
Pumpiigo kasuisa lung tuhtang.

3. Jesuna gohbam tchiida lei, Ahma bamki nyido gong tangle, Ahna n'goh lungsyi pyisa, Nlei
gongsa n'goh pang tangle.

title: TELL ME THE OLD, OLD STORY
details:
.(SS.1131) MISS HANKEY. EPH.3:19 W.H. DOANE.
DOH IS C
lyrics:
1. Jesu sam gohda tamlo I Ahsam shiinyile, I ngou kasu pot matumtei gohda tampyilo;
Rasam tamrali pyilo Ina naamei kumpii, Kasoi kaset Ile teimahum kagah Ile.

Jesu lungkasyi samtei (3 times) Gohda tam mangoulo.

2. Tchiigatpii tampyilo Ina tikalu tchiisa, I Ahsam tinyile kamadat keikapyi tei, Kemgo gah
kapyitei taksupii Ahsam tamlo, Mangai kalei jaangpii tingchoi kajikdwi longtang.

3. Jesu sam gohda tamlo kamanoipii tamlo, Keipyi nesa Jesuna humle kem jaangpiina,
Taksupii rali pyilo ntah rangaa tangle, Kasagah puiditei gohda tam rali pyilo.

title: LET THE BLESSED SUNSHINE IN
details:
. (SS.795) ECCLES.11:7. ADA BLENKHORN. CHAS H.
GABRIEL.
DOH IS AB.
lyrics:
1. Ngoukarou saryi mei gotei hingtangpo? Kamyitei golungki keibamhum tangpo? Golung
kamyiteido disa latpyilo, Kavaitei latmatulo.

Kavaitei liitmatulo….. kavaitei liitmatulo….. Golung kamwi tei disanii latpyilo, Kavaitei
liitmatulo.

2. Goma malum nang nkii humlei takpo? Goma rata sating gamto ke makpo? Golung
kamyiteido disa latpyilo, Kavaitei latmatulo.

3. Nang ntahsa doi ntoisa lattangpo? Gongtang karam kamyi gotei hingmakpo? Golung
kamyi teido disa latpyilo, Kavaitei liitmatulo.

title: THE GOLDEN SHORE
details:
.(SS.509) REV.22:21 REV. C DUNSAR. W.B. BRADBURN.
DOH IS D
lyrics:
1. Nyina jaikadi pouryito malyi hoisa tatleile. Jei kuto kee kaleinitei gongtang karam
hoileile.

Tingkei tingrot kahung maju chii, Malyi keikabam nitei gongkabuitei tchiisa, Nyihangna
malyitei hoisa leile, Teikitei gong dichii kalaktei, Mangeisa lungtutangle.

2. Jai kaditei meitang tang majupat wosa leitakle, Teibamkitei meitang tang bamsong kisa
tchiidekbamle.

3. Sating gamto tingkei guilei hoikalanglo malyitei, Ahnyi hangna tchiikapyipii liitei ntahsa
tchiile.

4. Bamkitei nyihang pihwodichii meihangna saatangle, Nyihangna liitchiisa sating gam
ntahsa roitangle.

title: MEET MOTHER IN THE SKIES
details:
(C.H. 163) W.S. NICKLE
KEY A
lyrics:
1. Gohpwi mah rowtei mile tangtang diisa lei, Poigoi eitakle, lungkasyi gohpwi tei, Gohmah
lungkasyi lattei mangei wolak, Lungkasyi gohpwi sating gamto ngoutang.

Gohpwina latsa leile gongliit losa, Kataangka n'noutaksa latsa leile, Sating gamto bamsa
n'goh koisa lei, Lungkasyi gohpwi sating gamto ngoutang,

2. Sazyi pouryi toisa mangai eikido, Gohlung kasyitei pyisana leihumle, Ntahsa leihumtang
gohpwi namkitei, Lungkasyi gohpwi sating gamto doutang.

3. Jesugo kasangpii lungkapyi meihang, Nyihang mah kaset Ahna pungpyi takle, Ahna nyigo
keipyi nesa koisa lei. Keipyisa sating gamki pangkii pyitang.

title: THE LILY OFTHE VALLEY
details:
. (SS.104) SOLOMON.2:1. C.W.FRY (BY PER) IRA.D.SANKEY.
DOH IS F.
lyrics:
1. Jesukum kang kaki gah, maiting kaki Ahle, Ahna tang kyarii songdo ngoubikile, Ngou kabi
ningki hiipai, ngoukabi Ahteile N'goh kem kiteito tchii mateipyilo.

Hiipai tei poi sadaa ki Jesuna bikile, Tamwo kalak gah Jesuna kile Pumpiina hiipai songkile,
Sageiti ting tangpwi, Hiipai tang tang songdo Ahna ngoubile.

2. Gohmah kamage hang gahpyi, kemhangtei pung pyile, Kahem kiteito Ahna n'goh keipyi,
Gohmah matum Ahda pyitak, Kemkito keipyisii, Ahmah teimahumpii n'go jupyile.

3. Ahna n'goh toisang toilak, N'goh mpatpyilak, Malumsa Pumpii sam suikalei tatei, Kahem
gohda gongkido, I hingtang karam gah, Rangii karing chiitak pyisa makotpyi.

title: ROCK OFAGES !
details:
(SS.1189) A.M. TOPLADY. E.O. EXCELL
DOH IS D FLAT. Saprano prominent.
lyrics:
1. Kalui kagah tukadi, Kabei pyilo godaka, Gopum kito kapat zai, Longkalei dwitei piina,
Gohkem tchii magah pyilo, Syi mateisa poipyilo. Gohkem tchii magah pyilo, Syi mateisa
poipyilo.

2. Ngamtei tchiisa leikido, Midwi patsa leikido, Ahsam sui kasukito, Ngamtei tchiisa leikido,
Pumpii Jesu roinale, Gohkem gahpyi kabuitei. Pumpii Jesu roinale, Gohkem gahpyi kabuitei.

3. Pumpiida liittang karam, Samakado poimakle, Tikasu sating gamto, Sam tchiitang karam
kitei, Pumpiina lungsyi suchii, Kemkito Itai tangle. Pumpiina lungsyi suchii, Kemkito Itai
tangle.

4. Taitang karam maningsa Samakado poisupii, Pumpii Crossgo maningsa, Keipyitang
karam jaangpii, Kalui kagah tukadi, Kabei pyilo godahka. Kalui kagah tukadi, Kabei pyilo
godaka.

title: GREAT IS THY FAITHFULNESS
details:
. (C.W.165) LEM. 3:22,23 THOMAS O.CHISHOLM,1866-
WILLIAM M. RUNYAN,1870
KEY E FLAT. In moderate time, with dignity
lyrics:
1. Gomah Bangpii, Sating gammah goh Bangpii! Goma kakum kasang katu gahle, Kamyi
sumto swikak sana kalei Godato diisana leituh takle.

Kamaning kalimak, tamkalei toisupii: Tingchoi tatei lungkasyi leihumle: Sating katai n’goh
koipyihum siilei, Tam kalei samtei suisa leihumle.

2. Katchiih majung tinglang tingkam katangpii, Leimik, Sakii, Sageina tammatoi, Sazyi
pouryi kalei rangii kapunghang, Sagei hiinii hiipai teinado toih.

3. Keikapyido majungsa lungset teido, Lungkasyido kalui gahhum tangle, Sating kiita ntah
wokabui tchiipyi, Ngoutang kalak goh

title: THE HOME-LAND SHORE
details:
. (S. S. 971) IS. 35: 10. MISS FANNY J. CROSBY,1820-1915 S. C.
FOSTER.
KEY D.
lyrics:
1. Sazyyi pouryi kalak kaniih tei, Maju eichii, Kalui kagah zang kazyi bamki Chistian mei
pihtangle.

Teiki kachiih kaniih gah, Lung kamage gahle, Tei namki gong kalu mei hangtei, Zang jyisa
lung tangle.

2. Gohdoi reisa tat katu meihang, Tei namki lei, I-Ahsam tchiigatpii suidichii Ahnyigo ngou
tangle.

3. Keikapyi dou katu meihang tei, Sating gamto, Bangpii Jesuna ahnyi mikdwi, Piit matang
pyi tangle.

4. Jesu go malum kasu meitei Bam dou lakle, Ahgo malum kalu meihang tei, Zang kajyi bam
doutang.

title: GOD CALLING
details:
(C.H. 205) J. B. JOHN BORTHWICK.
KEY A b
lyrics:
1. Bangpiina n’go lat leile, Kemkito nang bamsa leitangpo? Tinglangna meigo koi makle, Go
rangii zyisa lei tangpo?

Bang . .........piina lat .........lei N’ ..............go latlei. Ei .............toido lat ............lei Kem meigo latsa
leile.

2. Nang Jesu teih suinyi makpo? Nang Bangpii lattei shiinyi makpo? Lat manoisa latsa leile,
Bangpiina eitoido latlei.

3. Bangpiina lungsyisa latlei, Kem kito bamsa leijou depo? Lungkasyipa latloi leile, Go rangii
lak mataang takle.

4. Nang sui karou tei tchiisulo, Nang lung mateihsa Ahteih suilo, Sazyi pouryi ngam toi eisa,
Ahsam suilo Ahteih suilo.

title: LORD, DISMISS US
details:
. (S. S. 287) EPH. 1: 3. REV. J. FAWCETT, 1740-1817 W. L. VINER.
KEY A.
lyrics:
1. Bangpii! satoi pa mpatpyi, Nyilung ki majung pyilo. Golung kasyi leimatulo. Lungset paito
ngam tangle. Nyigo tchiiranu pyiloi lo; Sazyi marong ki tatlei.

2. Hakalaang pyisa matalei, Go sampou kabi jangpa. Goma keikapyi ati tei, Nyilung tokryi
matulo; Ahsam swisa ahsam swisa, Kasang to nyigo ngoutang.

3. Golung kasyipa kalat kak, Sazyi pouryi toi eitang; Katai kahing nii ngamlak, Goma kalat
koi shiisa. Kalui gahsa, kalui gahsa, Christago kasui lungtang.

title: NAILED TO THE CROSS
details:
. (A. H. 54) MRS. FRANK A. BRECK. GRANT C. TULLAR. FRED P.
MORRIS.
KEY F. Alto and Tenor
lyrics:
1. Kem kapung n’goh keipyi tang karam jangpa Cross gamto katai hingpyi makle Samakado
kasumei gohjang teipiinii, Pi-ba ki jotpyi gee keibamle.

Gohkem gah pyitakle, gohkem gah pyitakle. Daziikii moikido keipyile. Tamwo kalak, kalak
kanhii gah pyisanii Calvary gamto kem gah pyile.

2. Bangpiina lungkasyi ei kamadat teile Gohkem ei Ahna shyitoi pyile Keipyitakle, toisekpii
kem mei laktakle Crossnii sazyi pou tchii n-noule.

3. Cross paryito gohkem tei tiimaga pyile Toinii goh hemloiwolak takle Jesuna cross kito
matum keipyisanii Sating gam tei pangkiih pyi takle.

title: THERE IS A GATE
details:
. ((S.S. 372) REV. 21: 25. MRS. LYDIA BAXTER,1809-1874 S. J.
VAIL,1818-1884
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. Kavai kongmui hangnina lei, Ahma kavai teipanii, Cross mah kavai maang pyisana
Mangoupyi keikapyi pii.

Oh, lungkasyi mah paikito, Inii teiki liitwo buipo? Gohma, gohma, kamui tei latbampo?

2. Kongmui teimah amee tchiimak, Ahgo kafii meihang na; Kani kagah kacheng kadi, Meilui
matumpii liitbui.

3. Kongmui tei latpyi wosana, Doilam pang tatpat tulo, Cross pungsa pyihung tei poilo,
Lungkasyi mah kapyile.

4. Nyihangna pungkalei Cross ei, Poimang matou eisekchii, Rangii mah pyihung keiwosa,
Bangpii go lungsyi kitang.

title: ONLY A SINNER
details:
. (M.H. 251) I COR. 15 : 10. JAMES M. GRAY.1851-1935 D. B.
TOWNER,1850-1919
KEY C.
lyrics:
1. I lyisa makle, matah pii doule, Kamalum paito lungset tei pyile; I det katchiini gahsang
gahle, Kem tchiisa lei lungset pii keipyi.

Kem kapung n’goh keipyile Lungsetpii n’goh keiwole; Bangpii Ahzheigo sagoisa toitulo,
Kemmei n’goh lungsetpii keipyi
2.Swi kagah kito kem tchii hingmakle, Bangpii go timak, diisa tattutak; Doi bigat sanii Jesu
fiihpyi, Kem tchiisa leikido magah pyi

3. Hatsa leikido atei gahsang gah, Keipyi sudichii tai eitang takle; I sat wolakle Bangpii
doito, Teikido eitoinii keipyi tak.
4.Kem kapung meihang gohrasam shiilo, Keikapyi lungkasyi jang teipanii, Inii tikalu tei
tamleile, Dajiikii kem tchiido keipyi tang

title: JESUS, BELOVED OF MY HEART
details:
. (S.S. 646) "MY BELOVED IS MINE, AND I AM HIS" -
CANTICLES II.16. GEO. D. MACKAY. GEO. C. STERBINS.
DOH IS C.
lyrics:
1. Jesu Ina lungkasyipii Go lungset I saryisa lei; Nangnii lungsyisa goh jangpa, Kisa n’goh
koipyi humlo.

Meikating kee mareikido, Sona namdi ngoubikido; I ngoukabi go mareimak Gohbam tei
stinggamki lei

2. Sazyi pou lungkasyi kadi, Golung kasyi teinii kile; Nyi mik hang stinggam julei; I nii goju
dadou ngoutang.

3. Paradise hangka ntahdo’ Hiipaina hangka ngoubido, Sona kongmui sating luihang Songdo
kisa nyigo lungsyi.

title: HOME OF THE SOULS
details:
. (AACH 278) "MY BELOVED IS MINE, AND I AM HIS" -
CANTICLES II.16. JAME HOWE SAMUEL W. BEAZLEY
DOH IS G.
lyrics:
1. Kaset kalak maning dichii, Nga ka ngah lui eisana, Goh rangii ntak doutangle, Bangpii
peebang teito.

Ngoukabi ma ……. Kee nina lei….. Kaset kalak ………. Tikasu bam ….. Ntah rangaa ……… nyina
lungtang…… Jesu sekpa ………... kavai tangle…….. Sazyi pouryi……… mage kido……….

Tinglang tanglak….. thangkei lakle……. Keikapyi meima kee tei vaimarang kalei sazyito.

2. Kalui-gahlak, ntak tutang, Bangpiima naamei hannggo; N’gi ragi leiloi keilak, Lungkasyi
sazyito.

3. Ngou kabima tingchoi lamtei, Nyima keetei ngoutangle Doukasuta Jesu Ahgo, Bangpiigo
toisulo.

4. Sana karyi kaipat wosa, Kadaa katchii namdito, Nyihang kadouloi keitangle, Nyihang
n’nouloi lakle.

title: WASHED IS THE BLOOD OFTHE LAMB
details: (S.S. 1021) REV. 1:5. T.C. O'K. T.C. O'KANE
lyrics:
KEY C.
1.Katai kamoi to satkalei gonyi Taata kadopo taitang karam mei? Jesu Zhei tei ratasa, Rangii
katai gahtangle
Satinggam karing kamuiki liitang karam, Jao zeiteipii shyi eilo, Satinggam karing kamuiki
liitang karam, Jao zeiteipii shyi eilo.
2.Chiina douto Jesu kafii meitei, Jesu dousa swirek doukalu mei; Bangpanii lungsyi pyile, Jao
zeiteipii shyipyile.
3.Kalak kaniih kadou meihang teido, Jesu doukalu kito ntahle, Lungtei tchiimatei pyile, Jao
zeiteipii shyi pyile.
4.Satinggam bamki pihkalu kitei, Kalak kaniih katai kachiih gahtang; Eitoina ntah takle, Jao
zeiteipii shyi takle.

title: YE MUST BE BORN AGAIN
details:
. (S.S. 366) JN. 3:3. W.T. SLEEPER,1819-1904 GEO. C.
STEBBINS,1846-1945
KEY E FLAT.
lyrics:
1. Tinghum Nicodimas Jesuda gong, Kalui kagah kavai puidi n’nhiile; Kasang samtei
Bangpiina tampyi takle, “Nang manaloi keilo”. “Nang manaloi keilo” (2times) Ina kasang
samtei goda tamleile, “Nang manaloi keilo.”

2. Meilui kalung hang katam sam shiilo, Hangkapii lungsyisa Jesuna katam. Kabi samtei
matapii magasulo, “Nang manaloi keilo.”

3. N’tah ranga doutang karam meihang,, Bangpiigo kasuisa liitei tchiitangle, Kalui kagah
karing tei nang dounyichii, “Nang manaloi keilo.”

4. Sating gam Bangpiina golung ngounyi, Sating gam kamuito n’go koisa lei; Kamatei bungki
zhei ryikei pyitangle, “Nang manaloi keilo.”

title: JESUS, THINE ALL-VICTORIOUS LOVE
details:
. ((S.S. 187) EPH. 3: 19. C. WESLEY,1707-1788
DR. T. HASTINGS,1784-1872
KEY A. Moderato
lyrics:
1. Jesu gomah lungkasyi tei, Gohlungki liit bampyi, Gohlung swi kaliloi lakle, Bangpii da
liitwosa. (2Times)

2. He rangii kamatei mah mee, Masoi makiih pyilo; Kem matumpii rutoi pyilo, Rangii tei
mangpyilo. (2 Times)

3. Pentecost ki kahum kiimpii, Gohkem tei rupyilo, Rangii matei n’go latlei, Meepai kumpii
humlo. (2 Times)

4. Kamatei meepai teikiimpii Goh rangii vaipyilo; Golung matum madam piina, Tchiimatei,
vaipyilo. (2 Times)

title: WE, THREE KINGS OF ORIENTS ARE
details:
(CW 204, AACH 248; MATT 2:9 JOHN H. HOPKINS
J.H. HOPKINS
KEY G.
lyrics:
1. Leimik kapat lamto sagong Mai kating pot poisa gong Azang ningkam karyi daziika
kaisanii gongle.

Oh, Vaikalei sageiti tei! Sagongmah sageiti tei! Sagong Ahnaa ma kalung bamni Kaliit lam
pangliitpyi.

2. Sagong Bethlehem to manah Nyihang sona poigongpyi; Kalui kaga tchiisupa Ahna Sagong
tang takle.

3. Keirum kabi pot poi gongpyi , Lungkasyi Thao poi gongpyi; Meihang toitangle Kaki
kisang Bangpii ma naago!

4. Juhlo, madat kalei takle! Sagong naatei manah tak; Ntah lii tchiitulo Sazyipou hang shii
matulo.

title: DOXOLOGY
details:
. (GGSH. 14) THOMAS KEN,1637-1711 From the GENEVAN PSALTER. Arr.
by LOUIS BROUGEOIS.
KEY G
lyrics:
1. Sating sazyi matum hangna Bangpii gotei ratatude; Ahzhei kadi tammatoilo, Apfii Anaa
Rangii matei, Amen.

title: CHRISTMAS
lyrics:
1. Kamyisumto kalei meihangna, Kavai kadi hangnina ngoutakle, Myibung bungsa lungsa
kaleimeigo, Kavai teipii vaipyi takle.

Bangpiina meilui moiki matule Ntahdo ntah matule.

2. Rachetkatu tinglangki ka ntah kumpii, Meihangna rangaasa ntahle.

Kadapoka nyijaangpii Naasafii mpou hangnina lungpyi takle; Hang paryito Ahna Sagong
tangle.

3. Ahzhei doi nzangkapyi Teimahum kalei Pumpii, Katai kagah tchiikasu Apfii, Steichii
kamajung Sagong naa lattangle
Ahna Sagong katukak, Kamajung kaluikagah tchiilakle Bangpiina gongtang matutangle.

title: CHRISTMAS
lyrics:
1. Nyipfii teimahum kaleipii, Naa sapii mpou Jesu Khristago sazyi pouryika maangkapyi,
sapwimei Hangnina dato lungkapyi nyigo chiilung kasatei Kapyi Pumpii gotei.

Ahzheitei kisa dikiih matulo.

2. Oh Jesu Khrista kinaapfii hangnina jeitchiisa Sazyi pouryi meijeilui kumpii kalungpii
gotei.

Ahzhei tei kisa dikiih matulo.

3. Oh rangii kamatei Maryda humsa, Naasapii mei Hangnina lungtanglesa tamkapyi piigotei;
